```{r build_dunnEndline_function}
dialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

statedunnYr1 <- dunnTest(VarItem1 ~ State_f, data=StatDF1, method="bonferroni")

statedunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ State_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

## add LocationTypeDesc to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[1,1] <- "Location Type"
dunnTestMasterTable[,2:3] <- locationdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,4] <- locationdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[,5] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,6] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add SES composite to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[4,1] <- "SES Composite"
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,2:3] <- sesdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,4] <- sesdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,5] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,6] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[7,1] <- "Dialect"
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,2:3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,5] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,6] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add state dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[10,1] <- "State"
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,2:3] <- statedunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,4] <- statedunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,5] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,6] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
dunnTestMasterTable <- dunnTestMasterTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- flextable(dunnTestMasterTable)

## set format of flextable
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- autofit(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- add_header_row(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, values = c(sectionTitle), colwidths = c(6), top = TRUE)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- height(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, height = .08)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=1, 1)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=2, 2)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=3, .8)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=4, .8)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=5, .8)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=6, .8)

flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- fontsize(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 3:6, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 3:6, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- valign(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = NULL, part = "all", valign = "top")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 14, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 3)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 6)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 9)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bold(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bold(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, ~ ((`Year 1 P.adj` < 0.05) & (`Year 2 P.adj` < 0.05)), j=2:6, bold=TRUE)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- fix_border_issues(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable
}
```

```{r build_dunnEndline_subsection_function}
build_dunnEndline_subsection_function <- function(df, mean_item_var2, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_dunnEndline_subsection_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, EL2EGRAPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for EGRA Percent Gain for Demographic Categories with more than 2 Categories')

## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)

StatDF2 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem2'=!!mean_item_var2, LocationTypeDesc_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, Languages2_f, State_f)

dunnTestMasterTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=3, ncol = 4))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dunnTestMasterTable) <- c("Group", "Comparison", "Year 2 Z-statistic", "Year 2 P.adj")

locationdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

sesdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

statedunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ State_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

## add LocationTypeDesc to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[1,1] <- "Location Type"
dunnTestMasterTable[,2:3] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,4] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add SES composite to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[4,1] <- "SES Composite"
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,2:3] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,4] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[7,1] <- "Dialect"
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,2:3] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,4] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add state dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[10,1] <- "State"
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,2:3] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,4] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
dunnTestMasterTable <- dunnTestMasterTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- flextable(dunnTestMasterTable)

## set format of flextable
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- autofit(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- add_header_row(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, values = c(sectionTitle), colwidths = c(4), top = TRUE)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- height(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, height = .08)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=1, 1)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=2, 2)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=3, .8)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- width(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, j=4, .8)

flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- fontsize(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 3:4, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- align(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = 3:4, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- valign(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = NULL, j = NULL, part = "all", valign = "top")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bg(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 14, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 3)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 6)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- hline(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, i = 9)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bold(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- bold(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable, ~ (`Year 2 P.adj` < 0.05), j=2:4, bold=TRUE)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable <- fix_border_issues(flexdfdunnTestMasterTable)
flexdfdunnTestMasterTable
}
```



```{r build_dunnMidlinedf_function}
build_dunnMidlinedf_function <- function(df, mean_item_var1, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_dunnMidlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, EGRAPCTGain, 'Student Dunn Test Results for EGRA Percent Gain for Demographic Categories with more than 2 Categories')

## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var1 <- enquo(mean_item_var1)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var1, LocationTypeDesc_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, Languages2_f, State_f)

dunnTestMasterTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=15, ncol = 4))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dunnTestMasterTable) <- c("Group", "Comparison", "Z-Statistic",  "P.adj")

locationdunn <- dunnTest(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data=StatDF, method="bonferroni")

sesdunn <- dunnTest(VarItem ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data=StatDF, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunn <- dunnTest(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF, method="bonferroni")

statedunn <- dunnTest(VarItem ~ State_f, data=StatDF, method="bonferroni")

## add LocationTypeDesc to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[1,1] <- "Location Type"
dunnTestMasterTable[,2:3] <- locationdunn[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,4] <- locationdunn[[2]][4]

## add SES composite to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[4,1] <- "SES Composite"
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,2:3] <- sesdunn[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,4] <- sesdunn[[2]][4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[7,1] <- "Dialect"
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,2:3] <- dialectdunn[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,4] <- dialectdunn[[2]][4]

## add state dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[10,1] <- "State"
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,2:3] <- statedunn[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,4] <- statedunn[[2]][4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
dunnTestMasterTable <- dunnTestMasterTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

dunnTestMasterTable
}
```

```{r build_dunnEndlinedf_function}
build_dunnEndlinedf_function <- function(df, mean_item_var1, mean_item_var2, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_dunnEndlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEmpathy, EL2Empathy, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Demographic Categories with more than 2 Categories')

## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var1 <- enquo(mean_item_var1)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)

StatDF1 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem1'=!!mean_item_var1, LocationTypeDesc_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, Languages2_f, State_f)

StatDF2 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem2'=!!mean_item_var2, LocationTypeDesc_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, Languages2_f, State_f)

dunnTestMasterTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=3, ncol = 6))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dunnTestMasterTable) <- c("Group", "Comparison", "Year 1 Z-statistic", "Year 1 P.adj", "Year 2 Z-statistic", "Year 2 P.adj")

locationdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(VarItem1 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data=StatDF1, method="bonferroni")

locationdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

sesdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(VarItem1 ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data=StatDF1, method="bonferroni")

sesdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(VarItem1 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF1, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

statedunnYr1 <- dunnTest(VarItem1 ~ State_f, data=StatDF1, method="bonferroni")

statedunnYr2 <- dunnTest(VarItem2 ~ State_f, data=StatDF2, method="bonferroni")

## add LocationTypeDesc to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[1,1] <- "Location Type"
dunnTestMasterTable[,2:3] <- locationdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,4] <- locationdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[,5] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[,6] <- locationdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add SES composite to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[4,1] <- "SES Composite"
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,2:3] <- sesdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,4] <- sesdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,5] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[4:6,6] <- sesdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[7,1] <- "Dialect"
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,2:3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,5] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[7:9,6] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][4]

## add state dunnTest Result to Master Table
dunnTestMasterTable[10,1] <- "State"
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,2:3] <- statedunnYr1[[2]][1:2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,4] <- statedunnYr1[[2]][4]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,5] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][2]
dunnTestMasterTable[10:15,6] <- statedunnYr2[[2]][4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
dunnTestMasterTable <- dunnTestMasterTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

dunnTestMasterTable
}
```

```{r build_meanLongStudy_function}
build_meanLongStudy_function <- function(df, mean_item_var, sectionTitle){
## call for function build_meanLongStudy_function(Bstudentsurveylong, Equity_Avg, "Equity")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var <- enquo(mean_item_var)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var, BProgramGrade_f)

## Create data frame
dfMeanItemLongStudy <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =4, ncol = 7))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMeanItemLongStudy) <- c("Group", "Sig", "Subgroup", "Abs", "Mean", "SD", "Diff from Overall Mean")

## Retrieve Data
tempMeanBBABProgram <- df %>% group_by(BProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanBBABProgram <- as.data.frame(tempMeanBBABProgram)

## Set row labels 
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Group[1] <- paste("All Longitudinal Study Students", sectionTitle)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Group[2] <- "Program Inclusion"
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Subgroup[2] <- as.character(tempMeanBBABProgram[1,1])
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Subgroup[3] <- as.character(tempMeanBBABProgram[2,1])
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Subgroup[4] <- as.character(tempMeanBBABProgram[3,1])

## calculate base stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant <- tempMean[1,1]
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Mean[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$SD[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate Program Status BAB vs. FormalPrimary based stats(2-4)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Mean[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Mean[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Mean[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$mean[3], sigdig)

tempsdBBABProgram <- df %>% group_by(BProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdBBABProgram <- as.data.frame(tempsdBBABProgram)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$SD[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$SD[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$SD[4] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[3], sigdig)

tempMeanBBABProgram <- tempMeanBBABProgram %>% mutate(Diff = mean - tempMeanConstant)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$`Diff from Overall Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[1], sigdig)
tempMeanBBABProgram <- tempMeanBBABProgram %>% mutate(Diff = mean - tempMeanConstant)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$`Diff from Overall Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[2], sigdig)
tempMeanBBABProgram <- tempMeanBBABProgram %>% mutate(Diff = mean - tempMeanConstant)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$`Diff from Overall Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[3], sigdig)

dfMeanItemLongStudy$Abs[2] <- round(abs(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[1])*100, sigdig3)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Abs[3] <- round(abs(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[2])*100, sigdig3)
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Abs[4] <- round(abs(tempMeanBBABProgram$Diff[3])*100, sigdig3)

BBABProgramNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(BProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
BBABProgramNormality <- as.data.frame(BBABProgramNormality)	
if (BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 && BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[3] > .0)
	{	
		onewayBBABProgram <- aov(VarItem ~ BProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayBBABProgram <- tidy(onewayBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfonewayBBABProgram$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBBABProgram <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ BProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalBBABProgram <- tidy(kruskalBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfkruskalBBABProgram$p.value[1]
	}

dfMeanItemLongStudy$Sig[2] <- BBABProgramPvalue
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Sig[3] <- BBABProgramPvalue
dfMeanItemLongStudy$Sig[4] <- BBABProgramPvalue

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- flextable(dfMeanItemLongStudy)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- autofit(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- merge_at(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=1, j=1:4, part="body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- merge_at(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=2:4, j=2, part="body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- height(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, height= .08)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=1, 1.6)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=2, 0.3)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=3, 1.3)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=4, 1.1)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=5, 0.6)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=6, 0.6)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, j=7, 1.0)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- hline(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=1)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- hline(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=4)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- fontsize(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 4:7, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 1:3, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 4:7, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- valign(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = 2, j = 3:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = 4, j = 3:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- color(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = 1, j=2, color = "white", part = "header")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- color(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=1, j=4, color = "white", part = "all")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- color(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=3, j=4, color = "white", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- color(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=2, j=4, color="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- color(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=4, j=4, color="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- padding(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, ~ `Diff from Overall Mean` > 0 & Abs > 10, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=7)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, ~ `Diff from Overall Mean` < 0 & Abs > 10, bg=lowerselectorcolor, j=7)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- compose(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, ~ Sig < .05 , value = as_paragraph(as_b("*")), j=2)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy <- compose(flexdfMeanItemLongStudy, ~ Sig >= .05, value = as_paragraph(""), j=2)
flexdfMeanItemLongStudy
}
```

```{r build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_Program_function}
## function for programs on socioeconomic variables
build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_Program_function <- function(df, mean_item_var, sectionTitle){
## call for function build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_Program_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndEmpathy_Avg, "Empathy")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var <- enquo(mean_item_var)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var, BABProgram_f)

## Create data frame
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =3, ncol = 5))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Mean", "SD", "p value")

## Retrieve Data
tempMeanProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgram <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgram)

## Retrieve n's for Program type
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% count()
programLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$BABProgram_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$BABProgram_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Group[1] <- paste(sectionTitle)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Group[2] <- "Program Inclusion"
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Subgroup[2] <- programLabel1
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Subgroup[3] <- programLabel2

## calculate base stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant <- tempMean[1,1]
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Mean[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$SD[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate Program Status BAB vs. FormalPrimary based stats(2-4)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Mean[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgram$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Mean[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgram$mean[2], sigdig)

tempsdBBABProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdBBABProgram <- as.data.frame(tempsdBBABProgram)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$SD[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$SD[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[2], sigdig)

BBABProgramNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
BBABProgramNormality <- as.data.frame(BBABProgramNormality)	
if (BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayBBABProgram <- aov(VarItem ~ BABProgram_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayBBABProgram <- tidy(onewayBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfonewayBBABProgram$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBBABProgram <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ BABProgram_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalBBABProgram <- tidy(kruskalBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfkruskalBBABProgram$p.value[1]
	}

dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`p value`[2] <- round(BBABProgramPvalue, sigdig4)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- flextable(dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- autofit(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- height(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, height= .08)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=1, 1.6)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=2, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=3, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=4, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=5, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- hline(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- fontsize(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 4:5, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 1:3, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 4:5, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- valign(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = 2, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- padding(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy
}
```

```{r build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_Program_function}
## function for programs on socioeconomic variables
build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_Program_function <- function(df, mean_item_var, mean_item_var2, sectionTitle){
## call for function build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_Program_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EndEmpathy_Avg, "Empathy")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var <- enquo(mean_item_var)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var2, BABProgram_f)

## Create data frame
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =3, ncol = 7))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Midline Mean", "Midline SD", "Endline Mean", "Endline SD", "p value")

## Retrieve Midline Data
tempMeanMidProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidProgram <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidProgram)

## Retrieve Endline Data
tempMeanProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgram <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgram)

## Retrieve n's for Program type
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% count()
programLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$BABProgram_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$BABProgram_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Group[1] <- paste(sectionTitle)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Group[2] <- "Program Inclusion"
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Subgroup[2] <- programLabel1
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$Subgroup[3] <- programLabel2

## calculate base midline stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant <- tempMean[1,1]
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate base endline stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant <- tempMean[1,1]
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate Midline Program Status BAB vs. FormalPrimary based stats(2-4)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidProgram$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidProgram$mean[2], sigdig)

tempsdBBABProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdBBABProgram <- as.data.frame(tempsdBBABProgram)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Midline SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[2], sigdig)


## calculate Endline Program Status BAB vs. FormalPrimary based stats(2-4)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgram$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgram$mean[2], sigdig)

tempsdBBABProgram <- df %>% group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdBBABProgram <- as.data.frame(tempsdBBABProgram)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`Endline SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdBBABProgram$sd[2], sigdig)

BBABProgramNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(BABProgram_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
BBABProgramNormality <- as.data.frame(BBABProgramNormality)	
if (BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BBABProgramNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayBBABProgram <- aov(VarItem ~ BABProgram_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayBBABProgram <- tidy(onewayBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfonewayBBABProgram$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBBABProgram <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ BABProgram_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalBBABProgram <- tidy(kruskalBBABProgram)
		BBABProgramPvalue <- dfkruskalBBABProgram$p.value[1]
	}

dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy$`p value`[2] <- round(BBABProgramPvalue, sigdig4)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- flextable(dfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- autofit(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- height(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, height= .08)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=2, 1.2)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=3, 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=4, 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=5, 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=6, 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- width(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, j=7, 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- hline(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- fontsize(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 3:7, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- align(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = 3:7, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- valign(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bg(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = 2, j = 3:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- padding(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- bold(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy)
flexdfMeanEndItemOnlyLongStudy
}
```

```{r build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_function long study function}
build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_function <- function(df, mean_item_var, mean_item_var2, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_meanEndline2_psychoSocial_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EndEmpathy_Avg, "Empathy Endline")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var <- enquo(mean_item_var)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var2, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 27, ncol = 7))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Midline Mean", "Midline SD", "Endline Mean", "Endline SD", "p value")

## Retrieve MidlineData for Location Type
tempMeanMidLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidLocationType)

## Retrieve Endline Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Midline data for IDP Family
tempMeanMidIDPFamily <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidIDPFamily <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidIDPFamily)

## Retrieve Endline data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamily <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Midline Data for Gender
tempMeanMidGender <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidGender <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidGender)

## Retrieve Endline Data for Gender
tempMeanGender <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanGender <- as.data.frame(tempMeanGender)

## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Midline Data for Age Group 1
tempMeanMidAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidAgeGroup1)

## Retrieve Endline Data for Age Group 1
tempMeanAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanAgeGroup1)

## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label
tempAgeGroup1N <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")
AgeGroup1Label3 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[3]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Midline data for SES Sum
tempMeanMidSES <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidSES <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidSES)

## Retrieve Endline data for SES Sum
tempMeanSES <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanSES <- as.data.frame(tempMeanSES)

## Retrieve n's for SES Sum and build label
tempSESN <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
SESLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[1]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[1], ")")
SESLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[2]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[2], ")")
SESLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[3]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[3], ")")
SESLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[4]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[4], ")")

## Retrieve Midline data for mother literacy
tempMeanMidMomLit <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidMomLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidMomLit)

## Retrieve Endline data for mother literacy
tempMeanMomLit <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMomLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMomLit)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label
tempMomLitN <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Midline data for father literacy
tempMeanMidDadLit <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidDadLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidDadLit)

## Retrieve Endline data for father literacy
tempMeanDadLit <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanDadLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanDadLit)

## Retrieve n's for Father Literacy and build label
tempDadLitN <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
DadLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[1], ")")
DadLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrive Midline data for lives with other
tempMeanMidLives <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidLives <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidLives)

## Retrive Endline data for lives with other
tempMeanLives <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLives <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLives)

## Retrieve n's for Lives with Other and build label
tempLivesN <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% count()
LivesLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[1]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[1], ")")
LivesLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[2]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Midline data for Languages
tempMeanMidLanguage <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidLanguage)

## Retrieve Endline data for Languages
tempMeanLanguage <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLanguage)

## Retrieve n's for Languages and build label
tempLanguageN <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
LanguageLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[1]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[1], ")")
LanguageLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[2]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[2], ")")
LanguageLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[3]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[3], ")")

## Retrive Midline Data for State
tempMeanMidState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMidState <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMidState)

## Retrive Endline Data for State
tempMeanState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState)

StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")

StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[2] <- "Location Type"

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[3] <- locationTypeLabel2

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[8] <- GenderLabel2

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[9] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[10] <- AgeGroup1Label2

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[11] <- SESLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[12] <- SESLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel3
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel4
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[15] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[15] <- MomLitLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[17] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[17] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[19] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[19] <- LivesLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[21] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[21] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Group[24] <- "State"
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[24] <- StateLabel1
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel3
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base midline stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate base endline stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate Midline Location Type based stats(2-4) for mean_item_var
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLocationType$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLocationType$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLocationType$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Endline Location Type based stats(2-4) for mean_item_var2
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Midline Location Type SD for mean_item_var
tempsdLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempsdLocationType)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Endline Location Type SD for mean_item_var2
tempsdLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempsdLocationType)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between location types
LocationTypeNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormality)
if (LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationType <- aov(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayLocationType <- tidy(onewayLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfonewayLocationType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalLocationType <- tidy(kruskalLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfkruskalLocationType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`p value`[2] <- round(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)

tempsdLives <- as.data.frame(tempsdLives)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[19] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLives$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLives$sd[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between children that live with their parents and those that live with others
LivesNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LivesNormality <- as.data.frame(LivesNormality)
if (LivesNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LivesNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLives <- aov(VarItem ~ StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayLives <- tidy(onewayLives)
		LivesPvalue <- dfonewayLives$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLives <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalLives <- tidy(kruskalLives)
		LivesPvalue <- dfkruskalLives$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`p value`[19] <- round(LivesPvalue, sigdig4)

## Calculate midline Languages2 based stats(21-23) for mean_item_var
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLanguage$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLanguage$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidLanguage$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate endline Languages2 based stats(21-23) for mean_item_var
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate midline Languages2 SD for mean_item_var
tempsdLanguage <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempsdLanguage)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[3], sigdig)

## calculate endline Languages2 SD for mean_item_var
tempsdLanguage <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempsdLanguage)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLanguage$sd[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between Languages2 groups
Languages2Normality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(Languages2_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
Languages2Normality <- as.data.frame(Languages2Normality)
if (Languages2Normality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && Languages2Normality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLanguages2 <- aov(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayLanguages2 <- tidy(onewayLanguages2)
		Languages2Pvalue <- dfonewayLanguages2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLanguages2 <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalLanguages2 <- tidy(kruskalLanguages2)
		Languages2Pvalue <- dfkruskalLanguages2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`p value`[21] <- round(Languages2Pvalue, sigdig4)

## Calculate baseline State based stats(24-27)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidState$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidState$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidState$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanMidState$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate endline State based stats(24-27)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[4], sigdig)

## calculate midline sd state based stats
tempsdState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdState <- as.data.frame(tempsdState)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[3], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Midline SD`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[4], sigdig)

## calculate endline sd state based stats
tempsdState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdState <- as.data.frame(tempsdState)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[1], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[2], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[3], sigdig)
dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[4], sigdig)

StateNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
StateNormality <- as.data.frame(StateNormality)
if (StateNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && StateNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[4] > .05)
	{	
		onewayState <- aov(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayState <- tidy(onewayState)
		StatePvalue <- dfonewayState$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalState <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalState <- tidy(kruskalState)
		StatePvalue <- dfkruskalState$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial$`p value`[24] <- round(StatePvalue, sigdig4)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- flextable(dfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- autofit(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- height(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, height= .08)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=2, 1.2)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=3, 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=4, 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=5, 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=6, 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, j=7, 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=4)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=6)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=8)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=10)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=14)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=16)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=18)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=20)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=23)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- fontsize(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:7, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:7, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- valign(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 2, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 4, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 6, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 8, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 10, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 12, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 14, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 16, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 18, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 20, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 22, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 24, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 26, j = 2:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- padding(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfMidlineMeanPsychoSocial
}
```

```{r build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function long study function}
build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function <- function(df, mean_item_var1, mean_item_var2, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EL2Empathy_Avg, "Empathy Endline")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var1 <- enquo(mean_item_var1)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)

StatDF1 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem1'=!!mean_item_var1, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

StatDF2 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem2'=!!mean_item_var2, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 8))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Year 1 Mean", "Year 1 SD", "Year 1 p value", "Year 2 Mean", "Year 2 SD", "Year 2 p value")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for Program type
tempMeanProgramTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramTypeYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for Pogram type
tempMeanProgramTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramTypeYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Program type
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationTypeYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationTypeYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamilyYr1 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamilyYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamilyYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamilyYr2 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamilyYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamilyYr2)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 Data for Gender
tempMeanGenderYr1 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanGenderYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanGenderYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 Data for Gender
tempMeanGenderYr2 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanGenderYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanGenderYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 Data for Age Group 1
tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr1 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 Data for Age Group 1
tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr2 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanAgeGroup1Yr2)

## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label
tempAgeGroup1N <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")
AgeGroup1Label3 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[3]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for SES Sum
tempMeanSESYr1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanSESYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanSESYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for SES Sum
tempMeanSESYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanSESYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanSESYr2)

## Retrieve n's for SES Sum and build label
tempSESN <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
SESLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[1]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[1], ")")
SESLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[2]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[2], ")")
SESLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[3]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for mother literacy
tempMeanMomLitYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMomLitYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMomLitYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for mother literacy
tempMeanMomLitYr2 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMomLitYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMomLitYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label
tempMomLitN <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for father literacy
tempMeanDadLitYr1 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanDadLitYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanDadLitYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for father literacy
tempMeanDadLitYr2 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanDadLitYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanDadLitYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Father Literacy and build label
tempDadLitN <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
DadLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[1], ")")
DadLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrive Year1 data for lives with other
tempMeanLivesYr1 <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLivesYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLivesYr1)

## Retrive Year2 data for lives with other
tempMeanLivesYr2 <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLivesYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLivesYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Lives with Other and build label
tempLivesN <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% count()
LivesLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[1]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[1], ")")
LivesLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[2]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Year 1 data for Languages
tempMeanLanguageYr1 <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLanguageYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLanguageYr1)

## Retrieve Year 2 data for Languages
tempMeanLanguageYr2 <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLanguageYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLanguageYr2)

## Retrieve n's for Languages and build label
tempLanguageN <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
LanguageLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[1]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[1], ")")
LanguageLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[2]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[2], ")")
LanguageLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[3]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[3], ")")

## Retrive Year 1 Data for State
tempMeanStateYr1 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanStateYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanStateYr1)

## Retrive Year 2 Data for State
tempMeanStateYr2 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanStateYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanStateYr2)

## Retrieve n's for State and build label
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
StateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[2] <- "Program Type"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[2] <- programLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[3] <- programLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[16] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2

dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base year 1 stats
tempMeanYr1 <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanYr1, sigdig)
tempsdYr1 <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempsdYr1)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsdYr1, sigdig)

## calculate base year 2 stats

dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanYr2, sigdig)

tempsdYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempsdYr2)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsdYr2, sigdig)

dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramTypeYr1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramTypeYr1$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate Year 2 Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var2
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramTypeYr2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramTypeYr2$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Year 1 Program Type SD for mean_item_var1
tempsdProgramTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdProgramTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempsdProgramTypeYr1)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramTypeYr1$sd[1], sigdig)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramTypeYr1$sd[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Year 2 Program Type SD for mean_item_var2
tempsdProgramTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdProgramTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempsdProgramTypeYr2)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramTypeYr2$sd[1], sigdig)
dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramTypeYr2$sd[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between progam types Year 1
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- StatDF1 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem1)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr1)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr1 <- aov(VarItem1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF1) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItem1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF1)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 1 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between progam types Year 2
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF2 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem2)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr2)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItem2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF2) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItem2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF2)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]
	}

	group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>%

SESNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(SESNormalityYr1)
if (SESNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && SESNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 && SESNormalityYr1$`p-value`[3] > .05 )

	{

		dfkruskalSESYr1 <- tidy(kruskalSESYr1)
		SESPvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalSESYr1$p.value[1]
	}
```
