```{r build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function long study function}
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem2)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr2)
if (StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05  && StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[3] > .05 && StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[4] > .05)
	{	
		onewayStateYr2 <- aov(VarItem2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF2) 
		dfonewayStateYr2 <- tidy(onewayStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayStateYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItem2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF2)
		dfkruskalStateYr2 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalStateYr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Year 2 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr2, sigdig5)


## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- flextable(dfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial)

## set format of flextables
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- autofit(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
## flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- height(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, height= .08)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=1, 1)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=2, 1)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=3, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=4, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=5, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=6, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=7, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=8, .7)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=3)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=6)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=8)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=10)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=12)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=15)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=17)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=19)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=21)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=24)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- fontsize(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:8, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:8, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- valign(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 2, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 4, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 6, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 8, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 10, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 12, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 14, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 16, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 18, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 20, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 22, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 24, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 26, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 28, j = 2:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- padding(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial <- fix_border_issues(flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfTwoYearMeanPsychoSocial
}
```

```{r build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_function long study function}
build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_function <- function(df, mean_item_var, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_meanEndline_psychoSocial_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndEquity_Avg, "Equity Endline")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var <- enquo(mean_item_var)

StatDF <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 5))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Endline Mean", "Endline SD", "Endline p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMeanProgramType <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType)

## Retrieve n's for Program type
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamily <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Gender
tempMeanGender <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanGender <- as.data.frame(tempMeanGender)

## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Age Group 1
tempMeanAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanAgeGroup1)

## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label
tempAgeGroup1N <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")
AgeGroup1Label3 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[3]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for SES Sum
tempMeanSES <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanSES <- as.data.frame(tempMeanSES)

## Retrieve n's for SES Sum and build label
tempSESN <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
SESLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[1]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[1], ")")
SESLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[2]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[2], ")")
SESLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$SES_Sum_f[3]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for mother literacy
tempMeanMomLit <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanMomLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMomLit)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label
tempMomLitN <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for father literacy
tempMeanDadLit <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanDadLit <- as.data.frame(tempMeanDadLit)

## Retrieve n's for Father Literacy and build label
tempDadLitN <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
DadLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[1], ")")
DadLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrive data for lives with other
tempMeanLives <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLives <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLives)

## Retrieve n's for Lives with Other and build label
tempLivesN <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% count()
LivesLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[1]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[1], ")")
LivesLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[2]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Languages
tempMeanLanguage <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLanguage)

## Retrieve n's for Languages and build label
tempLanguageN <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
LanguageLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[1]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[1], ")")
LanguageLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[2]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[2], ")")
LanguageLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[3]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[3], ")")

## Retrive Data for State
tempMeanState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState)

## Retrieve n's for State and build label
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
StateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[2] <- "Program Type"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[2] <- programLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[3] <- programLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[16] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Group[25] <- "State"
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMean <- df %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean, sigdig)
tempsd <- df %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsd <- as.data.frame(tempsd)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempsd, sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Program Type SD for mean_item_var
tempsdProgramType <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdProgramType <- as.data.frame(tempsdProgramType)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramType$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempsdProgramType$sd[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between progam types
ProgramTypeNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormality)
if (ProgramTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramType <- aov(VarItem ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayProgramType <- tidy(onewayProgramType)
		ProgramTypePvalue <- dfonewayProgramType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalProgramType <- tidy(kruskalProgramType)
		ProgramTypePvalue <- dfkruskalProgramType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalue, sigdig5)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Location Type SD for mean_item_var
tempsdLocationType <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempsdLocationType)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempsdLocationType$sd[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between location types
LocationTypeNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormality)
if (LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationType <- aov(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayLocationType <- tidy(onewayLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfonewayLocationType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalLocationType <- tidy(kruskalLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfkruskalLocationType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig5)


## calculate IDP Family based stats(7-8) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family SD for mean_item_var
tempsdIDPFamily <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdIDPFamily <- as.data.frame(tempsdIDPFamily)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempsdIDPFamily$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempsdIDPFamily$sd[2], sigdig)

##calculate for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between IDP Family types
IDPFamilyNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
IDPFamilyNormality <- as.data.frame(IDPFamilyNormality)
if (IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayIDPFamily <- aov(VarItem ~ IDPFamily_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayIDPFamily <- tidy(onewayIDPFamily)
		IDPFamilyPvalue <- dfonewayIDPFamilyp.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalIDPFamily <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ IDPFamily_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalIDPFamily <- tidy(kruskalIDPFamily)
		IDPFamilyPvalue <- dfkruskalIDPFamily$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[7] <- specify_decimal(IDPFamilyPvalue, sigdig5)

## calculate Gender based stats(9-10) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanGender$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanGender$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Gender SD for mean_item_var
tempsdGender <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdGender <- as.data.frame(tempsdGender)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempsdGender$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempsdGender$sd[2], sigdig)

## check for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between Gender types
GenderNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(Gender_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
GenderNormality <- as.data.frame(GenderNormality)
if (GenderNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && GenderNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayGender <- aov(VarItem ~ Gender_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayGender <- tidy(onewayGender)
		GenderPvalue <- dfonewayGender$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalGender <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ Gender_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalGender <- tidy(kruskalGender)
		GenderPvalue <- dfkruskalGender$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[9] <- specify_decimal(GenderPvalue, sigdig5)

## Calculate Age Group 1 based stats(11-12) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanAgeGroup1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanAgeGroup1$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Age Group 1 SD for mean_item_var
tempsdAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempsdAgeGroup1)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempsdAgeGroup1$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempsdAgeGroup1$sd[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between agegroup1 

AgeGroup1Normality <- StatDF %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
AgeGroup1Normality <- as.data.frame(AgeGroup1Normality)
if (AgeGroup1Normality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && AgeGroup1Normality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayAgeGroup1 <- aov(VarItem ~ AgeGroup1_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayAgeGroup1 <- tidy(onewayAgeGroup1)
		AgeGroup1Pvalue <- dfonewayAgeGroup1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalAgeGroup1 <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ AgeGroup1_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalAgeGroup1 <- tidy(kruskalAgeGroup1)
		AgeGroup1Pvalue <- dfkruskalAgeGroup1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[11] <- specify_decimal(AgeGroup1Pvalue, sigdig5)

# Calculate SES based stats(13-15) for mean_item_var
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanSES$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanSES$mean[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanSES$mean[3], sigdig)


## calculate SES SD for mean_item_var
tempsdSES <- df %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdSES <- as.data.frame(tempsdSES)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempsdSES$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempsdSES$sd[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempsdSES$sd[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between SES groups
SESNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
SESNormality <- as.data.frame(SESNormality)
if (SESNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && SESNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewaySES <- aov(VarItem ~ SES_Sum_f, data = StatDF)

	{

		dfkruskalSES <- tidy(kruskalSES)
		SESPvalue <- dfkruskalSES$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[13] <- specify_decimal(SESPvalue, sigdig5)

## Calculate Mother's Literacy based stats(16-17) for mean_item_var

## Calculate Father's Literacy based stats(18-19) for mean_item_var

DadLitNormality <- as.data.frame(DadLitNormality)
if (DadLitNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && DadLitNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var

## calculate lives with other SD for mean_item_var

tempsdLanguage <- as.data.frame(tempsdLanguage)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between Languages2 groups
Languages2Normality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(Languages2_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
Languages2Normality <- as.data.frame(Languages2Normality)
if (Languages2Normality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && Languages2Normality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLanguages2 <- aov(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayLanguages2 <- tidy(onewayLanguages2)
		Languages2Pvalue <- dfonewayLanguages2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLanguages2 <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalLanguages2 <- tidy(kruskalLanguages2)
		Languages2Pvalue <- dfkruskalLanguages2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[22] <- specify_decimal(Languages2Pvalue, sigdig5)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[3], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline Mean`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState$mean[4], sigdig)

tempsdState <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(sd = sd(!!mean_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempsdState <- as.data.frame(tempsdState)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[1], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[2], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[3], sigdig)
dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline SD`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempsdState$sd[4], sigdig)

StateNormality <- StatDF %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
StateNormality <- as.data.frame(StateNormality)
if (StateNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && StateNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[4] > .05)
	{	
		onewayState <- aov(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF) 
		dfonewayState <- tidy(onewayState)
		StatePvalue <- dfonewayState$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalState <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF)
		dfkruskalState <- tidy(kruskalState)
		StatePvalue <- dfkruskalState$p.value[1]
	}	

dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial$`Endline p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalue, sigdig5)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- flextable(dfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial)

## set format of flextables
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- autofit(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- merge_at(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=14:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- height(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, height= .08)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=1, 1.6)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=2, 2)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=3, 0.9)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=4, 0.9)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- width(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, j=5, 0.9)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=3)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=6)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=8)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=10)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=12)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=15)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=17)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=19)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=21)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- hline(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=24)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- fontsize(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- flextable::align(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- align(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- valign(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 2, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 4, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 6, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 8, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 10, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 12, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 14, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 16, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 18, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 20, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 22, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 24, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 26, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bg(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 28, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- color(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 1, j=2, color = "white", part = "header")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- padding(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- bold(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial <- fix_border_issues(flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial)
flexdfEndlineOneYearMeanPsychoSocial
}
```

```{r build_meanendlineEE_2Ages_function long study}
## used for both BAB and Formal Primary at midline
build_meanEndlineEE_2Ages_function <- function(df, mean_item_var1, mean_item_var2, mean_item_var3, mean_item_var4, mean_item_var5, mean_item_var6, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_meanEndlineEE_2Ages_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRAPCTGain, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var1 <- enquo(mean_item_var1)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)
mean_item_var3 <- enquo(mean_item_var3)
mean_item_var4 <- enquo(mean_item_var4)
mean_item_var5 <- enquo(mean_item_var5)
mean_item_var6 <- enquo(mean_item_var6)

StatDF6 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var6, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMeanEEItem <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 9))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMeanEEItem) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Base Mean", "Mid Mean", "Mid Normalized Gain", "Base Level 2 Mean", "End Level 2 Mean", "End Normalized Gain", "p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMeanProgramType1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType1)
tempMeanProgramType2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType2)
tempMeanProgramType3 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType3)
tempMeanProgramType4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType4<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType4)
tempMeanProgramType5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType5<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType5)
tempMeanProgramType6 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType6<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType6)

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationType1 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType1)
tempMeanLocationType2 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType2)
tempMeanLocationType3 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType3)
tempMeanLocationType4 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType4<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType4)
tempMeanLocationType5 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType5<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType5)
tempMeanLocationType6 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType6<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType6)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamily1 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily1)
tempMeanIDPFamily2 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily2)
tempMeanIDPFamily3 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily3)
tempMeanIDPFamily4 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily4 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily4)
tempMeanIDPFamily5 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily5 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily5)
tempMeanIDPFamily6 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily6 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily6)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label

## Set row labels 
dfMeanEEItem$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMeanEEItem$Group[2] <- "Program"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[2] <- programTypeLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[3] <- programTypeLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Group[25] <- "State"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMean1 <- df %>% summarise(mean1 = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant1 <- tempMean1[1,1]
tempMean2 <- df %>% summarise(mean2 = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant2 <- tempMean2[1,1]
tempMean3 <- df %>% summarise(mean3 = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant3 <- tempMean3[1,1]
tempMean4 <- df %>% summarise(mean4 = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant4 <- tempMean4[1,1]
tempMean5 <- df %>% summarise(mean5 = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant5 <- tempMean4[1,1]
tempMean6 <- df %>% summarise(mean6 = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant6 <- tempMean4[1,1]

dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean1, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean2, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean3, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean4, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean5, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean6, sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType1$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType2$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType3$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType4$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType5$mean[2], sigdig)


## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanProgramType6$mean[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types 
ProgramTypeNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormality)
if (ProgramTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramType <- aov(VarItem ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayProgramType <- tidy(onewayProgramType)
		ProgramTypePvalue <- dfonewayProgramType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalProgramType <- tidy(kruskalProgramType)
		ProgramTypePvalue <- dfkruskalProgramType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalue, sigdig4)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType1$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType1$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType2$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType2$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType3$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType3$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType4$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType4$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType5$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType5$mean[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType6$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLocationType6$mean[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormality)
if (LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationType <- aov(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLocationType <- tidy(onewayLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfonewayLocationType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalLocationType <- tidy(kruskalLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfkruskalLocationType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)
dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[5] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)
dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[6] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(7-8) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily1$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(8-9) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily2$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(8-9) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily3$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(8-9) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily4$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(8-9) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily5$mean[2], sigdig)

## calculate IDP Family based stats(8-9) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanIDPFamily6$mean[2], sigdig)

##calculate for normality and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between IDP Family types
IDPFamilyNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
IDPFamilyNormality <- as.data.frame(IDPFamilyNormality)
if (IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayIDPFamily <- aov(VarItem ~ IDPFamily_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayIDPFamily <- tidy(onewayIDPFamily)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- flextable(dfMeanEEItem)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMeanEEItem <- autofit(flexdfMeanEEItem)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=16:17, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=22:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=25:28, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- height(flexdfMeanEEItem, height= .08)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=1, 1.0)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=2, 1.8)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=3, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=4, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=5, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=6, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=7, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=8, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=9, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=3)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=8)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=10)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=12)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=15)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=19)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=21)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=24)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=28)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- fontsize(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- valign(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 2, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 4, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 6, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 8, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 10, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 12, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 14, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 16, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 18, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 20, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 22, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 24, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 26, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 28, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfMeanEEItem <- padding(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bold(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- compose(flexdfMeanEEItem, ~ `p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`p value`)), j=9)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bold(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMeanEEItem)
flexdfMeanEEItem
}
```

```{r build_medianendlineEE_2Ages_function long study}
## used for both BAB and Formal Primary at midline
build_medianEndlineEE_2Ages_function <- function(df, median_item_var1, median_item_var2, median_item_var3, median_item_var4, median_item_var5, median_item_var6, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_medianEndlineEE_2Ages_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRAPCTGain, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var1 <- enquo(median_item_var1)
median_item_var2 <- enquo(median_item_var2)
median_item_var3 <- enquo(median_item_var3)
median_item_var4 <- enquo(median_item_var4)
median_item_var5 <- enquo(median_item_var5)
median_item_var6 <- enquo(median_item_var6)

StatDF3 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItemYr1'=!!median_item_var3, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

StatDF6 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItemYr2'=!!median_item_var6, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMedianEEItem <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 10))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianEEItem) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Year 1 Base Med", "Year 1 End Med", "Year 1 Norm Gain Med", "Year 1 p value", "Year 2 Base Med", "Year 2 End Med", "Year 2 Norm Gain Med", "Year 2 p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMedianProgramType1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType1)
tempMedianProgramType2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType2)
tempMedianProgramType3 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType3)
tempMedianProgramType4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType4)
tempMedianProgramType5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType5)
tempMedianProgramType6 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType6<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType6)

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMedianLocationType1 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType1)
tempMedianLocationType2 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType2)
tempMedianLocationType3 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType3)
tempMedianLocationType4 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType4)
tempMedianLocationType5 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType5)
tempMedianLocationType6 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType6<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType6)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMedianIDPFamily1 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label

IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Gender

tempMedianGender1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender1)

tempMedianGender4 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender4)

tempMedianGender5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender5)
tempMedianGender6 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender6 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender6)

## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Age Group 1
tempMedianAgeGroup11 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))

LivesLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[2]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Languages

## Retrive data for State

## Retrieve n's for State and build label
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")

StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMedianEEItem$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMedianEEItem$Group[2] <- "Program"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[2] <- programTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[3] <- programTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[16] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[25] <- "State"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMedian1 <- df %>% summarise(median1 = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant1 <- tempMedian1[1,1]
tempMedian2 <- df %>% summarise(median2 = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant2 <- tempMedian2[1,1]
tempMedian3 <- df %>% summarise(median3 = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant3 <- tempMedian3[1,1]
tempMedian4 <- df %>% summarise(median4 = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant4 <- tempMedian4[1,1]
tempMedian5 <- df %>% summarise(median5 = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant5 <- tempMedian4[1,1]
tempMedian6 <- df %>% summarise(median6 = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant6 <- tempMedian4[1,1]

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian1, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian2, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian3, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian4, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian5, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian6, sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var1
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType1$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var2
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType2$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType2$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var3
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType3$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType3$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[2], sigdig)


## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var6
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType6$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType6$median[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types for end of year 1
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr1)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types for end of year 2
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr2)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 1 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormalitYr1 <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormalityYr1)
if (LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationTypeYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayLocationTypeYr1 <- tidy(onewayLocationTypeYr1)
		LocationTypePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayLocationTypeYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationTypeYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalLocationTypeYr1 <- tidy(kruskalLocationTypeYr1)
		LocationTypePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalLocationTypeYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormalityYr2)
if (LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLocationTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayLocationTypeYr2)
		LocationTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayLocationTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6)

## Check for normality year 1 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between SES groups
SESNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
SESNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(SESNormalityYr1)
if (SESNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && SESNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewaySESYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewaySESYr1 <- tidy(onewaySESYr1)
		SESPvalueYr1 <- dfonewaySESYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalSESYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalSESYr1 <- tidy(kruskalSESYr1)
		SESPvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalSESYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[13] <- specify_decimal(SESPvalueYr1, sigdig5)
```
