```{r build_medianendlineEE_2Ages_function long study}
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[4], sigdig)

## Check for normality year 1 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups

StateNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr1)
if (StateNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayStateYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ State_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayStateYr1 <- tidy(onewayStateYr1)
		StatePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayStateYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ State_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalStateYr1 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr1)
		StatePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalStateYr1$p.value
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups

StateNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr2)
if (StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayStateYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayStateYr2 <- tidy(onewayStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayStateYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalStateYr2 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalStateYr2$p.value
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- flextable(dfMedianEEItem)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianEEItem <- autofit(flexdfMedianEEItem)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=16:17, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=22:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=25:28, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- height(flexdfMedianEEItem, height= .08)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=1, 0.9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=2, 1.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=3, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=4, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=5, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=6, 0.7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=7, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=8, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=9, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=10, 0.7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=8)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=10)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=12)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=15)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=17)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=19)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=21)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=24)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=28)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fontsize(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- valign(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 2, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 4, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 6, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 8, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 10, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 12, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 14, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 16, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 18, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 20, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 22, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 24, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 26, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 28, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfMedianEEItem <- padding(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, padding.top = .5, padding.bottom = .5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~ `Year 2 p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 p value`)), j=10)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~ `Year 1 p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 p value`)), j=6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(Subgroup)), j=2)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(Group)), j=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 Base Med`)), j=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 End Med`)), j=4)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`)), j=5)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 Base Med`)), j=7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 End Med`)), j=8)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`)), j=9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianEEItem)
flexdfMedianEEItem
}
```

```{r build_medianendlineEE_subsection_function long study}
## used for both BAB and Formal Primary at midline
build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function <- function(df, median_item_var1, median_item_var2, median_item_var3, median_item_var4, median_item_var5, median_item_var6, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRAPCTGain, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var1 <- enquo(median_item_var1)
median_item_var2 <- enquo(median_item_var2)
median_item_var3 <- enquo(median_item_var3)
median_item_var4 <- enquo(median_item_var4)
median_item_var5 <- enquo(median_item_var5)
median_item_var6 <- enquo(median_item_var6)

StatDF3 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItemYr1'=!!median_item_var3, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

StatDF6 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItemYr2'=!!median_item_var6, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMedianEEItem <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 10))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianEEItem) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Year 1 Base Med", "Year 1 End Med", "Year 1 Norm Gain Med", "Year 1 p value", "Year 2 Base Med", "Year 2 End Med", "Year 2 Norm Gain Med", "Year 2 p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMedianProgramType1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType1)
tempMedianProgramType2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType2)
tempMedianProgramType3 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType3)
tempMedianProgramType4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType4)
tempMedianProgramType5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType5)
tempMedianProgramType6 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType6<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType6)

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMedianLocationType1 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType1)
tempMedianLocationType2 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType2)
tempMedianLocationType3 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType3)
tempMedianLocationType4 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType4)
tempMedianLocationType5 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType5)
tempMedianLocationType6 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType6<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType6)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMedianIDPFamily1 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily1)
tempMedianIDPFamily2 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily2)
tempMedianIDPFamily3 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily3)
tempMedianIDPFamily4 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily4)
tempMedianIDPFamily5 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily5)
tempMedianIDPFamily6 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily6 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily6)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Gender
tempMedianGender1 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender1)
tempMedianGender2 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender2)
tempMedianGender3 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender3)
tempMedianGender4 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender4)
tempMedianGender5 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender5)
tempMedianGender6 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender6 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender6)

## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Age Group 1
tempMedianAgeGroup11 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup11 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup11)
tempMedianAgeGroup12 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup12 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup12)
tempMedianAgeGroup13 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup13 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup13)
tempMedianAgeGroup14 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup14 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup14)
tempMedianAgeGroup15 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup15 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup15)
tempMedianAgeGroup16 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup16 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup16)

## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label
tempAgeGroup1N <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for SES Sum
tempMedianSES1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES1)
tempMedianSES2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES2)
tempMedianSES3 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES3)
tempMedianSES4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES4)
tempMedianSES5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES5)
tempMedianSES6 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES6 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES6)

## Retrieve n's for SES Sum and build label
tempSESN <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
SESLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[1]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[1], ")")
SESLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[2]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[2], ")")
SESLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[3]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for mother literacy
tempMedianMomLit1 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit1)
tempMedianMomLit2 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit2)
tempMedianMomLit3 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit3)
tempMedianMomLit4 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit4)
tempMedianMomLit5 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit5)
tempMedianMomLit6 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit6 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit6)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label
tempMomLitN <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for father literacy
tempMedianDadLit1 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit1)
tempMedianDadLit2 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit2)
tempMedianDadLit3 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit3 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit3)
tempMedianDadLit4 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit4)
tempMedianDadLit5 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit5)

## Set row labels 
dfMedianEEItem$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMedianEEItem$Group[2] <- "Program"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[2] <- programTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[3] <- programTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3

dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[25] <- "State"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMedian1 <- df %>% summarise(median1 = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant1 <- tempMedian1[1,1]
tempMedian2 <- df %>% summarise(median2 = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant2 <- tempMedian2[1,1]
tempMedian3 <- df %>% summarise(median3 = median(!!median_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant3 <- tempMedian3[1,1]
tempMedian4 <- df %>% summarise(median4 = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant4 <- tempMedian4[1,1]
tempMedian5 <- df %>% summarise(median5 = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant5 <- tempMedian4[1,1]
tempMedian6 <- df %>% summarise(median6 = median(!!median_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant6 <- tempMedian4[1,1]

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian1, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian2, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian3, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian4, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian5, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian6, sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var1
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType1$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var2
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType2$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType2$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var3
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType3$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType3$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[2], sigdig)


## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var6
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType6$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType6$median[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types for end of year 1
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr1)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr1)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Replace non-finite values with NA
StatDF6$VarItemYr2[!is.finite(StatDF6$VarItemYr2)] <- NA

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types for end of year 2
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr2)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

LocationTypeNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormalitYr1 <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormalityYr1)
if (LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormalityYr1$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationTypeYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayLocationTypeYr1 <- tidy(onewayLocationTypeYr1)
		LocationTypePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayLocationTypeYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationTypeYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalLocationTypeYr1 <- tidy(kruskalLocationTypeYr1)
		LocationTypePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalLocationTypeYr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormalityYr2)
if (LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6)

IDPFamilyNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(IDPFamilyNormalityYr1)
if (IDPFamilyNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && IDPFamilyNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )

##calculate for normality year 1 and use appropriate test to calculate significant difference in Gains between Gender types
GenderNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(Gender_f) %>%

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage3$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage3$median[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage4$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage4$median[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage5$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage5$median[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for median_item_var6
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage6$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage6$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLanguage6$median[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality  year 1 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between Languages2 groups

Languages2NormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(Languages2_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
Languages2NormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(Languages2NormalityYr1)
if (Languages2NormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && Languages2NormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLanguages2Yr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayLanguages2Yr1 <- tidy(onewayLanguages2Yr1)
		Languages2PvalueYr1 <- dfonewayLanguages2Yr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLanguages2Yr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalLanguages2Yr1 <- tidy(kruskalLanguages2Yr1)
		Languages2PvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalLanguages2Yr1$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[22] <- specify_decimal(Languages2PvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between Languages2 groups

Languages2NormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(Languages2_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
Languages2NormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(Languages2NormalityYr2)
if (Languages2NormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && Languages2NormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLanguages2Yr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLanguages2Yr2 <- tidy(onewayLanguages2Yr2)
		Languages2PvalueYr2 <- dfonewayLanguages2Yr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLanguages2Yr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalLanguages2Yr2 <- tidy(kruskalLanguages2Yr2)
		Languages2PvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalLanguages2Yr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[22] <- specify_decimal(Languages2PvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var1
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState1$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState1$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Base Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState1$median[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var2
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState2$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState2$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState2$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 End Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState2$median[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var3
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState3$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState3$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState3$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 Norm Gain Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState3$median[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState4$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState4$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState4$median[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for median_item_var6
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Norm Gain Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState6$median[4], sigdig)

## Check for normality year 1 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups

StateNormalityYr1 <- StatDF3 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr1)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr1)
if (StateNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayStateYr1 <- aov(VarItemYr1 ~ State_f, data = StatDF3) 
		dfonewayStateYr1 <- tidy(onewayStateYr1)
		StatePvalueYr1 <- dfonewayStateYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr1 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr1 ~ State_f, data = StatDF3)
		dfkruskalStateYr1 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr1)
		StatePvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalStateYr1$p.value
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 1 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr1, sigdig5)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups

StateNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr2)
if (StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayStateYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayStateYr2 <- tidy(onewayStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayStateYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalStateYr2 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalStateYr2$p.value
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## for the SubSection tables Remove columns 5 and 9 from the flextable
dfMedianEEItem <- dfMedianEEItem[, -c(5, 9)]

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- flextable(dfMedianEEItem)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianEEItem <- autofit(flexdfMedianEEItem)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=16:17, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=22:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=25:28, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- height(flexdfMedianEEItem, height= .08)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=1, 0.9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=2, 1.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=3, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=4, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=5, 0.7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=6, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=7, 0.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=8, 0.7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=8)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=10)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=12)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=15)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=17)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=19)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=21)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=24)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=28)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fontsize(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:8, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:8, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- valign(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 2, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 4, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 6, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 8, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 10, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 12, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 14, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 16, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 18, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 20, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 22, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 24, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 26, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 28, j = 3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfMedianEEItem <- padding(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, padding.top = .5, padding.bottom = .5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~ `Year 2 p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 p value`)), j=8)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~ `Year 1 p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 p value`)), j=5)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(Subgroup)), j=2)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(Group)), j=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 Base Med`)), j=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 1 End Med`)), j=4)

flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 Base Med`)), j=7)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05) & (`Year 1 p value`) < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 End Med`)), j=8)

flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianEEItem)


flexdfMedianEEItem
}
```

```{r build_medianendlineEE_subsection2_function long study}
## used for both BAB and Formal Primary at midline
build_medianEndlineEE_subsection2_function <- function(df, median_item_var4, median_item_var5, median_item_var6, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_medianEndlineEE_subsection2_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var4 <- enquo(median_item_var4)
median_item_var5 <- enquo(median_item_var5)
median_item_var6 <- enquo(median_item_var6)

StatDF6 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItemYr2'=!!median_item_var6, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMedianEEItem <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 5))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianEEItem) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Year 2 Base Med", "Year 2 End Med", "Year 2 p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMedianProgramType4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType4)
tempMedianProgramType5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianProgramType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianProgramType5)


## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")
programTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[2]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMedianLocationType4 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType4<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType4)
tempMedianLocationType5 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLocationType5<- as.data.frame(tempMedianLocationType5)


## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMedianIDPFamily4 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily4)
tempMedianIDPFamily5 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianIDPFamily5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianIDPFamily5)


## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Gender
tempMedianGender4 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender4)
tempMedianGender5 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianGender5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianGender5)


## Retrieve n's for Gender and build label
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
GenderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Age Group 1
tempMedianAgeGroup14 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup14 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup14)
tempMedianAgeGroup15 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianAgeGroup15 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianAgeGroup15)


## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label
tempAgeGroup1N <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for SES Sum
tempMedianSES4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES4)
tempMedianSES5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianSES5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianSES5)


## Retrieve n's for SES Sum and build label
tempSESN <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
SESLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[1]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[1], ")")
SESLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[2]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[2], ")")
SESLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempSESN$EL2SES_Sum_f[3]), " (n=", tempSESN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for mother literacy
tempMedianMomLit4 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit4)
tempMedianMomLit5 <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianMomLit5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianMomLit5)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label
tempMomLitN <- df %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for father literacy
tempMedianDadLit4 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit4)
tempMedianDadLit5 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianDadLit5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianDadLit5)


## Retrieve n's for Father Literacy and build label
tempDadLitN <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
DadLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[1], ")")
DadLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempDadLitN$FatherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempDadLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrive data for lives with other
tempMedianLives4 <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLives4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLives4)
tempMedianLives5 <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLives5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLives5)


## Retrieve n's for Lives with Other and build label
tempLivesN <- df %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% count()
LivesLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[1]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[1], ")")
LivesLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLivesN$StudentLivesWithOtherDesc[2]), " (n=", tempLivesN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Languages
tempMedianLanguage4 <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLanguage4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLanguage4)
tempMedianLanguage5 <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianLanguage5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianLanguage5)

## Retrieve n's for Languages and build label
tempLanguageN <- df %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
LanguageLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[1]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[1], ")")
LanguageLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[2]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[2], ")")
LanguageLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[3]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[3], ")")

## Retrive data for State
tempMedianState4 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianState4 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianState4)
tempMedianState5 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianState5 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianState5)

## Retrieve n's for State and build label
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
StateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMedianEEItem$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMedianEEItem$Group[2] <- "Program"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[2] <- programTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[3] <- programTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[16] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[16] <- MomLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Group[25] <- "State"
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfMedianEEItem$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMedian4 <- df %>% summarise(median4 = median(!!median_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant4 <- tempMedian4[1,1]
tempMedian5 <- df %>% summarise(median5 = median(!!median_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant5 <- tempMedian4[1,1]

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian4, sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian5, sigdig)


## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType4$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate Program Type based stats(2-3) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianProgramType5$median[2], sigdig)


## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between program types for end of year 2
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
ProgramTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(ProgramTypeNormalityYr2)
if (ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && ProgramTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05)
	{	
		onewayProgramTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ EL2ProgramGrade_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2 <- tidy(kruskalProgramTypeYr2)
		ProgramTypePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalProgramTypeYr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[2] <- specify_decimal(ProgramTypePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for median_item_var4
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType4$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType4$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 Base Med`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType4$median[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location Type based stats(4-6) for median_item_var5
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType5$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType5$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianLocationType5$median[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormalityYr2)
if (LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormalityYr2$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationTypeYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLocationTypeYr2 <- tidy(onewayLocationTypeYr2)
		LocationTypePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayLocationTypeYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationTypeYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalLocationTypeYr2 <- tidy(kruskalLocationTypeYr2)
		LocationTypePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalLocationTypeYr2$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 End Med`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianState5$median[4], sigdig)

## Check for normality year 2 and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups

StateNormalityYr2 <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItemYr2)$p.value)
StateNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(StateNormalityYr2)
if (StateNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayStateYr2 <- aov(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayStateYr2 <- tidy(onewayStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfonewayStateYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalStateYr2 <- kruskal.test(VarItemYr2 ~ State_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalStateYr2 <- tidy(kruskalStateYr2)
		StatePvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalStateYr2$p.value
	}	

dfMedianEEItem$`Year 2 p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalueYr2, sigdig5)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- flextable(dfMedianEEItem)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianEEItem <- autofit(flexdfMedianEEItem)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=16:17, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=22:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=25:28, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- height(flexdfMedianEEItem, height= .08)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=2, 2.6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=3, 0.9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=4, 0.9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- width(flexdfMedianEEItem, j=5, 0.9)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=6)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=8)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=10)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=12)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=15)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=17)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=19)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=21)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=24)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- hline(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=28)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fontsize(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- align(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- valign(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 2, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 4, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 6, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 8, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 10, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 12, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 14, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 16, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 18, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 20, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 22, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 24, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 26, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bg(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 28, j = 3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfMedianEEItem <- padding(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = NULL, padding.top = .5, padding.bottom = .5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~ `Year 2 p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 p value`)), j=5)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05), value = as_paragraph(as_b(Subgroup)), j=2)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05), value = as_paragraph(as_b(Group)), j=1)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05), value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 Base Med`)), j=3)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- compose(flexdfMedianEEItem, ~  (`Year 2 p value` < .05), value = as_paragraph(as_b(`Year 2 End Med`)), j=4)


flexdfMedianEEItem <- bold(flexdfMedianEEItem, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMedianEEItem <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianEEItem)


flexdfMedianEEItem
}
```



```{r build_meanendlineEEG2_2Ages_function long study}
## used for both BAB and Formal Primary at midline
build_meanEndlineEEG2_2Ages_function <- function(df, mean_item_var1, mean_item_var2, mean_item_var3, mean_item_var4, mean_item_var5, mean_item_var6, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_meanEndlineEEG2_2Ages_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedTriadsSansOutlier, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRAPCTGain, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
mean_item_var1 <- enquo(mean_item_var1)
mean_item_var2 <- enquo(mean_item_var2)
mean_item_var3 <- enquo(mean_item_var3)
mean_item_var4 <- enquo(mean_item_var4)
mean_item_var5 <- enquo(mean_item_var5)
mean_item_var6 <- enquo(mean_item_var6)

StatDF6 <- df %>% dplyr::select('VarItem'=!!mean_item_var6, EL2ProgramGrade_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, IDPFamily_f, Gender_f, AgeGroup1_f, EL2SES_Sum_f, MotherLiteracy_f, FatherLiteracy_f, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, Languages2_f, State_f)

## Create data frame
dfMeanEEItem <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 28, ncol = 9))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMeanEEItem) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Base Mean", "Mid Mean", "Mid Normalized Gain", "Base Level 2 Mean", "End Level 2 Mean", "End Normalized Gain", "p value")

## Retrieve Data for Program Type
tempMeanProgramType1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType1)
tempMeanProgramType2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType2)
tempMeanProgramType3 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType3)
tempMeanProgramType4 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType4<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType4)
tempMeanProgramType5 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType5<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType5)
tempMeanProgramType6 <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanProgramType6<- as.data.frame(tempMeanProgramType6)

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
tempProgramN <- df %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
programTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempProgramN$EL2ProgramGrade_f[1]), " (n=", tempProgramN$n[1], ")")

## Retrieve Data for Location Type
tempMeanLocationType1 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType1)
tempMeanLocationType2 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType2)
tempMeanLocationType3 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType3)
tempMeanLocationType4 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType4<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType4)
tempMeanLocationType5 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType5<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType5)
tempMeanLocationType6 <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanLocationType6<- as.data.frame(tempMeanLocationType6)

## Retrieve n's for Location Type and build label
tempLocationN <- df %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationN$LocationTypeDesc_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve data for IDP Family
tempMeanIDPFamily1 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily1)
tempMeanIDPFamily2 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))

tempMeanIDPFamily6 <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanIDPFamily6 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanIDPFamily6)

## Retrieve n's for IDP Family and build label
tempIDPFamilyN <- df %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
IDPFamilyLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[1]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[1], ")")
IDPFamilyLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempIDPFamilyN$IDPFamily_f[2]), " (n=", tempIDPFamilyN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Gender
tempMeanGender1 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanGender1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanGender1)
tempMeanGender2 <- df %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))

GenderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$Gender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for Age Group 1

tempMeanAgeGroup11 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanAgeGroup11)
tempMeanAgeGroup12 <- df %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for AgeGroup1 and build label

AgeGroup1Label1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[1], ")")
AgeGroup1Label2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroup1N$AgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroup1N$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for SES Sum
tempMeanSES1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))

tempMeanMomLit6 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanMomLit6)

## Retrieve n's for Mother Literacy and build label

MomLitLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[1]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[1], ")")
MomLitLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempMomLitN$MotherLiteracy_f[2]), " (n=", tempMomLitN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve data for father literacy
tempMeanDadLit1 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanDadLit1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanDadLit1)
tempMeanDadLit2 <- df %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))

## Retrive data for lives with other

LanguageLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLanguageN$Languages2_f[3]), " (n=", tempLanguageN$n[3], ")")

## Retrive data for State
tempMeanState1 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState1 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState1)
tempMeanState2 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState2 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState2)
tempMeanState3 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState3 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState3)
tempMeanState4 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState4 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState4)
tempMeanState5 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState5 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState5)
tempMeanState6 <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanState6 <- as.data.frame(tempMeanState6)

## Retrieve n's for State and build label
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
StateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
StateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
StateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
StateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$State_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMeanEEItem$Group[1] <- sectionTitle
dfMeanEEItem$Group[2] <- "Program"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[2] <- programTypeLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[7] <- IDPFamilyLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[8] <- IDPFamilyLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[9] <- "Gender"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[9] <- GenderLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[10] <- GenderLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[11] <- "Age Group"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[11] <- AgeGroup1Label1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[12] <- AgeGroup1Label2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[13] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[13] <- SESLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[14] <- SESLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[15] <- SESLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Group[16] <- "Mother's Literacy"

dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[17] <- MomLitLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[18] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[18] <- DadLitLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[19] <- DadLitLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[20] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[20] <- LivesLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[21] <- LivesLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Group[22] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[22] <- LanguageLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[23] <- LanguageLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[24] <- LanguageLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Group[25] <- "State"
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[25] <- StateLabel1
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[26] <- StateLabel2
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[27] <- StateLabel3
dfMeanEEItem$Subgroup[28] <- StateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMean1 <- df %>% summarise(mean1 = mean(!!mean_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant1 <- tempMean1[1,1]
tempMean2 <- df %>% summarise(mean2 = mean(!!mean_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant2 <- tempMean2[1,1]
tempMean3 <- df %>% summarise(mean3 = mean(!!mean_item_var3, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant3 <- tempMean3[1,1]
tempMean4 <- df %>% summarise(mean4 = mean(!!mean_item_var4, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant4 <- tempMean4[1,1]
tempMean5 <- df %>% summarise(mean5 = mean(!!mean_item_var5, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant5 <- tempMean4[1,1]
tempMean6 <- df %>% summarise(mean6 = mean(!!mean_item_var6, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMeanConstant6 <- tempMean4[1,1]

dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean1, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean2, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean3, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean4, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean5, sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMean6, sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between location types 
LocationTypeNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LocationTypeNormality <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeNormality)
if (LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05  && LocationTypeNormality$`p-value`[3] > .05)
	{	
		onewayLocationType <- aov(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLocationType <- tidy(onewayLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfonewayLocationType$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLocationType <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ LocationTypeDesc_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalLocationType <- tidy(kruskalLocationType)
		LocationTypePvalue <- dfkruskalLocationType$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[4] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)
dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[5] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)
dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[6] <- specify_decimal(LocationTypePvalue, sigdig4)

	group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
IDPFamilyNormality <- as.data.frame(IDPFamilyNormality)
if (IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && IDPFamilyNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayIDPFamily <- aov(VarItem ~ IDPFamily_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayIDPFamily <- tidy(onewayIDPFamily)
		IDPFamilyPvalue <- dfonewayIDPFamily$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{

		IDPFamilyPvalue <- dfkruskalIDPFamily$p.value[1]

SESNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
SESNormality <- as.data.frame(SESNormality)
if (SESNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && SESNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewaySES <- aov(VarItem ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewaySES <- tidy(onewaySES)
		SESPvalue <- dfonewaySES$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalSES <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ EL2SES_Sum_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalSES <- tidy(kruskalSES)
		SESPvalue <- dfkruskalSES$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[13] <- specify_decimal(SESPvalue, sigdig4)
```
