```{r build_meanendlineEEG2_2Ages_function long study}
		dfonewayDadLit <- tidy(onewayDadLit)
		DadLitPvalue <- dfonewayDadLit$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalDadLit <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ FatherLiteracy_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalDadLit <- tidy(kruskalDadLit)
		DadLitPvalue <- dfkruskalDadLit$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[18] <- specify_decimal(DadLitPvalue, sigdig4)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives1$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives2$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives3$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives4$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives5$mean[2], sigdig)

## Calculate lives with other based stats(20-21) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[20] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[21] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLives6$mean[2], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between children that live with their parents and those that live with others
LivesNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
LivesNormality <- as.data.frame(LivesNormality)
if (LivesNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && LivesNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayLives <- aov(VarItem ~ StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayLives <- tidy(onewayLives)
		LivesPvalue <- dfonewayLives$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalLives <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalLives <- tidy(kruskalLives)
		LivesPvalue <- dfkruskalLives$p.value[1]
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[20] <- specify_decimal(LivesPvalue, sigdig4)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage1$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage1$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage2$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage2$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage3$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage3$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage4$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage4$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage5$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage5$mean[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Languages2 based stats(22-24) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[22] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[23] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage6$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[24] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanLanguage6$mean[3], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between Languages2 groups

kruskalLanguages2 <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ Languages2_f, data = StatDF6)
dfkruskalLanguages2 <- tidy(kruskalLanguages2)
Languages2Pvalue <- dfkruskalLanguages2$p.value[1]

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[22] <- specify_decimal(Languages2Pvalue, sigdig4)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var1
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState1$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState1$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState1$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Mean`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState1$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var2
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState2$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState2$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState2$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Mean`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState2$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var3
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState3$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState3$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState3$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Mid Normalized Gain`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState3$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var4
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState4$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState4$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState4$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`Base Level 2 Mean`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState4$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var5
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState5$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState5$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState5$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Level 2 Mean`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState5$mean[4], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(25-28) for mean_item_var6
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[25] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState6$mean[1], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[26] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState6$mean[2], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[27] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState6$mean[3], sigdig)
dfMeanEEItem$`End Normalized Gain`[28] <- specify_decimal(tempMeanState6$mean[4], sigdig)

## Check for normality and use appropriate test to Calculate Significant difference in Gains between State groups
StateNormality <- StatDF6 %>% 
	group_by(State_f) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(VarItem)$p.value)
StateNormality <- as.data.frame(StateNormality)
if (StateNormality$`p-value`[1] > .05 && StateNormality$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayState <- aov(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF6) 
		dfonewayState <- tidy(onewayState)
		StatePvalue <- dfonewayState$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalState <- kruskal.test(VarItem ~ State_f, data = StatDF6)
		dfkruskalState <- tidy(kruskalState)
		StatePvalue <- dfkruskalState$p.value
	}	

dfMeanEEItem$`p value`[25] <- specify_decimal(StatePvalue, sigdig4)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- flextable(dfMeanEEItem)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMeanEEItem <- autofit(flexdfMeanEEItem)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=16:17, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=22:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- merge_at(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=25:28, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- height(flexdfMeanEEItem, height= .08)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=1, 1.0)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=2, 1.8)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=3, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=4, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=5, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=6, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=7, 0.6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=8, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- width(flexdfMeanEEItem, j=9, 0.7)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=3)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=6)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=8)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=10)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=12)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=15)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=19)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=21)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=24)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- hline(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=28)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- fontsize(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- align(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- valign(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 2, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 4, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 6, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 8, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 10, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 12, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 14, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 16, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 18, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 20, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 22, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 24, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 26, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bg(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 28, j = 3:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfMeanEEItem <- padding(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bold(flexdfMeanEEItem, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMeanEEItem <- compose(flexdfMeanEEItem, ~ `p value` < .05, value = as_paragraph(as_b(`p value`)), j=9)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- bold(flexdfMeanEEItem, i=1, bold = TRUE)
flexdfMeanEEItem <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMeanEEItem)
flexdfMeanEEItem
}
```

```{r endline median Teacher study function}
build_median_teacher_function <- function(df, median_item_var, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_median_teacher_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TSafetyScaleCNV, "")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var <- enquo(median_item_var)

## Create data frame
dfMedianItemTeacher <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =19, ncol = 5))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianItemTeacher) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "End Year 2 Median", "End Year 2 Range", "Diff from Overall Median")

## Retrieve Site Type Median
tempMedianEL2TColocationType <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TColocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TColocationType)

## Retrieve Site Type N's
tempColocationTypeN  <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
colocationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempColocationTypeN$EL2TColocation_f[1]), " (n=", tempColocationTypeN$n[1], ")")
colocationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempColocationTypeN$EL2TColocation_f[2]), " (n=", tempColocationTypeN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Location Type Median
tempMedianEL2TLocationType <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TLocationType)

## Retrieve Location Type N's
tempLocationTypeN <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2TLocationType_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2TLocationType_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2TLocationType_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Funding Type Median
tempMedianEL2TFundingType <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TFundingType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TFundingType)

## Retrieve Funding Type N's
tempFundingTypeN <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% count()
fundingTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2TFundingType_f[1]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[1], ")")
fundingTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2TFundingType_f[2]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[2], ")")
fundingTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2TFundingType_f[3]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[3], ")")
fundingTypeLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2TFundingType_f[4]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[4], ")")

## Retrieve Gender type Median
tempMedianEL2TGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TGender <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TGender)

## Retrieve Gender Type N's
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% count()
genderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$EL2TGender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
genderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$EL2TGender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")


## Retrieve Age Group Median
tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1)

## Retrieve Age Group N's
tempAgeGroupN <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
ageGroupLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[1], ")")
ageGroupLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[2], ")")
ageGroupLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f[3]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve State Median
tempMedianEL2TState <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2TState <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2TState)

## Retrieve State Type N's
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% count()
stateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2TState_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
stateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2TState_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
stateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2TState_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
stateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2TState_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[1] <- paste("All Teachers", sectionTitle)
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[2] <- "Site Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[2] <- colocationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[3] <- colocationTypeLabel2 
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[7] <- "Funding Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[7] <- fundingTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[8] <- fundingTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[9] <- fundingTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[10] <- fundingTypeLabel4
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[11] <- "Gender"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[11] <- genderLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[12] <- genderLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[13] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[13] <- ageGroupLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[14] <- ageGroupLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[15] <- ageGroupLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[16] <- "State"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[16] <- stateLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[17] <- stateLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[18] <- stateLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[19] <- stateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMedian <- df %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant <- tempMedian[1,1]
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian, sigdig)
tempmin <- df %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmax <- df %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[1] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempmin, sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmax, sigdig), ")")

## calculate Site Type based stats(2-4)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TColocationType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TColocationType$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate site type range (2-4)
tempminSiteType <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxSiteType <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminSiteType <- as.data.frame(tempminSiteType)
tempmaxSiteType <- as.data.frame(tempmaxSiteType)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[2] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteType$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteType$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[3] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteType$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteType$max[2], sigdig), ")")

## calculate site type diff from overall (2-4)
tempMedianEL2TColocationType <- tempMedianEL2TColocationType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TColocationType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TColocationType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TColocationType$Diff[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location based stats(5-7)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$median[3], sigdig)

tempminLocation <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxLocation <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminLocation <- as.data.frame(tempminLocation)
tempmaxLocation <- as.data.frame(tempmaxLocation)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[4] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[5] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[6] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[2], sigdig), ")")

tempMedianEL2TLocationType <- tempMedianEL2TLocationType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TLocationType$Diff[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Funding based stats(8-11)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$median[4], sigdig)

tempminFunding <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxFunding <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminFunding <- as.data.frame(tempminFunding)
tempmaxFunding <- as.data.frame(tempmaxFunding)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[7] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[8] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[9] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[3], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[10] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[4], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[4], sigdig), ")")

tempMedianEL2TFundingType <- tempMedianEL2TFundingType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$Diff[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TFundingType$Diff[4], sigdig)

## Calculate Gender based stats(11-12)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TGender$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TGender$median[2], sigdig)

tempminGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminGender <- as.data.frame(tempminGender)
tempmaxGender <- as.data.frame(tempmaxGender)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[11] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminGender$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxGender$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[12] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminGender$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxGender$max[2], sigdig), ")")

tempMedianEL2TGender <- tempMedianEL2TGender %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TGender$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TGender$Diff[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Teacher Age based stats(13-15)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$median[3], sigdig)

tempminTeacherAge <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxTeacherAge <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminTeacherAge <- as.data.frame(tempminTeacherAge)
tempmaxTeacherAge <- as.data.frame(tempmaxTeacherAge)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[13] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[14] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[15] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[3], sigdig), ")")

tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1 <- tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1 %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[3], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(16-19)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[16] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[17] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[18] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[19] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$median[4], sigdig)

tempminState <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxState <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminState <- as.data.frame(tempminState)
tempmaxState <- as.data.frame(tempmaxState)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[16] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[17] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[18] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[3], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[19] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[4], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[4], sigdig), ")")

tempMedianEL2TState <- tempMedianEL2TState %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[16] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[17] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[18] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$Diff[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[19] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2TState$Diff[4], sigdig)


## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- flextable(dfMedianItemTeacher)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- autofit(flexdfMedianItemTeacher)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- height(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, height= .08)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=2, 2.0)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=3, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=4, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=5, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=1)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=3)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=6)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=10)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=12)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=15)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=19)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- fontsize(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 1:3, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- valign(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 2, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 4, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 6, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 8, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 10, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 12, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 14, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 16, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 18, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- padding(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bold(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")

flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianItemTeacher)

flexdfMedianItemTeacher
}
```

```{r endline median Head Teacher study function}
build_median_headteacher_function <- function(df, median_item_var, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_median_headteacher_function(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2HTSafetyScaleCNV, "")
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var <- enquo(median_item_var)

## Create data frame
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =19, ncol = 5))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianItemHeadTeacher) <- c("Group", "Subgroup",  "End Year 2 Median", "End Year 2 Range", "Diff from Overall Median")

## Retrieve Site Type Median Data
tempMedianEL2HTColocationType <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTColocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType)

## Retrieve Site Type N's
tempColocationTypeN  <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% count()
colocationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempColocationTypeN$EL2HTColocation_f[1]), " (n=", tempColocationTypeN$n[1], ")")
colocationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempColocationTypeN$EL2HTColocation_f[2]), " (n=", tempColocationTypeN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Location Type Median
tempMedianEL2HTLocationType <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTLocationType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType)

## Retrieve Location Type N's
tempLocationTypeN <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2HTLocationType_f[1]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[1], ")")
locationTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2HTLocationType_f[2]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[2], ")")
locationTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempLocationTypeN$EL2HTLocationType_f[3]), " (n=", tempLocationTypeN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve Funding Type Median
tempMedianEL2HTFundingType <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTFundingType <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType)

## Retrieve Funding Type N's
tempFundingTypeN <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% count()
fundingTypeLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2HTFundingType[1]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[1], ")")
fundingTypeLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2HTFundingType[2]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[2], ")")
fundingTypeLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2HTFundingType[3]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[3], ")")
fundingTypeLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempFundingTypeN$EL2HTFundingType[4]), " (n=", tempFundingTypeN$n[4], ")")

## Retrieve Gender type Median
tempMedianEL2HTGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTGender <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTGender)

## Retrieve Gender Type N's
tempGenderN <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% count()
genderLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$EL2HTGender_f[1]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[1], ")")
genderLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempGenderN$EL2HTGender_f[2]), " (n=", tempGenderN$n[2], ")")

## Retrieve Age Group Median
tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1 <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1)

## Retrieve Age Group N's
tempAgeGroupN <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
ageGroupLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f[1]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[1], ")")
ageGroupLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f[2]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[2], ")")
ageGroupLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempAgeGroupN$EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f[3]), " (n=", tempAgeGroupN$n[3], ")")

## Retrieve State Median
tempMedianEL2HTState <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTState_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianEL2HTState <- as.data.frame(tempMedianEL2HTState)

## Retrieve State Type N's
tempStateN <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTState_f) %>% count()
stateLabel1 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2HTState_f[1]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[1], ")")
stateLabel2 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2HTState_f[2]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[2], ")")
stateLabel3 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2HTState_f[3]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[3], ")")
stateLabel4 <- paste0(as.character(tempStateN$EL2HTState_f[4]), " (n=", tempStateN$n[4], ")")

## Set row labels 
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[1] <- paste("All Head Teachers", sectionTitle)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[2] <- "Site Type"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[2] <- colocationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[3] <- colocationTypeLabel2 
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[7] <- "Funding Type"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[7] <- fundingTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[8] <- fundingTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[9] <- fundingTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[10] <- fundingTypeLabel4
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[11] <- "Gender"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[11] <- genderLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[12] <- genderLabel2
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[13] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[13] <- ageGroupLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[14] <- ageGroupLabel2
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[15] <- ageGroupLabel3
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Group[16] <- "State"
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[16] <- stateLabel1
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[17] <- stateLabel2
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[18] <- stateLabel3
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$Subgroup[19] <- stateLabel4

## calculate base stats
tempMedian <- df %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianConstant <- tempMedian[1,1]
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedian, sigdig)
tempmin <- df %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmax <- df %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[1] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempmin, sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmax, sigdig), ")")

## calculate Site Type based stats(2-4)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate site type range (2-4)
tempminSiteType <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxSiteType <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminSiteType <- as.data.frame(tempminSiteType)
tempmaxSiteType <- as.data.frame(tempmaxSiteType)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[2] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteType$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteType$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[3] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteType$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteType$max[2], sigdig), ")")

## calculate site type diff from overall (2-4)
tempMedianEL2HTColocationType <- tempMedianEL2HTColocationType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTColocationType$Diff[3], sigdig)

## calculate Location based stats(5-7)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$median[3], sigdig)

## calculate location type range (5-7)
tempminLocation <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxLocation <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminLocation <- as.data.frame(tempminLocation)
tempmaxLocation <- as.data.frame(tempmaxLocation)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[4] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[5] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[6] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminLocation$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxLocation$max[2], sigdig), ")")

## calculate location type diff from overall (5-7)
tempMedianEL2HTLocationType <- tempMedianEL2HTLocationType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[4] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[5] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[6] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTLocationType$Diff[3], sigdig)

## Calculate Funding type based stats(8-11)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$median[4], sigdig)

## calculate funding type range (8-11)
tempminFunding <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxFunding <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminFunding <- as.data.frame(tempminFunding)
tempmaxFunding <- as.data.frame(tempmaxFunding)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[7] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[8] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[9] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[3], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[10] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminFunding$min[4], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxFunding$max[4], sigdig), ")")

## calculate funding type diff from overall (8-11)
tempMedianEL2HTFundingType <- tempMedianEL2HTFundingType %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[7] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[8] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[9] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$Diff[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[10] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTFundingType$Diff[4], sigdig)

## Calculate Gender based stats(11-12)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTGender$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTGender$median[2], sigdig)

## calculate gender range (11-12)
tempminGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxGender <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminGender <- as.data.frame(tempminGender)
tempmaxGender <- as.data.frame(tempmaxGender)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[11] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminGender$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxGender$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[12] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminGender$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxGender$max[2], sigdig), ")")

## calculate gender diff from overall (11-12)
tempMedianEL2HTGender <- tempMedianEL2HTGender %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[11] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTGender$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[12] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTGender$Diff[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Teacher Age based stats(13-15)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$median[3], sigdig)

## calculate teacher age range (13-15)
tempminTeacherAge <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxTeacherAge <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminTeacherAge <- as.data.frame(tempminTeacherAge)
tempmaxTeacherAge <- as.data.frame(tempmaxTeacherAge)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[13] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[14] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[15] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminTeacherAge$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxTeacherAge$max[3], sigdig), ")")

## calculate teacher age diff from overall (13-15)
tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1 <- tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1 %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[13] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[14] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[15] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTeacherAgeGroup1$Diff[3], sigdig)

## Calculate State based stats(16-19)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[16] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[17] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$median[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[18] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$median[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[19] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$median[4], sigdig)

## calculate state range (16-19)
tempminState <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTState_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxState <- df %>% group_by(EL2HTState_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminState <- as.data.frame(tempminState)
tempmaxState <- as.data.frame(tempmaxState)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[16] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[17] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[2], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[18] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[3], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[3], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`End Year 2 Range`[19] <- paste0("(",specify_decimal(tempminState$min[4], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxState$max[4], sigdig), ")")

## calculate state diff from overall (16-19)
tempMedianEL2HTState <- tempMedianEL2HTState %>% mutate(Diff = median - tempMedianConstant)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[16] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$Diff[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[17] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$Diff[2], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[18] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$Diff[3], sigdig)
dfMedianItemHeadTeacher$`Diff from Overall Median`[19] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianEL2HTState$Diff[4], sigdig)

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- flextable(dfMedianItemHeadTeacher)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- autofit(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=7:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=16:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- height(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, height= .08)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, j=2, 2.0)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, j=3, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, j=4, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, j=5, 1.0)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=1)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=3)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=6)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=10)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=12)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=15)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i=19)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- fontsize(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = 1:3, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:5, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- valign(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 2, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 4, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 6, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 8, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 10, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 12, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 14, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 16, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 18, j = 2:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- padding(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- bold(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")

flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher)

flexdfMedianItemHeadTeacher
}
```

```{r endline median ME Teacher study function}
build_median_ME_teacher_function <- function(df, median_item_var1, median_item_var2, sectionTitle) {
## call for function build_median_ME_teacher_function(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate, MTSupportIntDim, EL2TSupportIntDim, "")
	
TotTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(TMatchPoint!='B'))	
Yr1TotTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(TMatchPoint=='BM' | TMatchPoint=='BMEL' | TMatchPoint=='M' | TMatchPoint=='MEL'))
Yr2TotTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(TMatchPoint=='BEL' | TMatchPoint=='BMEL' | TMatchPoint=='EL' | TMatchPoint=='MEL'))
	
	
## convert item variable to a format that can be used as a data frame column name
median_item_var1 <- enquo(median_item_var1)
median_item_var2 <- enquo(median_item_var2)

## Create data frame
dfMedianItemTeacher <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =19, ncol = 9))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfMedianItemTeacher) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Year 1 N", "End Year 1 Median", "Year 1 Range", "Year 2 N", "End Year 2 Median", "Year 2 Range", "Change")

## Retrieve Site Type Year 1 Median
tempMedianTColocationTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTColocationTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr1)

## Retrieve Site Year 1 Type N's
tempColocationTypeYr1N  <- df %>% group_by(MTColocation_f) %>% count()
colocationTypeLabel1 <- as.character(tempColocationTypeYr1N$MTColocation_f[1])
colocationTypeLabel2 <- as.character(tempColocationTypeYr1N$MTColocation_f[2])
colocationTypeYr1N1 <- tempColocationTypeYr1N$n[1]
colocationTypeYr1N2 <- tempColocationTypeYr1N$n[2]

## Retrieve Location Type Year 1 Median
tempMedianTLocationTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTLocationType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTLocationTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTLocationTypeYr1)

## Retrieve Location Type Year 1 N's
tempLocationTypeYr1N <- df %>% group_by(MTLocationType_f) %>% count()
locationTypeLabel1 <- as.character(tempLocationTypeYr1N$MTLocationType_f[1])
locationTypeLabel2 <- as.character(tempLocationTypeYr1N$MTLocationType_f[2])
locationTypeLabel3 <- as.character(tempLocationTypeYr1N$MTLocationType_f[3])
locationTypeYr1N1 <- tempLocationTypeYr1N$n[1]
locationTypeYr1N2 <- tempLocationTypeYr1N$n[2]
locationTypeYr1N3 <- tempLocationTypeYr1N$n[3]

## Retrieve Funding Type Year 1 Median
tempMedianTFundingTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTFundingType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTFundingTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTFundingTypeYr1)

## Retrieve Funding Type Year 1 N's
tempFundingTypeYr1N <- df %>% group_by(MTFundingType_f) %>% count()
fundingTypeLabel1 <- as.character(tempFundingTypeYr1N$MTFundingType_f[1])
fundingTypeLabel2 <- as.character(tempFundingTypeYr1N$MTFundingType_f[2])
fundingTypeLabel3 <- as.character(tempFundingTypeYr1N$MTFundingType_f[3])
fundingTypeLabel4 <- as.character(tempFundingTypeYr1N$MTFundingType_f[4])
fundingTypeYr1N1 <- tempFundingTypeYr1N$n[1]
fundingTypeYr1N2 <- tempFundingTypeYr1N$n[2]
fundingTypeYr1N3 <- tempFundingTypeYr1N$n[3]
fundingTypeYr1N4 <- tempFundingTypeYr1N$n[4]

## Retrieve Gender type Year 1 Median
tempMedianTGenderYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTGender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTGenderYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTGenderYr1)

## Retrieve Gender Type Year 1 N's
tempGenderYr1N <- df %>% group_by(MTGender_f) %>% count()
genderLabel1 <- as.character(tempGenderYr1N$MTGender_f[1])
genderLabel2 <- as.character(tempGenderYr1N$MTGender_f[2])
genderYr1N1 <- tempGenderYr1N$n[1]
genderYr1N2 <- tempGenderYr1N$n[2]

## Retrieve Age Group Year 1 Median
tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr1)

## Retrieve Age Group Year 1 N's
tempAgeGroupYr1N <- df %>% group_by(MTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
ageGroupLabel1 <- as.character(tempAgeGroupYr1N$MTeacherAgeGroup1_f[1])
ageGroupLabel2 <- as.character(tempAgeGroupYr1N$MTeacherAgeGroup1_f[2])
ageGroupLabel3 <- as.character(tempAgeGroupYr1N$MTeacherAgeGroup1_f[3])
ageGroupYr1N1 <- tempAgeGroupYr1N$n[1]
ageGroupYr1N2 <- tempAgeGroupYr1N$n[2]
ageGroupYr1N3 <- tempAgeGroupYr1N$n[3]

## Retrieve State Year 1 Median
tempMedianTStateYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTState_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTStateYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTStateYr1)

## Retrieve State Type Year 1 N's
tempStateYr1N <- df %>% group_by(MTState_f) %>% count()
stateLabel1 <- as.character(tempStateYr1N$MTState_f[1])
stateLabel2 <- as.character(tempStateYr1N$MTState_f[2])
stateLabel3 <- as.character(tempStateYr1N$MTState_f[3])
stateLabel4 <- as.character(tempStateYr1N$MTState_f[4])
stateYr1N1 <- tempStateYr1N$n[1]
stateYr1N2 <- tempStateYr1N$n[2]
stateYr1N3 <- tempStateYr1N$n[3]
stateYr1N4 <- tempStateYr1N$n[4]

## Retrieve Site Type Year 2 Median
tempMedianTColocationTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTColocationTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr2)

## Retrieve Site Year 2 Type N's
tempColocationTypeYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
colocationTypeYr2N1 <- tempColocationTypeYr2N$n[1]
colocationTypeYr2N2 <- tempColocationTypeYr2N$n[2]

## Retrieve Location Type Year 2 Median
tempMedianTLocationTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTLocationTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTLocationTypeYr2)

## Retrieve Location Type Year 2 N's
tempLocationTypeYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% count()
locationTypeYr2N1 <- tempLocationTypeYr2N$n[1]
locationTypeYr2N2 <- tempLocationTypeYr2N$n[2]
locationTypeYr2N3 <- tempLocationTypeYr2N$n[3]

## Retrieve Funding Type Year 2 Median
tempMedianTFundingTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTFundingTypeYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTFundingTypeYr2)

## Retrieve Funding Type Year 2 N's
tempFundingTypeYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% count()
fundingTypeYr2N1 <- tempFundingTypeYr2N$n[1]
fundingTypeYr2N2 <- tempFundingTypeYr2N$n[2]
fundingTypeYr2N3 <- tempFundingTypeYr2N$n[3]
fundingTypeYr2N4 <- tempFundingTypeYr2N$n[4]

## Retrieve Gender type Year 2 Median
tempMedianTGenderYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTGenderYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTGenderYr2)

## Retrieve Gender Type Year 2 N's
tempGenderYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% count()
genderYr2N1 <- tempGenderYr2N$n[1]
genderYr2N2 <- tempGenderYr2N$n[2]

## Retrieve Age Group Year 2 Median
tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTeacherAgeGroup1Yr2)

## Retrieve Age Group Year 2 N's
tempAgeGroupYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
ageGroupYr2N1 <- tempAgeGroupYr2N$n[1]
ageGroupYr2N2 <- tempAgeGroupYr2N$n[2]
ageGroupYr2N3 <- tempAgeGroupYr2N$n[3]

## Retrieve State Year 2 Median
tempMedianTStateYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempMedianTStateYr2 <- as.data.frame(tempMedianTStateYr2)

## Retrieve State Type Year 2 N's
tempStateYr2N <- df %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% count()
stateYr2N1 <- tempStateYr2N$n[1]
stateYr2N2 <- tempStateYr2N$n[2]
stateYr2N3 <- tempStateYr2N$n[3]
stateYr2N4 <- tempStateYr2N$n[4]

## Set row labels 
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[1] <- paste0("All Teachers"," ", sectionTitle)
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[2] <- "Site Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[2] <- colocationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[3] <- colocationTypeLabel2 
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[4] <- locationTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[5] <- locationTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[6] <- locationTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[7] <- "Funding Type"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[7] <- fundingTypeLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[8] <- fundingTypeLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[9] <- fundingTypeLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[10] <- fundingTypeLabel4
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[11] <- "Gender"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[11] <- genderLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[12] <- genderLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[13] <- "Age Group"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[13] <- ageGroupLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[14] <- ageGroupLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[15] <- ageGroupLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Group[16] <- "State"
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[16] <- stateLabel1
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[17] <- stateLabel2
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[18] <- stateLabel3
dfMedianItemTeacher$Subgroup[19] <- stateLabel4

## calculate base stats Year 1
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 N`[1] <- Yr1TotTeachers
tempMedianYr1 <- df %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 1 Median`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianYr1, sigdig)
tempmin <- df %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmax <- df %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 Range`[1] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempmin, sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmax, sigdig), ")")

## Calculate base stats Year 2
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 2 N`[1] <- Yr2TotTeachers
tempMedianYr2 <- df %>% summarise(median = median(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianYr2, sigdig)
tempmin <- df %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmax <- df %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 2 Range`[1] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempmin, sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmax, sigdig), ")")

## Calculate Base Change
dfMedianItemTeacher$Change[1] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianYr2 - tempMedianYr1, sigdig)

## set site Type N (2-3) Year 1
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 N`[2] <- colocationTypeYr1N1
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 N`[3] <- colocationTypeYr1N2

## set site type median (2-3) Year 1
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 1 Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr1$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 1 Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr1$median[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Site Type Range Year 1
tempminSiteTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTColocation_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempmaxSiteTypeYr1 <- df %>% group_by(MTColocation_f) %>% summarise(max = max(!!median_item_var1, na.rm = TRUE))
tempminSiteTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempminSiteTypeYr1)
tempmaxSiteTypeYr1 <- as.data.frame(tempmaxSiteTypeYr1)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 Range`[2] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteTypeYr1$min[1], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteTypeYr1$max[1], sigdig), ")")
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 1 Range`[3] <- paste0("(", specify_decimal(tempminSiteTypeYr1$min[2], sigdig), "-", specify_decimal(tempmaxSiteTypeYr1$max[2], sigdig), ")")

## set site Type N (2-3) Year 2
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 2 N`[2] <- colocationTypeYr2N1
dfMedianItemTeacher$`Year 2 N`[3] <- colocationTypeYr2N2

## set site type median (2-3) Year 2
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[2] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr2$median[1], sigdig)
dfMedianItemTeacher$`End Year 2 Median`[3] <- specify_decimal(tempMedianTColocationTypeYr2$median[2], sigdig)

## Calculate Site Type Range Year 2
tempminSiteTypeYr2 <- df %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(min = min(!!median_item_var2, na.rm = TRUE))
```
