```{r endline median ME Teacher study function}
## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- flextable(dfMedianItemTeacher)

## set format of flextables
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- autofit(flexdfMedianItemTeacher)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=2:3, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=7:10, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=13:15, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- merge_at(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=16:19, j=1, part="body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- height(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, height= .08)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=1, 1.2)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=2, 0.8)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=3, 0.6)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=4, 0.8)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=5, 0.7)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=6, 0.6)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=7, 0.7)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=8, 0.7)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- width(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, j=9, 0.7)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=1)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=3)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=6)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=10)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=12)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=15)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- hline(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=19)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- fontsize(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "header")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 1:3, align = "left", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- align(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = 3:9, align = "right", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- valign(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 2, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 4, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 6, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 8, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 10, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 12, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 14, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 16, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bg(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 18, j = 2:9, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- padding(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bold(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- bold(flexdfMedianItemTeacher, i=1, bold = TRUE)

flexdfMedianItemTeacher <- fix_border_issues(flexdfMedianItemTeacher)

flexdfMedianItemTeacher
}
```

```{r create likert6 function}
build_likert6_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_likert6_function(Bstudentsurveylonglocate, Safety_01, 'I feel safe at school by Program', -80, 80, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikerMTBABProgram <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTProgramGrade3_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoMTBABProgram <- templikerMTBABProgram %>% group_by(MTProgramGrade3_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoMTBABProgram <- templikertPivoMTBABProgram %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MTBABProgram <- templikertPivoMTBABProgram %>% group_by(MTProgramGrade3_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MTBABProgram$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MTBABProgram <- templikertPivot2MTBABProgram %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MTBABProgram <- templikertPivot3MTBABProgram %>% mutate(Type="Program Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MTBABProgram)[colnames(templikertPivot3MTBABProgram) == "MTProgramGrade3_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTLocationTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(MTLocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(MTLocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType) == "MTLocationTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTFundingTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertFundingType %>% group_by(MTFundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% group_by(MTFundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2FundingType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType) == "MTFundingTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMTGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMTGender <- templikertMTGender %>% group_by(MTGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMTGender <- templikertPivotMTGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MTGender <- templikertPivotMTGender %>% group_by(MTGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MTGender$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MTGender <- templikertPivot2MTGender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MTGender <- templikertPivot3MTGender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MTGender)[colnames(templikertPivot3MTGender) == "MTGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTStudentAgeGroup2_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertAge %>% group_by(MTStudentAgeGroup2_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertPivotAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivotAge %>% group_by(MTStudentAgeGroup2_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2Age$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot3Age %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Age)[colnames(templikertPivot3Age) == "MTStudentAgeGroup2_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertState <- df %>% dplyr::select(MTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertState %>% group_by(MTState_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertPivotState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivotState %>% group_by(MTState_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2State$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "MTState_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MTBABProgram, templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3MTGender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette2), auto.key=list(text=c("none of the time", "", "", "", "", "all of the time")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create mlikert6 function}
build_mlikert6_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_likert6_function(Bstudentsurveylonglocate, Safety_01, 'I feel safe at school by Program', -80, 80, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikertMBABProgram <- df %>% dplyr::select(MProgramGrade3_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot2MBABProgram %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot3MBABProgram %>% mutate(Type="Program Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MBABProgram)[colnames(templikertPivot3MBABProgram) == "MProgramGrade3_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMLocationType <- templikertMLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MLocationType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MLocationType <- templikertPivot2MLocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MLocationType <- templikertPivot3MLocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType) == "LocationTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MFundingType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot2MFundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot3MFundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType) == "FundingTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(MGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MGender$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot2MGender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot3MGender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MGender)[colnames(templikertPivot3MGender) == "MGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertMAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(MAgeGroup2_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MAge$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot2MAge %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot3MAge %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MAge)[colnames(templikertPivot3MAge) == "MAgeGroup2_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMState <- df %>% dplyr::select(State_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertPivotMState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MState <- templikertPivotMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MState$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot2MState %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot3MState %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MState)[colnames(templikertPivot3MState) == "State_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertMcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MBABProgram, templikertPivot3MLocationType, templikertPivot3MFundingType,  templikertPivot3MGender, templikertPivot3MAge, templikertPivot3MState)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertMcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette2), auto.key=list(text=c("none of the time", "", "", "", "", "all of the time")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create likert2 function}
build_likert2_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_BBABProgram_likert2_function(Bstudentsurveylonglocate, Safety_01, 'I feel safe at school by Program', -80, 80, 20)

	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)

	templikertPivotState <- templikertPivotState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))

	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "MTState_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MTBABProgram, templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3MTGender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette3), auto.key=list(text=c("no", "yes")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create mlikert2 midline function}
build_mlikert2_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_mlikert2_function(Mstudentsurveylonglocate, MSafety_01, 'I feel safe at school by Program', -80, 80, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikertMBABProgram <- df %>% dplyr::select(MProgramGrade3_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot2MBABProgram %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot3MBABProgram %>% mutate(Type="Program Type")

	templikertPivotMLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MLocationType$n <- NULL

	templikertPivot3MLocationType <- templikertPivot3MLocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType) == "LocationTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MFundingType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot2MFundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot3MFundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType) == "FundingTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(MGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MGender$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot2MGender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot3MGender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MGender)[colnames(templikertPivot3MGender) == "MGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertMAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(MAgeGroup2_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MAge$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot2MAge %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot3MAge %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MAge)[colnames(templikertPivot3MAge) == "MAgeGroup2_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMState <- df %>% dplyr::select(State_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertPivotMState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MState <- templikertPivotMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MState$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot2MState %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot3MState %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MState)[colnames(templikertPivot3MState) == "State_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertMcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MBABProgram, templikertPivot3MLocationType, templikertPivot3MFundingType,  templikertPivot3MGender, templikertPivot3MAge, templikertPivot3MState)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertMcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette3), auto.key=list(text=c("no", "yes")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create mlikert5 student agree disagree function}
build_mlikert5_agreedisagree_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_mlikert5_agreedisagree_function(Bstudentsurveylonglocate, Safety_01, 'I feel safe at school by Program', -100, 100, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=5), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikertMBABProgram <- df %>% dplyr::select(MProgramGrade3_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram <- templikertPivotMBABProgram %>% group_by(MProgramGrade3_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MBABProgram$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot2MBABProgram %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MBABProgram <- templikertPivot3MBABProgram %>% mutate(Type="Program Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MBABProgram)[colnames(templikertPivot3MBABProgram) == "MProgramGrade3_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMLocationType <- templikertMLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MLocationType <- templikertPivotMLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MLocationType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MLocationType <- templikertPivot2MLocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MLocationType <- templikertPivot3MLocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MLocationType) == "LocationTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MFundingType <- templikertPivotMFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MFundingType$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot2MFundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
templikertPivot3MFundingType <- templikertPivot3MFundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3MFundingType) == "FundingTypeDesc_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(MGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MGender <- templikertPivotMGender %>% group_by(MGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MGender$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot2MGender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MGender <- templikertPivot3MGender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MGender)[colnames(templikertPivot3MGender) == "MGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertMAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(MAgeGroup2_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MAge <- templikertPivotMAge %>% group_by(MAgeGroup2_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MAge$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot2MAge %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MAge <- templikertPivot3MAge %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MAge)[colnames(templikertPivot3MAge) == "MAgeGroup2_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikertMState <- df %>% dplyr::select(State_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotMState <- templikertPivotMState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2MState <- templikertPivotMState %>% group_by(State_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2MState$n <- NULL
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot2MState %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per)
	templikertPivot3MState <- templikertPivot3MState %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3MState)[colnames(templikertPivot3MState) == "State_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertMcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MBABProgram, templikertPivot3MLocationType, templikertPivot3MFundingType,  templikertPivot3MGender, templikertPivot3MAge, templikertPivot3MState)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertMcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette5), auto.key=list(text=c("strongly disagree", "disagree", "neither", "agree", "strongly agree")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create teacher likert7 endline agree disagree function}
build_teacherlikert_agreedisagree_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	
	## call for function build_teacherlikert_agreedisagree_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TSafetyCNV_LKRT, 'Endline Teacher Safety Scale', -100, 100, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=7), layout.heights = list(between = 0))
	
	## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "Type", "Strongly Disagree", "Disagree", "Somewhat Disagree", "Neither Agree nor Disagree", "Somewhat Agree", "Agree", "Strongly Agree")

	templikertColocation <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TColocation_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertColocation %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2Colocation, is.factor, as.character)
		templikertPivot2Colocation$n <- NULL
	
	programlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% arrange(desc(EL2TColocation_f), !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Colocation)
	templikertPivot3Colocation[is.na(templikertPivot3Colocation)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation %>% mutate(Type="Site Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation)[colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation) == "EL2TColocation_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation[, col_order]
	
	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2LocationType, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL	
	
	locationlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% arrange(EL2TLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3LocationType)
	templikertPivot3LocationType[is.na(templikertPivot3LocationType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType) == "EL2TLocationType_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType[, col_order]

	templikertFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertFundingType %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% group_by(EL2TFundingType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2FundingType, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2FundingType$n <- NULL
	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	fundinglength <- nrow(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% arrange(EL2TFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3FundingType)
	templikertPivot3FundingType[is.na(templikertPivot3FundingType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType) == "EL2TFundingType_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType[, col_order]
	
	templikertGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotGender <- templikertGender %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotGender <- templikertPivotGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivotGender %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100)
	
	templikertPivot2Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Gender)
	templikertPivot2Gender <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2Gender, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2Gender$n <- NULL
	
	genderlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Gender)
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,1] <- 'male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% arrange(desc(EL2TGender_f), !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Gender)
	templikertPivot3Gender[is.na(templikertPivot3Gender)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Gender)[colnames(templikertPivot3Gender) == "EL2TGender_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender[, col_order]

	templikertAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertAge %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertPivotAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivotAge %>% group_by(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Age)
	templikertPivot2Age <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2Age, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2Age$n <- NULL	
	
	agelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Age)
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% arrange(desc(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f), !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Age)
	templikertPivot3Age[is.na(templikertPivot3Age)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot3Age %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Age)[colnames(templikertPivot3Age) == "EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot3Age[, col_order]

	templikertState <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertState %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertPivotState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivotState %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100)
	
	templikertPivot2State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2State)
	templikertPivot2State <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2State, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2State$n <- NULL	
	
	statelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2State)
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivot2State %>% arrange(EL2TState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3State)
	templikertPivot3State[is.na(templikertPivot3State)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "EL2TState_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State[, col_order]
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3Colocation, templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3Gender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, 
	xlab='Percentage', ylab='',
	xlim=c(lmin,lmax), 
	scales=list(x=list(at=seq(-100,100, 20)), y=list(relation="free")), 
	layout=c(1,6), 
	main=chart_title,  
	col=(likertPalette7), 
	auto.key=list(text=c("strongly disagree", "", "", "neither", "", "", "strongly agree")),
	key.border.white=T,
	par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create head teacher likert7 endline agree disagree function}
build_headteacherlikert_agreedisagree_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	
	## call for function build_headteacherlikert_agreedisagree_function(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2HTSafetyCNV_LKRT, 'Endline Head Teacher Safety Scale', -100, 100, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=7), layout.heights = list(between = 0))
	
	## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "Type", "Strongly Disagree", "Disagree", "Somewhat Disagree", "Neither Agree nor Disagree", "Somewhat Agree", "Agree", "Strongly Agree")

	templikertColocation <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2HTColocation_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertColocation %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% group_by(EL2HTColocation_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2Colocation, is.factor, as.character)
		templikertPivot2Colocation$n <- NULL
	
	programlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% arrange(desc(EL2HTColocation_f), !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Colocation)
	templikertPivot3Colocation[is.na(templikertPivot3Colocation)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation %>% mutate(Type="Site Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation)[colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation) == "EL2HTColocation_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation[, col_order]
	
	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2HTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(EL2HTLocationType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2LocationType, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL	
	
	locationlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% arrange(EL2HTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3LocationType)
	templikertPivot3LocationType[is.na(templikertPivot3LocationType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType) == "EL2HTLocationType_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType[, col_order]

	templikertFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2HTFundingType, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertFundingType %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% group_by(EL2HTFundingType) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2FundingType, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2FundingType$n <- NULL
	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	fundinglength <- nrow(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'

	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,3] <- 0

	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,1] <- 'BAB'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% arrange(EL2HTFundingType, !!likert_item_var)

	templikertPivot3FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3FundingType)
	templikertPivot3FundingType[is.na(templikertPivot3FundingType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType) == "EL2HTFundingType"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType[, col_order]
	
	templikertGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2HTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotGender <- templikertGender %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotGender <- templikertPivotGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivotGender %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100)
	
	templikertPivot2Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Gender)

	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Gender)[colnames(templikertPivot3Gender) == "EL2HTGender_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender[, col_order]

	templikertAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)

	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivotAge %>% group_by(EL2HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Age)

	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivot2State %>% arrange(EL2HTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3State)
	templikertPivot3State[is.na(templikertPivot3State)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "EL2HTState_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State[, col_order]
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3Colocation, templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3Gender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, 
	xlab='Percentage', ylab='',
	xlim=c(lmin,lmax), 
	scales=list(x=list(at=seq(-100,100, 20)), y=list(relation="free")), 
	layout=c(1,6), 
	main=chart_title,  
	col=(likertPalette7), 
	auto.key=list(text=c("strongly disagree", "", "", "neither", "", "", "strongly agree")),
	key.border.white=T,
	par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create simple teacher and head teacher likert7 endline agree disagree function}
build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_agreedisagree_function <- function(df, df2, likert_item_var, likert_item_var2, chart_title) {
	
	## call for function build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_agreedisagree_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2TSafetyCNV_LKRT, EL2HTSafetyCNV_LKRT, 'Endline Teacher and Head Teacher Overall Safety Scale')

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	likert_item_var2 <- enquo(likert_item_var2)
	
		## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "Strongly Disagree", "Disagree", "Somewhat Disagree", "Neither Agree nor Disagree", "Somewhat Agree", "Agree", "Strongly Agree")

	## get teacher nrows
	NumTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var)))
	
	## get number of headteachers
	NumHeadTeachers <- nrow(df2 %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2)))
	
	## get teacher frequency percents by category for teachers and then head teachers
	## teachers
	tempteacher <- df %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var) %>% count()
	tempteacher <- as.data.frame(tempteacher)
	tempteacher <- mutate_if(tempteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempteacher$n <- NULL
	
	teacherlength <- nrow(tempteacher)
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,1] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,1] <- 'Disagree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,1] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,1] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,1] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,1] <- 'Agree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+7,1] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+7,2] <- 0
	
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivot[is.na(tempteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Teacher")
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## head teachers
	tempheadteacher <- df2 %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var2) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var2) %>% count()
	tempheadteacher <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher <- mutate_if(tempheadteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2))
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumHeadTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempheadteacher$n <- NULL
	
	headteacherlength <- nrow(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,1] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,1] <- 'Disagree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,1] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,1] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,1] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,1] <- 'Agree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+7,1] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+7,2] <- 0
	
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var2, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempheadteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempheadteacherPivot[is.na(tempheadteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Head Teacher")
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## combine teacher and head teacher pivots
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- rbind(tempteacherPivot, tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	tempteacherPivotTotal$Item <- sapply(tempteacherPivotTotal$Item, as.factor)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- tempteacherPivotTotal %>% arrange(Item)
	
	origNames = colnames(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	
	# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "1%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "2%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "3%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "4%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "5%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "6%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "7%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "8%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "9%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.9, fontface=2)
}	
	
	tempteacherheadteacherPlot <- plot.likert(Item ~ ., tempteacherPivotTotal,
            as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=4,
            xlim=c(-100,100), scales=list(relation = "free", x=list(draw=FALSE)),
            main = list(label=chart_title, cex=1), col = likertPalette7,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc,  
            ## set size of the legend text and the number of columns
            auto.key.in = list(cex = .7, columns=4),
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0)))

tempteacherheadteacherPlot
	
	
}
```

```{r create simple teacher and head teacher likert7 endline none of the time all of the time function}
build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_nonealltime_function <- function(df, df2, likert_item_var, likert_item_var2, chart_title) {
	
	## call for function build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_nonealltime_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2THope_LKRT, EL2HTHope_LKRT, 'Endline Teacher and Head Teacher Perception of Hope Scale')

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	likert_item_var2 <- enquo(likert_item_var2)
	
		## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "none of the time", "a little of the time", "some of the time", "a lot of the time", "most of the time", "all of the time")

	## get teacher nrows
	NumTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var)))
	
	## get number of headteachers
	NumHeadTeachers <- nrow(df2 %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2)))
	
	## get teacher frequency percents by category for teachers and then head teachers
	## teachers
	tempteacher <- df %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var) %>% count()
	tempteacher <- as.data.frame(tempteacher)
	tempteacher <- mutate_if(tempteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempteacher$n <- NULL
	
	teacherlength <- nrow(tempteacher)
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,1] <- 'none of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,1] <- 'a little of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,1] <- 'some of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,1] <- 'a lot of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,1] <- 'most of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,1] <- 'all of the time'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,2] <- 0
		
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivot[is.na(tempteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Teacher")
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## head teachers
	tempheadteacher <- df2 %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var2) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var2) %>% count()
	tempheadteacher <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher <- mutate_if(tempheadteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2))
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumHeadTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempheadteacher$n <- NULL
	
	headteacherlength <- nrow(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,1] <- 'none of the time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,1] <- 'a little of the time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,1] <- 'some of the time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,1] <- 'a lot of the time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,1] <- 'most of teh time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,1] <- 'all of the time'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,2] <- 0
	
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var2, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempheadteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempheadteacherPivot[is.na(tempheadteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Head Teacher")
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## combine teacher and head teacher pivots
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- rbind(tempteacherPivot, tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	tempteacherPivotTotal$Item <- sapply(tempteacherPivotTotal$Item, as.factor)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- tempteacherPivotTotal %>% arrange(Item)
	
	origNames = colnames(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	
	# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "1%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "2%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "3%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "4%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "5%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "6%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "7%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "8%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.9, fontface=2)
}	
	
	tempteacherheadteacherPlot <- plot.likert(Item ~ ., tempteacherPivotTotal,
            as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=3.5,
            xlim=c(-100,100), scales=list(relation = "free", x=list(draw=FALSE)),
            main = list(label=chart_title, cex=1), col = likertPalette2,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc,  
            ## set size of the legend text and the number of columns
            auto.key.in = list(cex = .7, columns=4),
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0)))

tempteacherheadteacherPlot
	
	
}
```

```{r create simple teacher and head teacher likert7 endline untrue true function}
build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_untruetrue_function <- function(df, df2, likert_item_var, likert_item_var2, chart_title) {
	
	## call for function build_teacherHeadteacherlikert_untruetrue_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2TEquity_LKRT, EL2HTEquity_LKRT, 'Endline Teacher and Head Teacher Perception of Equity')

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	likert_item_var2 <- enquo(likert_item_var2)
	
		## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "Very Untrue", "Untrue", "Somewhat Untrue", "Neutral", "Somewhat true", "True", "Very True")

	## get teacher nrows
	NumTeachers <- nrow(df %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var)))
	
	## get number of headteachers
	NumHeadTeachers <- nrow(df2 %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2)))
	
	## get teacher frequency percents by category for teachers and then head teachers
	## teachers
	tempteacher <- df %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var) %>% count()
	tempteacher <- as.data.frame(tempteacher)
	tempteacher <- mutate_if(tempteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	tempteacher <- tempteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempteacher$n <- NULL
	
	teacherlength <- nrow(tempteacher)
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,1] <- 'Very Untrue'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,1] <- 'Untrue'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,1] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,1] <- 'Neutral'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,1] <- 'Somewhat true'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,1] <- 'True'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+6,2] <- 0
	tempteacher[teacherlength+7,1] <- 'Very True'
	tempteacher[teacherlength+7,2] <- 0
		
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivot[is.na(tempteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Teacher")
	tempteacherPivot <- tempteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## head teachers
	tempheadteacher <- df2 %>% dplyr::select(!!likert_item_var2) %>% group_by(!!likert_item_var2) %>% count()
	tempheadteacher <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher <- mutate_if(tempheadteacher, is.factor, as.character)
	
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var2))
	tempheadteacher <- tempheadteacher %>% group_by() %>% mutate(per = round((n/NumHeadTeachers * 100), 0))
	tempheadteacher$n <- NULL
	
	headteacherlength <- nrow(tempheadteacher)
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,1] <- 'Very Untrue'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+1,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,1] <- 'Untrue'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+2,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,1] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+3,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,1] <- 'Neutral'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+4,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,1] <- 'Somewhat true'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+5,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,1] <- 'True'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+6,2] <- 0
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+7,1] <- 'Very True'
	tempheadteacher[headteacherlength+7,2] <- 0
	
	## pivot values from rows to columns, while adding the values from per column to integrate 0 values
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacher %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var2, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	tempheadteacherPivot <- as.data.frame(tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempheadteacherPivot[is.na(tempheadteacherPivot)] <- 0
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot %>% mutate(Item="Head Teacher")
	tempheadteacherPivot <- tempheadteacherPivot[, col_order]
	
	## combine teacher and head teacher pivots
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- rbind(tempteacherPivot, tempheadteacherPivot)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- as.data.frame(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	tempteacherPivotTotal$Item <- sapply(tempteacherPivotTotal$Item, as.factor)
	tempteacherPivotTotal <- tempteacherPivotTotal %>% arrange(Item)
	
	origNames = colnames(tempteacherPivotTotal)
	
	# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "1%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "2%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "3%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "4%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "5%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "6%"] <- ""
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "7%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.9, fontface=2)
}	
	
	tempteacherheadteacherPlot <- plot.likert(Item ~ ., tempteacherPivotTotal,
            as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=4,
            xlim=c(-100,100), scales=list(relation = "free", x=list(draw=FALSE)),
            main = list(label=chart_title, cex=1), col = likertPalette7,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc,  
            ## set size of the legend text and the number of columns
            auto.key.in = list(cex = .7, columns=4),
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0)))

tempteacherheadteacherPlot
	
	
}
```

```{r create teacher nonealltime6 endline none of the time all of the time function}
build_teacherlikert_nonealltime_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=0, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	
	## call for function build_teacherlikert_nonealltime_function(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TSafetyHome_LKRT, 'Endline Teacher Ability to Teach while Feeling Unsafe at Home', 0, 100, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))
	
	## set column order
	col_order <- c("Item", "Type", "none of the time", "a little of the time", "some of the time", "a lot of the time", "most of the time", "all of the time")

	templikertColocation <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TColocation_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertColocation %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotColocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivotColocation %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2Colocation, is.factor, as.character)
		templikertPivot2Colocation$n <- NULL
	
	programlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Colocation)
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,2] <- 'none of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,2] <- 'a little of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,2] <- 'some of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,2] <- 'a lot of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,2] <- 'most of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,1] <- 'BAB Center'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,2] <- 'all of the time'
	templikertPivot2Colocation[programlength+6,3] <- 0
		
	templikertPivot2Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% arrange(desc(EL2TColocation_f), !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot2Colocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Colocation)
	templikertPivot3Colocation[is.na(templikertPivot3Colocation)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation %>% mutate(Type="Site Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation)[colnames(templikertPivot3Colocation) == "EL2TColocation_f"] <- "Item"
	templikertPivot3Colocation <- templikertPivot3Colocation[, col_order]
	
	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(EL2TLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- mutate_if(templikertPivot2LocationType, is.factor, as.character)
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL

	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,2] <- 'none of the time'

	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,2] <- 'a little of the time'

	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,2] <- 'all of the time'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,3] <- 0

	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3LocationType)
	templikertPivot3LocationType[is.na(templikertPivot3LocationType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
```
