```{r create teacher likert5 midline nothing agreatdeal function}
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,2] <- 'Very Little'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,2] <- 'Some Influence'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,2] <- 'Quite a Bit'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,2] <- 'A Great Deal'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivot2State %>% arrange(MTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3State)
	templikertPivot3State[is.na(templikertPivot3State)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "MTState_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3MTBABProgram, templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3MTGender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,6), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette5), auto.key=list(text=c("Nothing ", "Very Little", "Some Influence", "Quite a Bit", "A Great Deal")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create head teacher likert7 midline true untrue function}
build_headteacherlikert_trueuntrue_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_headteacherlikert_trueuntrue_function(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate, BHTMindset_01_f, 'I have the content knowledge I need to effectively teach my class.', -100, 100, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(BHTLocationType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(BHTLocationType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	locationlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,2] <- 'Very Untrue'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,2] <- 'Untrue'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,2] <- 'Neutral'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat True'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,2] <- 'True'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,2] <- 'Very True'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% arrange(BHTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3LocationType)
	templikertPivot3LocationType[is.na(templikertPivot3LocationType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType) == "BHTLocationType_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertFundingType %>% group_by(BHTFundingType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% group_by(BHTFundingType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2FundingType$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	fundinglength <- nrow(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,2] <- 'Very Untrue'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,2] <- 'Untrue'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,2] <- 'Neutral'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat True'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,2] <- 'True'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,2] <- 'Very True'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% arrange(BHTFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3FundingType)
	templikertPivot3FundingType[is.na(templikertPivot3FundingType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType) == "BHTFundingType_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikerBTGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoBTGender <- templikerBTGender %>% group_by(BHTGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoBTGender <- templikertPivoBTGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivoBTGender %>% group_by(BHTGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2Gender$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Gender)
	genderlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Gender)
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,2] <- 'Very Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,2] <- 'Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,2] <- 'Neutral'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat True'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,2] <- 'True'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,2] <- 'Very True'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% arrange(BHTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Gender)
	templikertPivot3Gender[is.na(templikertPivot3Gender)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Gender)[colnames(templikertPivot3Gender) == "BHTGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertAge %>% group_by(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertPivotAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivotAge %>% group_by(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2Age$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Age)
	agelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Age)
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,2] <- 'Very Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,2] <- 'Untrue'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,2] <- 'Neutral'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat True'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,2] <- 'True'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,2] <- 'Very True'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% arrange(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Age)
	templikertPivot3Age[is.na(templikertPivot3Age)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot3Age %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Age)[colnames(templikertPivot3Age) == "BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertState <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertState %>% group_by(BHTState_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertPivotState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivotState %>% group_by(BHTState_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2State$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2State)
	statelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2State)
	templikertPivot2State$BHTState_f <- fct_relevel(templikertPivot2State$BHTState_f, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,2] <- 'Very Untrue'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,1] <- 'Benaadir'

	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,2] <- 'Untrue'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,2] <- 'Neutral'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat True'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,2] <- 'True'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,2] <- 'Very True'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivot2State %>% arrange(BHTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3State)
	templikertPivot3State[is.na(templikertPivot3State)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "BHTState_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3Gender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,5), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette7), auto.key=list(text=c("very untrue ", "", "", "neutral", "", "", "very true ")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r create head teacher likert7 midline agree disagree function}
build_headteacherlikert_agreedisagreemidline_function <- function(df, likert_item_var, chart_title, lmin=-100, lmax=100, linterval=20) {
	## call for function build_headteacherlikert_agreedisagree_function(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate, BHTSafety_01, 'Head Teacher: I feel physically safe at school', -80, 80, 20)

	## convert item variable to a useable format
	likert_item_var <- enquo(likert_item_var)
	
	## left margin setting
	parSettingsG <- list(layout.widths=list(left.padding=6), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0))

	templikertLocationType <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertLocationType %>% group_by(BHTLocationType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotLocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivotLocationType %>% group_by(BHTLocationType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2LocationType$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2LocationType)
		locationlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2LocationType)
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,1] <- 'IDP'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2LocationType[locationlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% arrange(BHTLocationType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot2LocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3LocationType)
	templikertPivot3LocationType[is.na(templikertPivot3LocationType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3LocationType <- templikertPivot3LocationType %>% mutate(Type="Location Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType)[colnames(templikertPivot3LocationType) == "BHTLocationType_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertFundingType <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertFundingType %>% group_by(BHTFundingType_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotFundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivotFundingType %>% group_by(BHTFundingType_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2FundingType$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	fundinglength <- nrow(templikertPivot2FundingType)
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,1] <- 'Community'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2FundingType[fundinglength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% arrange(BHTFundingType_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot2FundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3FundingType)
	templikertPivot3FundingType[is.na(templikertPivot3FundingType)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3FundingType <- templikertPivot3FundingType %>% mutate(Type="Funding Type")
	colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType)[colnames(templikertPivot3FundingType) == "BHTFundingType_f"] <- "Item"
	
	templikerBTGender <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoBTGender <- templikerBTGender %>% group_by(BHTGender_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivoBTGender <- templikertPivoBTGender %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivoBTGender %>% group_by(BHTGender_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2Gender$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Gender)
	genderlength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Gender)
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,1] <- 'Male'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Gender[genderlength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% arrange(BHTGender_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot2Gender %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Gender <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Gender)
	templikertPivot3Gender[is.na(templikertPivot3Gender)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Gender <- templikertPivot3Gender %>% mutate(Type="Gender")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Gender)[colnames(templikertPivot3Gender) == "BHTGender_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertAge <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertAge %>% group_by(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotAge <- templikertPivotAge %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivotAge %>% group_by(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2Age$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2Age)
	agelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2Age)
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,1] <- 'Under 30 Year Olds'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2Age[agelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% arrange(BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot2Age %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3Age <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3Age)
	templikertPivot3Age[is.na(templikertPivot3Age)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3Age <- templikertPivot3Age %>% mutate(Type="Age")
	colnames(templikertPivot3Age)[colnames(templikertPivot3Age) == "BHTeacherAgeGroup1_f"] <- "Item"

	templikertState <- df %>% dplyr::select(BHTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertState %>% group_by(BHTState_f) %>% count(!!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivotState <- templikertPivotState %>% filter(!is.na(!!likert_item_var))
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivotState %>% group_by(BHTState_f) %>% mutate(per = prop.table(n) * 100) 
	templikertPivot2State$n <- NULL	
	templikertPivot2State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot2State)
	templikertPivot2State$BHTState_f <- fct_relevel(templikertPivot2State$BHTState_f, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")
	statelength <- nrow(templikertPivot2State)
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,2] <- 'Strongly Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+1,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,2] <- 'Somewhat Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+2,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,2] <- 'Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+3,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,2] <- 'Neither Agree nor Disagree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+4,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,2] <- 'Somewhat Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+5,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,2] <- 'Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+6,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,1] <- 'Benaadir'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,2] <- 'Strongly Agree'
	templikertPivot2State[statelength+7,3] <- 0
	templikertPivot2State <- templikertPivot2State %>% arrange(BHTState_f, !!likert_item_var)
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot2State %>% pivot_wider(names_from = !!likert_item_var, values_from = per, values_fn = sum)
	templikertPivot3State <- as.data.frame(templikertPivot3State)
	templikertPivot3State[is.na(templikertPivot3State)] <- 0
	templikertPivot3State <- templikertPivot3State %>% mutate(Type="State")
	colnames(templikertPivot3State)[colnames(templikertPivot3State) == "BHTState_f"] <- "Item"
	
	likertcombo <- rbind(templikertPivot3LocationType, templikertPivot3FundingType,  templikertPivot3Gender, templikertPivot3Age, templikertPivot3State)
	
likert(Item~. | Type, likertcombo, xlab='Percentage', ylab='', xlim=c(lmin,lmax), scales=list(x=list(at=seq(lmin,lmax,linterval)), y=list(relation="free")), layout=c(1,5), main=chart_title,  col=(likertPalette7), auto.key=list(text=c("strongly disagree ", "", "", "neither agree nor disagree", "", "", "strongly agree ")), par.settings = parSettingsG)	
}
```

```{r merge baseline and midline student files}
## merge baseline student longitudinal survey and location
Bstudentsurveylonglocate <- merge(Bstudentsurveylong, location, by.x = "BSchoolId", by.y = "SchoolId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
## merge baseline student cross sectional survey and location
Bstudentsurveycrosslocate <- merge(Bstudentsurveycross, location, by.x = "BSchoolId", by.y = "SchoolId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)

## merge midline student longitudinal survey and location
Mstudentsurveylonglocate <- merge(Mstudentsurveylong, location, by.x = "MSchoolId", by.y = "SchoolId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)
## merge midline student cross sectional survey and location
Mstudentsurveycrosslocate <- merge(Mstudentsurveycross, location, by.x = "MSchoolId", by.y = "SchoolId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)

## merge baseline and midline longitudinal data sets
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- merge(Bstudentsurveylonglocate, Mstudentsurveylonglocate, by.x = "BStudentId", by.y = "MStudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE)

## create baseline separate longitudinal study student dataframes
BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- Bstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BstudentsurveylonglocateBAB <- Bstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB')
BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1 <- BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 1')
BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2 <- BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 2')
BstudentsurveylonglocateGr1 <- Bstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BGrade_f=='Grade 1'))

## create midline separate longitudinal study student dataframes
MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- Mstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
MstudentsurveylonglocateBAB <- Mstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MBABProgram_f=='BAB')
MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1 <- MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(MGrade_f=='Grade 1')
MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2 <- MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(MGrade_f=='Grade 2')
MstudentsurveylonglocateGr1 <- Mstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (MBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & MGrade_f=='Grade 1'))

## create baseline constants
BTotStudents <- nrow(Bstudentsurveylonglocate)
BFormalPrimaryStudentTotal <- nrow(BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary)
BBABStudentTotal <- nrow(BstudentsurveylonglocateBAB)
BFormalPrimaryGr1Total <- nrow(BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1)
BFormalPrimaryGr2Total <- nrow(BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2)

BTotalSchoolsList <- unique(Bstudentsurveylonglocate$BSchoolId)
BTotalSchools <- length(BTotalSchoolsList)
BTotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList <- unique(BstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary$BSchoolId)
BTotalFormalPrimarySchools <- length(BTotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList)
BTotalBABSchoolsTotalList <- unique(BstudentsurveylonglocateBAB$BSchoolId)
BTotalBABSchools <- length(BTotalBABSchoolsTotalList)

## create midline constants
MTotStudents <- nrow(Mstudentsurveylonglocate)
MFormalPrimaryStudentTotal <- nrow(MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary)
MBABStudentTotal <- nrow(MstudentsurveylonglocateBAB)
MFormalPrimaryGr1Total <- nrow(MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1)
MFormalPrimaryGr2Total <- nrow(MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2)

MTotalSchoolsList <- unique(Mstudentsurveylonglocate$BSchoolId)
MTotalSchools <- length(MTotalSchoolsList)
MTotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList <- unique(MstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary$BSchoolId)
MTotalFormalPrimarySchools <- length(MTotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList)
MTotalBABSchoolsTotalList <- unique(MstudentsurveylonglocateBAB$BSchoolId)
MTotalBABSchools <- length(MTotalBABSchoolsTotalList)

## crosssectional study student data
BTotCrossStudents <- nrow(Bstudentsurveycrosslocate)
BTotalCrossSchoolsList <- unique(Bstudentsurveycrosslocate$BSchoolId)
BTotalCrossSchools <- length(BTotalCrossSchoolsList)
MTotCrossStudents <- nrow(Mstudentsurveycrosslocate)
MTotalCrossSchoolsList <- unique(Mstudentsurveycrosslocate$MSchoolId)
MTotalCrossSchools <- length(MTotalCrossSchoolsList)

## Subset long and cross to combine baseline
BstudentlongEGSubset <- Bstudentsurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BEGMATotal_n, BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, BEGMATotalPercent_n, BEGRATotal_n, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, BEGRATotalPercent_n, BEGMABaselineLearner_f, BEGRABaselineLearner_f, BOralRdFlncyLearner_f, BReadCompCorrectCat_f, BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, BGender_f, BStudentAgeGroup2_f, State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, BStudentAge, District_f, BSchoolId, BProgramGrade_f)

BstudentcrossEGSubset <- Bstudentsurveycrosslocate %>% dplyr::select(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BEGMATotal_n, BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, BEGMATotalPercent_n, BEGRATotal_n, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, BEGRATotalPercent_n, BEGMABaselineLearner_f, BEGRABaselineLearner_f, BOralRdFlncyLearner_f, BReadCompCorrectCat_f, BOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, BGender_f, BStudentAgeGroup2_f, State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, BStudentAge, District_f, BSchoolId)

BstudentcrossEGSubset <- BstudentcrossEGSubset %>% mutate(BProgramGrade_f = 'BAB Cross')

BstudentsurveyEGSubset <- rbind(BstudentlongEGSubset, BstudentcrossEGSubset)

BstudentsurveyEGSubset <- BstudentsurveyEGSubset %>% mutate( BProgram_f = case_when(
	BProgramGrade_f == 'BAB' ~ 'BAB\nLongitudinal',
	BProgramGrade_f == 'BAB Cross' ~ 'BAB\nCross Sectional',
	BProgramGrade_f == 'Formal Primary Grade 1' ~ 'Formal Primary\nGrade 1',
	BProgramGrade_f == 'Formal Primary Grade 2' ~ 'Formal Primary\nGrade 2'))

## Subset long and cross to combine midline
MstudentlongEGSubset <- Mstudentsurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MEGMATotal_n, MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, MEGMATotalPercent_n, MEGRATotal_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalPercent_n, MEGMAMidlineLearner_f, MEGRAMidlineLearner_f, MOralRdFlncyLearner_f, MReadCompCorrectCat_f, MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, MGender_f, "AgeGroup"= MAgeGroup2_f, State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, MStudentAge, District_f, MSchoolId, MProgramGrade_f)

MstudentcrossEGSubset <- Mstudentsurveycrosslocate %>% dplyr::select(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MEGMATotal_n, MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, MEGMATotalPercent_n, MEGRATotal_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalPercent_n, MEGMAMidlineLearner_f, MEGRAMidlineLearner_f, MOralRdFlncyLearner_f, MReadCompCorrectCat_f, MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, MGender_f, "AgeGroup" = MStudentAgeGroup2_f, State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, MStudentAge, District_f, MSchoolId)

MstudentcrossEGSubset <- MstudentcrossEGSubset %>% mutate(MProgramGrade_f = 'BAB Cross')

MstudentsurveyEGSubset <- rbind(MstudentlongEGSubset, MstudentcrossEGSubset)

MstudentsurveyEGSubset <- MstudentsurveyEGSubset %>% mutate( MProgram_f = case_when(
	MProgramGrade_f == 'BAB' ~ 'BAB\nLongitudinal',
	MProgramGrade_f == 'BAB Cross' ~ 'BAB\nCross Sectional',
	MProgramGrade_f == 'Formal Primary Grade 1' ~ 'Formal Primary\nGrade 1',
	MProgramGrade_f == 'Formal Primary Grade 2' ~ 'Formal Primary\nGrade 2'))
```

```{r merge baseline and midline and endline teacher files}
## merge teacher data sets
BMteachersurveylonglocate <- merge(Bteachersurveylonglocate, Mteachersurveylonglocate, by.x = 'BTeacherId', by.y='MTeacherId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- merge(BMteachersurveylonglocate, EL2teachersurveylonglocate, by.x='BTeacherId', by.y='EL2TeacherId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

## longitudinal study teacher data
BteachersurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryOnly <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, BTBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary Only')
BteachersurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, BTBABProgram_f != 'BAB Only')
BteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, BTBABProgram_f=='BAB Only')
BteachersurveylonglocateBAB <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, BTBABProgram_f!='Formal Primary Only')
BteachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, BTBABProgram_f=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')
BteachersurveylonglocateColocated <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, Colocated=='Yes')
BteachersurveylonglocateBABStandAlone <- filter(Bteachersurveylonglocate, Colocated=='No')
BteachersurveylonglocateIDP <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTLocationType_f=='IDP')
BteachersurveylonglocateRural <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTLocationType_f=='Rural')
BteachersurveylonglocateUrban <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTLocationType_f=='Urban')
BteachersurveylonglocateFemale <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTGender_f=='female')
BteachersurveylonglocateMale <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTGender_f=='male')
BteachersurveylonglocateBenaadir <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTState_f=='Benaadir')
BteachersurveylonglocateHirshabeelle <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTState_f=='Hirshabeelle')
BteachersurveylonglocateJubbaland <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTState_f=='Jubbaland')
BteachersurveylonglocateSouthWest <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTState_f=='South-West')
BteachersurveylonglocateMaay <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTeacherLanguage_f=='Maay')
BteachersurveylonglocateMaxaaTiri <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTeacherLanguage_f=='Maxaa tiri')
BteachersurveylonglocateCommunity <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTFundingType_f=='Community')
BteachersurveylonglocatePrivate <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTFundingType_f=='Private')
BteachersurveylonglocatePublic <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(BTFundingType_f=='Public')

MteachersurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryOnly <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, MTBABProgram_f == 'Formal Primary Only')
MteachersurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, MTBABProgram_f != 'BAB Only')
MteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, MTBABProgram_f=='BAB Only')
MteachersurveylonglocateBAB <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, MTBABProgram_f!='Formal Primary Only')
MteachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, MTBABProgram_f=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')
MteachersurveylonglocateColocated <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, Colocated=='Yes')
MteachersurveylonglocateBABStandAlone <- filter(Mteachersurveylonglocate, Colocated=='No')
MteachersurveylonglocateIDP <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTLocationType_f=='IDP')
MteachersurveylonglocateRural <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTLocationType_f=='Rural')
MteachersurveylonglocateUrban <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTLocationType_f=='Urban')
MteachersurveylonglocateFemale <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTGender_f=='female')
MteachersurveylonglocateMale <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTGender_f=='male')
MteachersurveylonglocateBenaadir <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTState_f=='Benaadir')
MteachersurveylonglocateHirshabeelle <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTState_f=='Hirshabeelle')
MteachersurveylonglocateJubbaland <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTState_f=='Jubbaland')
MteachersurveylonglocateSouthWest <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTState_f=='South-West')
MteachersurveylonglocateMaay <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTeacherLanguage_f=='Maay')
MteachersurveylonglocateMaxaaTiri <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTeacherLanguage_f=='Maxaa tiri')
MteachersurveylonglocateOtherLanguage <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTeacherLanguage_f!='Maay' &  MTeacherLanguage_f!='Maxaa tiri')
MteachersurveylonglocateCommunity <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTFundingType_f=='Community')
MteachersurveylonglocatePrivate <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTFundingType_f=='Private')
MteachersurveylonglocatePublic <- Mteachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(MTFundingType_f=='Public')

EL2teachersurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- filter(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TBABProgram_f != 'BAB Only')
EL2teachersurveylonglocateBABOnly <- filter(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TBABProgram_f=='BAB Only')
EL2teachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, EL2TBABProgram_f=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')
```

```{r coalesce Teacher variables for combined file}
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TMatchPoint = coalesce(BTMatchPoint, MTMatchPoint, EL2TMatchPoint))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TColocated = coalesce(Colocated.x, Colocated.y, EL2Colocated))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TColocation_f = coalesce(BTColocation_f, MTColocation_f, EL2TColocation_f))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TBABSchoolId = coalesce(BTBABSchoolId, MTBABSchoolId, EL2TBABSchoolId))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TFPSchoolId = coalesce(BTFormalPrimarySchoolId, MTFormalPrimarySchoolId, EL2TFormalPrimarySchoolId))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TGender = coalesce(EL2TGender, MTGender, BTGender))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TGenderDesc = coalesce(EL2TGenderDesc, MTGenderDesc, BTGenderDesc))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherAge = coalesce(EL2TeacherAge, MTeacherAge, BTeacherAge))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherAgeGroup1_f = coalesce(EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f, MTeacherAgeGroup1_f, BTeacherAgeGroup1_f))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherEducation = coalesce(EL2TeacherEducation, MTeacherEducation, BTeacherEducation))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherEducation_f = coalesce(EL2TeacherEducation_f, MTeacherEducation_f, BTeacherEducation_f))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TState = coalesce(BTState, MTState, EL2TState))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TDistrict = coalesce(BTDistrict, MTDistrict, EL2TDistrict))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TSchoolNameLocate = coalesce(BTSchoolNameLocate, MTSchoolNameLocate, EL2TSchoolNameLocate))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TLocationTypeDesc = coalesce(BTLocationTypeDesc, MTLocationTypeDesc, EL2TLocationTypeDesc))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TLocationTypeCode = coalesce(BTLocationTypeCode, MTLocationTypeCode, EL2TLocationTypeCode))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TFundingType = coalesce(BTFundingType, MTFundingType, EL2TFundingType))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherLanguage = coalesce(BTeacherLanguage, MTeacherLanguage, EL2TeacherLanguage))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TeacherLanguage_f = coalesce(BTeacherLanguage_f, MTeacherLanguage_f, EL2TeacherLanguage_f))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TLanguageTeach = coalesce(EL2TLanguageTeach, MTLanguageTeach, BTLanguageTeach))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TLanguageTeach_f = coalesce(EL2TLanguageTeach_f, MTLanguageTeach_f, BTLanguageTeach_f))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TLanguageTeachOther = coalesce(BTLanguageTeachOther, MTLanguageTeachOther, EL2TLanguageTeachOther))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% mutate(TOtherOccupation_f = coalesce(EL2TOtherOccupation_f, MTOtherOccupation_f, BTOtherOccupation_f))

BMEL2NumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate)
BMEL2ColocatedNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TColocated=='Yes'))
BMEL2BABCenterNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TColocated=='No'))
BMEL2IDPNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TLocationTypeDesc=='IDP'))
BMEL2RuralNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TLocationTypeDesc=='Rural'))
BMEL2UrbanNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TLocationTypeDesc=='Urban'))
BMEL2FemaleNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TGenderDesc=='female'))
BMEL2MaleNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TGenderDesc=='male'))
BMEL2BenaadirNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TState=='Benaadir'))
BMEL2HirshabeelleNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TState=='Hirshabeelle'))
BMEL2JubbalandNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TState=='Jubbaland'))
BMEL2SouthWestNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TState=='South-West'))
BMEL2MaayNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TeacherLanguage_f=='Maay'))
BMEL2MaxaaTiriNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TeacherLanguage_f=='Maxaa tiri'))
BMEL2OtherLanguageNumTeachers <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TeacherLanguage_f!='Maay' &  TeacherLanguage_f!='Maxaa tiri'))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocateCommunity <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TFundingType=='Community'))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocatePrivate <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TFundingType=='Private'))
BMEL2teachersurveylonglocatePublic <- nrow(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% filter(TFundingType=='Public'))
```

```{r merge baseline and midline and endline head teacher files}
## merge head teacher data sets
BMheadteachersurveylonglocate <- merge(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate, Mheadteachersurveylonglocate, by.x = 'BHeadTeacherId', by.y='MHeadTeacherId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate <- merge(BMheadteachersurveylonglocate, EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, by.x='BHeadTeacherId', by.y='EL2HeadTeacherId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

## longitudinal study teacher data
BheadteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly <- filter(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate, BHTBABProgramDesc=='BAB Only')
BheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate, BHTBABProgramDesc=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')

MheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(Mheadteachersurveylonglocate, MHTBABProgramDesc=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')

EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly <- filter(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2HTBABProgramDesc=='BAB Only')
EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBoth <- filter(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate, EL2HTBABProgramDesc=='Both BAB and Formal Primary')

BTotHTeachers <- nrow(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate)
BBABOnlyHTeacherTotal <- nrow(BheadteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly)
BBothHTeacherTotal <- nrow(BheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth)

MTotHTeachers <- nrow(Mheadteachersurveylonglocate)
MBABOnlyHTeacherTotal <- nrow(MheadteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly)
MBothHTeacherTotal <- nrow(MheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth)

EL2TotHTeachers <- nrow(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate)
EL2BABOnlyHTeacherTotal <- nrow(EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly)
EL2BothHTeacherTotal <- nrow(EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBoth)

BTotalHTeacherSchoolsList <- unique(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTSchoolName)
BTotalHTeacherSchools <- length(BTotalHTeacherSchoolsList)
BTotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList <- unique(BheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth$BHTSchoolName)
BTotalHTeacherBothSchools <- length(BTotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList)
BTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList <- unique(BheadteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly$BHTSchoolName)
BTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchools <- length(BTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList)

MTotalHTeacherSchoolsList <- unique(Mheadteachersurveylonglocate$MHTSchoolName)
MTotalHTeacherSchools <- length(MTotalHTeacherSchoolsList)
MTotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList <- unique(MheadteachersurveylonglocateBoth$MHTSchoolName)
MTotalHTeacherBothSchools <- length(MTotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList)
MTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList <- unique(MheadteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly$MHTSchoolName)
MTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchools <- length(MTotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList)

EL2TotalHTeacherSchoolsList <- unique(EL2headteachersurveylonglocate$EL2HTSchoolName)
EL2TotalHTeacherSchools <- length(EL2TotalHTeacherSchoolsList)
EL2TotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList <- unique(EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBoth$EL2HTSchoolName)
EL2TotalHTeacherBothSchools <- length(EL2TotalHTeacherBothSchoolsList)
EL2TotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList <- unique(EL2headteachersurveylonglocateBABOnly$EL2HTSchoolName)
EL2TotalHTeacherBABOnlySchools <- length(EL2TotalHTeacherBABOnlySchoolsList)

BTotHeadTeachers <- nrow(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate)

BTotalHeadTeacherSchoolsList <- unique(Bheadteachersurveylonglocate$BHTBASchoolId)
BTotalHeadTeacherSchools <- length(BTotalHeadTeacherSchoolsList)
```

```{r merge baseline and endline level 2 student files}
## merge baseline level 2 student longitudinal survey and location
BL2studentsurveylonglocate <- merge(BL2studentsurveylong, location, by.x = "BL2SchoolId", by.y = "SchoolId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = FALSE)

## merge endline level 2 student longitudinal survey and location
EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- merge(EL2studentsurveylong, location, by.x='EL2SchoolId', by.y='SchoolId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

## merge endline level 1 grade 2 student longitudinal survey and location
ELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- merge(ELG2studentsurveylong, location, by.x='ELG2SchoolId', by.y='SchoolId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

## merge baseline and endline level 2 data sets
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- merge(BL2studentsurveylonglocate, EL2studentsurveylonglocate, by.x = "BL2StudentId", by.y = "EL2StudentId", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE)

## create baseline level 2 separate longitudinal study student dataframes
BL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- BL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BL2BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- BL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BL2BABProgram_f=='BAB')

## create baseline level 2 constants
BL2TotStudents <- nrow(BL2studentsurveylonglocate)
BL2FormalPrimaryStudentTotal <- nrow(BL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary)
BL2BABStudentTotal <- nrow(BL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB)

BL2TotalSchoolsList <- unique(BL2studentsurveylonglocate$BL2SchoolId)
BL2TotalSchools <- length(BL2TotalSchoolsList)
BL2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList <- unique(BL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary$BL2SchoolId)
BL2TotalFormalPrimarySchools <- length(BL2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList)
BL2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList <- unique(BL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB$BL2SchoolId)
BL2TotalBABSchools <- length(BL2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList)

## create endline level 2 separate longitudinal study student dataframes
EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(EL2BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(EL2BABProgram_f=='BAB')

## create baseline level 2 constants
EL2TotStudents <- nrow(EL2studentsurveylonglocate)
EL2FormalPrimaryStudentTotal <- nrow(EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary)
EL2BABStudentTotal <- nrow(EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB)

EL2TotalSchoolsList <- unique(EL2studentsurveylonglocate$EL2SchoolId)
EL2TotalSchools <- length(EL2TotalSchoolsList)
EL2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList <- unique(EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary$EL2SchoolId)
EL2TotalFormalPrimarySchools <- length(EL2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList)
EL2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList <- unique(EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB$EL2SchoolId)
EL2TotalBABSchools <- length(EL2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList)

## create endline level 1 grade 2 separate longitudinal study student dataframes
ELG2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- ELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(ELG2BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
ELG2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- ELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(ELG2BABProgram_f=='BAB')

## create baseline level 1 grade 2 constants
ELG2TotStudents <- nrow(ELG2studentsurveylonglocate)
ELG2FormalPrimaryStudentTotal <- nrow(ELG2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary)
ELG2BABStudentTotal <- nrow(ELG2studentsurveylonglocateBAB)

ELG2TotalSchoolsList <- unique(ELG2studentsurveylonglocate$ELG2SchoolId)
ELG2TotalSchools <- length(ELG2TotalSchoolsList)
ELG2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList <- unique(ELG2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary$ELG2SchoolId)
ELG2TotalFormalPrimarySchools <- length(ELG2TotalFormalPrimarySchoolsTotalList)
ELG2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList <- unique(ELG2studentsurveylonglocateBAB$ELG2SchoolId)
ELG2TotalBABSchools <- length(ELG2TotalBABSchoolsTotalList)
```

```{r create gain variables for baseline and midline combo data files}
# use coalesce to combine baseline and midline demographic variables

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeDesc_f = coalesce(LocationTypeDesc_f.x, LocationTypeDesc_f.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeCode = coalesce(LocationTypeCode.x, LocationTypeCode.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated = coalesce(Colocated.x, Colocated.y))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$Colocated.x <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$Colocated.y <- NULL

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated_f = coalesce(Colocated_f.x, Colocated_f.y))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$Colocated_f.x <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$Colocated_f.y <- NULL

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram = coalesce(BBABProgram, MBABProgram))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram_f = coalesce(BBABProgram_f, MBABProgram_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ProgramGrade_f = coalesce(BProgramGrade_f, MProgramGrade_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate$BProgramGrade_f <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate$ProgramGrade_f

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Grade_f = coalesce(BGrade_f, MGrade_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State_f = coalesce(State_f.x, State_f.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State = coalesce(State.x, State.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District_f = coalesce(District_f.x, District_f.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District = coalesce(District.x, District.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolId = coalesce(BSchoolId, MSchoolId))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolName = coalesce(SchoolName.x, SchoolName.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc_f = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc_f.x, FundingTypeDesc_f.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender_f = coalesce(BGender_f, MGender_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender2_f = coalesce(BGender2_f, MGender2_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender = coalesce(BGender, MGender))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup1_f = coalesce(BStudentAgeGroup1_f, MAgeGroup1_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup2_f = coalesce(BStudentAgeGroup2_f, MAgeGroup2_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup3_f = coalesce(BStudentAgeGroup3_f, MAgeGroup3_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc.x, FundingTypeDesc.y))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages_f = coalesce(BLanguages_f, MLanguages_f))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages2_f = coalesce(BLanguages2_f, MLanguages2_f))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(IDPFamily_f = coalesce(BIDPFamily_f, MIDPFamily_f))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SES_Sum_f = coalesce(BSES_Sum_f, MSES_Sum_f))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MotherLiteracy_f = coalesce(BMotherLiteracy_f, MMotherLiteracy_f))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FatherLiteracy_f = coalesce(BFatherLiteracy_f, MFatherLiteracy_f))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc = coalesce(BStudentLivesWithOtherDesc, MStudentLivesWithOtherDesc))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MatchPoint = coalesce(MatchPoint.x, MatchPoint.y))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.x <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.y <- NULL

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(DataPoints = coalesce(DataPoints.x, DataPoints.y))
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$DataPoints.x.x <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$DataPoints.y.y <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.x <- NULL
BMstudentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.y <- NULL

## Calculate Gains and Rate of Gains for overall EGRA and EGMA
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGRAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (MEGRATotalAdjusted_n - BEGRATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGRAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MEGRAGain) & BEGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (MEGRAGain/(100 - BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGRAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(MEGRAGain) & BEGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (MEGRAGain/(100 - BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGRAOutlier = ifelse((MEGRAPCTGain < -100 | BSchoolId==1358 | BSchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGMAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (MEGMATotalAdjusted_n - BEGMATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGMAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MEGMAGain) & BEGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (MEGMAGain/(100 - BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGMAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(MEGMAGain) & BEGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (MEGMAGain/(100 - BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MOverallGain = MEGRAGain + MEGMAGain)

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MEGMAOutlier = ifelse((MEGMAPCTGain < -100 | BSchoolId==1358 | BSchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MOutlier = MEGRAOutlier + MEGMAOutlier)

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MOutlier = ifelse(is.na(MOutlier), 0, MOutlier))


## Calculate Gains for EGRA Subsections
BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MListeningCompGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n - BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MListeningCompPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MListeningCompGain) & BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n != 100), (MListeningCompGain/(100 - BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MPhonAwareGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n - BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MPhonAwarePCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MPhonAwareGain) & BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n !=100), (MPhonAwareGain/(100 - BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MLetSoundGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram),  (MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n - BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MLetSoundPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MLetSoundGain) & BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n != 100),  (MLetSoundGain/(100 - BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MInventWordsGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n - BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MInventWordsPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(MInventWordsGain) & BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n != 100), (MInventWordsGain/(100 - BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BMstudentsurveylonglocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MRealWordsGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram),  (MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n - BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))
```

```{r create gain variables for baseline and endline level 2 combo data files}
## use coalesce to combine baseline and midline demographic variables
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeDesc_f = coalesce(LocationTypeDesc_f.x, LocationTypeDesc_f.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeCode = coalesce(LocationTypeCode.x, LocationTypeCode.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated = coalesce(Colocated.x, Colocated.y))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Colocated.x <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Colocated.y <- NULL

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated_f = coalesce(Colocated_f.x, Colocated_f.y))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Colocated_f.x <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Colocated_f.y <- NULL

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram = coalesce(BL2BABProgram, EL2BABProgram))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram_f = coalesce(BL2BABProgram_f, EL2BABProgram_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ProgramGrade_f = coalesce(BL2ProgramGrade_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Grade_f = coalesce(BL2Grade_f, EL2Grade_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State_f = coalesce(State_f.x, State_f.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State = coalesce(State.x, State.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District_f = coalesce(District_f.x, District_f.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District = coalesce(District.x, District.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolId = coalesce(BL2SchoolId, EL2SchoolId))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolName = coalesce(SchoolName.x, SchoolName.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc_f = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc_f.x, FundingTypeDesc_f.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender_f = coalesce(BL2Gender_f, EL2Gender_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender2_f = coalesce(BL2Gender2_f, EL2Gender2_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender = coalesce(BL2Gender, EL2Gender))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup1_f = coalesce(BL2AgeGroup1_f, EL2AgeGroup1_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup2_f = coalesce(BL2AgeGroup2_f, EL2AgeGroup2_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup3_f = coalesce(BL2AgeGroup3_f, EL2AgeGroup3_f))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc.x, FundingTypeDesc.y))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages_f = coalesce(EL2Languages_f, NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages2_f = coalesce(EL2Languages2_f, NA))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(IDPFamily_f = coalesce(EL2IDPFamily_f, NA))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SES_Sum_f = coalesce(EL2SES_Sum_f, NA))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MotherLiteracy_f = coalesce(EL2MotherLiteracy_f, NA))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FatherLiteracy_f = coalesce(EL2FatherLiteracy_f, NA))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc = coalesce(EL2StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MatchPoint = coalesce(MatchPoint.x, MatchPoint.y))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.x <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.y <- NULL

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(DataPoints = coalesce(DataPoints.x, DataPoints.y))
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$DataPoints.x.x <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$DataPoints.y.y <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.x <- NULL
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$MatchPoint.y <- NULL

## Calculate Gains and Rate of Gains for overall EGRA and EGMA
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGRAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n - BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGRAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(L2EGRAGain) & BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (L2EGRAGain/(100 - BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGRAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(L2EGRAGain) & BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (L2EGRAGain/(100 - BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

## set outliers to anyone with a pct gain score < -100 or from Waberi Primary 1358 or Yaqshiid school 1353
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGRAOutlier = ifelse((L2EGRAPCTGain < -100 | EL2SchoolId==1358 | EL2SchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGMAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n - BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGMAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(L2EGMAGain) & BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (L2EGMAGain/(100 - BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGMAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(L2EGMAGain) & BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (L2EGMAGain/(100 - BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2OverallGain = L2EGRAGain + L2EGMAGain)

## set outliers to anyone with a pct gain score < -100 or from Waberi Primary 1358 or Yaqshiid school 1353
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2EGMAOutlier = ifelse((L2EGMAPCTGain < -100 | EL2SchoolId==1358 | EL2SchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2Outlier = L2EGRAOutlier + L2EGMAOutlier)
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EL2Outlier = ifelse(is.na(EL2Outlier), 0, EL2Outlier))

## Calculate Gains for EGRA Subsections
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2ListeningCompGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n - BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2ListeningCompPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(L2ListeningCompGain) & BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n != 100), (L2ListeningCompGain/(100 - BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(L2PhonAwareGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n - BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))
```
