```{r create common variables from baseline to endline files}
## use coalesce to combine baseline, midline, and baseline level 2 demographic variables

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State_f = coalesce(State_f.x, State_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State = coalesce(State.x, State.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District_f = coalesce(District_f.x, District_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District = coalesce(District.x, District.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolId = coalesce(SchoolId.x, SchoolId.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolName = coalesce(SchoolName.x, SchoolName.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram_f = coalesce(BABProgram_f.x, BABProgram_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram = coalesce(BABProgram.x, BABProgram.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgramGrade_f = coalesce(ProgramGrade_f.x, ProgramGrade_f.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeDesc_f = coalesce(LocationTypeDesc_f.x, LocationTypeDesc_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeCode = coalesce(LocationTypeCode.x, LocationTypeCode.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated = coalesce(Colocated.x, Colocated.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated_f = coalesce(Colocated_f.x, Colocated_f.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc_f = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc_f.x, FundingTypeDesc_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc.x, FundingTypeDesc.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages_f = coalesce(Languages_f.x, Languages_f.x))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages2_f = coalesce(Languages2_f.x, Languages2_f.x))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(IDPFamily_f = coalesce(IDPFamily_f.x, IDPFamily_f.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SES_Sum_f = coalesce(EL2SES_Sum_f, SES_Sum_f.x))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MotherLiteracy_f = coalesce(MotherLiteracy_f.x, MotherLiteracy_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FatherLiteracy_f = coalesce(FatherLiteracy_f.x, FatherLiteracy_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc = coalesce(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc.x, StudentLivesWithOtherDesc.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender_f = coalesce(Gender_f.x, Gender_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender2_f = coalesce(Gender2_f.x, Gender2_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender = coalesce(Gender.x, Gender.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup1_f = coalesce(AgeGroup1_f.x, AgeGroup1_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup2_f = coalesce(AgeGroup2_f.x, AgeGroup2_f.y))
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup3_f = coalesce(AgeGroup3_f.x, AgeGroup3_f.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MatchPoint = coalesce(MatchPoint.x, MatchPoint.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(DataPoints = coalesce(DataPoints.x, DataPoints.y))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(HopeChange = EL2Hope_Avg - MHope_Avg)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRAPCTGainChange = L2EGRAPCTGain - MEGRAPCTGain)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMAPCTGainChange = L2EGMAPCTGain - MEGMAPCTGain)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRAPCTGainSum = L2EGRAPCTGain + MEGRAPCTGain)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMAPCTGainSum = L2EGMAPCTGain + MEGMAPCTGain)

EGRAGainList <- c('L2EGRAPCTGain', 'MEGRAPCTGain')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRAPCTGainAvg = rowMeans(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate[EGRAGainList], na.rm=TRUE))

EGMAGainList <- c('L2EGMAPCTGain', 'MEGMAPCTGain')                              
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMAPCTGainAvg = rowMeans(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate[EGMAGainList], na.rm=TRUE))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRATotalAdjustedChange = EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n - MEGRATotalAdjusted_n)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMATotalAdjustedChange = EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n - MEGMATotalAdjusted_n)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRATotalAdjustedSum = EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n + MEGRATotalAdjusted_n)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMATotalAdjustedSum = EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n + MEGMATotalAdjusted_n)

EGRAGainList <- c('EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n', 'MEGRATotalAdjusted_n')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGRATotalAdjustedAvg = rowMeans(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate[EGRAGainList], na.rm=TRUE))

EGMAGainList <- c('EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n', 'MEGMATotalAdjusted_n')                         
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(EGMATotalAdjustedAvg = rowMeans(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate[EGMAGainList], na.rm=TRUE))

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(OverallOutlier = MOutlier + EL2Outlier)

OutlierParticipantIdList <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(OverallOutlier>=1) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr1Retention[is.na(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr1Retention)] <- 0
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr2Retention[is.na(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr2Retention)] <- 0

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr1Retention[is.na(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr1Retention)] <- 0
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr2Retention[is.na(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate$Yr2Retention)] <- 0

```

```{r create common variables from midline to endline level 1 grade 2 files}
## use coalesce to combine baseline, midline, and endline level 1 demographic variables

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State_f = coalesce(State_f.x, State_f.y))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(State = coalesce(State.x, State.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District_f = coalesce(District_f.x, District_f.y))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(District = coalesce(District.x, District.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolId = coalesce(SchoolId, ELG2SchoolId))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SchoolName = coalesce(SchoolName.x, SchoolName.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram_f = coalesce(BABProgram_f, ELG2BABProgram_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgram = coalesce(BABProgram, ELG2BABProgram))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(BABProgramGrade_f = coalesce(ProgramGrade_f))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeDesc_f = coalesce(LocationTypeDesc_f.x, LocationTypeDesc_f.y))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(LocationTypeCode = coalesce(LocationTypeCode.x, LocationTypeCode.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated = coalesce(Colocated.x, Colocated.y))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Colocated_f = coalesce(Colocated_f.x, Colocated_f.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc_f = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc_f.x, FundingTypeDesc_f.y))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FundingTypeDesc = coalesce(FundingTypeDesc.x, FundingTypeDesc.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages_f = coalesce(Languages_f, ELG2Languages_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Languages2_f = coalesce(Languages2_f, ELG2Languages2_f))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(IDPFamily_f = coalesce(IDPFamily_f, ELG2IDPFamily_f))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(SES_Sum_f = coalesce(ELG2SES_Sum_f, SES_Sum_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MotherLiteracy_f = coalesce(MotherLiteracy_f, ELG2MotherLiteracy_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(FatherLiteracy_f = coalesce(FatherLiteracy_f, ELG2FatherLiteracy_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc = coalesce(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc, ELG2StudentLivesWithOtherDesc))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender_f = coalesce(Gender_f, ELG2Gender_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender2_f = coalesce(Gender2_f, ELG2Gender2_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(Gender = coalesce(Gender, ELG2Gender))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup1_f = coalesce(AgeGroup1_f, ELG2AgeGroup1_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup2_f = coalesce(AgeGroup2_f, ELG2AgeGroup2_f))
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(AgeGroup3_f = coalesce(AgeGroup3_f, ELG2AgeGroup3_f))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(MatchPoint = coalesce(MatchPoint.x, MatchPoint.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(DataPoints = coalesce(DataPoints.x, DataPoints.y))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(HopeChange = ELG2Hope_Avg - MHope_Avg)

## Calculate Gains and Rate of Gains for overall EGRA and EGMA
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGRAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (ELG2EGRATotalAdjusted_n - MEGRATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGRAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(ELG2EGRAGain) & MEGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (ELG2EGRAGain/(100 - MEGRATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGRAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(ELG2EGRAGain) & MEGRATotalAdjusted_n < 100), (ELG2EGRAGain/(100 - MEGRATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGRAOutlier = ifelse((ELG2EGRAPCTGain < -100 | BSchoolId==1358 | BSchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGMAGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (ELG2EGMATotalAdjusted_n - MEGMATotalAdjusted_n), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGMAPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(ELG2EGMAGain) & MEGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (ELG2EGMAGain/(100 - MEGMATotalAdjusted_n)*100), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGMAPCTGain2 = ifelse((!is.na(ELG2EGMAGain) & MEGMATotalAdjusted_n != 100), (ELG2EGMAGain/(100 - MEGMATotalAdjusted_n)), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2OverallGain = ELG2EGRAGain + ELG2EGMAGain)

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2EGMAOutlier = ifelse((ELG2EGMAPCTGain < -100 | BSchoolId==1358 | BSchoolId==1353), 1, 0))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2Outlier = ELG2EGRAOutlier + ELG2EGMAOutlier)

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2Outlier = ifelse(is.na(ELG2Outlier), 0, ELG2Outlier))

## Calculate Gains for EGRA Subsections
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2ListeningCompGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (ELG2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n - MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2ListeningCompPCTGain = ifelse((!is.na(ELG2ListeningCompGain) & MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n != 100), (ELG2ListeningCompGain/(100 - MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n)*100), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(ELG2PhonAwareGain = ifelse(!is.na(BABProgram), (ELG2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n - MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n), NA))

BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% mutate(OverallOutlier = MOutlier + ELG2Outlier)

OutlierParticipantIdListELG2 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(OverallOutlier>=1) %>% dplyr::select(BStudentId)

OutlierParticipantIdListCombined <- merge(OutlierParticipantIdList, OutlierParticipantIdListELG2, all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)
```

```{r endline merge level 1 and 2 data}
Endlinestudentsurvey <- merge(EndlineLevel2studentsurvey, EndlineLevel1studentsurvey, by.x='StudentId', by.y='StudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE) 

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(State_f = coalesce(State_f.x, State_f.y))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MSelfEsteem_Avg = coalesce(MSelfEsteem_Avg.x, MSelfEsteem_Avg.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSelfEsteem_Avg.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSelfEsteem_Avg.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MHope_Avg = coalesce(MHope_Avg.x, MHope_Avg.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MHope_Avg.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MHope_Avg.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MEmpathy_Avg = coalesce(MEmpathy_Avg.x, MEmpathy_Avg.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MEmpathy_Avg.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MEmpathy_Avg.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MCivicEngage_Avg = coalesce(MCivicEngage_Avg.x, MCivicEngage_Avg.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MCivicEngage_Avg.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MCivicEngage_Avg.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MStdntSatisCNV_Avg = coalesce(MStdntSatisCNV_Avg.x, MStdntSatisCNV_Avg.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MStdntSatisCNV_Avg.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MStdntSatisCNV_Avg.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MSafetySchool = coalesce(MSafetySchool.x, MSafetySchool.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSafetySchool.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSafetySchool.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate( MSafetyCmmnty = coalesce(MSafetyCmmnty.x, MSafetyCmmnty.y))
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSafetyCmmnty.x <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey$MSafetyCmmnty.y <- NULL
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndEmpathy_Avg = coalesce(EL2Empathy_Avg, ELG2Empathy_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndSelfEsteem_Avg = coalesce(EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, ELG2SelfEsteem_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndStdntSatis_Avg = coalesce(EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg, ELG2StdntSatisCNV_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndSafetySchool_Avg = coalesce(EL2SafetySchool_Avg, ELG2SafetySchool_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndSafetyCmmnty_Avg = coalesce(EL2SafetyCmmnty_Avg, ELG2SafetyCmmnty_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndSafetyHome_Avg = coalesce(EL2SafetyHome_Avg, ELG2SafetyHome_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndEquity_Avg = coalesce(EL2Equity_Avg, ELG2Equity_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndCmmntyBlngng_Avg = coalesce(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg, ELG2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndCivicEngage_Avg = coalesce(EL2CivicEngage_Avg, ELG2CivicEngage_Avg))
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(EndHope_Avg = coalesce(EL2Hope_Avg, ELG2Hope_Avg))

Endlinestudentsurvey$SES_Sum_f <- fct_relevel(Endlinestudentsurvey$SES_Sum_f, "none", "low", "medium", "high")

## Benchmark data
## combine end of year 1 oral reading fluency items per minute data for level 1 BAB and grade 2 formal primary students with end of year 2 grade 2 students for benchmark analysis at end of grade 2
Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = coalesce(ELG2OralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, MOralRdFlncyItemsPerMinuteCreative_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2InventWordItemsPerMinuteCreative_n = coalesce(ELG2InventWordItemsPerMinuteCreative_n, MInventWordItemsPerMinuteCreative_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n = coalesce(ELG2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2ReadCompCorrectCat_f = coalesce(ELG2ReadCompCorrectCat_f, MReadCompCorrectCat_f))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n = coalesce(ELG2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2AddSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n = coalesce(ELG2AddSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n = coalesce(ELG2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2InventWordZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2InventWordZeroScore_n, MInventWordZeroScore_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2OralRdFlncyZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2OralRdFlncyZeroScore_n, MOralRdFlncyZeroScore_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2ReadCompZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2ReadCompZeroScore_n, MReadCompZeroScore_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2MissNumZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2MissNumZeroScore_n, MMissNumZeroScore_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2AddSubLvl2ZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2AddSubLvl2ZeroScore_n, MAddSubLvl2ZeroScore_n))

Endlinestudentsurvey <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% mutate(GR2WordProbZeroScore_n = coalesce(ELG2WordProbZeroScore_n, MWordProbZeroScore_n))
```

```{r create data frames for endline student survey}
## Endline Matched Pairs data sets
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimary <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimarySansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimary %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr1 <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BABProgramGrade_f=='Formal Primary Grade 1')
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr1SansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr1 %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr2 <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BABProgramGrade_f=='Formal Primary Grade 2')
EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr2SansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr2 %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyBAB <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyBAB %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuads <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMBL2EL2')
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsBAB <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuads %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsFP <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuads %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')

EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedTriads <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMELG2')
EndlinestudentsurveyMatched <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMELG2' | MatchPoint=='BMBL2EL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFP <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBAB <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')

## create EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedPairs data file without PCTGain outliers
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuads %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuads %>% filter(OverallOutlier >= 1)
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsBABSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsBAB %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsFPSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsFP %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)

EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(OverallOutlier>0)
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFP %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBAB %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedTriadsSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedTriads %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPGR1SansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BABProgramGrade_f=='Formal Primary Grade 1')
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPGR2SansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatched %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BABProgramGrade_f=='Formal Primary Grade 2')

EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier <- Endlinestudentsurvey %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)

BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateSansOutlier <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateSansOutlier <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter((OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier)) & SchoolId!=1059)

## create student data files for retention and attrition
EndlinestudentsurveyBaseline <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyMidline <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'M' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr1End <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'M' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyMidlineRetained <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Retention <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyMidlineLost <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Attrition <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyEndline <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2' | MatchPoint == 'ELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr2End <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Retention <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Attrition <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineRetained <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetention <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttrition <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLost <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLostBAB <- EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLost %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')

EndlinestudentsurveyLostBtwnMidEnd <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyLostBtwnMidEndSansOutlier <- EndlinestudentsurveyLostBtwnMidEnd %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1 | is.na(OverallOutlier))

## create BAB student data files for retention and attrition
EndlinestudentsurveyBABBaseline <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABMidline <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'M' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1End <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'M' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABMidlineRetained <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Retention <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABMidlineLost <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Attrition <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABEndline <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2' | MatchPoint == 'ELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2End <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MEL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Retention <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2EL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Attrition <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2' | MatchPoint == 'MBL2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBABEndlineRetained <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrRetention <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BELG2' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMEL2' | MatchPoint == 'BMELG2')

EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrAttrition <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B' | MatchPoint == 'BBL2' | MatchPoint == 'BM' | MatchPoint == 'BMBL2')

## create studentslost data file with students that started at baseline but didn't make it to endline
EndLoststudents <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EndLoststudentsBAB <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EndLoststudentsFP <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimarySansOutlier %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EndLoststudentsFPGr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr1SansOutlier %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EndLoststudentsFPGr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyFormalPrimaryGr2SansOutlier %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
```

```{r create separate data frames for baseline-endline combo files}
## create baseline-midline combo separate longitudinal study student dataframes 
## first create dataframe of matched pairs
BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateBAB <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 1')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 2')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateGr1 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BGrade_f=='Grade 1'))
BMstudentsurveylonglocateBABFPGr2 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BGrade_f=='Grade 2'))

## Matched Pairs data sets
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BM' | MatchPoint=='BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint=='BMEL2' | MatchPoint=='BMBL2' | MatchPoint=='BMELG2')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBAB <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFP <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr1 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFP %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 1')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr2 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFP %>% filter(BGrade_f=='Grade 2')
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBABGr1 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BGrade_f=='Grade 1'))
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBABGr2 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BBABProgram_f=='BAB' | (BBABProgram_f=='Formal Primary' & BGrade_f=='Grade 2'))

## create baseline level 2 and endline level 1 combo separate longitudinal study student dataframes BL2EL2
## first create dataframe of matched pairs
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')

## BL2EL2 Matched Pairs data sets
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMBL2EL2' | MatchPoint=='MBL2EL2' | MatchPoint=='BBL2EL2' | MatchPoint=='BL2EL2')
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBAB <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFP <- BL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')

## Endline Matched Pairs data sets
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuads <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMBL2EL2')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsBAB <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuads %>% filter(EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsFP <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuads %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')

## Endline level 1 grade2 Matched Pairs data sets
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateBAB <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriads <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MatchPoint=='BMELG2')
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsBAB <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriads %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='BAB')
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsFP <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriads %>% filter(BABProgram_f=='Formal Primary')

## create BMstudentsurveylocaateMatchedPairs data file without outliers
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsSansOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(MOutlier<1)
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairs %>% filter(MOutlier>0)
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBABSansOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsBAB %>% filter(MOutlier<1)
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPSansOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFP %>% filter(MOutlier<1)
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr1SansOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr1 %>% filter(MOutlier<1)
BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr2SansOutlier <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateMatchedPairsFPGr2 %>% filter(MOutlier<1)

## create BMBL2EL2studentsurveylocaateMatchedPairs data file without outliers
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuads %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsOutlier <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuads %>% filter(OverallOutlier>0)
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsBABSansOutlier <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsBAB %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)
BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsFPSansOutlier <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsFP %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)

## create BMELG2 studentsurveylocaateMatchedPairs data file without outliers
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriads %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsOutlier <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriads %>% filter(OverallOutlier>0)
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsBABSansOutlier <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsBAB %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)
BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsFPSansOutlier <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsFP %>% filter(OverallOutlier<1)

## create studentslost data file with students that started at baseline but didn't make it to midline
MLoststudentslocate <- BMstudentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(MatchPoint== 'B')
MLoststudentslocateBAB <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateBAB %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B')
MLoststudentslocateFP <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B')
MLoststudentslocateFPGr1 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr1 %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B')
MLoststudentslocateFPGr2 <- BMstudentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimaryGr2 %>% filter(MatchPoint == 'B')

## create studentslost data file with students that started at baseline but didn't make it to endline
EL2Loststudentslocate <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EL2LoststudentslocateBAB <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateBAB %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
EL2LoststudentslocateFP <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateFormalPrimary %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
ELG2Loststudentslocate <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocate %>% filter(Retention==0 | is.na(Retention))
```

## Longitudinal Study Student Data Summary

<br/>

```{r baseline-endline retained students build demographics by state location and program type school totals}
schoolsubset1A <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubset1A <- unique(schoolsubset1A)
schoolsubset2A <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubset2A <- unique(schoolsubset2A)

schoolTotal1A <- schoolsubset1A %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(State_f)
schoolTotal2A <- schoolsubset2A %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f)

dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- schoolsubset1A %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f,  BABProgram_f) %>% count(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f)
colnames(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A) <- c("State", "Location Type", "Program Type", "School SubTotal")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- dfdemostatelocateprogram1A %>% mutate("School Total by Location" = '')
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[2] <- schoolTotal2A[1,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[4] <- schoolTotal2A[2,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[6] <- schoolTotal2A[3,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[8] <- schoolTotal2A[4,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[10] <- schoolTotal2A[5,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[12] <- schoolTotal2A[6,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[14] <- schoolTotal2A[7,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[15] <- schoolTotal2A[8,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by Location`[17] <- schoolTotal2A[9,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- dfdemostatelocateprogram1A %>% mutate("School Total by State" = '')
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by State`[4] <- schoolTotal1A[1,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by State`[8] <- schoolTotal1A[2,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by State`[12] <- schoolTotal1A[3,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A$`School Total by State`[17] <- schoolTotal1A[4,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- flextable(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- merge_v(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- valign(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, valign = "top", part = "all")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- autofit(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- height(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, height= .08)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=1, 1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=2, .9)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=3, 1.2)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=4, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=5, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, j=6, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 2, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 4, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 6, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 8, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 10, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 12, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 14, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = 16, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=2, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=4, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=6, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=8, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=10, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=12, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=14, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i=15, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- padding(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- fontsize(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1A <- fix_border_issues(dfdemostatelocateprogram1A)
```

```{r baseline-endline retained students build demo by location type}
dfdemolocate2b <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 7))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfdemolocate2b) <- c("Location Type", "BAB Schools", "Formal Primary Schools", "Total Schools", "BAB Students", "Formal Primary Students", "Total Students")
dfdemolocate2b$`Location Type`[1] <- "IDP"
dfdemolocate2b$`Location Type`[2] <- "Rural"
dfdemolocate2b$`Location Type`[3] <- "Urban"

EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

schoolsubset2c <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubset2c <- unique(schoolsubset2c)
schoolsubset2c <- schoolsubset2c %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()

schoolsubset2b <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f,  SchoolId)
schoolsubset2b <- unique(schoolsubset2b)
schoolsubset2b <- schoolsubset2b %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f) %>% count()

dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Schools`[1] <- schoolsubset2b[1,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Schools`[1] <- schoolsubset2b[2,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Schools`[2] <- schoolsubset2b[3,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Schools`[2] <- schoolsubset2b[4,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Schools`[3] <- schoolsubset2b[5,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Schools`[3] <- schoolsubset2b[6,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Schools`[1] <- schoolsubset2c[1,2]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Schools`[2] <- schoolsubset2c[2,2]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Schools`[3] <- schoolsubset2c[3,2]

studentsubset2c <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(LocationTypeDesc_f)
studentsubset2b <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f) %>% count(LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f)

dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Students`[1] <- studentsubset2b[1,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Students`[1] <- studentsubset2b[2,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Students`[2] <- studentsubset2b[3,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Students`[2] <- studentsubset2b[4,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`BAB Students`[3] <- studentsubset2b[5,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Formal Primary Students`[3] <- studentsubset2b[6,3]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Students`[1] <- studentsubset2c[1,2]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Students`[2] <- studentsubset2c[2,2]
dfdemolocate2b$`Total Students`[3] <- studentsubset2c[3,2]

## Store all student n's by location type for charts
ConstantLocationIDPNum <- studentsubset2c[1,2]
ConstantLocationRuralNum <- studentsubset2c[2,2]
ConstantLocationUrbanNum <- studentsubset2c[3,2]

## get and store BAB and Formal Primary n's by location Type for charts
ConstantBABLocationIDPNum <- studentsubset2b[1,3]
ConstantFormalPrimaryLocationIDPNum <- studentsubset2b[2,3]
ConstantBABLocationRuralNum <- studentsubset2b[3,3]
ConstantFormalPrimaryLocationRuralNum <- studentsubset2b[4,3]
ConstantBABLocationUrbanNum <- studentsubset2b[5,3]
ConstantFormalPrimaryLocationUrbanNum <- studentsubset2b[6,3]

dfdemolocate2b <- flextable(dfdemolocate2b)
dfdemolocate2b <- merge_v(dfdemolocate2b, j=1:2)
dfdemolocate2b <- valign(dfdemolocate2b, valign = "top", part = "body")
dfdemolocate2b <- flextable::align(dfdemolocate2b, align = "left", i=1:3, j=1, part = "body")
dfdemolocate2b <- flextable::align(dfdemolocate2b, align = "right", i=1:3, j=2:7, part = "body" )
dfdemolocate2b <- autofit(dfdemolocate2b)
dfdemolocate2b <- height(dfdemolocate2b, height= .08)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=1, 1.4)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=2, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=3, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=4, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=5, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=6, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- width(dfdemolocate2b, j=7, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2b <- bg(dfdemolocate2b, i = 2, j = 1:7, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate2b <- hline(dfdemolocate2b, i=1, j=1:7)
dfdemolocate2b <- hline(dfdemolocate2b, i=2, j=1:7)
dfdemolocate2b <- hline(dfdemolocate2b, i=3, j=1:7)
dfdemolocate2b <- padding(dfdemolocate2b, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemolocate2b <- fontsize(dfdemolocate2b, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
dfdemolocate2b <- fix_border_issues(dfdemolocate2b)
```

```{r baseline-endline retained students build demo by funding type}
schoolsubset2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f,  SchoolId)
schoolsubset2 <- unique(schoolsubset2)
dfdemolocate2 <- schoolsubset2 %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
colnames(dfdemolocate2) <- c("Funding Type", "School Total")

Totals2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
dfdemolocate2 <- dfdemolocate2 %>% mutate("Student Total" = '')
dfdemolocate2$`Student Total`[1] <- Totals2[1,2]
dfdemolocate2$`Student Total`[2] <- Totals2[2,2]
dfdemolocate2$`Student Total`[3] <- Totals2[3,2]
dfdemolocate2$`Student Total`[4] <- Totals2[4,2]

ConstantFundingBABNum <- Totals2[1,2]
ConstantFundingCommunityNum <- Totals2[2,2]
ConstantFundingPublicNum <- Totals2[3,2]
ConstantFundingPrivateNum <- Totals2[4,2]

dfdemolocate2 <- flextable(dfdemolocate2)
dfdemolocate2 <- merge_v(dfdemolocate2, j=1:2)
dfdemolocate2 <- valign(dfdemolocate2, valign = "top", part = "body")
dfdemolocate2 <- flextable::align(dfdemolocate2, align = "left", i=1:4, j=1, part = "body")
dfdemolocate2 <- autofit(dfdemolocate2)
dfdemolocate2 <- height(dfdemolocate2, height= .08)
dfdemolocate2 <- width(dfdemolocate2, j=1, 4.8)
dfdemolocate2 <- width(dfdemolocate2, j=2, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2 <- width(dfdemolocate2, j=3, 0.85)
dfdemolocate2 <- bg(dfdemolocate2, i = 2, j = 1:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate2 <- bg(dfdemolocate2, i = 4, j = 1:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate2 <- hline(dfdemolocate2, i=1, j=1:3)
dfdemolocate2 <- hline(dfdemolocate2, i=2, j=1:3)
dfdemolocate2 <- hline(dfdemolocate2, i=3, j=1:3)
dfdemolocate2 <- hline(dfdemolocate2, i=4, j=1:3)
dfdemolocate2 <- padding(dfdemolocate2, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemolocate2 <- fontsize(dfdemolocate2, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
dfdemolocate2 <- fix_border_issues(dfdemolocate2)
```

### Demographic Details

#### 2 Year Overall Tree Map Program-Location-Funding

```{r build overall tree map of basic stats, include=TRUE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.3}
Endlinestudentsurvey$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(Endlinestudentsurvey$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

vtree(Endlinestudentsurvey, c("BABProgram_f", "LocationTypeDesc_f", "FundingTypeDesc_f"), 
        fillcolor = c( BABProgram_f = "#e7d4e8", LocationTypeDesc_f="#9ecae1"),
        labelvar = c(BABProgram_f = "Program Level", LocationTypeDesc_f = "Location Type", FundingTypeDesc_f="School Type"),
        horiz = FALSE)
```

#### Baseline Tree Map Program-Location-Funding

```{r build baseline tree map of basic stats, include=TRUE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.3}
EndlinestudentsurveyBaseline$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(EndlinestudentsurveyBaseline$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

vtree(EndlinestudentsurveyBaseline, c("BBABProgram_f", "LocationTypeDesc_f", "FundingTypeDesc_f"), 
        fillcolor = c( BBABProgram_f = "#e7d4e8", LocationTypeDesc_f="#9ecae1"),
        labelvar = c(BBABProgram_f = "Program Level", LocationTypeDesc_f = "Location Type", FundingTypeDesc_f="School Type"),
        horiz = FALSE)
```

#### Midline Tree Map Program-Location-Funding

```{r build midline tree map of basic stats, include=TRUE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.3}
EndlinestudentsurveyMidline$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(EndlinestudentsurveyMidline$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

vtree(EndlinestudentsurveyMidline, c("BABProgram_f", "LocationTypeDesc_f", "FundingTypeDesc_f"), 
        fillcolor = c( BABProgram_f = "#e7d4e8", LocationTypeDesc_f="#9ecae1"),
        labelvar = c(BABProgram_f = "Program Level", LocationTypeDesc_f = "Location Type", FundingTypeDesc_f="School Type"),
        horiz = FALSE)
```

```{r build baseline level 2 tree map of basic stats, include=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.3}
BL2studentsurveylonglocate$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(BL2studentsurveylonglocate$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

vtree(BL2studentsurveylonglocate, c("BL2BABProgram_f", "LocationTypeDesc_f", "FundingTypeDesc_f"), 
        fillcolor = c( BL2BABProgram_f = "#e7d4e8", LocationTypeDesc_f="#9ecae1"),
        labelvar = c(BL2BABProgram_f = "Program Level", LocationTypeDesc_f = "Location Type", FundingTypeDesc_f="School Type"),
        horiz = FALSE)
```

#### Endline Tree Map Program-Location-Funding

```{r build baseline-endline retained student tree map of basic stats, include=TRUE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.3}
EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier$LocationTypeDesc_f <- fct_relevel(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier$LocationTypeDesc_f, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

EndlineTreeSpecial <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% mutate(EL2BABProgram = coalesce(EL2BABProgram_f.x, "Formal Primary"))

vtree(EndlineTreeSpecial, c("EL2BABProgram", "LocationTypeDesc_f", "FundingTypeDesc_f"), 
        fillcolor = c( EL2BABProgram = "#e7d4e8", LocationTypeDesc_f="#9ecae1"),
        labelvar = c(EL2BABProgram = "Program Level", LocationTypeDesc_f = "Location Type", FundingTypeDesc_f="School Type"),
        horiz = FALSE)
```

#### Endline Retained Student Counts by School Funding Type

`r dfdemolocate2`

#### Endline Retained Student Counts by School Location Type

`r dfdemolocate2b`

<br/>

```{r baseline-endline retained FP students build demographics by Formal Primary}
schoolsubset3 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubset3 <- unique(schoolsubset3)
dfdemolocate3 <- schoolsubset3 %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
colnames(dfdemolocate3) <- c("Location Type", "Funding Type", "School SubTotal")

schoolTotal3 <- schoolsubset3 %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(LocationTypeDesc_f)

dfdemolocate3 <- dfdemolocate3 %>% mutate("School Total" = '')
dfdemolocate3$`School Total`[2] <- schoolTotal3[1,2]
dfdemolocate3$`School Total`[4] <- schoolTotal3[2,2]
dfdemolocate3$`School Total`[7] <- schoolTotal3[3,2]

dfdemolocate3stud <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
Totals3 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(LocationTypeDesc_f)

dfdemolocate3 <- dfdemolocate3 %>% mutate("Student SubTotal" = '')
dfdemolocate3 <- dfdemolocate3 %>% mutate("Student Total" = '')
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[1] <- dfdemolocate3stud[1,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[2] <- dfdemolocate3stud[2,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[3] <- dfdemolocate3stud[3,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[4] <- dfdemolocate3stud[4,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[5] <- dfdemolocate3stud[5,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[6] <- dfdemolocate3stud[6,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student SubTotal`[7] <- dfdemolocate3stud[7,3]
dfdemolocate3$`Student Total`[2] <- Totals3[1,2]
dfdemolocate3$`Student Total`[4] <- Totals3[2,2]
dfdemolocate3$`Student Total`[7] <- Totals3[3,2]

dfdemolocate3 <- flextable(dfdemolocate3)
dfdemolocate3 <- merge_v(dfdemolocate3, j=1)
dfdemolocate3 <- valign(dfdemolocate3, valign = "top", part="body")
dfdemolocate3 <- flextable::align(dfdemolocate3, align = "left", i = 1:4, j=1, part="body")
dfdemolocate3 <- autofit(dfdemolocate3)
dfdemolocate3 <- height(dfdemolocate3, height= .08)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=1, 1.6)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=2, 1.6)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=3, 0.825)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=4, 0.825)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=5, 0.825)
dfdemolocate3 <- width(dfdemolocate3, j=6, 0.825)
dfdemolocate3 <- bg(dfdemolocate3, i = 2, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate3 <- bg(dfdemolocate3, i = 4, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate3 <- bg(dfdemolocate3, i = 6, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocate3 <- hline(dfdemolocate3, i=2, j=1:6)
dfdemolocate3 <- hline(dfdemolocate3, i=4, j=1:6)
dfdemolocate3 <- padding(dfdemolocate3, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemolocate3 <- fontsize(dfdemolocate3, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
dfdemolocate3 <- fix_border_issues(dfdemolocate3)
```

#### School Counts by State, Location and Program Type

`r dfdemostatelocateprogram1A`

```{r baseline-endline retained students build demographics by state location and program type student totals}
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f) %>% count(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, BABProgram_f)
studentsubset2A <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f)
studentsubset3A <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(State_f)
colnames(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud) <- c("State", "Location Type", "Program Type", "Student SubTotal")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud %>% mutate("Student Total by Location" = '')

dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[2] <- studentsubset2A[1,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[4] <- studentsubset2A[2,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[6] <- studentsubset2A[3,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[8] <- studentsubset2A[4,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[10] <- studentsubset2A[5,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[12] <- studentsubset2A[6,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[14] <- studentsubset2A[7,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[15] <- studentsubset2A[8,3]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by Location`[17] <- studentsubset2A[9,3]

dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud %>% mutate("Student Total by State" = '')
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by State`[4] <- studentsubset3A[1,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by State`[8] <- studentsubset3A[2,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by State`[12] <- studentsubset3A[3,2]
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud$`Student Total by State`[17] <- studentsubset3A[4,2]

dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- flextable(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- merge_v(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- valign(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, valign = "top", part = "all")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- autofit(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- height(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, height= .08)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=1, 1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=2, .9)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=3, 1.2)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=4, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=5, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- width(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, j=6, 1.1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 2, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 4, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 6, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 8, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 10, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 12, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 14, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- bg(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = 16, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=2, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=4, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=6, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=8, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=10, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=12, j=1:6)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=14, j=1:5)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- hline(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i=15, j=1:5)

dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- padding(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- fontsize(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud <- fix_border_issues(dfdemostatelocateprogram1Astud)
```

```{r baseline-endline retained students build demographics by state and program type}
schoolsubsetA <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, BABProgram_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubsetA <- unique(schoolsubsetA)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- schoolsubsetA %>% group_by(State_f, BABProgram_f) %>% count()
colnames(dfdemostateprogram1) <- c("State", "Program Type", "School SubTotal")

schoolTotalA <- schoolsubsetA %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(State_f)

dfdemostateprogram1 <- dfdemostateprogram1 %>% mutate("School Total" = '')
dfdemostateprogram1$`School Total`[2] <- schoolTotalA[1,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`School Total`[4] <- schoolTotalA[2,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`School Total`[6] <- schoolTotalA[3,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`School Total`[8] <- schoolTotalA[4,2]

dfdemostateprogram1stud <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f, BABProgram_f) %>% count(State_f, BABProgram_f)
Totals <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count(State_f)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- dfdemostateprogram1 %>% mutate("Student SubTotal" = '')
dfdemostateprogram1 <- dfdemostateprogram1 %>% mutate("Student Total" = '')
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[1] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[1,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[2] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[2,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[3] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[3,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[4] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[4,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[5] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[5,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[6] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[6,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[7] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[7,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student SubTotal`[8] <- dfdemostateprogram1stud[8,3]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student Total`[2] <- Totals[1,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student Total`[4] <- Totals[2,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student Total`[6] <- Totals[3,2]
dfdemostateprogram1$`Student Total`[8] <- Totals[4,2]

dfdemostateprogram1 <- flextable(dfdemostateprogram1)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- merge_v(dfdemostateprogram1, j=1)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- valign(dfdemostateprogram1, valign = "top", part = "body")

dfdemostateprogram1 <- autofit(dfdemostateprogram1)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- height(dfdemostateprogram1, height= .08)
## dfdemostateprogram1 <- autofit(dfdemolocate1)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=1, 1.6)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=2, 1.6)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=3, 0.825)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=4, 0.825)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=5, 0.825)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- width(dfdemostateprogram1, j=6, 0.825)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- bg(dfdemostateprogram1, i = 2, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostateprogram1 <- bg(dfdemostateprogram1, i = 4, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostateprogram1 <- bg(dfdemostateprogram1, i = 6, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostateprogram1 <- bg(dfdemostateprogram1, i = 8, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemostateprogram1 <- hline(dfdemostateprogram1, i=2, j=1:6)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- hline(dfdemostateprogram1, i=4, j=1:6)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- hline(dfdemostateprogram1, i=6, j=1:6)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- padding(dfdemostateprogram1, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemostateprogram1 <- fontsize(dfdemostateprogram1, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
```

```{r baseline-midline retained students build demographics by state and location type}
schoolsubset <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, SchoolId)
schoolsubset <- unique(schoolsubset)
```
```{r baseline-midline retained students build demographics by state and location type}
dfdemolocatestate1 <- schoolsubset %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
colnames(dfdemolocatestate1) <- c("State", "Location Type", "School SubTotal")

schoolTotal1 <- schoolsubset %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()

dfdemolocatestate1 <- dfdemolocatestate1 %>% mutate("School Total" = '')
dfdemolocatestate1$`School Total`[2] <- schoolTotal1[1,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`School Total`[4] <- schoolTotal1[2,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`School Total`[6] <- schoolTotal1[3,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`School Total`[9] <- schoolTotal1[4,2]

dfdemolocatestate1stud <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f, LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
Totals <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
dfdemolocatestate1 <- dfdemolocatestate1 %>% mutate("Student SubTotal" = '')
dfdemolocatestate1 <- dfdemolocatestate1 %>% mutate("Student Total" = '')
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[1] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[1,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[2] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[2,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[3] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[3,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[4] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[4,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[5] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[5,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[6] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[6,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[7] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[7,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[8] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[8,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student SubTotal`[9] <- dfdemolocatestate1stud[9,3]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student Total`[2] <- Totals[1,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student Total`[4] <- Totals[2,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student Total`[6] <- Totals[3,2]
dfdemolocatestate1$`Student Total`[9] <- Totals[4,2]

dfdemolocatestate1 <- flextable(dfdemolocatestate1)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- merge_v(dfdemolocatestate1, j=1)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- valign(dfdemolocatestate1, valign = "top", part = "body")

dfdemolocatestate1 <- autofit(dfdemolocatestate1)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- height(dfdemolocatestate1, height= .08)
## dfdemolocatestate1 <- autofit(dfdemolocate1)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=1, 1.6)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=2, 1.6)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=3, 0.825)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=4, 0.825)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=5, 0.825)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- width(dfdemolocatestate1, j=6, 0.825)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- bg(dfdemolocatestate1, i = 2, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocatestate1 <- bg(dfdemolocatestate1, i = 4, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocatestate1 <- bg(dfdemolocatestate1, i = 6, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocatestate1 <- bg(dfdemolocatestate1, i = 8, j = 2:6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
dfdemolocatestate1 <- hline(dfdemolocatestate1, i=2, j=1:6)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- hline(dfdemolocatestate1, i=4, j=1:6)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- hline(dfdemolocatestate1, i=6, j=1:6)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- padding(dfdemolocatestate1, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
dfdemolocatestate1 <- fontsize(dfdemolocatestate1, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 11, part = "body")
```

#### Geographical Representation of School Sites by State
```{r baseline-endline retained students build leaflet map, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
SchoolIdMedians <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGRAMedian = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians)

SchoolIdMedians2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGMAMedian = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians2 <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians2)

SchoolIdMedianCombine <- merge(SchoolIdMedians, SchoolIdMedians2, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocate <- merge(SchoolIdMedianCombine, location, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocate <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocate %>% rename("long" = GPSLongitude, "lat"=GPSLatitude)

schools <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocate %>% dplyr::select(lat, long, egra = EGRAMedian, egma = EGMAMedian, State)

schools$State <- sapply(schools$State, as.factor)

getColor <- function(schools) { 
		sapply(schools$State, function(State) {  
		if(State == "Benaadir") {
		"green"
		} else if(State == "Hirshabeelle") {
		"orange"
		} else if(State == "Jubbaland") {
		"red"
		} else {"blue"} })}

icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'ios-close',
  iconColor = 'black',
  library = 'ion',
  markerColor = getColor(schools)
)

leaflet(schools) %>% addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(~long, ~lat, icon=icons, label=~as.character(State))

```
*Green - Benaadir, Yellow - Hirshabeelle, Red - Jubbaland, Blue - South-West
<br/>

#### Formal Primary Program Retained Student Counts by Location and School Funding Type
`r dfdemolocate3`

#### Gender Disaggregation for Retained Students
```{r baseline - endline Gender plot demographics, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
GenderbyBABStatus <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f, Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyBABStatus <- GenderbyBABStatus %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
GenderbyBABStatus <- GenderbyBABStatus %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(GenderbyBABStatus)

ConstantBABGenderMaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[1]
ConstantBABGenderFemaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[2]
ConstantFormalPrimaryGenderGr1MaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[3]
ConstantFormalPrimaryGenderGr1FemaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[4]
ConstantFormalPrimaryGenderGr2MaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[5]
ConstantFormalPrimaryGenderGr2FemaleNum <- GenderbyBABStatus$n[6]

GenderPlot1 <- ggplot(data = GenderbyBABStatus, aes(x=BABProgramGrade_f, y=per, fill=Gender_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,75) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T))	+ geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained Student Gender by Program Type') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

GenderbyLocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocation <- GenderbyLocation %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
GenderbyLocation <- GenderbyLocation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocation <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocation)
GenderbyLocation$Gender <- sapply(GenderbyLocation$Gender_f, as.factor)
GenderbyLocation$LocationTypeDesc <- sapply(GenderbyLocation$LocationTypeDesc, as.factor)
GenderbyLocation$Gender <- factor(GenderbyLocation$Gender, levels = c('1', '2'), labels = c('Male', 'Female'))

GenderPlot2 <- ggplot(data = GenderbyLocation, aes(x=LocationTypeDesc_f, y=per, fill=Gender_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,75) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T))	+ geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained Student Gender by Location Type') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

GenderbyFunding <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc, Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)

## add percent
GenderbyFunding <- GenderbyFunding %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
GenderbyFunding <- GenderbyFunding %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyFunding <- as.data.frame(GenderbyFunding)

GenderbyFundingPlot1 <- ggplot(data = GenderbyFunding, aes(x=FundingTypeDesc, y=per, fill=Gender_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,75) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T))	+ geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained Student Gender by Funding Type') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

GenderPlot1
GenderPlot2
GenderbyFundingPlot1

##ggarrange(GenderPlot1, GenderPlot2, GenderbyFundingPlot1,
##          labels = c("", ""),
##          ncol = 3, nrow = 1, align="hv", legend="bottom", common.legend = TRUE)
```

```{r baseline - endline Gender plot demographics2, include=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}

	  coord_flip() +

ggarrange(GenderbyFundingPlot1, GenderbyGradeplot1,
```

```{r baseline - endline retained student build studentage demographics3, include=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=3.5}
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(), legend.justification="left") + ylab('') + xlab('Num Students') +
```

#### Dialects Spoken Disaggregation for Retained Students

```{r baseline - endline retained student Languages plot demographics, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.3}
LanguagesbyBABStatus <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
## add percent
LanguagesbyBABStatus <- LanguagesbyBABStatus %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
LanguagesbyBABStatus <- LanguagesbyBABStatus %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
LanguagesbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyBABStatus)
LanguagesbyBABStatus$Languages_f <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyBABStatus$Languages_f, "Other", "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Mazaa tiri")

LanguageConstants <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()

ConstantLanguagesMaayBABNum <- LanguageConstants$n[1]
ConstantLanguagesMazBABNum <- LanguageConstants$n[2]
ConstantLanguagesOtherBABNum <- LanguageConstants$n[3]

LanguagesPlot1 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyBABStatus, aes(x=BABProgramGrade_f, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained Student Dialects by Program Type') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Dialect", reverse=TRUE)) +
    theme_classic()

LanguagesbyLocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
## add percent
LanguagesbyLocation <- LanguagesbyLocation %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
LanguagesbyLocation <- LanguagesbyLocation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
LanguagesbyLocation <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyLocation)
LanguagesbyLocation$Languages_f <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyLocation$Languages_f, "Other", "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Mazaatiri")

LanguagesPlot2 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyLocation, aes(x=LocationTypeDesc_f, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained BAB Student Dialects by Location Type') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Dialect", reverse=TRUE)) +
    theme_classic()

LanguagesbyLocationLost <- EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLostBAB %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
## add percent
LanguagesbyLocationLost <- LanguagesbyLocationLost %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, 0))
## add label
LanguagesbyLocationLost <- LanguagesbyLocationLost %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))

LanguagesLostPlot2 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyLocationLost, aes(x=LocationTypeDesc_f, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Lost BAB Student Dialects by Location Type') +

LanguagesbyStateLostBAB <- EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLostBAB %>% group_by(State, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)

## add label
```
