```{r baseline - endline retained student Languages plot demographics, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.3}
LanguagesbyStateLostBAB$State <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyStateLostBAB$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

LanguagesLostStateBABPlot2 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyStateLostBAB, aes(x=State, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Lost BAB Student Dialects by State') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Dialect", reverse=TRUE)) +
    theme_classic()

LanguagesbyStateLost <- EndlinestudentsurveyEndlineLost %>% group_by(State, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
## add percent
LanguagesbyStateLost <- LanguagesbyStateLost %>% group_by(State) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
LanguagesbyStateLost <- LanguagesbyStateLost %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
LanguagesbyStateLost <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyStateLost)
LanguagesbyStateLost$Languages_f <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyStateLost$Languages_f, "Other", "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Mazaatiri")
LanguagesbyStateLost$State <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyStateLost$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

LanguagesLostStatePlot2 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyStateLost, aes(x=State, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('All Lost Student Dialects by State') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Dialect", reverse=TRUE)) +
    theme_classic()

LanguagesbyFunding <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedFPSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f, Languages_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
## add percent
LanguagesbyFunding <- LanguagesbyFunding %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add label
LanguagesbyFunding <- LanguagesbyFunding %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
LanguagesbyFunding <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyFunding)
LanguagesbyFunding$Languages_f <- fct_relevel(LanguagesbyFunding$Languages_f, "Other", "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Mazaatiri")

LanguagesbyFundingPlot1 <- ggplot(data = LanguagesbyFunding, aes(x=FundingTypeDesc_f, y=per, fill=Languages_f)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Percent of Students') + ylim(0,100) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + ggtitle('Retained Formal Primary Student \nDialects by School Funding Type') +  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + guides(fill=guide_legend(title="Dialect", reverse=TRUE)) +
    theme_classic()

LanguagesPlot1
LanguagesPlot2 
LanguagesLostPlot2
LanguagesLostStateBABPlot2
LanguagesLostStatePlot2
LanguagesbyFundingPlot1

OtherDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% filter(Languages2_f=='Other')
OtherDialectDemo <- OtherDialect %>% group_by(State_f, BABProgram_f, LocationTypeDesc_f, FundingTypeDesc_f, Languages_f) %>% count()
OtherDialectDemo <- as.data.frame(OtherDialectDemo)
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_vanilla)
OtherDialectDemoflex <- flextable(OtherDialectDemo)
```

#### Combined Demographics by School Funding Type for Retained Students

```{r baseline - endline retained student combination table by funding type, include=TRUE}
GenderbyType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyType <- GenderbyType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add percent
GenderbyType <- GenderbyType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig2),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyType <- as.data.frame(GenderbyType)
GenderbyType <- GenderbyType %>% arrange(FundingTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyType <- GenderbyType[-c(1,3,5,7),]
GenderbyType2 <- GenderbyType %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyTypePivot <- GenderbyType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = FundingTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyTypePivot <- GenderbyTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")

MedianAgebyFundingType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyFundingTypePivot <- MedianAgebyFundingType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = FundingTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyFundingTypePivot <- MedianAgebyFundingTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")

AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(AttendAnyOther_f)
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType)
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType %>% filter(AttendAnyOther_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2 <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = FundingTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")

MaternalEdbyFundingType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyFundingType <- MaternalEdbyFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
MaternalEdbyFundingType <- MaternalEdbyFundingType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
MaternalEdbyFundingType <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyFundingType)
MaternalEdbyFundingType <- MaternalEdbyFundingType %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyFundingType2 <- MaternalEdbyFundingType %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyFundingType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyFundingType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = FundingTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyFundingType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyFundingType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")

LanguagesbyFundingType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Languages_f)
LanguagesbyFundingType <- LanguagesbyFundingType %>% group_by(FundingTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
LanguagesbyFundingType <- LanguagesbyFundingType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%)'))
LanguagesbyFundingType <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyFundingType)
LanguagesbyFundingType <- LanguagesbyFundingType %>% arrange(FundingTypeDesc_f, n)
LanguagesbyFundingType <- LanguagesbyFundingType[-c(1,2,3,5,6,7,9,11,12),]
LanguagesbyFundingType <- LanguagesbyFundingType %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyFundingType2 <- LanguagesbyFundingType %>% dplyr::select(FundingTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyFundingType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyFundingType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = FundingTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyFundingType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyFundingType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

FundingTypeTable <- rbind(GenderbyTypePivot, MedianAgebyFundingTypePivot, AttendOtherPriorbyFundingType2Pivot, MaternalEdbyFundingType2Pivot, LanguagesbyFundingType2Pivot)

FundingTypeTable2 <- FundingTypeTable[, c(5, 1, 2, 3, 4)]
FundingTypeTable2 <- flextable(FundingTypeTable2)
FundingTypeTable2 <- autofit(FundingTypeTable2)
FundingTypeTable2 <- add_header_row(FundingTypeTable2, values = c("  ", "School Funding Type"), colwidths = c(1,4))
FundingTypeTable2 <- bold(FundingTypeTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
FundingTypeTable2 <- hline_top(FundingTypeTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
FundingTypeTable2 <- vline(FundingTypeTable2, j=1, part="all")
FundingTypeTable2 <- border_inner_h(FundingTypeTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

`r FundingTypeTable2`

#### Combined Demographics by School Location Type for Retained BAB Students
```{r baseline - endline retained BAB students combination table by location type, include=TRUE}
GenderbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
## add percent
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig2),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocationType)
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType[-c(1,3,5,7),]
GenderbyLocationType2 <- GenderbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivot <- GenderbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivot <- GenderbyLocationTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")

MedianAgebyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot <- MedianAgebyLocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot <- MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")

AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2 <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")

MaternalEdbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyLocationType)
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyLocationType2 <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")

LanguagesbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedBABSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig2))
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%)'))
LanguagesbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyLocationType)
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType[-c(1,2,4,5,7,8),]
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2 <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

LocationTypeTable <- rbind(GenderbyLocationTypePivot, MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot, AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot, MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot, LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot)

LocationTypeTable2 <- LocationTypeTable[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
LocationTypeTable2 <- flextable(LocationTypeTable2)
LocationTypeTable2 <- autofit(LocationTypeTable2)
LocationTypeTable2 <- add_header_row(LocationTypeTable2, values = c("  ", "School Type"), colwidths = c(1,3))
LocationTypeTable2 <- bold(LocationTypeTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
LocationTypeTable2 <- hline_top(LocationTypeTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
LocationTypeTable2 <- vline(LocationTypeTable2, j=1, part="all")
LocationTypeTable2 <- border_inner_h(LocationTypeTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

`r LocationTypeTable2`

`r LocationTypeTable2`

### Student Retention and Attrition

The tables below display the number of students included in the Longitudinal Study from Baseline to Midline and Baseline to Endline.  The students are broken out into the following categories:

  * students present baseline

  * students present at midline/endline (this includes students that entered the program between baseline and midline)

  * students that were retained from baseline to midline/endline 

  * students that left the program between baseline and midline/endline 
  
  * students that were missing at midline but reappeared at endline were counted as missing at midline but not missing at endline

<br/>

All students are disaggregated further into demographic groups to help identify vulnerable learners. Those groups include:
 
  * Location Type: Urban, Rural and IDP
  
  * IDP Family as self-identified by the student
  
  * Gender
  
  * Age 
  
  * SES (Socio-Economic Status) Composite Score
  
  * Mother's Literacy
  
  * Father's Literacy
  
  * Student's living with someone other than their parents
  
  * Dialect
  
  * Somali State
  
<br/>


```{r baseline-endline student retention table, include=TRUE}
dfDemoTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =30, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfDemoTable) <- c("\nGroup", "\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABdf <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BeginCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin)
Yr1EndCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1End)
Yr1RetentionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Retention)
Yr1AttritionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Attrition)
Yr2BeginCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin)
Yr2EndCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2End)
Yr2RetentionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Retention)
Yr2AttritionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Attrition)
TwoYrRetentionCount <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetention)
TwoYrAttritionCount <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttrition)

## Get program data for Yr1 Begin
yr1beginprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1beginprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr1beginprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 1 end
yr1endprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1End %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1endprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr1endprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Retained students
yr1retentionprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Retention %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1retentionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr1retentionprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Students lost
yr1attritionprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Attrition %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1attritionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 2 Begin
yr2beginprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2beginprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr2beginprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 2 end
yr2endprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2End %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2endprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr2endprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 2 Retained Students
yr2retentionprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Retention %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2retentionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionprogrampivot)

## Get program data for Yr 2 Students lost
yr2attritionprogrampivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Attrition %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionprogrampivot)

## get program data for 2 Year Retained Students
twoyrretentionprogrampivot <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetention %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrretentionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(twoyrretentionprogrampivot)

## get program data for 2 Year Students lost
twoyrattritionprogrampivot <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttrition %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrattritionprogrampivot <- as.data.frame(twoyrattritionprogrampivot)

## build and set program row 1
buildProgramRow1 <- c('Totals', '', 
Yr1BeginCount, 
Yr1EndCount, 
paste0(Yr1RetentionCount, ' (', percent(Yr1RetentionCount/Yr1BeginCount), ')'), paste0(Yr1AttritionCount, ' (',  percent(Yr1AttritionCount/Yr1BeginCount), ')'), 
Yr2BeginCount,
Yr2EndCount, 
paste0(Yr2RetentionCount, ' (', percent(Yr2RetentionCount/Yr2BeginCount), ')'),
paste0(Yr2AttritionCount, ' (', percent(Yr2AttritionCount/Yr2BeginCount), ')'),
paste0(TwoYrRetentionCount, ' (',  percent(TwoYrRetentionCount/Yr1BeginCount), ')'), paste0(TwoYrAttritionCount, ' (',  percent(TwoYrAttritionCount/Yr1BeginCount), ')'))
dfDemoTable[1,] <- buildProgramRow1

## build and set program row 2
buildProgramRow2 <- c('Program', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivot[1,1]), yr1beginprogrampivot[1,2], 
yr1endprogrampivot[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivot[1,2],
yr2endprogrampivot[1,2],
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTable[2,] <- buildProgramRow2

## build and set program row 3
buildProgramRow3 <- c('', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivot[2,1]), yr1beginprogrampivot[2,2], 
yr1endprogrampivot[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivot[2,2],
yr2endprogrampivot[2,2], 
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[2,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTable[3,] <- buildProgramRow3

## build and set program row 4
buildProgramRow4 <- c('', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivot[3,1]), yr1beginprogrampivot[3,2], 
yr1endprogrampivot[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivot[3,2],
yr2endprogrampivot[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr2beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivot[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivot[3,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTable[4,] <- buildProgramRow4

## Get location data for year 1 begin
yr1beginlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1beginlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1beginlocationpivot)

## get location data for year 1 end
yr1endlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1End %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1endlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1endlocationpivot)

## get location data for Yr 1 Retained students
yr1retentionlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Retention %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1retentionlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1retentionlocationpivot)

## get location data for Yr 1 Students lost
yr1attritionlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Attrition %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1attritionlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionlocationpivot)

## get location data for yr 2 begin
yr2beginlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2beginlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2beginlocationpivot)

## get location data for Year 2 end
yr2endlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2End %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()

## get location data for yr2 retained students
yr2retentionlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Retention %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()

## get location data for yr2 students lost
yr2attritionlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Attrition %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionlocationpivot)

## get location data for 2 year Retained Students

paste0(yr1retentionlocationpivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlocationpivot[1,2]/yr1beginlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'),

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemo <- flextable(dfDemoTable)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemo <- autofit(flexSurveyDemo)
flexSurveyDemo <- height(flexSurveyDemo, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemo <- bold(flexSurveyDemo, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bold(flexSurveyDemo, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=2:4, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=5:7, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=8:9, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=10:11, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=14:17, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=22:23, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=24:26, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemo, i=27:30, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=4, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=5, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=6, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=7, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=8, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=9, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=10, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=11, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- width(flexSurveyDemo, j=12, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=1)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=4)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=7)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=9)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=11)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=13)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=17)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=19)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=21)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=23)
flexSurveyDemo <- hline(flexSurveyDemo, i=26)
flexSurveyDemo <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemo, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemo <- align(flexSurveyDemo, i = NULL, j = 3:12, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemo <- align(flexSurveyDemo, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- valign(flexSurveyDemo, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 2, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 4, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 6, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 8, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 10, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 12, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 14, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 16, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 18, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 20, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 22, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 24, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 26, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 28, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- bg(flexSurveyDemo, i = 30, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemo <- padding(flexSurveyDemo, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemo <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemo)
```

`r flexSurveyDemo`

* Please note there are some missing values for the SES Composite items and therefore the counts do not always equal the overall student totals for this category. Numbers in Paranthesis indicate the retention or missing rate based on the baseline values.

<br/>

#### Are there statistically significant differences between retained and dropped out students?

A Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for a statistically significant differences for variables between baseline and endline student groups for all of the demographic variables listed above.


```{r retention statistics table build }
dfchisquare <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 14, ncol = 8))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfchisquare) <- c("Group", "Method", "Yr 1 Statistic", "Yr 1 p value", "Yr 2 Statistic", "Yr 2 p value", "Overall Statistic", "Overall p value")
row <- 1

# Program Yr 1 retention
programchiYr1 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Yr1Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$BABProgram_f, correct=FALSE)
programchiYr1 <- tidy(programchiYr1)
## add program to table
dfchisquare$Group[row] <- c('Program')
dfchisquare$`Yr 1 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiYr1$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Yr 1 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiYr1$p.value, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$Method[row] <- programchiYr1$method

# Program Yr 2 Retention
programchiYr2 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin$Yr2Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin$BABProgram_f, correct=FALSE)
programchiYr2 <- tidy(programchiYr2)
## add program to table
dfchisquare$`Yr 2 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiYr2$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Yr 2 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiYr2$p.value, sigdig5)

# Program Overall
programchiOverall <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$BABProgram_f, correct=FALSE)
programchiOverall <- tidy(programchiOverall)
## add program to table
dfchisquare$`Overall Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiOverall$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(programchiOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1

# EGRA Yr 1 retention
BEGRATotalNormalityYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr1Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGRATotalNormalityYr1 <- as.data.frame(BEGRATotalNormalityYr1)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGRAYr1 <- aov(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGRAYr1 <- tidy(onewayBEGRAYr1)
		BEGRAPvalueYr1 <- dfonewayBEGRAYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGRAYr1 <- kruskal.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGRAYr1 <- tidy(kruskalBEGRAYr1)
		BEGRAPvalueYr1 <- dfkruskalBEGRAYr1$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGRA to table
dfchisquare$Group[row] <- c('EGRA')
dfchisquare$`Yr 1 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRAYr1$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Yr 1 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRAYr1$p.value, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$Method[row] <- dfkruskalBEGRAYr1$method

# EGRA Yr 2 Retention
BEGRATotalNormalityYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr2Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGRATotalNormalityYr2 <- as.data.frame(BEGRATotalNormalityYr2)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayEGRAYr2 <- aov(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr2Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGRAYr2 <- tidy(onewayBEGRAYr2)
		BEGRAPvalueYr2 <- dfonewayBEGRAYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGRAYr2 <- kruskal.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr2Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyYr2Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGRAYr2 <- tidy(kruskalBEGRAYr2)
		BEGRAPvalueYr2 <- dfkruskalBEGRAYr2$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGRA to table
dfchisquare$`Yr 2 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRAYr2$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Yr 2 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRAYr2$p.value, sigdig5)

# EGRA Overall retention
BEGRATotalNormalityOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityOverall$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityOverall$`p-value`[2] > .05 )

dfchisquare$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRAOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1

genderchiOverall <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Gender_f, correct=FALSE)
genderchiOverall <- tidy(genderchiOverall)
dfchisquare$`Overall Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(genderchiOverall$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquare$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(genderchiOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1

#age Yr 1 retention
agechiYr1 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Yr1Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$AgeGroup1_f, correct=FALSE)
agechiYr1 <- tidy(agechiYr1)

#mother literacy Yr 1 retention

#mother literacy Overall retention

row <- row + 1

#father literacy Yr 1 retention
dadlitchiYr1 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$Yr1Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin$FatherLiteracy_f, correct=FALSE)

row <- row + 1

#state Yr 1 retention

#state Overall retention

dfchisquare$`Overall Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(statechiOverall$statistic, sigdig5)

row <- row + 1

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexchisquare <- flextable(dfchisquare)

## set format of flextables
flexchisquare <- autofit(flexchisquare)
flexchisquare <- height(flexchisquare, height= .08)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=1, 1)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=2, 1.2)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=3, .8)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=4, .8)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=5, .8)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=6, .8)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=7, .8)
flexchisquare <- width(flexchisquare, j=8, .8)
flexchisquare <- fontsize(flexchisquare, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexchisquare <- align(flexchisquare, i = NULL, j = 5, align = "left", part = "header")
flexchisquare <- align(flexchisquare, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "all")
flexchisquare <- valign(flexchisquare, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- bg(flexchisquare, i = 14, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexchisquare <- padding(flexchisquare, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)

flexchisquare <- fix_border_issues(flexchisquare)
```

`r flexchisquare`
<br/>

#### BAB Student Retention and Attrition

```{r baseline-endline BAB student retention table, include=TRUE}
dfBABDemoTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =27, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfBABDemoTable) <- c("\nGroup", "\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABdf <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABSansOutlier %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BABBeginCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
Yr1BABEndCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1End)
Yr1BABRetentionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Retention)
Yr1BABAttritionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Attrition)
Yr2BABBeginCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin)
Yr2BABEndCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2End)
Yr2BABRetentionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Retention)
Yr2BABAttritionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Attrition)
TwoYrBABRetentionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrRetention)
TwoYrBABAttritionCount <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrAttrition)

## build and set row 1
buildBABRow1 <- c('Totals', '', 
Yr1BABBeginCount, 
Yr1BABEndCount, 
paste0(Yr1BABRetentionCount, ' (', percent(Yr1BABRetentionCount/Yr1BABBeginCount), ')'), paste0(Yr1BABAttritionCount, ' (',  percent(Yr1BABAttritionCount/Yr1BABBeginCount), ')'), 
Yr2BABBeginCount,
Yr2BABEndCount, 
paste0(Yr2BABRetentionCount, ' (', percent(Yr2BABRetentionCount/Yr2BABBeginCount), ')'),
paste0(Yr2BABAttritionCount, ' (', percent(Yr2BABAttritionCount/Yr2BABBeginCount), ')'),
paste0(TwoYrBABRetentionCount, ' (',  percent(TwoYrBABRetentionCount/Yr1BABBeginCount), ')'), paste0(TwoYrBABAttritionCount, ' (',  percent(TwoYrBABAttritionCount/Yr1BABBeginCount), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[1,] <- buildBABRow1

## get location datat for year 1 begin
yr1beginBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1beginBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1beginBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for year 1 end
yr1endBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1End %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1endBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1endBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for Yr 1 Retained students
yr1retentionBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Retention %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1retentionBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for Yr 1 Students lost
yr1attritionBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Attrition %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr1attritionBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for yr 2 begin
yr2beginBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2beginBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2beginBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for Year 2 end
yr2endBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2End %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2endBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2endBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for yr2 retained students
yr2retentionBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Retention %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2retentionBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for yr2 students lost
yr2attritionBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Attrition %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for 2 year Retained Students
twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrRetention %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot)

## get location data for 2 year students lost
twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBAB2YrAttrition %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot <- as.data.frame(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot)

## build and set location row 1
buildlocationBABRow1 <- c('Location Type', as.character(yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,1]), 
yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,2], 
yr1endBABlocationpivot[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[1,2], '(', percent(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginBABlocationpivot[1,2],
yr2endBABlocationpivot[1,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[1,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[1,2]), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[2,] <- buildlocationBABRow1

## build and set location row 2
buildlocationBABRow2 <- c('', as.character(yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,1]), yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,2], 
yr1endBABlocationpivot[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginBABlocationpivot[2,2],
yr2endBABlocationpivot[2,2], 
paste0(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[2,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[2,2]), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[3,] <- buildlocationBABRow2

## build and set location row 3
buildlocationBABRow3 <- c('', as.character(yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,1]), yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,2], 
yr1endBABlocationpivot[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginBABlocationpivot[3,2],
yr2endBABlocationpivot[3,2], 
paste0(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr2beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'),  
paste0(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretainedBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionBABlocationpivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABlocationpivot[3,2]), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[4,] <- buildlocationBABRow3

## Get idpfamily data for yr 1 begin
yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot <- as.data.frame(yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot)

## Get idpfamily data for yr 1 end

## build and set idpfamily row 1
buildidpfamilyBABRow1 <- c('Student IDP Family', as.character(yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot[1,1]), 
yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot[1,2], 
yr1endBABidpfamilypivot[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionBABidpfamilypivot[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionBABidpfamilypivot[1,2]/yr1beginBABidpfamilypivot[1,2]), ')'),

yr2endBABstatepivot[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionBABstatepivot[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionBABstatepivot[3,2]/yr2beginBABstatepivot[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionBABstatepivot[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionBABstatepivot[3,2]/yr2beginBABstatepivot[3,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionBABstatepivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionBABstatepivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[3,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionBABstatepivot[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionBABstatepivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[3,2]), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[26,] <- buildstateBABRow3

## build and set state row 4
buildstateBABRow4 <- c('', as.character(yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,1]), yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,2], 
yr1endBABstatepivot[4,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionBABstatepivot[4,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionBABstatepivot[4,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginBABstatepivot[4,2],
yr2endBABstatepivot[4,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionBABstatepivot[4,2]/yr2beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionBABstatepivot[4,2]/yr2beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionBABstatepivot[3,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionBABstatepivot[4,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionBABstatepivot[4,2]/yr1beginBABstatepivot[4,2]), ')'))
dfBABDemoTable[27,] <- buildstateBABRow4

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- flextable(dfBABDemoTable)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- autofit(flexSurveyDemoBAB)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- height(flexSurveyDemoBAB, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bold(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bold(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=2:4, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=11:14, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=15:16, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=17:18, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=19:20, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=21:23, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=4, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=5, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=6, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=7, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=8, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=9, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=10, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=11, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- width(flexSurveyDemoBAB, j=12, 0.6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=1)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=4)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=6)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=8)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=10)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=14)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=16)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=18)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=20)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i=23)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- align(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = NULL, j = 3:12, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- align(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- valign(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 2, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 4, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 6, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 8, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 10, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 12, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 14, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 16, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 18, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 20, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 22, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 24, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = 26, j = 2:12, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- padding(flexSurveyDemoBAB, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemoBAB <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemoBAB)
```


<br/>

`r flexSurveyDemoBAB`

<br/>

#### Are there statistically significant differences between retained and dropped out BAB students?

A Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for a statistically significant differences for variables between baseline and endline BAB student groups for all of the demographic variables listed above.


```{r retention statistics BAB table build }
dfchisquareBAB <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 14, ncol = 8))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfchisquareBAB) <- c("Group", "Method", "Yr 1 Statistic", "Yr 1 p value", "Yr 2 Statistic", "Yr 2 p value", "Overall Statistic", "Overall p value")
row <- 1

# EGRA Yr 1 retention
BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr1Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr1 <- as.data.frame(BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr1)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGRABABYr1 <- aov(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGRABABYr1 <- tidy(onewayBEGRABABYr1)
		BEGRAPvalueBABYr1 <- dfonewayBEGRABABYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGRABABYr1 <- kruskal.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGRABABYr1 <- tidy(kruskalBEGRABABYr1)
		BEGRAPvalueBABYr1 <- dfkruskalBEGRABABYr1$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGRA to table
dfchisquareBAB$Group[row] <- c('EGRA')
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABYr1$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABYr1$p.value, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$Method[row] <- dfkruskalBEGRABABYr1$method

# EGRA Yr 2 Retention
BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr2Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr2 <- as.data.frame(BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr2)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayEGRABABYr2 <- aov(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr2Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGRABABYr2 <- tidy(onewayBEGRABABYr2)
		BEGRAPvalueBABYr2 <- dfonewayBEGRABABYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGRABABYr2 <- kruskal.test(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr2Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGRABABYr2 <- tidy(kruskalBEGRABABYr2)
		BEGRAPvalueBABYr2 <- dfkruskalBEGRABABYr2$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGRA to table
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 2 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABYr2$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 2 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABYr2$p.value, sigdig5)

# EGRA Overall retention
BEGRATotalNormalityBABOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGRATotalNormalityBABOverall <- as.data.frame(BEGRATotalNormalityBABOverall)

if (BEGRATotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGRATotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGRABABOverall <- aov(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGRABABOverall <- tidy(onewayBEGRABABOverall)
		BEGRAPvalueBABOverall <- dfonewayBEGRABABOverall$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGRABABOverall <- kruskal.test(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n ~ Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGRABABOverall <- tidy(kruskalBEGRABABOverall)
		BEGRAPvalueBABOverall <- dfkruskalBEGRABABOverall$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGRA to table
dfchisquareBAB$`Overall Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABOverall$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGRABABOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1
	
#EGMA Yr 1 Retention
BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr1Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr1 <- as.data.frame(BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr1)

if (BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGMABABYr1 <- aov(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGMABABYr1 <- tidy(onewayBEGMABABYr1)
		BEGMAPvalueBABYr1 <- dfonewayBEGMABABYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGMABABYr1 <- kruskal.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGMABABYr1 <- tidy(kruskalBEGMABABYr1)
		BEGMAPvalueBABYr1 <- dfkruskalBEGMABABYr1$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGMA to table
dfchisquareBAB$Group[row] <- c('EGMA')
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGMAYr1$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGMAYr1$p.value, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$Method[row] <- dfkruskalBEGMAYr1$method

#EGMA Yr 2 Retention
BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr2Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr2 <- as.data.frame(BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr2)

if (BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGMATotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGMABABYr2 <- aov(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n ~ Yr2Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGMABABYr2 <- tidy(onewayBEGMABABYr2)
		BEGMAPvalueBABYr2 <- dfonewayBEGMABABYr2$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{

		dfkruskalBEGMABABYr2 <- tidy(kruskalBEGMABABYr2)
		BEGMAPvalueBABYr2 <- dfkruskalBEGMABABYr2$p.value[1]
	}	
## add EGMA to table

dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 2 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBEGMABABYr2$p.value, sigdig5)

#EGMA Overall Retention
BEGMATotalNormalityBABOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n)$p.value)
BEGMATotalNormalityBABOverall <- as.data.frame(BEGMATotalNormalityBABOverall)

if (BEGMATotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BEGMATotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBEGMABABOverall <- aov(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n ~ Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBEGMAOverall <- tidy(onewayBEGMABABOverall)
		BEGMAPvalueBABOverall <- dfonewayBEGMABABOverall$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBEGMABABOverall <- kruskal.test(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n ~ Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBEGMABABOverall <- tidy(kruskalBEGMABABOverall)
		BEGMAPvalueBABOverall <- dfkruskalBEGMABABOverall$p.value[1]

row <- row + 1

#Safety Yr 1 Retention
BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Yr1Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$p.value)
BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr1 <- as.data.frame(BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr1)

if (BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr1$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBSafetyBABYr1 <- aov(BSafety_Avg ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBSafetyBABYr1 <- tidy(onewayBSafetyBABYr1)
		BSafetyPvalueBABYr1 <- dfonewayBSafetyBABYr1$p.value[1]		
		} else
	{
		kruskalBSafetyBABYr1 <- kruskal.test(BSafety_Avg ~ Yr1Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin)
		dfkruskalBSafetyBABYr1 <- tidy(kruskalBSafetyBABYr1)
		BSafetyPvalueBABYr1 <- dfkruskalBSafetyBABYr1$p.value[1]
	}

#Safety Yr 2 Retention

	group_by(Yr2Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$p.value)
BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr2 <- as.data.frame(BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr2)

if (BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BSafetyTotalNormalityBABYr2$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{

#Safety Overall Retention
BSafetyTotalNormalityBABOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin %>% 
	group_by(Retention) %>% 
	summarise(`W Statistic` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$Statistic, 
	`p-value` = shapiro.test(BSafety_Avg)$p.value)
BSafetyTotalNormalityBABOverall <- as.data.frame(BSafetyTotalNormalityBABOverall)

if (BSafetyTotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[1] > .05 && BSafetyTotalNormalityBABOverall$`p-value`[2] > .05 )
	{	
		onewayBSafetyBABOverall <- aov(BSafety_Avg ~ Retention, data = EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin) 
		dfonewayBSafetyBABOverall <- tidy(onewayBSafetyBABOverall)
		BSafetyPvalueBABOverall <- dfonewayBSafetyBABOverall$p.value[1]

	{

	}	
## add Safety to table

dfchisquareBAB$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(dfkruskalBSafetyBABOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1

#location Yr 1 retention
locationchiBABYr1 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$Yr1Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$LocationTypeDesc_f, correct=FALSE)
locationchiBABYr1 <- tidy(locationchiBABYr1)
## add location to table
dfchisquareBAB$Group[row] <- c('Location')
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABYr1$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 1 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABYr1$p.value, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$Method[row] <- locationchiBABYr1$method

#location Yr 2 retention
locationchiBABYr2 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin$Yr2Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr2Begin$LocationTypeDesc_f, correct=FALSE)
locationchiBABYr2 <- tidy(locationchiBABYr2)
## add location to table
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 2 Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABYr2$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Yr 2 p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABYr2$p.value, sigdig5)

#location overall retention
locationchiBABOverall <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$LocationTypeDesc_f, correct=FALSE)
locationchiBABOverall <- tidy(locationchiBABOverall)
## add location to table
dfchisquareBAB$`Overall Statistic`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABOverall$statistic, sigdig5)
dfchisquareBAB$`Overall p value`[row] <- specify_decimal(locationchiBABOverall$p.value, sigdig5)
row <- row + 1

#idpfamily Yr 1 retention
idpfamilychiBABYr1 <- chisq.test(EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$Yr1Retention, EndlinestudentsurveyBABYr1Begin$IDPFamily_f, correct=FALSE)

dfchisquareBAB$Group[row] <- c('IDP Family')

flexchisquareBAB <- fix_border_issues(flexchisquareBAB)
```

<br/>

`r flexchisquareBAB`

<br/>



### Student Psycho-Social Data Details

The hypothesized associations between student perceptions on several psycho-social measures, versus hope, normalized gain in EGRA, and normalized gain in EGMA were tested using structural equation modeling in AMOS. Three groups of models were tested based on the focus of the student perception predictors. 

<br/>

For each psycho-social item within the model groups, the first base data table displayed contains the overall Longitudinal sample data plus the BAB vs. Formal Primary disaggregation. The second data table contains the data for the BAB portion of the Longitudinal study sample disaggregated by the demographic subgroups followed by a data table with the Formal Primary Grade 1 and Grade 2 portions of the Longitudinal Study Sample disaggregated by the demographic subgroups.  

<br/>

The data for the psycho-social scales were collected with the scales they were originally designed and validated.  These were either 5, 6, or 7 point scales. In order to properly compare the scales the 5 and 7 point scales were converted to 6 point scales. The individual items that make up the subscales and also those that did not statistically fit into a subscale can be found in Appendix A displayed in Likert Type Charts disaggregated by BAB vs. Formal Primary and demographic subgroups.

<br/>

Statistics: For each base table a Shapiro-Wilk normality test was performed on each subgroup to check for normality of the scale item distribution. If the Scale item was found to have a normal distribution across the subgroup a One-way ANOVA test was then performed on the subgroup to check if there was a significant difference of means between the subgroups. If the distribution was not found to be normal, a Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for a significant difference of means between the subgroups. All subgroups where a significant difference was found are marked by a '*' next to the Group Label.  

The table below each data table contains the ANOVA/Kruskal Wallis tests with statistically significant differences bolded.  Further post hoc testing, Tukey HSD/Dunn Test was computed for groups containing more than two subgroups to identify which subgroups have a statistically significant difference with a Bonferonni adjustment in case of a Dunn Test and can be seen in Table below the ANOVA/Kruskal Wallis results.  Groupings with a significant difference are bolded.

<br/>

Correlation plots were also created for each model group to make a graphical representation of the relationship of the student perception variables, EGRA and EGMA subsections and some of the demographic variables. A separate correlation plot was created for both BAB and Formal Primary students.  In the correlation heatmap plots, green dots indicate a positive correlation and purple dots indicate a negative correlation.  The intensity and size of the dots indicate the magnitude of the correlation.  The location of the dots has no meaning on its own.  

#### Model A.	Do student SEL measures of resilience predict EGRA, EGMA, and hope?

Model A includes student perceptions of themselves as predictors of each outcome (EGRA normalized gains, EGMA normalized gain, and hope). The independent student perceptions for model A include: self-esteem and empathy.

**Retained Student Correlation Heat Map**
```{r model A correlation plots, include=TRUE, width = 7.5}
rquery.cormatMethod(EndlinestudentsurveyModelACorr)
```

#### Student Perception of Empathy 

The Midline Empathy scale items were used to assess student perception of empathy.  The scale is composed of the average of the following 3 items:

<br/>

  * When a friend is upset, I feel upset too.
  * If someone in my family is sad, I feel really bad.
  * I feel bad when two people quarrel.
  
<br/>

All items were measured on 6 point Likert scale (0-None of the time, 1-A little of the time, 2-Some of the time, 3-A lot of the time, 4-Most of the time, 5-All the time) where students indicated the frequency of perceived empathy with each statement.

<br/>

```{r empathy midline to endline call mean function}
## call mean table functions build with equity avg scale item

empathy_avg_flex <- build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EL2Empathy_Avg, "Empathy Perceptions")
```


`r empathy_avg_flex`


<br/>

#### Student Perception of Self-Esteem

The Self-Esteem scale items from the KINDL Quality of Life Survey (Ravens-Sieberer, U. & Bullinger, M. (1998b) were used to assess student’s perception of their self-esteem during the prior week as component of quality of life. The scale is composed of the average of the following 5 items: 

<br/>

  * During the past week, how often were you proud of yourself?
  * During the past week, how often did you feel happy?
  * During the past week, how often did you feel pleased with yourself?
  * During the past week, how often did you have lots of good ideas?
  * During the past week, I felt I was doing really well.

<br/>

All items were measured on a 6 point Likert scale (0-None of the time, 1-A little of the time, 2-Some of the time, 3-A lot of the time, 4-Most of the time, 5-All the time) where students indicated their self-esteem during the past week with each statement. 


```{r self-esteem midline to endline call mean function}
## call mean table functions build with equity avg scale item
selfesteem_avg_flex <- build_meanEndline3_psychoSocial_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MSelfEsteem_Avg, EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, "Self-Esteem Perceptions")
```

`r selfesteem_avg_flex`

<br/>

#### Model A Variances by Demographics

Student perceptions of empathy and student perception of self-esteem were all analyzed for variances among the demographic subgroups.  The table below shows the p values when checking for significance of those variances. Demographic categories with only two subgroups have one line in the table representing the significance of the variance between those two subgroups and demographic categories with more than two subgroups have more than one line, with each line representing the significance of the variance between each of the subgroup groupings. A line in the table is bolded if any of the p values represent a significant variance.  In the case of more than two subgroups, the p value displayed is the adjusted p value using a Bonferroni correction.


```{r both years psychosocial model A stats table build, include=TRUE}
dfkruskalTestTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=22, ncol = 6))
colnames(dfkruskalTestTable) <- c("Group", "Subgroup", "Empathy Year 1 p value", "Empathy Year 2 p value", "Self-Esteem Year 1 p value", "Self-Esteem Year 2 p value")

## Set row labels 
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[1] <- "Program Type"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[2] <- "Location Type"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[5] <- "IDP Family"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[6] <- "Gender"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[7] <- "Age Group"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[8] <- "Socio-Economic Status"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[11] <- "Mother's Literacy"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[12] <- "Father's Literacy"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[13] <- "Lives without Parents"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[14] <- "Dialect Spoken"
dfkruskalTestTable$Group[17] <- "State"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[1] <- "BAB - Formal Primary"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[2] <- "IDP - Rural"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[3] <- "IDP - Urban"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[4] <- "Rural - Urban"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[5] <- "Not IDP Family - IDP Family"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[6] <- "Male - Female"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[7] <- "4 to 11 year olds - 12 to 20 year olds"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[8] <- "high - low"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[9] <- "high - medium"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[10] <- "low - medium"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[11] <- "no - yes"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[12] <- "no - yes"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[13] <- "no - yes"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[14] <- "Maay - Maxaa tiri"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[15] <- "Maay - Other"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[16] <- "Maxaa tiri - Other"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[17] <- "Benaadir - Hirshabeelle"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[18] <- "Benaadir - Jubbaland"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[19] <- "Hirshabeelle - Jubbaland"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[20] <- "Benaadir - South-West"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[21] <- "Hirshabeelle - South-West"
dfkruskalTestTable$Subgroup[22] <- "Jubbaland - South-West"

empathy_kruskal <- build_kruskalEndlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EL2Empathy_Avg, 'Empathy Kruskal')

empathy_dunn <- build_dunnEndlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEmpathy_Avg, EL2Empathy_Avg, 'Empathy Dunn')

selfesteem_kruskal <- build_kruskalEndlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MSelfEsteem_Avg, EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, 'Self Esteem Kruskal')

selfesteem_dunn <- build_dunnEndlinedf_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MSelfEsteem_Avg, EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, 'Self Esteem Dunn')

dfkruskalTestTable[1,3]  <- empathy_kruskal[1,3]
dfkruskalTestTable[1,4] <- empathy_kruskal[1,5]
dfkruskalTestTable[1,5] <- selfesteem_kruskal[1,3]
dfkruskalTestTable[1,6] <- selfesteem_kruskal[1,5]
dfkruskalTestTable[5,3] <- empathy_kruskal[3,3]
dfkruskalTestTable[5,4] <- empathy_kruskal[3,5]
dfkruskalTestTable[5,5] <- selfesteem_kruskal[3,3]
dfkruskalTestTable[5,6] <- selfesteem_kruskal[3,5]
```
