```{r both years psychosocial All Other stats table build, include=TRUE}
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- hline(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=11)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- hline(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=12)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- hline(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=13)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- hline(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=16)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=3, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=9, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=15, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=18, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=20, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bg(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, i=22, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bold(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, ~  (`Hope Year 1 p value` < .05) & (`Hope Year 2 p value` < .05), bold=TRUE)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bold(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, ~  (`SES Year 1 p value` < .05) | (`SES Year 2 p value` < .05), bold = TRUE)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bold(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, ~  (`Overall Safety Year 2 p value` < .05), bold = TRUE)
flexdfkruskalOverallTable <- bold(flexdfkruskalOverallTable, ~  (`Responsibility Influence Year 2 p value` < .05), bold = TRUE)

flexdfkruskalOverallTable
```


### Student EGRA (Early Grade Reading Assessment) and EGMA (Early Grade Mathematics Assessment) Results

To analyze student growth from baseline to midline, gains were measured using the “percent potential gain” identified in the table as ‘% Gain Mean’. The percent of potential gains was calculated using: 
EGRAPercentPotentialGain = EGRAGain / (100 - BaselineEGRATotal) * 100

After calculating the Percent Potential Gain values, we found that on the negative end of the potential percent gain values some students had values less than -100%.  These extreme negative values distorted the analysis and were treated as outliers.  We decided to remove these students from the EGRA and EGMA analysis because we believe they could have been misidentified students or the result of some other unknown occurrence.  There were 55 BAB students and 35 Formal Primary students found to be outliers.  

### Distribution of Outliers amongst the population

```{r baseline to endline matched outliers, include=TRUE}
Outlierprogramtype <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
colnames(Outlierprogramtype) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlierlocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()
Outlierlocation <- as.data.frame(Outlierlocation)
colnames(Outlierlocation) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlieridpfamily <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(IDPFamily_f) %>% count()
Outlieridpfamily <- as.data.frame(Outlieridpfamily)
colnames(Outlieridpfamily) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outliergender <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count()
Outliergender <- as.data.frame(Outliergender)
colnames(Outliergender) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlierses <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(EL2SES_Sum_f) %>% count()
Outlierses <- as.data.frame(Outlierses)
colnames(Outlierses) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outliermotherlit <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(MotherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
Outliermotherlit <- as.data.frame(Outliermotherlit)
colnames(Outliermotherlit) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlierfatherlit <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()
Outlierfatherlit <- as.data.frame(Outlierfatherlit)
colnames(Outlierfatherlit) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

OutlierLivesWithOther <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(StudentLivesWithOtherDesc) %>% count()
OutlierLivesWithOther <- as.data.frame(OutlierLivesWithOther)
colnames(OutlierLivesWithOther) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlierlanguages <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(Languages_f) %>% count()
Outlierlanguages <- as.data.frame(Outlierlanguages)
colnames(Outlierlanguages) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

Outlierstate <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedOutlier %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()
Outlierstate <- as.data.frame(Outlierstate)
colnames(Outlierstate) <- c("Demographic", "Count")

outlierDemo <- rbind(Outlierprogramtype, Outlierlocation, Outlieridpfamily, Outliergender, Outlierses, Outliermotherlit, Outlierfatherlit, OutlierLivesWithOther, Outlierlanguages, Outlierstate)

outlierDemo <- outlierDemo %>% mutate(Group = '')
outlierDemo <- outlierDemo[,c(3,1,2)]

outlierDemo$Group[1] <- "Program"
outlierDemo$Group[4] <- "Location Type"
outlierDemo$Group[7] <- "IDP Family"
outlierDemo$Group[9] <- "Gender"
outlierDemo$Group[11] <- "SES"
outlierDemo$Group[15] <- "Mother Literacy"
outlierDemo$Group[17] <- "Father Literacy"
outlierDemo$Group[19] <- "Lives With Other"
outlierDemo$Group[21] <- "Dialect"

outlierflextable <- flextable(outlierDemo)
outlierflextable <- autofit(outlierflextable)
outlierflextable <- height(outlierflextable, height = 0.08)
outlierflextable <- width(outlierflextable, j=1, 2.0)
outlierflextable <- width(outlierflextable, j=2, 2.0)
outlierflextable <- width(outlierflextable, j=3, 2.0)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=3)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=6)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=8)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=10)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=14)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=16)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=18)
outlierflextable <- hline(outlierflextable, i=20)
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=2, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=4, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=6, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=8, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=10, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=12, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=14, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=16, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=18, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=20, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=22, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=24, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
outlierflextable <- bg(outlierflextable, i=26, j=2:3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

outlierflextable
```



### Proficiency Levels

<br/>

Student proficiency levels were measured at each step in the 2 year longitudinal study for both the EGRA and EGMA exams.  Proficiency levels are defined as 4 distinct levels. The first level is labeled 'Non-Learner' and is defined as students scoring 0.  Level 2 is labeled as 'Emergent Learner' and defined with a score greater than 0 and less than or equal to 40. Level 3 is labeled as 'Established Learner' and defined with a score great than 40 and less than or equal to 80. Lastly, level 4 is labeled as 'Proficient Learner' and defined with a score greater than 80 to 100.  For students that started as BAB students in level 1 and Formal Primary grades 1 and 2 in year 1 and then proceeded onto either BAB level 2 or Formal Primary grade 3 are seen as a whole group in the first EGRA proficiency figure below followed by a table with the corresponding values.

<br/>

```{r EGRA learner proficiency levels, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.5}

Learnercol_order <- c("Time", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")
EGRABaselineLearner <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BEGRABaselineLearner_f) %>% count()
EGRABaselineLearner <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearner)
numEGRALearner <- nrow(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

EGRABaselineLearnerLength <- nrow(EGRABaselineLearner)
EGRABLearnerSave <- EGRABaselineLearner
EGRABaselineLearner <- EGRABaselineLearner %>%  mutate(per = round(n/numEGRALearner*100, sigdig2))
EGRABaselineLearner <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearner)

EGRABaselineLearner$n <- NULL

EGRABLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABaselineLearner %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRABLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRABLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGRABLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRABLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABLearnerpivot1[,Learnercol_order]
EGRABLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerSavepivot1[,Learnercol_order]
EGRABLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABLearnerpivot1)
EGRABLearnerSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABLearnerSavepivot1)

EGRAMidlineLearner <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(MEGRAMidlineLearner_f) %>% count()
EGRAMidlineLearner <- as.data.frame(EGRAMidlineLearner)
EGRAMLearnerSave <- EGRAMidlineLearner
EGRAMidlineLearner <- EGRAMidlineLearner %>% mutate(per = round(n/numEGRALearner*100, sigdig2))
EGRAMidlineLearner <- as.data.frame(EGRAMidlineLearner)
EGRAMidlineLearner$n <- NULL

EGRAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGRAMidlineLearner %>% pivot_wider(names_from = MEGRAMidlineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = MEGRAMidlineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRAMLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGRAMLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Endline")
EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Endline")
EGRAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerpivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRAMLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRAMLearnerpivot1)
EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1)

EGRABL2Learner <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BL2EGRALearner_f) %>% count()
EGRABL2Learner <- as.data.frame(EGRABL2Learner)
EGRABL2LearnerSave <- EGRABL2Learner
EGRABL2Learner <- EGRABL2Learner %>% mutate(per = round(n/numEGRALearner*100, sigdig2))
EGRABL2Learner <- as.data.frame(EGRABL2Learner)
EGRABL2Learner$n <- NULL

EGRABL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRABL2Learner %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BL2EGRALearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABL2LearnerSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BL2EGRALearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRABL2Learnerpivot1[is.na(EGRABL2Learnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRABL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRABL2Learnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGRABL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRABL2Learnerpivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRABL2Learnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABL2Learnerpivot1)
EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1)

EGRAEL2Learner <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(EL2EGRALearner_f) %>% count()
EGRAEL2Learner <- as.data.frame(EGRAEL2Learner)
EGRAEL2LearnerSave <- EGRAEL2Learner
EGRAEL2Learner <- EGRAEL2Learner %>% mutate(per = round(n/numEGRALearner*100, sigdig2))
EGRAEL2Learner <- as.data.frame(EGRAEL2Learner)
EGRAEL2Learner$n <- NULL

EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRAEL2Learner %>% pivot_wider(names_from = EL2EGRALearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAEL2LearnerSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = EL2EGRALearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1[is.na(EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Endline")
EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Endline")
EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1 <- EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1[, Learnercol_order]
EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1)
EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1)

EGRALearner <- rbind(EGRABLearnerpivot1, EGRAMLearnerpivot1, EGRABL2Learnerpivot1, EGRAEL2Learnerpivot1)
EGRALearnerSaveTable <- rbind(EGRABLearnerSavepivot1, EGRAMLearnerSavepivot1, EGRABL2LearnerSavepivot1, EGRAEL2LearnerSavepivot1)


origNames = colnames(EGRALearner)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	
	
EGRALearnerPlot <- plot.likert(Time ~ ., EGRALearner, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = "EGRA Learner Proficiency", col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc,
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))

EGRALearnerPlot

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGRAFlex <- flextable(EGRALearnerSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGRAFlex <- autofit(EGRAFlex)

EGRAFlex
```

```{r EGMA learner proficiency levels, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.5}
origNames = colnames(EGMALearner)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

<br/>

The students in the above longitudinal study are now broken out by program type in the following 4 EGRA figures followed by the corresponding EGMA figures.  The first figure shows their proficiency at the beginning of year 1, the second figure shows the end of year 1, the third figure shows the beginning of year 2 and the fourth figure shows the end of year 2 all distinguished by program type and grade level.

<br/>

```{r EGRA learner level baseline by program, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.1}

Yr1ProgramLearnercol_order <- c("Time", "BABProgramGrade_f", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BEGRABaselineLearner_f, BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus)

EGRABaselineLearnerLength <- nrow(EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus)

EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+1, 1] <- "Non-Learner"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+1, 2] <- "BAB"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+1, 3] <- 0
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+2, 1] <- "Emergent Learner"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+2, 2] <- "BAB"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+2, 3] <- 0
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+3, 1] <- "Established Learner"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+3, 2] <- "BAB"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+3, 3] <- 0
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+4, 1] <- "Proficient Learner"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+4, 2] <- "BAB"
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGRABaselineLearnerLength+4, 3] <- 0

EGRABLearnerProgSave <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus)
EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus$n <- NULL

EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyBABStatus %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerProgSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1[,Yr1ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1[,Yr1ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1)
EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1)

origNames = colnames(EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	
	
EGRAYear1BaselineProgramPlot <- plot.likert(BABProgramGrade_f ~ ., EGRABProgramLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGRA Learner Proficiency Year 1 Baseline\nby Program", fontsize=10), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGRAYear1BaselineProgramPlot
```

```{r EGRA Learner Level table by Program, include=TRUE}
LearnerProgColNames <- c("Time", "Program", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGRAMLearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGRABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGRAEL2LearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames

EGRALearnerProgSaveTable <- rbind(EGRABLearnerProgSavepivot1, EGRAMLearnerProgSavepivot1, EGRABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1, EGRAEL2LearnerProgSavepivot1)

EGRALearnerProgSaveTable[is.na(EGRALearnerProgSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- flextable(EGRALearnerProgSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- autofit(EGRALearnerProgFlex)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=3)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=1:3, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- height(EGRALearnerProgFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGRALearnerProgFlex, j=6, 0.9)

EGRALearnerProgFlex <- height(EGRALearnerProgFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- fontsize(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGRALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=6)
EGRALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerProgFlex, i=8)

EGRALearnerProgFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGRALearnerProgFlex)
EGRALearnerProgFlex
```

```{r EGMA learner level baseline by program, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

```{r EGMA learner level midline by program, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}
EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGMAMidlineLearnerLength+3, 2] <- "BAB"

EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGMAMidlineLearnerLength+4, 1] <- "Proficient Learner"
EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGMAMidlineLearnerLength+4, 2] <- "BAB"
EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus[EGMAMidlineLearnerLength+4, 3] <- 0

EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus <- EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
## EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus <- EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig2), '%'))
EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus)
EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus$n <- NULL

EGMAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGMAMidlineLearnerbyBABStatus %>% pivot_wider(names_from = MEGMAMidlineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerProgSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = MEGMAMidlineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGMAMLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGMAMLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGMAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Endline")
EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Endline")
EGMAMLearnerpivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerpivot1[,Yr1ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1[,Yr1ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGMAMLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMAMLearnerpivot1)
EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1)

EGMAYear1MidlineProgramPlot <- plot.likert(BABProgramGrade_f ~ ., EGMAMLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGMA Learner Proficiency Year 1 Endline", fontsize=11), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGMAYear1MidlineProgramPlot
```

```{r EGMA learner level BL2 by program, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.1}
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BL2EGMALearner_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus)

EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength <- nrow(EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus)
EGMABL2LearnerProgSave <- EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus

EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+1, 1] <- "Non-Learner"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+1, 2] <- "BAB"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+1, 3] <- 0
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+2, 1] <- "Emergent Learner"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+2, 2] <- "BAB"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+2, 3] <- 0
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+3, 1] <- "Established Learner"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+3, 2] <- "BAB"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+3, 3] <- 0
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+4, 1] <- "Proficient Learner"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+4, 2] <- "BAB"
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus[EGMABL2ProgramLearnerLength+4, 3] <- 0

EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus <- EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus %>% group_by(EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus)
EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus$n <- NULL

EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerbyBABStatus %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BL2EGMALearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerProgSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BL2EGMALearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1[,Yr2ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1[,Yr2ProgramLearnercol_order]
EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1)
EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1)

origNames = colnames(EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	

EGMAYear2BaselineProgramPlot <- plot.likert(EL2ProgramGrade_f ~ ., EGMABL2ProgramLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGMA Learner Proficiency Year 2 Baseline", fontsize=11), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGMAYear2BaselineProgramPlot
```

```{r EGMA Learner Level table by Program, include=TRUE}
LearnerProgColNames <- c("Time", "Program", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGMABLearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames
names(EGMAEL2LearnerProgSavepivot1) <- LearnerProgColNames

EGMALearnerProgSaveTable <- rbind(EGMABLearnerProgSavepivot1, EGMAMLearnerProgSavepivot1, EGMABL2LearnerProgSavepivot1, EGMAEL2LearnerProgSavepivot1)

EGMALearnerProgSaveTable[is.na(EGMALearnerProgSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- flextable(EGMALearnerProgSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- autofit(EGMALearnerProgFlex)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=3)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=1:3, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=4:6, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- height(EGMALearnerProgFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- width(EGMALearnerProgFlex, j=6, 0.9)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- height(EGMALearnerProgFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- fontsize(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGMALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=6)
EGMALearnerProgFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerProgFlex, i=8)

EGMALearnerProgFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGMALearnerProgFlex)
EGMALearnerProgFlex
```

#### EGRA and EGMA Learner Levels by Retention Status for BAB and Formal Primary Students Combined

<br/>

```{r EGRA learner level baseline by retention, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}
Yr1RetentionLearnercol_order <- c("Time", "Retention_f", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

EndlineRetained <- EndlinestudentsurveySansOutlier %>% filter(!is.na(Retention))

EndlineRetained <- EndlineRetained %>% mutate(Retention_f = ifelse(Retention==0, "Not Retained", "Retained"))


EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention <- EndlineRetained %>% group_by(BEGRABaselineLearner_f, Retention_f) %>% count()
EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention)

EGRABaselineLearnerRetention <- nrow(EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention)

EGRABLearnerRetentionSave <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention
EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention %>% group_by(Retention_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention)
EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention$n <- NULL

EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyRetention %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerRetentionSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1[,Yr1RetentionLearnercol_order]
EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1[,Yr1RetentionLearnercol_order]
EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1)
EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABLearnerRetentionSavepivot1)



origNames = colnames(EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	
	
EGRAYear1BaselineRetentionPlot <- plot.likert(Retention_f ~ ., EGRABRetentionLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGRA Learner Proficiency Year 1 Baseline\n by Retention", fontsize=10), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGRAYear1BaselineRetentionPlot
```

```{r EGMA learner level baseline by retention, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

<br/>

#### EGRA and EGMA Learner Levels by State for BAB and Formal Primary Students Combined


The stacked bar graphs below show the student learner levels at baseline by state.  The first figure shows the percent of students by state at each learner level defined at baseline of year 1. The second figure shows the percent of students by state at each learner level defined by their performance at the end of year 1.
<br/>

```{r EGRA learner level baseline by state, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3.1}
Yr1StateLearnercol_order <- c("Time", "State", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")
EGRABaselineLearnerbyState <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BEGRABaselineLearner_f, State) %>% count()
EGRABaselineLearnerbyState <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyState)

EGRABaselineLearnerStateLength <- nrow(EGRABaselineLearnerbyState)

EGRABLearnerStateSave <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyState
EGRABaselineLearnerbyState <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyState %>% group_by(State) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
EGRABaselineLearnerbyState <- as.data.frame(EGRABaselineLearnerbyState)
EGRABaselineLearnerbyState$n <- NULL

EGRABStateLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABaselineLearnerbyState %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerStateSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGRABaselineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGRABStateLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGRABStateLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGRABStateLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABStateLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGRABStateLearnerpivot1 <- EGRABStateLearnerpivot1[,Yr1StateLearnercol_order]
EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1[,Yr1StateLearnercol_order]
EGRABStateLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABStateLearnerpivot1)
EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1)

EGRABStateLearnerpivot1$State <- fct_relevel(EGRABStateLearnerpivot1$State, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")

origNames = colnames(EGRABStateLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	
	
EGRAYear1BaselineStatePlot <- plot.likert(State ~ ., EGRABStateLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGRA Learner Proficiency Year 1 Baseline\n by State Group", fontsize=10), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGRAYear1BaselineStatePlot
```

```{r EGRA learner level BL2 by State, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3.1}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

```{r EGRA Learner Level table by State, include=TRUE}
LearnerStateColNames <- c("Time", "State", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGRAMLearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGRABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGRAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames

EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGRAMLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRAMLearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGRABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGRAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGRAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)

EGRALearnerStateSaveTable <- rbind(EGRABLearnerStateSavepivot1, EGRAMLearnerStateSavepivot1, EGRABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1, EGRAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1)

EGRALearnerStateSaveTable[is.na(EGRALearnerStateSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- flextable(EGRALearnerStateSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- autofit(EGRALearnerStateFlex)

EGRALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=1:4, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=5:8, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=9:12, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=13:16, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- height(EGRALearnerStateFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGRALearnerStateFlex, j=6, 0.9)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=4)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=8)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i=12)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- height(EGRALearnerStateFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerStateFlex <- fontsize(EGRALearnerStateFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGRALearnerStateFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGRALearnerStateFlex)
EGRALearnerStateFlex
```

```{r EGMA learner level baseline by state, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3.1}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

```{r EGMA learner level BL2 by State, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3.1}
EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerStateSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BL2EGMALearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1)
EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 2 Baseline")
EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1[,Yr2StateLearnercol_order]
EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1[,Yr2StateLearnercol_order]
EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1)
EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1)

EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1$State <- fct_relevel(EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1$State, "Benaadir", "Hirshabeelle", "Jubbaland", "South-West")

origNames = colnames(EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	



EGMAYear2BaselineStatePlot <- plot.likert(State ~ ., EGMABL2StateLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGMA Learner Proficiency Year 2 Baseline\n by State", fontsize=11), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGMAYear2BaselineStatePlot
```

```{r EGMA Learner Level table by State, include=TRUE}
LearnerStateColNames <- c("Time", "State", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGMABLearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGMAMLearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames
names(EGMAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1) <- LearnerStateColNames

EGMABLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMABLearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGMAMLearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMAMLearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)
EGMAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 <- EGMAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1 %>% arrange(State)

EGMALearnerStateSaveTable <- rbind(EGMABLearnerStateSavepivot1, EGMAMLearnerStateSavepivot1, EGMABL2LearnerStateSavepivot1, EGMAEL2LearnerStateSavepivot1)

EGMALearnerStateSaveTable[is.na(EGMALearnerStateSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- flextable(EGMALearnerStateSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- autofit(EGMALearnerStateFlex)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=1:4, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=5:8, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=9:12, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=13:16, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- height(EGMALearnerStateFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- width(EGMALearnerStateFlex, j=6, 0.9)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=4)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=8)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i=12)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- height(EGMALearnerStateFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerStateFlex <- fontsize(EGMALearnerStateFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGMALearnerStateFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGMALearnerStateFlex)
EGMALearnerStateFlex
```

```{r EGRA learner level baseline by agegroup1, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```

```{r EGRA learner level BL2 by agegroup1, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.1}
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2

  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
```

```{r EGRA learner level EL2 by agegroup1, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.1}
EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup[EGRAEL2LearnerAgeLength+2, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"

EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup[EGRAEL2LearnerAgeLength+3, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup[EGRAEL2LearnerAgeLength+3, 3] <- 0

EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup[EGRAEL2LearnerAgeLength+4, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup[EGRAEL2LearnerAgeLength+4, 3] <- 0

EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup <- EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))

EGRAEL2LearnerbyAgeGroup$n <- NULL
```

```{r EGRA Learner Level table by Age Group, include=TRUE}
LearnerAgeColNames <- c("Time", "Age Group", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGRAEL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1) <- LearnerAgeColNames

EGRALearnerAgeSaveTable <- rbind(EGRABLearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGRAMLearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGRABL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGRAEL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1)

EGRALearnerAgeSaveTable[is.na(EGRALearnerAgeSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- flextable(EGRALearnerAgeSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- autofit(EGRALearnerAgeFlex)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=2)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- height(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, j=6, 0.9)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=4)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i=6)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- height(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, height= .08)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- fontsize(EGRALearnerAgeFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGRALearnerAgeFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGRALearnerAgeFlex)
EGRALearnerAgeFlex
```

```{r EGMA learner level baseline by agegroup1, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.3}

Yr1AgeLearnercol_order <- c("Time", "AgeGroup1_f", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(BEGMABaselineLearner_f, AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge <- as.data.frame(EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge)

EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength <- nrow(EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge)

EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+1, 1] <- "Non-Learner"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+1, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+1, 3] <- 0
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+2, 1] <- "Emergent Learner"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+2, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+2, 3] <- 0
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+3, 1] <- "Established Learner"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+3, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+3, 3] <- 0
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+4, 1] <- "Proficient Learner"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+4, 2] <- "4 to 11 year olds"
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge[EGMABaselineLearnerAgeLength+4, 3] <- 0

EGMABLearnerAgeSave <- EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge <- EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% mutate(per = round(prop.table(n)*100, sigdig2))
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge <- as.data.frame(EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge)
EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge$n <- NULL

EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABaselineLearnerbyAge %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGMABaselineLearner_f, values_from = per, values_fn=sum)
EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1 <- EGMABLearnerAgeSave %>% pivot_wider(names_from = BEGMABaselineLearner_f, values_from = n, values_fn=sum)
EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1)
EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1[is.na(EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1)] <- 0
EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1 <- EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1 %>% mutate(Time = "Year 1 Baseline")
EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 <- EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1[,Yr1AgeLearnercol_order]
EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1 <- EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1[,Yr1AgeLearnercol_order]
EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1)
EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1 <- as.data.frame(EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1)

origNames = colnames(EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1)
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}	
	
EGMAYear1BaselineAgePlot <- plot.likert(AgeGroup1_f ~ ., EGMABAgeLearnerpivot1, as.percent=TRUE, ReferenceZero=1.5,
            main = list(label="EGMA Learner Proficiency Year 1 Baseline\n by Age Group", fontsize=10), 
            col = likertPalette4a,
            xlab = "",  
            positive.order = F,
            ylab = "",    
            key.border.white=T,
            panel=myPanelFunc, 
            rightAxis=F, par.settings.in =list(axis.line = list(col = 0), layout.heights = list(key.bottom = 0), fontsize=list(text=10, points=6), layout.heights = list(between = 0)))
EGMAYear1BaselineAgePlot
```

```{r EGMA learner level BL2 by agegroup1, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.1}
# define a custom panel function
myPanelFunc <- function(...){
  panel.likert(...)
  vals <- list(...)
  DF <- data.frame(x=vals$x, y=vals$y, groups=vals$groups)

  ### some convoluted calculations here...
  grps <- as.character(DF$groups)
  for(i in 1:length(origNames)){
    grps <- sub(paste0('^',origNames[i]),i,grps)
  }

  DF <- DF[order(DF$y,grps),]

  DF$correctX <- ave(DF$x,DF$y,FUN=function(x){
    x[x < 0] <- rev(cumsum(rev(x[x < 0]))) - x[x < 0]/2
    x[x > 0] <- cumsum(x[x > 0]) - x[x > 0]/2
    return(x)
  })

  subs <- sub(' Positive$','',DF$groups)
  collapse <- subs[-1] == subs[-length(subs)] & DF$y[-1] == DF$y[-length(DF$y)]
  DF$abs <- abs(DF$x)
  DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- DF$abs[c(collapse,FALSE)] + DF$abs[c(FALSE,collapse)]
  DF$correctX[c(collapse,FALSE)] <- 0
  DF <- DF[c(TRUE,!collapse),]

  DF$perc <- round(ave(DF$abs,DF$y,FUN=function(x){x/sum(x) * 100}), 0)

  ## Here goes 6 lines that have been changes - AK
  # here we modify the column with labels a bit:
  DF$perc <- paste0(DF$perc,'%')
  # change all "0%" to blanks
  DF$perc[DF$perc == "0%"] <- ""
  # the argument label is a bit modified too
  panel.text(x=DF$correctX, y=DF$y, label=DF$perc, cex=0.8)
}
```
