```{r EGMA Learner Level table by Age Group, include=TRUE}
LearnerAgeColNames <- c("Time", "Age Group", "Non-Learner", "Emergent Learner", "Established Learner", "Proficient Learner")

names(EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1) <- LearnerAgeColNames
names(EGMAMLearnerAgeSavepivot1) <- LearnerAgeColNames
names(EGMABL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1) <- LearnerAgeColNames
names(EGMAEL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1) <- LearnerAgeColNames

EGMALearnerAgeSaveTable <- rbind(EGMABLearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGMAMLearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGMABL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1, EGMAEL2LearnerAgeSavepivot1)

EGMALearnerAgeSaveTable[is.na(EGMALearnerAgeSaveTable)] <- 0

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- flextable(EGMALearnerAgeSaveTable)

## set format of flextables
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- autofit(EGMALearnerAgeFlex)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=2)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- merge_at(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- height(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=1, 1.0)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=2, 1.5)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=3, 0.9)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=4, 0.9)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=5, 0.9)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- width(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, j=6, 0.9)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- height(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, height= .08)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- fontsize(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 10, part = "body")

EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=4)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- hline(EGMALearnerAgeFlex, i=6)

EGMALearnerAgeFlex <- fix_border_issues(EGMALearnerAgeFlex)
EGMALearnerAgeFlex
```

<br/>

### EGRA (Early Grade Reading Assessment) Overall Test Results

The 9 sub-sections of the EGRA were summed in equal weights to create a Total EGRA Score out of 100 possible points.  The table below displays the Baseline Mean, Midline Mean, the Gain Mean or the mean of each student's Midline Score - Baseline Score.  This is followed by the % Gain Mean, which represents the mean of students percent potential gain.  The Percent Potential Gain is calculated by taking each student's individual gain divided by the total possible score minus their baseline score. This way we can normalize gain scores by taking into account their baseline score.  Finally, we have the difference from overall percent potential gain column.  This column shows the difference from each subgroup to the overall group.  Students with a negative percent potential gain less than -100% have been considered outliers and have been removed from the analysis in the data tables below showing the results from the overall EGRA test.

<br/>

Statistics: For the EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains table below, a Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for statistically significant difference of medians between the subgroups. If only Year 1 or Year 2 have a statistically significant difference, only the corresponding p value is bolded. If there is a statistically significant difference among subgroups for both year 1 and year 2, the entire line is bolded. The next table shows the H-Statistic along with the p values for both year 1 and year 2 for the Kruskal-Wallis test.  The final table displays further post hoc testing, Tukey HSD/Dunn Test.  This test was computed for groups containing more than two subgroups to identify which subgroups have a statistically significant difference with a Bonferonni adjustment in case of a Dunn Test and can be seen below. Groupings with a significant difference amongst the specific subgroups are bolded.

<br/>

```{r EGRA total scores}
## call median table build with EGRA Total

EGRATotalEndlineAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_2Ages_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRAPCTGain, BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRAPCTGain, "EGRA Baseline to Endline Gains")

EGRATotal_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEGRAPCTGain, EL2EGRAPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor EGRA Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

EGRATotal_avgdunn_flex <-  
build_dunnEndline_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEGRAPCTGain, EL2EGRAPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for EGRA Percent Gain for Demographic Categories with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r EGRATotalEndlineAllMedian`

<br/>

`r EGRATotal_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r EGRATotal_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

### EGMA (Early Grade Math Assessment) Overall Test Results

The 10 sub-sections of the EGMA were summed in equal weights to create a Total EGMA Score out of 100 possible points.  The table below displays the Baseline Median, Midline Median, the Gain Median or the median of each student's Midline Score - Baseline Score.  This is followed by the % Gain Median, which represents the median of students percent potential gain.  The Percent Potential Gain is calculated by taking each student's individual gain divided by the the total possible score minus their baseline score. This way we can normalize gain scores by taking into account their baseline score.  Finally, we have the difference from overall percent potential gain column.  This column shows the difference from each subgroup to the overall group.  Students with a negative percent potential gain less than 100 have been considered outliers and have been removed from the analysis in the data tables below.  

<br/>

Statistics: For the EGMA Baseline to Endline Gains table below, a Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for statistically significant difference of medians between the subgroups. If only Year 1 or Year 2 have a statistically significant difference, only the corresponding p value is bolded. If there is a statistically significant difference among subgroups for both year 1 and year 2, the entire line is bolded. The next table shows the H-Statistic along with the p values for both year 1 and year 2 for the Kruskal-Wallis test.  The final table displays further post hoc testing, Tukey HSD/Dunn Test.  This test was computed for groups containing more than two subgroups to identify which subgroups have a statistically significant difference with a Bonferonni adjustment in case of a Dunn Test and can be seen below. Groupings with a significant difference amongst the specific subgroups are bolded. 

<br/>

```{r EGMA total scores}
EGMATotalEndlineAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_2Ages_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, MEGMAPCTGain, BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGMAPCTGain, "EGMA Baseline to Endline Gains")

EGMATotal_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEGMAPCTGain, EL2EGMAPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor EGMA Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

EGMATotal_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MEGMAPCTGain, EL2EGMAPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for EGMA Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

`r EGMATotalEndlineAllMedian`

<br/>

`r EGMATotal_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r EGMATotal_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>


### EGRA Subsection Test Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA subsection median gains for students in both the BAB and formal primary students combined.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Note that in year 2 the median value for baseline and endline are the same for both Listening Comprehension and Dictation 1 subsections and that is why it looks like there is only one point for those subsections.  

<br/>

The green and purple tables below show the EGRA subsection median scores by learner category and subsection for BAB students only.  The green table shows the results for year 1/level 1 and the purple table shows the results for year 2/level 2.  For both the baseline and endline data rows, the learner category is defined based on the student overall EGRA performance at the baseline of that year.  The endline data row shows us how well students in the learner category defined at baseline completed the year.  

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 1 for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBSubsectionpivot1 <- egraBSubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBSubsectionpivot2 <- egraBSubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBSubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBSubsectionpivot2)
egraBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraESubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraESubsectionpivot1 <- egraESubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraESubsectionpivot2 <- egraESubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraESubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraESubsectionpivot2)
egraESubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraESubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragain <- merge(egraBSubsectionpivot2, egraESubsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragain$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragain $Subsection, "Dictation 1", "Dictation 2", "Listening Comprehension", "Phonemic Awareness", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Invented Words", "Real Words", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Reading Comprehension")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

ggplot(egragain ) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +  labs(x="EGRA Subsection", y="EGRA Median Score", title="EGRA Year 1 Baseline to Endline Subsection Score Gains\n All Longitudinal Study students") + theme_light()+ theme(text = element_text(face="bold"))
```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection by learner category BAB level 1 for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

egraBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(BEGRABaselineLearner_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f, BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, MEGRATotalAdjusted_n)

## Create data frame
dflearnerEGRAlevel1 <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 8, ncol = 11))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dflearnerEGRAlevel1) <- c("EGRA Subtask", "Time", "Dict 1 (Letters)", "Dict 2 (Words)", "Listening Comp", "Phonemic Awareness", "Letter Sounds", "Invent Words", "Real Words", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Reading Comp")

## Retrieve Baseline Data for Non-Learner
egraBNonLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BEGRABaselineLearner_f=='Non-Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Non-Learners
baselineMedianReadComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluency <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSounds <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwareness <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Non-Learners
midlineMedianReadComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianOralFluency <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianRealWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianInventWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianLetterSounds <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianPhonAwareness <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianListComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict1 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict2 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
egraBNonLearnerN <- nrow(egraBNonLearner)
nonLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Non-Learner"), " (n=", egraBNonLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Non-Learners
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,1] <- nonLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListComp, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwareness, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSounds, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluency, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[1,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadComp, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianListComp, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianPhonAwareness, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianLetterSounds, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianInventWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianRealWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianOralFluency, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[2,11] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianReadComp, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Emergent Learner
egraBEmergentLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BEGRABaselineLearner_f=='Emergent Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Emergent Learners
baselineMedianReadCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Emergent Learners
midlineMedianReadCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianOralFluencyEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianRealWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianInventWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianLetterSoundsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianListCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict1EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict2EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Emergent Learners and build label
egraBEmergentLearnerN <- nrow(egraBEmergentLearner)
emergentLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Emergent Learner"), " (n=", egraBEmergentLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Emergent Learners
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,1] <- emergentLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[3,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompEL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianListCompEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianLetterSoundsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianInventWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianRealWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianOralFluencyEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[4,11] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianReadCompEL, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Established Learner
egraBEstablishedLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BEGRABaselineLearner_f=='Established Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Established Learners
baselineMedianReadCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Established Learners
midlineMedianReadCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianOralFluencyEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianRealWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianInventWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianLetterSoundsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianListCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict1EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict2EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Established Learners and build label
egraBEstablishedLearnerN <- nrow(egraBEstablishedLearner)
establishedLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Established Learner"), " (n=", egraBEstablishedLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Established Learners
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,1] <- establishedLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[5,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompEL2, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianListCompEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianLetterSoundsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianInventWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianRealWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianOralFluencyEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[6,11] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianReadCompEL2, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Proficient Learner
egraBProficientLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BEGRABaselineLearner_f=='Proficient Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Proficient Learners
baselineMedianReadCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Proficient Learners
midlineMedianReadCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianOralFluencyPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianRealWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianInventWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianLetterSoundsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianPhonAwarenessPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianListCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict1PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianDict2PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Proficient Learners and build label
egraBProficientLearnerN <- nrow(egraBProficientLearner)
proficientLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Proficient Learner"), " (n=", egraBProficientLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Proficient Learners
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,1] <- proficientLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[7,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompPL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianDict2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianListCompPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianPhonAwarenessPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianLetterSoundsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianInventWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianRealWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianOralFluencyPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRAlevel1[8,11] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianReadCompPL, sigdig2)


## create flextable from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_box)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- flextable(dflearnerEGRAlevel1)

## set format of flextables
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- add_header_row(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, values=c("EGRA Level 1"), colwidths = c(11), top=TRUE)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=1, 0.8)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=2, 0.6)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=3, 0.6)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=4, 0.6)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=5, 0.5)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=6, 0.65)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=7, 0.6)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=8, 0.7)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=9, 0.7)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=10, 0.55)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=11, 0.55)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- fontsize(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 8, part= "all")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- align(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=1:2, align="left", part="all")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- align(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=3:11, align="right", part="all")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- valign(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=1:2, j=1, part="body", valign="center")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=NULL, bg="#7FBF7B", part="header")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=2, j=2:11, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=4, j=2:11, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=6, j=2:11, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=8, j=2:11, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bold(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=1, bold=TRUE)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bold(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- fix_border_issues(flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1)
flexEgraSubectionbyLearnerLevel1
```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 2 for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5}
egraBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBSubsectionpivot1 <- egraBSubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBSubsectionpivot2 <- egraBSubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBSubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBSubsectionpivot2)
egraBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraESubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraESubsectionpivot1 <- egraESubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraESubsectionpivot2 <- egraESubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraESubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraESubsectionpivot2)
egraESubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraESubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragain <- merge(egraBSubsectionpivot2, egraESubsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragain$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragain $Subsection, "Dictation 1", "Dictation 2","Listening Comprehension", "Phonemic Awareness", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Invented Words", "Real Words", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Reading Comprehension")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

ggplot(egragain ) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +  labs(x="EGRA Subsection", y="EGRA Median Score", title="EGRA Year 2 Baseline to Endline Subsection Score Gains\n All Longitudinal Study students") + theme_light()+ theme(text = element_text(face="bold"))
```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection by learner category BAB level 2 for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

egraBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(BL2EGRALearner_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f, BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n)

## Create data frame
dflearnerEGRALevel2 <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 8, ncol = 11))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dflearnerEGRALevel2) <- c("EGRA Subtask", "Time", "Dict 1 (Words)", "Dict 2 (Phrases)", "Listening Comp", "Phonemic Awareness", "Letter Sounds", "Invent Words", "Real Words", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Reading Comp")

## Retrieve Baseline Data for Non-Learner
egraBNonLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BL2EGRALearner_f=='Non-Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Non-Learners
baselineMedianReadComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluency <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSounds <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwareness <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Non-Learners
endlineMedianReadComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianOralFluency <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianRealWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianInventWords <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianLetterSounds <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianPhonAwareness <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianListComp <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict1 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict2 <- egraBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
egraBNonLearnerN <- nrow(egraBNonLearner)
nonLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Non-Learner"), " (n=", egraBNonLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Non-Learners
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,1] <- nonLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListComp, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwareness, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSounds, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluency, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[1,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadComp, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianListComp, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianPhonAwareness, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianLetterSounds, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianInventWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianRealWords, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianOralFluency, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[2,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianReadComp, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Emergent Learner
egraBEmergentLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BL2EGRALearner_f=='Emergent Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Emergent Learners
baselineMedianReadCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Emergent Learners
endlineMedianReadCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianOralFluencyEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianRealWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianInventWordsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianLetterSoundsEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianListCompEL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict1EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict2EL <- egraBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Emergent Learners and build label
egraBEmergentLearnerN <- nrow(egraBEmergentLearner)
emergentLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Emergent Learner"), " (n=", egraBEmergentLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Emergent Learners
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,1] <- emergentLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[3,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompEL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianListCompEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianLetterSoundsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianInventWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianRealWordsEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianOralFluencyEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[4,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianReadCompEL, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Established Learner
egraBEstablishedLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BL2EGRALearner_f=='Established Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Established Learners
baselineMedianReadCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Established Learners
endlineMedianReadCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianOralFluencyEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianRealWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianInventWordsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianLetterSoundsEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianListCompEL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict1EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict2EL2 <- egraBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Established Learners and build label
egraBEstablishedLearnerN <- nrow(egraBEstablishedLearner)
establishedLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Established Learner"), " (n=", egraBEstablishedLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Established Learners
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,1] <- establishedLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[5,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompEL2, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianListCompEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianPhonAwarenessEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianLetterSoundsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianInventWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianRealWordsEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianOralFluencyEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[6,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianReadCompEL2, sigdig2)




## Retrieve Baseline Data for Proficient Learner
egraBProficientLearner <- egraBSubsection %>% filter(BL2EGRALearner_f=='Proficient Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Proficient Learners
baselineMedianReadCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianOralFluencyPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianRealWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianInventWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianLetterSoundsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianPhonAwarenessPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianListCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict1PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDict2PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Proficient Learners
endlineMedianReadCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianOralFluencyPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianRealWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianInventWordsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianLetterSoundsPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianPhonAwarenessPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianListCompPL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict1PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDict2PL <- egraBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Proficient Learners and build label
egraBProficientLearnerN <- nrow(egraBProficientLearner)
proficientLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Proficient Learner"), " (n=", egraBProficientLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Proficient Learners
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,1] <- proficientLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDict2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianListCompPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianPhonAwarenessPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianLetterSoundsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianInventWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianRealWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianOralFluencyPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[7,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianReadCompPL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDict2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianListCompPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianPhonAwarenessPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianLetterSoundsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianInventWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianRealWordsPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianOralFluencyPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGRALevel2[8,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianReadCompPL, sigdig2)




## create flextable from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_box)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- flextable(dflearnerEGRALevel2)

## set format of flextables
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- add_header_row(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, values=c("EGRA Level 2"), colwidths = c(11), top=TRUE)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=1, 0.8)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=2, 0.6)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=3, 0.6)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=4, 0.6)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=5, 0.5)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=6, 0.65)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=7, 0.6)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=8, 0.75)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=9, 0.7)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=10, 0.6)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=11, 0.55)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- fontsize(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 8, part= "all")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- align(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=1:2, align="left", part="all")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- align(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=3:11, align="right", part="all")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- valign(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=1:2, j=1, part="body", valign="center")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=NULL, bg="#AF8DC3", part="header")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=2, j=2:11, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=4, j=2:11, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=6, j=2:11, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=8, j=2:11, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bold(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=1, bold=TRUE)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bold(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- fix_border_issues(flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2)
flexEgraSubsectionbyLearnerLevel2
```

```{r EGRA baseline program radar Subsection Year 1, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
EGRARadar <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 1, ncol = 9))

colnames(EGRARadar) <- c('Listening\nComp', 'Phon\nAware', 'Letter\nSound', 'Invented\nWords', 'Real\nWords', 'Oral Rd\nFluency', 'Reading\nComp', 'Dictation 1', 'Dictation 2')

EGRARadar <- rbind(rep(100,9), rep(0,9), EGRARadar)

EGRARadarListeningComp <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,1] <- round(EGRARadarListeningComp[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,1] <- round(EGRARadarListeningComp[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarPhonAware <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,2] <- round(EGRARadarPhonAware[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,2] <- round(EGRARadarPhonAware[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarLetSound <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,3] <- round(EGRARadarLetSound[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,3] <- round(EGRARadarLetSound[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarInventWord <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,4] <- round(EGRARadarInventWord[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,4] <- round(EGRARadarInventWord[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarRealWords <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,5] <- round(EGRARadarRealWords[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,5] <- round(EGRARadarRealWords[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarOralRdFlncy <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,6] <- round(EGRARadarOralRdFlncy[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,6] <- round(EGRARadarOralRdFlncy[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarReadComp <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,7] <- round(EGRARadarReadComp[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,7] <- round(EGRARadarReadComp[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarDictation_01 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,8] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_01[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,8] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_01[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarDictation_02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,9] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_02[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,9] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_02[2,2], sigdig2)


row.names(EGRARadar) <- c('1', '2', 'BAB', 'Formal Primary')

## coul <- viridis(3)
## colors_border <- coul
library(scales)

## previously used #7fafff
colors_border <- c('#fbada8', '#30c75d')
colors_in <- alpha(colors_border, 0.3)
op <- par(mar = c(1, 2, 1.5, 0))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

EGRARadarChart <- radarchart( EGRARadar, axistype=1, seg=5,
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border, pfcol=colors_in, plwd=3, plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1, 
	title='EGRA Begin Year 1 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[4,]))

# Add a legend
legend(x=-1.2, y=-1.3, legend = rownames(EGRARadar[-c(1,2),]), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGRARadarChart

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

par(op)
```

```{r EGRA endline program radar Subsection Year 1, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border, pfcol=colors_in, plwd=3, plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1, 
	title='EGRA End Year 1 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[4,]))

# Add a legend
legend(x=-1.2, y=-1.3, legend = rownames(EGRARadar[-c(1,2),]), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGRARadarChart

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

par(op)
```

```{r EGRA baseline program radar Subsection Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
EGRARadar <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 1, ncol = 9))

colnames(EGRARadar) <- c('Listening\nComp', 'Phon\nAware', 'Letter\nSound', 'Invented\nWords', 'Real\nWords', 'Oral Rd\nFluency', 'Reading\nComp', 'Dictation 1', 'Dictation 2')

EGRARadar <- rbind(rep(100,9), rep(0,9), EGRARadar)

EGRARadarListeningComp <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,1] <- round(EGRARadarListeningComp[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,1] <- round(EGRARadarListeningComp[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarPhonAware <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,2] <- round(EGRARadarPhonAware[1,2], sigdig2)

EGRARadar[3,3] <- round(EGRARadarLetSound[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,3] <- round(EGRARadarLetSound[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarInventWord <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,4] <- round(EGRARadarInventWord[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,4] <- round(EGRARadarInventWord[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarRealWords <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,5] <- round(EGRARadarRealWords[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,5] <- round(EGRARadarRealWords[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarOralRdFlncy <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,6] <- round(EGRARadarOralRdFlncy[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,6] <- round(EGRARadarOralRdFlncy[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarReadComp <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,7] <- round(EGRARadarReadComp[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,7] <- round(EGRARadarReadComp[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarDictation_01 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,8] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_01[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,8] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_01[2,2], sigdig2)


EGRARadarDictation_02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGRARadar[3,9] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_02[1,2], sigdig2)
EGRARadar[4,9] <- round(EGRARadarDictation_02[2,2], sigdig2)


row.names(EGRARadar) <- c('1', '2', 'BAB', 'Formal Primary')

## coul <- viridis(3)
## colors_border <- coul
library(scales)

## previously used #7fafff

colors_in <- alpha(colors_border, 0.3)
op <- par(mar = c(1, 2, 1.5, 0))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

EGRARadarChart <- radarchart( EGRARadar, axistype=1, seg=5,
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border, pfcol=colors_in, plwd=3, plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1, 
	title='EGRA Begin Year 2 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGRARadar[4,]))

# Add a legend
legend(x=-1.2, y=-1.3, legend = rownames(EGRARadar[-c(1,2),]), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGRARadarChart

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

par(op)
```

<br/>

For each EGRA Subsection table below, a Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for statistically significant difference of medians between the subgroups. If only Year 1 or Year 2 have a statistically significant difference, only the corresponding p value is bolded. If there is a statistically significant difference among subgroups for both year 1 and year 2, the entire line is bolded. The next table shows the H-Statistic along with the p values for both year 1 and year 2 for the Kruskal-Wallis test.  The final table displays further post hoc testing, Tukey HSD/Dunn Test.  This test was computed for groups containing more than two subgroups to identify which subgroups have a statistically significant difference with a Bonferonni adjustment in case of a Dunn Test and can be seen below. Groupings with a significant difference amongst the specific subgroups are bolded.


#### Dictation 1 Subsection Results

The Dictation subsection captures the student's ability to write letters. The student is given a pencil and a lined sheet of paper. The enumerator then reads each of 5 letters to the student one by one in year 1 and 5 short words one by one in year 2.

<br/>

```{r EGRA Dictation Level 1 results}
Dictation1AllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_01PCTGain, BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2Dictation_01PCTGain, "Dictation Level 1 Baseline to Endline Gains")

Dictation1_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MDictation_01PCTGain, L2Dictation_01PCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Dictation Level 1 Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

Dictation1_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MDictation_01PCTGain, L2Dictation_01PCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Dictation Level 1 Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r Dictation1AllMedian`

<br/>


`r Dictation1_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r Dictation1_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Dictation 2 Subsection Results

The Dictation 2 subsection captures the developmental nature of spelling skills using a scoring protocol awarding partial correctness. Enumerators dictate 3 words for students to write in year 1 EGRA and 5 words in year 2 EGRA.

<br/>

```{r EGRA Dictation Level 2 results}
Dictation2AllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MDictation_02PCTGain, BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2Dictation_02PCTGain, "Dictation Level 2 Baseline to Endline Gains")

Dictation2_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MDictation_02PCTGain, L2Dictation_02PCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Dictation Level 2 Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

Dictation2_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MDictation_02PCTGain, L2Dictation_02PCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Dictation Level 2 Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r Dictation2AllMedian`

<br/>

`r Dictation2_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r Dictation2_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Listening Comprehension Subsection Results

In this subsection, the EGRA administrator reads a passage to the student, who does not see it. The student then responds to questions or statements read by the EGRA administrator. For example in year 1 one question stated: Where did she send Ali's mother?  An example from the year 2 EGRA was: What did the travelers face?  The Listening Comprehension Subsection contains 5 questions in year 1 and 7 questions in year 2.

<br/>

```{r EGRA ListeningComprehension results}
ListeningCompAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MListeningCompPCTGain, BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2ListeningCompPCTGain, "Listening Comprehension Baseline to Endline Gains")

ListeningComp_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MListeningCompPCTGain, L2ListeningCompPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Listening Comprehension Gain Variances by Demographics')

ListeningComp_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MListeningCompPCTGain, L2ListeningCompPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Listening Comprehension Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r ListeningCompAllMedian`

<br/>

`r ListeningComp_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r ListeningComp_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Phonemic Awareness Subsection Results

In this subsection, students are presented with a word orally and asked to isolate and pronounce only the first sound of the word.  The Phonemic Awareness subsection contains 10 items on both year 1 and 2.


```{r EGRA Phonemic Awareness subsection results}
PhonAwareAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, MPhonAwarePCTGain, BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2PhonAwarePCTGain, "Phonemic Awareness Baseline to Endline Gains")

PhonAware_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MPhonAwarePCTGain, L2PhonAwarePCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Phonemic Awareness Gain Variances by Demographics')

PhonAware_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MPhonAwarePCTGain, L2PhonAwarePCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Listening Comprehension Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r PhonAwareAllMedian`

<br/>

`r PhonAware_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r PhonAware_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Letter Sounds Identification Subsection Results

In this subsection, students are given a written list of capital and lowercase letters in random order and asked to articulate the sound of each letter. The Letter Sound Identification subsection contains 100 items in year 1 and 2. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to identify as many sounds as they can in the time period.


```{r EGRA Letter Sound Identification Subsection results}
LetSoundAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, MLetSoundPCTGain, BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2LetSoundPCTGain, "Letter Sound Identification Baseline to Endline Gains")

LetSound_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MLetSoundPCTGain, L2LetSoundPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Letter Sound Identification Gain Variances by Demographics')

LetSound_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MLetSoundPCTGain, L2LetSoundPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Letter Sound Identification Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r LetSoundAllMedian`

<br/>

`r LetSound_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r LetSound_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Invented Words Subsection Results

In this subsection, students are given a list of invented or non-words to see how many they can decode/pronounce. The Invented Words subsection contains 50 items from year 1 and year 2. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to identify as many words as they can in the time period.


```{r EGRA Invented Words Subsection results}
InventWordAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, MInventWordsPCTGain, BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2InventWordsPCTGain, "Invented Words Baseline to Endline Gains")

InventWord_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MInventWordsPCTGain, L2InventWordsPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Invented Words Gain Variances by Demographics')

InventWord_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MInventWordsPCTGain, L2InventWordsPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Invented Words Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

`r InventWordAllMedian`

<br/>
