<br/>

`r InventWord_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Familiar/Real Words Subsection Results

In this subsection, students are given a list of familiar or real words to see how many they can decode/pronounce. The Real Words subsection contains 50 items in year 1 and 49 in year 2. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to identify as many words as they can in the time period.


```{r Real Words Subsection results}
RealWordsAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, MRealWordsPCTGain, BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2RealWordsPCTGain, "Real Words Baseline to Endline Gains")

RealWords_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MRealWordsPCTGain, L2RealWordsPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Real Words Gain Variances by Demographics')

                                                      , MRealWordsPCTGain, L2RealWordsPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Real Words Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

#### Oral Reading Fluency Subsection Results

The oral Reading Fluency subsection measures how quickly and accurately a student can read. The Oral Reading Fluency subsection contains a paragraph with 66 words for the student to read in year 1 and 91 words in year 2. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to read the paragraph. Students that score a zero in this section are frequently referred to as non-readers.

```{r Oral Rd Fluency Subsection results}
OralRdFlncyAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MOralRdFlncyPCTGain, BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2OralRdFlncyPCTGain, "Oral Reading Fluency Baseline to Endline Gains")

OralRdFlncy_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MOralRdFlncyPCTGain, L2OralRdFlncyPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Oral Reading Fluency Gain Variances by Demographics')

OralRdFlncy_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MOralRdFlncyPCTGain, L2OralRdFlncyPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Oral Reading Fluency Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r OralRdFlncyAllMedian`

<br/>

`r OralRdFlncy_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r OralRdFlncy_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Reading Comprehension Subsection Results

The Reading Comprehension subsection measures the reader's understanding of what they read. Comprehension is a complex task that requires some ability in all of the other reading skills. This subtask is paired with the Oral Reading Fluency (ORF) subtask. Depending on how much of the ORF passage the student was able to read, the EGRA administrator asks the student up to 5 questions about the story in year 1 and 8 questions in year 2.

```{r Reading Comprehension Subsection results}
ReadCompAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, MReadCompPCTGain, BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2ReadCompPCTGain, "Reading Comprehension Baseline to Endline Gains")

ReadComp_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MReadCompPCTGain, L2ReadCompPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Reading Comprehension Gain Variances by Demographics')

ReadComp_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier
                                                      , MReadCompPCTGain, L2ReadCompPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Reading Comprehension Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r ReadCompAllMedian`

<br/>

`r ReadComp_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r ReadComp_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>


<br/>

### EGMA Subsection Test Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGMA subsection median gains for students in both the BAB and formal primary students combined.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  

<br/>

The green and purple tables below show the EGMA subsection median scores by learner category and subsection for BAB students only.  The green table shows the results for year 1/level 1 and the purple table shows the results for year 2/level 2.  For both the baseline and endline data rows, the learner category is defined based on the student overall EGRA performance at the baseline of that year.  The endline data row shows us how well students in the learner category defined at baseline completed the year.   

<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains year 1 for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5}
egmaBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBSubsectionpivot1 <- egmaBSubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBSubsectionpivot2 <- egmaBSubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBSubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBSubsectionpivot2)
egmaBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaESubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaESubsectionpivot1 <- egmaESubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaESubsectionpivot2 <- egmaESubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaESubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaESubsectionpivot2)
egmaESubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaESubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagain <- merge(egmaBSubsectionpivot2, egmaESubsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagain$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagain$Subsection, "Number Identification", "Number Discrimination", "Word Problems", "Missing Numbers", "Addition Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Subtraction Level 2")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

ggplot(egmagain) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +  labs(x="EGMA Subsection", y="EGMA Median Score", title="EGMA Year 1 Baseline to Endline Subsection Score Gains\n All Longitudinal Study Students") + theme_light() + theme(text = element_text(face="bold"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection by learner category BAB level 1 for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

egmaBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(BEGMABaselineLearner_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f, BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

## Create data frame
dflearnerEGMAlevel1 <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 8, ncol = 10))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dflearnerEGMAlevel1) <- c("EGMA Subtask", "Time", "Number Ident", "Number Discrim", "Missing Numbers", "Addition (1 digit)", "Addition (2 digits)", "Subtract (1 digit)", "Subtract (2 digits)", "Word Problems")

## Retrieve Baseline Data for Non-Learner
egmaBNonLearner <- egmaBSubsection %>% filter(BEGMABaselineLearner_f=='Non-Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Non-Learners
baselineMedianNumIdent <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrim <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNum <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Non-Learners
midlineMedianNumIdent <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianNumDiscrim <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianMissNum <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianWordProb <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
egmaBNonLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBNonLearner)
nonLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Non-Learner"), " (n=", egmaBNonLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Non-Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,1] <- nonLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdent, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrim, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNum, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[1,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumIdent, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumDiscrim, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianMissNum, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[2,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianWordProb, sigdig2)





## Retrieve Baseline Data for Emergent Learner
egmaBEmergentLearner <- egmaBSubsection %>% filter(BEGMABaselineLearner_f=='Emergent Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Emergent Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProbEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Emergent Learners
midlineMedianNumIdentEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianNumDiscrimEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianMissNumEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianWordProbEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Emergent Learners and build label
egmaBEmergentLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBEmergentLearner)
emergentLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Emergent Learner"), " (n=", egmaBEmergentLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Emergent Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,1] <- emergentLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[3,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProbEL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumIdentEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumDiscrimEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianMissNumEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[4,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianWordProbEL, sigdig2)




## Retrieve Baseline Data for Established Learner
egmaBEstablishedLearner <- egmaBSubsection %>% filter(BEGMABaselineLearner_f=='Established Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Established Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Established Learners
midlineMedianNumIdentEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianNumDiscrimEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianMissNumEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Established Learners and build label
egmaBEstablishedLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBEstablishedLearner)
establishedLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Established Learner"), " (n=", egmaBEstablishedLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Established Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,1] <- establishedLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[5,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProbEL2, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumIdentEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumDiscrimEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianMissNumEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[6,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianWordProbEL2, sigdig2)




## Retrieve Baseline Data for Proficient Learner
egmaBProficientLearner <- egmaBSubsection %>% filter(BEGMABaselineLearner_f=='Proficient Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Proficient Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProbPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve midline Medians for Proficient Learners
midlineMedianNumIdentPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
midlineMedianNumDiscrimPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianMissNumPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianAddLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianSubLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
midlineMedianWordProbPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Proficient Learners and build label
egmaBProficientLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBProficientLearner)
proficientLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Proficient Learner"), " (n=", egmaBProficientLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and midline rows for Proficient Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,1] <- proficientLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[7,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProbPL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,3] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumIdentPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,4] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianNumDiscrimPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,5] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianMissNumPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,6] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,7] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianAddLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,8] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,9] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianSubLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel1[8,10] <- specify_decimal(midlineMedianWordProbPL, sigdig2)

## create flextable from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_box)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- flextable(dflearnerEGMAlevel1)

## set format of flextables
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- add_header_row(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, values=c("EGMA Level 1"), colwidths = c(10), top=TRUE)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=1, 0.9)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=2, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=3, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=4, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=5, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=6, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=7, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=8, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=9, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=10, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- fontsize(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 8, part= "all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- align(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=1:2, align="left", part="all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- align(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=3:10, align="right", part="all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- valign(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=1:2, j=1, part="body", valign="center")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=NULL, j=NULL, bg="#7FBF7B", part="header")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=2, j=2:10, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=4, j=2:10, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=6, j=2:10, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, i=8, j=2:10, bg="#D9F0D3", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bold(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, j=1, bold=TRUE)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- bold(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1 <- fix_border_issues(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel1
```

<br/>


```{r EGMA Subsection Gains year 2 for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5}
egmaBSubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBSubsectionpivot1 <- egmaBSubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBSubsectionpivot2 <- egmaBSubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBSubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBSubsectionpivot2)
egmaBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBSubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaESubsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaESubsectionpivot1 <- egmaESubsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaESubsectionpivot2 <- egmaESubsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaESubsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaESubsectionpivot2)
egmaESubsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaESubsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagain <- merge(egmaBSubsectionpivot2, egmaESubsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagain$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagain$Subsection, "Number Identification", "Number Discrimination", "Word Problems", "Missing Numbers", "Addition Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Subtraction Level 2", "Multiplication", "Division")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

ggplot(egmagain) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	guides(x = guide_axis(angle = 45)) +  labs(x="EGMA Subsection", y="EGMA Median Score", title="EGMA Year 2 Baseline to Endline Subsection Score Gains\n All Longitudinal Study Students") + theme_light() + theme(text = element_text(face="bold"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection by learner category BAB level 2 for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

egmaBSubsectionLvl2 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(BL2EGMALearner_f, EL2ProgramGrade_f, BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, BL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

## Create data frame
dflearnerEGMAlevel2 <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 8, ncol = 13))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dflearnerEGMAlevel2) <- c("EGMA Subtask", "Time", "Number Ident", "Number Discrim", "Missing Numbers", "Addition (1 digit)", "Addition (2 digits)", "Subtract (1 digit)", "Subtract (2 digits)", "Word Problems (Add & Subtract)", "Multiplic.", "Division", "Word Prob (Multi & Div)")

## Retrieve Baseline Data for Non-Learner
egmaBNonLearner <- egmaBSubsectionLvl2 %>% filter(BL2EGMALearner_f=='Non-Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Non-Learners
baselineMedianNumIdent <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrim <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNum <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMulti <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDiv <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Non-Learners
endlineMedianNumIdent <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianNumDiscrim <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMissNum <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb1 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMulti <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDiv <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb2 <- egmaBNonLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Program Type and build label
egmaBNonLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBNonLearner)
nonLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Non-Learner"), " (n=", egmaBNonLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Non-Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,1] <- nonLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdent, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrim, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNum, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMulti, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,12] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDiv, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[1,13] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb2, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumIdent, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumDiscrim, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMissNum, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb1, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMulti, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,12] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDiv, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[2,13] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb2, sigdig2)




## Retrieve Baseline Data for Emergent Learner
egmaBEmergentLearner <- egmaBSubsectionLvl2 %>% filter(BL2EGMALearner_f=='Emergent Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Emergent Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMultiEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDivEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Emergent Learners
endlineMedianNumIdentEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianNumDiscrimEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMissNumEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb1EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMultiEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDivEL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb2EL <- egmaBEmergentLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Emergent Learners and build label
egmaBEmergentLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBEmergentLearner)
emergentLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Emergent Learner"), " (n=", egmaBEmergentLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Emergent Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,1] <- emergentLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMultiEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,12] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDivEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[3,13] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb2EL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumIdentEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumDiscrimEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMissNumEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl2EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb1EL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMultiEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,12] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDivEL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[4,13] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb2EL, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Established Learner
egmaBEstablishedLearner <- egmaBSubsectionLvl2 %>% filter(BL2EGMALearner_f=='Established Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Established Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMultiEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDivEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Established Learners
endlineMedianNumIdentEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianNumDiscrimEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMissNumEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb1EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMultiEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDivEL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb2EL2 <- egmaBEstablishedLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Established Learners and build label
egmaBEstablishedLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBEstablishedLearner)
establishedLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Established Learner"), " (n=", egmaBEstablishedLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Established Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,1] <- establishedLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMultiEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,12] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDivEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[5,13] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb2EL2, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumIdentEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumDiscrimEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMissNumEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl2EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb1EL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMultiEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,12] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDivEL2, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[6,13] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb2EL2, sigdig2)



## Retrieve Baseline Data for Proficient Learner
egmaBProficientLearner <- egmaBSubsectionLvl2 %>% filter(BL2EGMALearner_f=='Proficient Learner' & EL2ProgramGrade_f=='BAB')

## Retrieve baseline Medians for Proficient Learners
baselineMedianNumIdentPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
baselineMedianNumDiscrimPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMissNumPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianAddLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianSubLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianMultiPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianDivPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
baselineMedianWordProb2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(BL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve endline Medians for Proficient Learners
endlineMedianNumIdentPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm = TRUE))
endlineMedianNumDiscrimPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMissNumPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianAddLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianSubLvl2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb1PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianMultiPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianDivPL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
endlineMedianWordProb2PL <- egmaBProficientLearner %>% summarise(median = median(EL2WordProb2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

## Retrieve n's for Proficient Learners and build label
egmaBProficientLearnerN <- nrow(egmaBProficientLearner)
proficientLearnerLabel <- paste0(as.character("Proficient Learner"), " (n=", egmaBProficientLearnerN, ")")

## Set baseline and endline rows for Proficient Learners
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,1] <- proficientLearnerLabel
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,2] <- "Baseline"
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,2] <- "Endline"

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,3] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumIdentPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,4] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianNumDiscrimPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,5] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMissNumPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,6] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,7] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianAddLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,8] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,9] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianSubLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,10] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,11] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianMultiPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,12] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianDivPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[7,13] <- specify_decimal(baselineMedianWordProb2PL, sigdig2)

dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,3] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumIdentPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,4] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianNumDiscrimPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,5] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMissNumPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,6] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,7] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianAddLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,8] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,9] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianSubLvl2PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,10] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb1PL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,11] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianMultiPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,12] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianDivPL, sigdig2)
dflearnerEGMAlevel2[8,13] <- specify_decimal(endlineMedianWordProb2PL, sigdig2)

## create flextable from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_box)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- flextable(dflearnerEGMAlevel2)

## set format of flextables
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- add_header_row(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, values=c("EGMA Level 2"), colwidths = c(13), top=TRUE)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=3:4, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=5:6, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- merge_at(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=7:8, j=1, part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=1, 0.9)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=2, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=3, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=4, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=5, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=6, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=7, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=8, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=9, 0.6)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=10, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=10, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=10, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- width(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=10, 0.5)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- fontsize(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 8, part= "all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- align(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=1:2, align="left", part="all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- align(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=3:13, align="right", part="all")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- valign(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=1:2, j=1, part="body", valign="center")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=NULL, j=NULL, bg="#AF8DC3", part="header")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=2, j=2:13, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=4, j=2:13, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=6, j=2:13, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bg(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, i=8, j=2:13, bg="#E7D4E8", part="body")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bold(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, j=1, bold=TRUE)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- bold(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2, bold=TRUE, part="header")
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2 <- fix_border_issues(flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2)
flexEgmaSubectionbyLearnerLevel2
```

```{r EGMA base program radar Subsections year 1, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
EGMARadar <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 1, ncol = 8))

colnames(EGMARadar) <- c('Number\nIdentification', 'Number\nDiscrimination', 'Missing\nNumber', 'Addition\nLevel 1', 'Addition\nLevel 2', 'Subtract\nLevel 1', 'Subtract\nLevel 2', 'Word\nProblem')

EGMARadar <- rbind(rep(100,8), rep(0,8), EGMARadar)

EGMARadarNumIdentify <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

EGMARadar[3,1] <- round(EGMARadarNumIdentify[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,1] <- round(EGMARadarNumIdentify[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarNumDisc <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,2] <- round(EGMARadarNumDisc[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,2] <- round(EGMARadarNumDisc[2,2], sigdig2)

EGMARadarBMissNum <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,3] <- round(EGMARadarBMissNum[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,3] <- round(EGMARadarBMissNum[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarAddLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,4] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,4] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarAddLvl2 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,5] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl2[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,5] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl2[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarSubLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,6] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,6] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarSubLvl2 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,7] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl2[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,7] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl2[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarWordProb <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,8] <- round(EGMARadarWordProb[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,8] <- round(EGMARadarWordProb[2,2], sigdig2)

row.names(EGMARadar) <- c('1', '2', 'BAB', 'Formal Primary')

## coul <- viridis(3)
## colors_border <- coul
library(scales)

colors_border <- c('#fbada8', '#30c75d')
colors_in <- alpha(colors_border, 0.3)
op <- par(mar = c(1, 2, 1.5, 0))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[4,]))

EGMARadarChart <- radarchart( EGMARadar, axistype=1, seg=5,
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border , pfcol=colors_in , plwd=3 , plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1,
	title='EGMA Base Year 1 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGMARadarChart

par(op)
```

```{r EGMA end program radar Subsections year 1, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
EGMARadar[4,7] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl2[2,2], sigdig2)
```

```{r EGMA base program radar Subsections year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
colors_in <- alpha(colors_border, 0.3)
op <- par(mar = c(1, 2, 1.5, 0))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[4,]))

EGMARadarChart <- radarchart( EGMARadar, axistype=1, seg=5,
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border , pfcol=colors_in , plwd=3 , plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1,
	title='EGMA Base Year 2 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGMARadarChart

par(op)
```

<br/>

```{r EGMA end program radar Subsections year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=5}
EGMARadar <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 1, ncol = 10))

colnames(EGMARadar) <- c('Number\nIdentification', 'Number\nDiscrimination', 'Missing\nNumber', 'Addition\nLevel 1', 'Addition\nLevel 2', 'Subtract\nLevel 1', 'Subtract\nLevel 2', 'Multiplication\nLevel 1', 'Division\nLevel 1', 'Word\nProblem')

EGMARadar <- rbind(rep(100,8), rep(0,8), EGMARadar)

EGMARadarNumIdentify <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))

EGMARadar[3,1] <- round(EGMARadarNumIdentify[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,1] <- round(EGMARadarNumIdentify[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarNumDisc <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,2] <- round(EGMARadarNumDisc[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,2] <- round(EGMARadarNumDisc[2,2], sigdig2)

EGMARadarBMissNum <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,3] <- round(EGMARadarBMissNum[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,3] <- round(EGMARadarBMissNum[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarAddLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,4] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,4] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarAddLvl2 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,5] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl2[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,5] <- round(EGMARadarAddLvl2[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarSubLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,6] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,6] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)


EGMARadarSubLvl2 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,7] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl2[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,7] <- round(EGMARadarSubLvl2[2,2], sigdig2)

EGMARadarMultLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,8] <- round(EGMARadarMultLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,8] <- round(EGMARadarMultLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)

EGMARadarDivLvl1 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,9] <- round(EGMARadarDivLvl1[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,9] <- round(EGMARadarDivLvl1[2,2], sigdig2)

EGMARadarWordProb <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by (EL2ProgramGrade_f) %>% summarise(median=median(EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, na.rm=TRUE))
EGMARadar[3,8] <- round(EGMARadarWordProb[1,2], sigdig2)
EGMARadar[4,8] <- round(EGMARadarWordProb[2,2], sigdig2)

row.names(EGMARadar) <- c('1', '2', 'BAB', 'Formal Primary')

## coul <- viridis(3)
## colors_border <- coul
library(scales)

colors_border <- c('#fbada8', '#30c75d')
colors_in <- alpha(colors_border, 0.3)
op <- par(mar = c(1, 2, 1.5, 0))
par(mfrow = c(1,1))

legend1 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[3,]))
legend2 <- paste0(rownames(EGMARadar[4,]))

EGMARadarChart <- radarchart( EGMARadar, axistype=1, seg=5,
    #custom polygon
    pcol=colors_border , pfcol=colors_in , plwd=3 , plty=1,
    #custom the grid
    cglcol="grey", cglty=1, axislabcol="black", caxislabels=seq(0,100,20), cglwd=0.7,
    #custom labels
    vlcex=0.5, cex.main = 1,
	title='EGMA End Year 2 Subsection Median Totals'
    )

# Add a legend
legend("right", legend = c(legend1, legend2), bty = "n", pch=20 , col=colors_border, text.col = "black", horiz=FALSE, cex=0.6, pt.cex=2.0)

EGMARadarChart

par(op)
```


<br/>

For each EGMA Subsection table below, a Kruskal-Wallis test was performed to check for statistically significant difference of medians between the subgroups. If only Year 1 or Year 2 have a statistically significant difference, only the corresponding p value is bolded. If there is a statistically significant difference among subgroups for both year 1 and year 2, the entire line is bolded. The next table shows the H-Statistic along with the p values for both year 1 and year 2 for the Kruskal-Wallis test.  The final table displays further post hoc testing, Tukey HSD/Dunn Test.  This test was computed for groups containing more than two subgroups to identify which subgroups have a statistically significant difference with a Bonferonni adjustment in case of a Dunn Test and can be seen below. Groupings with a significant difference amongst the specific subgroups are bolded.

<br/>

#### Number Identification Subsection Results

In the Number Identification subsection students are asked: 'Here are some numbers. I want you to show me each number, tell me its name. You can answer questions in any language you want.' The Number Identification subsection contains 20 items in both year 1 and year 2. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to identify as many numbers as they can in the time period. 
<br/>

```{r EGMA Number Identification results}
NumIdentifyAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumIdentifyPCTGain, BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2NumIdentifyPCTGain, "Number Identification Baseline to Endline Gains")

NumIdentify_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MNumIdentifyPCTGain, L2NumIdentifyPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Number Identification Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

NumIdentify_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MNumIdentifyPCTGain, L2NumIdentifyPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Number Identification Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r NumIdentifyAllMedian`

<br/>

`r NumIdentify_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r NumIdentify_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Number Discrimination Subsection Results

In the Number Discrimination subsection students are asked: 'Look at these numbers. I want you to tell me which one of them is greater?' The Number Discrimination subsection contains 10 items for year 1 and year 2.  In year 1 the numbers range from 1 to 3 digits.  In year 2 the numbers range from 3 to 6 digits. This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to discriminate as many number pairs as they can in the time period.

```{r EGMA Number Discrimination results}
NumDiscAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, MNumDiscPCTGain, BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2NumDiscPCTGain, "Number Discrimination Baseline to Endline Gains")

NumDisc_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MNumDiscPCTGain, L2NumDiscPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Number Discrimination Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

NumDisc_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MNumDiscPCTGain, L2NumDiscPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Number Discrimination Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r NumDiscAllMedian`

<br/>

`r NumDisc_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r NumDisc_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Missing Numbers Subsection Results

In the Missing Number subsection students are asked: 'In a sequence of related numbers, which number is missing?' The Missing Number subsection contains 10 sequences of numbers in year 1 and year 2.  The numbers in year 1 range from 1 to 3 digits.  The numbers in year 2 range from 2 to 5 digits.  This is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to identify as many missing numbers as they can in the time period.

```{r EGMA Missing Numbers results}
MissNumAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, MMissNumPCTGain, BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2MissNumPCTGain, "Missing Numbers Baseline to Endline Gains")

MissNum_kruskal_flex <- build_kruskalEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MMissNumPCTGain, L2MissNumPCTGain, 'All Students Kruskal Test Results \nfor Missing Numbers Percent Gain Variances by Demographics')

MissNum_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MMissNumPCTGain, L2MissNumPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Missing Numbers Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

<br/>

`r MissNumAllMedian`

<br/>

`r MissNum_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r MissNum_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Addition Level 1 Subsection Results

In the Addition Level 1 subsection students are asked to evaluate 20 addition problems. In year 1 the problems range from 1 to 2 digit numbers. In year 2 the problems range from 1 to 3 digit numbers.  The Addition Level 1 is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to evaluate as many addition problems as they can in the time period.

```{r EGMA Addition Level 1 results}
AddLvl1AllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl1PCTGain, BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2AddLvl1PCTGain, "Addition Level 1 Baseline to Endline Gains")

AddLvl1_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MAddLvl1PCTGain, L2AddLvl1PCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Addition Level 1 Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```

`r AddLvl1_kruskal_flex`

<br/>

`r AddLvl1_avgdunn_flex`

<br/>

#### Addition Level 2 Subsection Results

In the Addition Level 2 subsection students are asked to evaluate 5 more addition problems, most of which are 2 digit numbers in year 1 and 2 to 5 digits in year 2.  If all items from Addition Level 1 were answered incorrectly, then this section is skipped.


```{r EGMA Addition Level 2 results}
AddLvl2AllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, MAddLvl2PCTGain, BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2AddLvl2PCTGain, "Addition Level 2 Baseline to Endline Gains")
```

#### Subtraction Level 1 Subsection Results

In the Subtraction Level 1 subsection students are asked to evaluate 20 subtraction problems. In year 1 the items are mostly single digit numbers but range from 1 to 2 digist.  In year 2 the items range from 1 to 3 digits.  Subtraction Level 1 is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to evaluate as many subtraction problems as they can in the time period.

#### Multiplication Subsection Results

In the Multiplication subsection, students are asked to evaluate 6 multiplication problems. This subsection was not part of the year 1 EGMA test and only appeared in the year 2 EGMA. All 6 problems consisted of single digit multiplication problems.  Multiplication is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to evaluate as many multiplication problems as they can in the time period.

#### Division Subsection Results

In the Division subsection, students are asked to evaluate 6 division problems. This subsection was not part of the year 1 EGMA test and only appeared in the year 2 EGMA. Division is a timed subsection and students are given 1 minute to evaluate as many division problems as they can in the time period.

#### Word Problems Subsection Results

In the Word Problem subsection, students are read a word problem then prompted to answer. The Word Problem subsection contained 6 items in year 1 and 8 items in year 2. An example of the one of the questions is: Ali has 2 books, his father gave him 1 extra book. How many books does Ali have now? Answer: 3.

```{r EGMA Word Problems results}
WordProbAllMedian <- build_medianEndlineEE_subsection_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, MWordProbPCTGain, BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n, L2WordProbPCTGain, "Word Problems Baseline to Endline Gains")

WordProb_avgdunn_flex <-  build_dunnEndline_function(BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, MWordProbPCTGain, L2WordProbPCTGain, 'Students Dunn Test Results for Word Problems Percent Gain for Demographic Subgroups with more than 2 Categories')
```
