```{r student future desires by Age for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2}
EL2AgeFuture01 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(AgeGroup1_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_01_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_01_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_01_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_01_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_01_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_01_06)

ELG2AgeFuture01 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(AgeGroup1_f, "Continue ABE programs"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_01, "Continue formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_02, "TVET Training"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_03, "Join workforce"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_04, "No plans"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_06)

numStudentsLocation <- nrow(EL2AgeFuture01) + nrow(ELG2AgeFuture01)

EndlineAgeFuture01 <- rbind(EL2AgeFuture01, ELG2AgeFuture01)
EndlineAgeFuture01 <- as.data.frame(EndlineAgeFuture01)

EndlineAgeFuture01Cnt <- EndlineAgeFuture01 %>% group_by(AgeGroup1_f) %>% count()

EndlineAgeFuture01 <- EndlineAgeFuture01 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineAgeFuture01$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineAgeFuture01$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineAgeFuture01Aggregate <- aggregate(.~AgeGroup1_f, data=EndlineAgeFuture01, FUN=sum)
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1 <- EndlineAgeFuture01Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!AgeGroup1_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1)
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Plan, EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Response)
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1 <- EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Response) | EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 <- merge(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot1, EndlineAgeFuture01Cnt, by.x="AgeGroup1_f", by.y="AgeGroup1_f")

EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round(( Response/n * 100),0))
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2)

EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2$AgeGroup1_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2$AgeGroup1_f, "12 to 20 year olds", "4 to 11 year olds")

ggplot(data = EndlineAgeFuture01pivot2, aes(x=AgeGroup1_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Future Education Plans by Age Group') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

```{r student future desires by SES for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
EL2SESFuture01 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(SES_Sum_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_01_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_01_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_01_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_01_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_01_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_01_06)

ELG2SESFuture01 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(SES_Sum_f, "Continue ABE programs"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_01, "Continue formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_02, "TVET Training"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_03, "Join workforce"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_04, "No plans"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_01_06)

numStudentsLocation <- nrow(EL2SESFuture01) + nrow(ELG2SESFuture01)

EndlineSESFuture01 <- rbind(EL2SESFuture01, ELG2SESFuture01)
EndlineSESFuture01 <- as.data.frame(EndlineSESFuture01)

EndlineSESFuture01Cnt <- EndlineSESFuture01 %>% group_by(SES_Sum_f) %>% count()

EndlineSESFuture01 <- EndlineSESFuture01 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineSESFuture01$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineSESFuture01$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineSESFuture01Aggregate <- aggregate(.~SES_Sum_f, data=EndlineSESFuture01, FUN=sum)
EndlineSESFuture01pivot1 <- EndlineSESFuture01Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!SES_Sum_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineSESFuture01pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineSESFuture01pivot1)
EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Plan, EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Response)
EndlineSESFuture01pivot1 <- EndlineSESFuture01pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Response) | EndlineSESFuture01pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 <- merge(EndlineSESFuture01pivot1, EndlineSESFuture01Cnt, by.x="SES_Sum_f", by.y="SES_Sum_f")

EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round(( Response/n * 100), 0))
EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineSESFuture01pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineSESFuture01pivot2)

EndlineSESFuture01pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineSESFuture01pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

EndlineSESFuture01pivot2$SES_Sum_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineSESFuture01pivot2$SES_Sum_f, "high", "medium", "low")

ggplot(data = EndlineSESFuture01pivot2, aes(x=SES_Sum_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('SES Composite') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Future Education Plans by SES Composite') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

```{r student future desires by State for next year, fig.height=4, fig.width=7.5, include=TRUE}
EL2StateFuture01 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_01_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_01_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_01_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_01_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_01_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_01_06)

EndlineStateFuture01Cnt <- EndlineStateFuture01 %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()

EndlineStateFuture01$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineStateFuture01$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineStateFuture01Aggregate <- aggregate(.~State_f, data=EndlineStateFuture01, FUN=sum)
EndlineStateFuture01pivot1 <- EndlineStateFuture01Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!State_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineStateFuture01pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineStateFuture01pivot1)
EndlineStateFuture01pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineStateFuture01pivot1$Plan, as.factor)

EndlineStateFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineStateFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round(( Response/n * 100),0))
EndlineStateFuture01pivot2 <- EndlineStateFuture01pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineStateFuture01pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineStateFuture01pivot2)

EndlineStateFuture01pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineStateFuture01pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

EndlineStateFuture01pivot2$State_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineStateFuture01pivot2$State_f, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

ggplot(data = EndlineStateFuture01pivot2, aes(x=State_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab("") + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Future Education Plans by State') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```


Students were next asked: 'What are your educational plans next school year?' The figure below shows the responses from all of the students in the Longitudinal data set.  Unlike the previous item three students chose to provide an other choice to the question as follows:
  
    * "To double my effort and to be the first number of the class."
    * "To be first number of the class and to advance my study."
    * "To work hard and pass the exam." 

```{r student plans for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4.5}
EL2Future02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select("Continue with ABE programs."=EL2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue with formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_02_02, "Join Technical and Vocational Educational Training (TVET), a formal apprenticeship, learn a trade (eg. Chef, beauty salon, electrician, plumber, engineering)"=EL2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce, get a good job, work full-time."=EL2FuturePlans_02_04, "I don't have any plans to continue my education."=EL2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_02_06)

ELG2Future02 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select("Continue with ABE programs."=ELG2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue with formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_02, "Join Technical and Vocational Educational Training (TVET), a formal apprenticeship, learn a trade (eg. Chef, beauty salon, electrician, plumber, engineering)"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce, get a good job, work full-time."=ELG2FuturePlans_02_04, "I don't have any plans to continue my education."=ELG2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_06)

numStudents <- nrow(EL2Future02) + nrow(ELG2Future02)

EndlineFuture02 <- rbind(EL2Future02, ELG2Future02)
EndlineFuture02 <- as.data.frame(EndlineFuture02)
EndlineFuture02 <- EndlineFuture02 %>% mutate(Base='Endline')

EndlineFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~Base, data=EndlineFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!Base, names_to = 'Reason', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineFuture02pivot1)
EndlineFuture02pivot1$Reason <- sapply(EndlineFuture02pivot1$Reason, as.factor)
EndlineFuture02pivot1$Reason <- fct_reorder(EndlineFuture02pivot1$Reason, EndlineFuture02pivot1$Response)
EndlineFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFuture02pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineFuture02pivot1$Response) | EndlineFuture02pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFuture02pivot1 %>% mutate(Percent = round(Response/numStudents*100), 0)
EndlineFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFuture02pivot1 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(Percent, "%"))

ggplot(data = EndlineFuture02pivot1, aes(x=Reason, y=Response)) + xlab('Plan') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend = FALSE, fill="#31A354") + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year') + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 250, 300, 350, 400, 450, 500, 550, 600)) + geom_text(aes(label = Label), hjust = -1.0, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))

```

Again, we broke the student plans for the next year out by demographic variables in the next several figures to see if there's a difference in the different populations.

```{r student plans by Location for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
EL2LocationFuture02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_02_06)

ELG2LocationFuture02 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, "Continue ABE programs"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_06)

numStudentsLocation <- nrow(EL2LocationFuture02) + nrow(ELG2LocationFuture02)

EndlineLocationFuture02 <- rbind(EL2LocationFuture02, ELG2LocationFuture02)
EndlineLocationFuture02 <- as.data.frame(EndlineLocationFuture02)

EndlineLocationFutureCnt <- EndlineLocationFuture02 %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()

EndlineLocationFuture02 <- EndlineLocationFuture02 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineLocationFuture02$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineLocationFuture02$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineLocationFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~LocationTypeDesc_f, data=EndlineLocationFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineLocationFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!LocationTypeDesc_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1)
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Plan, EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Response)
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Response) | EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 <- merge(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot1, EndlineLocationFutureCnt, by.x="LocationTypeDesc_f", by.y="LocationTypeDesc_f")

EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round(( Response/n * 100),0))
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2)

EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

ggplot(data = EndlineLocationFuture02pivot2, aes(x=LocationTypeDesc_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('Location Type') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2()) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year by Location Type') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```


```{r student plans by Gender for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2}
EndlineGenderFuture02$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL
```

```{r student plans by SES for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
EL2SESFuture02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(SES_Sum_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_02_06)

ELG2SESFuture02 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(SES_Sum_f, "Continue ABE programs"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_06)

EndlineSESFuture02 <- EndlineSESFuture02 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineSESFuture02$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineSESFuture02$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineSESFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~SES_Sum_f, data=EndlineSESFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineSESFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineSESFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!SES_Sum_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineSESFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineSESFuture02pivot1)
EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Plan, EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Response)
EndlineSESFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineSESFuture02pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Response) | EndlineSESFuture02pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineSESFuture02pivot2 <- merge(EndlineSESFuture02pivot1, EndlineSESFutureCnt, by.x="SES_Sum_f", by.y="SES_Sum_f")

EndlineSESFuture02pivot2$SES_Sum_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineSESFuture02pivot2$SES_Sum_f, "high", "medium", "low")

ggplot(data = EndlineSESFuture02pivot2, aes(x=SES_Sum_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('SES Composite') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 500), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year by SES Composite') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

```{r student plans by Father Literacy for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2}
EndlineFatherLitFutureCnt <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02 %>% group_by(FatherLiteracy_f) %>% count()

EndlineFatherLitFuture02 <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineFatherLitFuture02$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineFatherLitFuture02$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL

EndlineFatherLitFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~FatherLiteracy_f, data=EndlineFatherLitFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!FatherLiteracy_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1)
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Plan, EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Response)
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Response) | EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 <- merge(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot1, EndlineFatherLitFutureCnt, by.x="FatherLiteracy_f", by.y="FatherLiteracy_f")

EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round((Response/n * 100),0))
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2)

EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

ggplot(data = EndlineFatherLitFuture02pivot2, aes(x=FatherLiteracy_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('Father Literacy') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year\n by Father Literacy') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme( panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

```{r student plans by Languages for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2.5}
EL2LanguagesFuture02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(Languages2_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_02_06)

EndlineLanguagesFuture02$`Continue ABE programs` <- NULL
EndlineLanguagesFuture02$`Continue formal schooling` <- NULL
EndlineLanguagesFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~Languages2_f, data=EndlineLanguagesFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineLanguagesFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!Languages2_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot1)
EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot1$Plan, as.factor)

EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2)

EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2$Languages2_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2$Languages2_f, "Other", "Maxaa tiri", "Maay")

ggplot(data = EndlineLanguagesFuture02pivot2, aes(x=Languages2_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year \n by Language Spoken') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme( panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

```{r student plans by State for next year, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}
EL2StateFuture02 <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, "Continue ABE programs"=EL2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=EL2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=EL2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=EL2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=EL2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=EL2FuturePlans_02_06)


ELG2StateFuture02 <- BMELG2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedTriadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select(State_f, "Continue ABE programs"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_01, "Continue formal schooling"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_02, "TVET Training"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_03, "Join workforce"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_04, "No plans"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_05, "Other"=ELG2FuturePlans_02_06)

numStudentsState <- nrow(EL2StateFuture02) + nrow(ELG2StateFuture02)

EndlineStateFuture02 <- rbind(EL2StateFuture02, ELG2StateFuture02)
EndlineStateFuture02 <- as.data.frame(EndlineStateFuture02)

EndlineStateFutureCnt <- EndlineStateFuture02 %>% group_by(State_f) %>% count()

EndlineStateFuture02 <- EndlineStateFuture02 %>% mutate(`Continue Education` = ifelse((`Continue ABE programs`==1 | `Continue formal schooling`==1), 1, 0))
EndlineStateFuture02 <- EndlineStateFuture02[,-c(2,3)]
EndlineStateFuture02Aggregate <- aggregate(.~State_f, data=EndlineStateFuture02, FUN=sum)
EndlineStateFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineStateFuture02Aggregate %>% pivot_longer(!State_f, names_to = 'Plan', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineStateFuture02pivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineStateFuture02pivot1)
EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Plan <- sapply(EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Plan, as.factor)
EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Plan <- fct_reorder(EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Plan, EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Response)
EndlineStateFuture02pivot1 <- EndlineStateFuture02pivot1[!(is.na(EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Response) | EndlineStateFuture02pivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 <- merge(EndlineStateFuture02pivot1, EndlineStateFutureCnt, by.x="State_f", by.y="State_f") 

EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(per = round(( Response/n * 100),0))
EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 <- EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 %>% mutate(Label = paste0(per, "%"))
EndlineStateFuture02pivot2 <- as.data.frame(EndlineStateFuture02pivot2)

EndlineStateFuture02pivot2$Plan <- fct_relevel(EndlineStateFuture02pivot2$Plan, "No plans", "Other", "Join workforce", "TVET Training", "Continue Education")

EndlineStateFuture02pivot2$State_f <- fct_relevel(EndlineStateFuture02pivot2$State_f, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

ggplot(data = EndlineStateFuture02pivot2, aes(x=State_f, y=Response, fill=Plan)) + xlab('') + ylab('Number of Students') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single")) + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 300), breaks = c(0, 50, 100, 150, 200, 250, 300)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2) + ggtitle('Student Education Plans for Next Year by State') + geom_text(aes(label = Label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, fontface = "bold", color="#777B7E") + scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 35)) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```



\newpage

## Teacher and Head Teacher Data Summary

Across the 2 years of the longitudinal study `r BMEL2NumTeachers` unique teachers and `r BMEL2NumHeadTeachers` unique head teachers were surveyed.

<br/>

`r BTotTeachers` teachers were surveyed at the beginning of year 1, `r MTotTeachers` teachers were surveyed at the end of year 1, and `r EL2TotTeachers` teachers were surveyed at the end of year 2.

<br/>

`r BTotHTeachers` head teachers were surveyed at the beginning of year 1, `r MTotHTeachers` head teachers were surveyed at the end of year 1, and `r EL2TotHTeachers` head teachers were surveyed at the end of year 2.

```{r teacher and head teacher basic numbers, include=TRUE}
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=13, ncol = 8))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf) <- c("Group","Subgroup", "Year 1 Begin Teachers", "Year 1 Begin Head Teachers", "Year 1 End Teachers", "Year 1 End Head Teachers", "Year 2 End Teachers", "Year 2 End Head Teachers")

TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Group[1] <- "Total Teachers"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[1] <- BTotTeachers
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[1] <- BTotHeadTeachers
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[1] <- MTotTeachers
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[1] <- MTotHeadTeachers
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[1] <- EL2TotTeachers
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[1] <- EL2TotHeadTeachers

TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Group[2] <- "Unique Schools"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[2] <- BTotalTeacherSchools
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[2] <- BTotalHeadTeacherSchools
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[2] <- MTotalTeacherSchools
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[2] <- MTotalHeadTeacherSchools
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[2] <- EL2TotalTeacherSchools
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[2] <- EL2TotalHeadTeacherSchools

TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Group[3] <- "Colocation"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[3] <- "Colocated"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[4] <- "BAB Center"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[3] <- BTotTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[3] <- BTotHeadTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[4] <- BTotTeachersBABStandAlone
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[4] <- BTotHeadTeachersBABStandAlone
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[3] <- MTotTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[3] <- MTotHeadTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[4] <- MTotTeachersBABStandAlone
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[4] <- MTotHeadTeachersBABStandAlone
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[3] <- EL2TotTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[3] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersColocated
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[4] <- EL2TotTeachersBABStandAlone
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[4] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersBABStandAlone

TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Group[5] <- "Location Type"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[5] <- "IDP"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[6] <- "Rural"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[7] <- "Urban"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[5] <- BTotTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[5] <- BTotHeadTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[6] <- BTotTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[6] <- BTotHeadTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[7] <- BTotTeachersUrban
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[7] <- BTotHeadTeachersUrban
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[5] <- MTotTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[5] <- MTotHeadTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[6] <- MTotTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[6] <- MTotHeadTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[7] <- MTotTeachersUrban
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[7] <- MTotHeadTeachersUrban
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[5] <- EL2TotTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[5] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersIDP
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[6] <- EL2TotTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[6] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersRural
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[7] <- EL2TotTeachersUrban
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[7] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersUrban

TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Group[8] <- "Gender"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[8] <- "Female"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$Subgroup[9] <- "Male"
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[8] <- BTotTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[8] <- BTotHeadTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Teachers`[9] <- BTotTeachersMale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 Begin Head Teachers`[9] <- BTotHeadTeachersMale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[8] <- MTotTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[8] <- MTotHeadTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Teachers`[9] <- MTotTeachersMale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 1 End Head Teachers`[9] <- MTotHeadTeachersMale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[8] <- EL2TotTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[8] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersFemale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Teachers`[9] <- EL2TotTeachersMale
TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf$`Year 2 End Head Teachers`[9] <- EL2TotHeadTeachersMale

## create flextable from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- flextable(TeacherAndHeadTeacherdf)

## set format of flextables
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- autofit(flexdfTeacherAndHeadTeacher)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- height(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, height=.08)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=1, 1.2)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=2, 1.2)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=3, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=4, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=5, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=6, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=7, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- width(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=8, .9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=2)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=4)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=7)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- hline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=9)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- vline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=4)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- vline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=6)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- vline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=2)
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- vline(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, j=8)

flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- fontsize(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- align(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=NULL, j=3:8, align="right", part="all")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- align(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=NULL, j=1:2, align="left", part="all")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- valign(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=NULL, j=NULL, part="all", valign="top")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=2, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=4, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=6, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=8, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=10, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bg(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=12, j=3:8, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- padding(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=NULL, padding.top=.5, padding.bottom=.5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- bold(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher, i=1, j=NULL, bold=TRUE, part="body")
flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher <- fix_border_issues(flexdffTeacherAndHeadTeacher)

```

### Teacher and Head Teacher Demographics

<br/>

#### Teacher and Head Teacher State Distribution

<br/>

```{r build teacher and head teacher across 2 years by state, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherbyState <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TState) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherbyState <- as.data.frame(TeacherbyState)
colnames(TeacherbyState) <- sub("TState", "State", colnames(TeacherbyState)) 
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherbyState <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTState) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## conver to dataframe
HTeacherbyState <- as.data.frame(HTeacherbyState)
colnames(HTeacherbyState) <- sub("HTState", "State", colnames(HTeacherbyState))
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyState <- rbind(TeacherbyState, HTeacherbyState)

TCombobyState$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyState$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")
TCombobyState$State <- fct_relevel(TCombobyState$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

TStatePlot <- ggplot(data = TCombobyState, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=State)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40), limits=c(0, 40)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teachers and Head Teachers Surveyed Across 2 Year Longitudinal Sample\nDisaggregated by State') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TStatePlot

```

```{r build teacher and head teacher at endline by state, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherbyState <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherbyState <- as.data.frame(TeacherbyState)
colnames(TeacherbyState) <- sub("TState", "State", colnames(TeacherbyState)) 
TeacherbyState <- TeacherbyState %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherbyState <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2HTState) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotHTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## conver to dataframe
HTeacherbyState <- as.data.frame(HTeacherbyState)
colnames(HTeacherbyState) <- sub("HTState", "State", colnames(HTeacherbyState))
HTeacherbyState <- HTeacherbyState %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyState <- rbind(TeacherbyState, HTeacherbyState)

TCombobyState$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyState$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")
TCombobyState$EL2State <- fct_relevel(TCombobyState$EL2State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

TStatePlot <- ggplot(data = TCombobyState, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=EL2State)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40), limits=c(0, 40)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teachers and Head Teachers at Year 2 End\nDisaggregated by State') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TStatePlot

```

<br/>


#### Teacher and Head Teacher Gender Distribution

<br/>

```{r teacher and head teacher all Gender across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
TeacherGender <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TGenderDesc) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherGender <- TeacherGender %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
TeacherGender <- TeacherGender %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherGender <- as.data.frame(TeacherGender)
colnames(TeacherGender) <- sub("TGenderDesc", "Gender", colnames(TeacherGender)) 
TeacherGender <- TeacherGender %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherGender <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTGenderDesc) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
HTeacherGender <- as.data.frame(HTeacherGender)
colnames(HTeacherGender) <- sub("HTGenderDesc", "Gender", colnames(HTeacherGender))
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyGender <- rbind(TeacherGender, HTeacherGender)

TCombobyGender$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyGender$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")


TCombobyGender$Gender <- fct_relevel(TCombobyGender$Gender, "female", "male")

TGenderPlot1 <- ggplot(data = TCombobyGender, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=Gender)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,10,20,30,40,50,60,70,80), limits=c(0, 80)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher and Head Teacher Gender\nSurveyed Across 2 Year Longitudinal Sample') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TGenderPlot1
```

<br/>

```{r teacher and head teacher at endline by Gender, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2}
TeacherGender <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TGender_f) %>% count()
## add percent

## add label

## convert to dataframe
TeacherGender <- as.data.frame(TeacherGender)
colnames(TeacherGender) <- sub("EL2TGender_f", "Gender", colnames(TeacherGender)) 
TeacherGender <- TeacherGender %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherGender <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2HTGender_f) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotHTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe

colnames(HTeacherGender) <- sub("EL2HTGender_f", "Gender", colnames(HTeacherGender))
HTeacherGender <- HTeacherGender %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyGender$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyGender$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")


TCombobyGender$Gender <- fct_relevel(TCombobyGender$Gender, "female", "male")

TGenderPlot1 <- ggplot(data = TCombobyGender, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=Gender)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,10,20,30,40,50), limits=c(0, 50)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher and Head Teacher Gender at Year 2 End') +

	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
```

<br/>

```{r teacher gender by site type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2}
TeacherGenderbySite <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f, EL2TGender_f) %>% count()
TeacherGenderbySite <- as.data.frame(TeacherGenderbySite)

## get teacher counts by site site
TeachersbySiteCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('EL2TColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeacherGenderbySiteJoin <- merge(TeacherGenderbySite, TeachersbySiteCnt, by.x='EL2TColocation_f', by.y='EL2TColocation_f')

## add percent
TeacherGenderbySiteJoin <- TeacherGenderbySiteJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherGenderbySiteJoin <- TeacherGenderbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherGenderbySiteJoin <- as.data.frame(TeacherGenderbySiteJoin)
colnames(TeacherGenderbySiteJoin) <- c("Site Type", "Gender", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label") 

TeacherGenderbySiteJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TeacherGenderbySiteJoin$`Site Type`, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")

TeacherGenderbySiteJoin$Gender <- fct_relevel(TeacherGenderbySiteJoin$Gender, "female", "male")

TGenderSitePlot1 <- ggplot(data = TeacherGenderbySiteJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=Gender)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,10,20,30,40,50), limits=c(0, 50)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Gender", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Gender at Year 2 End\nDisaggregated by Site Type') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TGenderSitePlot1
```

#### Teacher Age Distribution

```{r build teacher age across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
ggplot(BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=TeacherAge)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Age in Years") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("Teacher Age from 2 Year Longitudinal Sample (n=86)") + theme_classic()
```

<br/>

```{r build head teacher age across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4}
ggplot(BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=HTeacherAge)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Age in Years") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("Head Teacher Age from 2 Year Longitudinal Sample (n=54)") + theme_classic()
```
<br/>

```{r teacher and head teacher age groups across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
TeacherAgeGroup <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherAgeGroup <- TeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherAgeGroup <- TeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherAgeGroup <- as.data.frame(TeacherAgeGroup)
colnames(TeacherAgeGroup) <- sub("TeacherAgeGroup1_f", "Age", colnames(TeacherAgeGroup)) 
TeacherAgeGroup <- TeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherAgeGroup <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherAgeGroup <- HTeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
HTeacherAgeGroup <- HTeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
HTeacherAgeGroup <- as.data.frame(HTeacherAgeGroup)
colnames(HTeacherAgeGroup) <- sub("HTeacherAgeGroup1_f", "Age", colnames(HTeacherAgeGroup))
HTeacherAgeGroup <- HTeacherAgeGroup %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyAge <- rbind(TeacherAgeGroup, HTeacherAgeGroup)

TCombobyAge$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyAge$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")


TCombobyAge$Age <- fct_relevel(TCombobyAge$Age, "40 - 65 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "Under 30 Year Olds")

TAgeGroup1Plot1 <- ggplot(data = TCombobyAge, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=Age)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40,45,50,55,60,65), limits=c(0, 65)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher and Head Teacher Age Groups Across 2 Year Longitudinal Sample') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TAgeGroup1Plot1
```

```{r head teacher age group by site type, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
HTAgeGroup1Plot1 <- ggplot(data = HeadTeacherAgeGroupbySiteJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=`Age Group`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Head Teacher Age at the End of Year 2 Disaggregated by Site Type') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

HTAgeGroup1Plot1
```

```{r teacher age group by state, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
TeacherAgeGroupbyState <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState, EL2TeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
TeacherAgeGroupbyState <- as.data.frame(TeacherAgeGroupbyState)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyStateCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState) %>% count()
TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('EL2TState', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin <- merge(TeacherAgeGroupbyState, TeachersbyStateCnt, by.x='EL2TState', by.y='EL2TState')

## add percent
TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin <- TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin <- TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin <- as.data.frame(TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin)
colnames(TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin) <- c('State', 'Age Group', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin$`Age Group` <- fct_relevel(TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin$`Age Group`, "40 - 65 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "Under 30 Year Olds")

TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin$State <- fct_relevel(TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

TAgeGroup1StatePlot1 <- ggplot(data = TeacherAgeGroupbyStateJoin, aes(x=`State`, y=n, fill=`Age Group`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Age Disaggregated by State at the End of Year 2') +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TAgeGroup1StatePlot1
```

#### Teacher Education Levels

```{r build teacher and head teacher education level across 2 years new figure, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherEducation <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherEducation <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducation)
colnames(TeacherEducation) <- sub("TeacherEducation_f", "Education Level", colnames(TeacherEducation)) 
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherEducation <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## conver to dataframe
HTeacherEducation <- as.data.frame(HTeacherEducation)
colnames(HTeacherEducation) <- sub("HTeacherEducation_f", "Education Level", colnames(HTeacherEducation))
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyEducation <- rbind(TeacherEducation, HTeacherEducation)

TCombobyEducation$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")
TCombobyEducation$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TCombobyEducation$n <- sapply(TCombobyEducation$n, as.numeric)


TCombobyEducation <- TCombobyEducation %>% mutate(label_color = if_else(Group=='Head Teachers' | n < 5, true = "black", false = "white"))

TCombobyEducation <- TCombobyEducation %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	n == 1 ~ n,
	n == 2 ~ n,
	n == 3 ~ n,
	n == 4 ~ n,
	n < 10 ~ n-3.5,
	TRUE ~ n-4))

TCombobyEducation$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$Group, "Teachers", "Head Teachers")
 
teacher_barcol <- "#1C9099"
hteacher_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

TEducationPlot <- ggplot(data = TCombobyEducation) +
	geom_bar(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = n, fill = Group), 
	stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Teachers" = teacher_barcol, 
	                             "Head Teachers" = hteacher_barcol)) +
	facet_wrap(~Group) + 
	geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = Group, label = paste0(n)), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=2), hjust=0, color = TCombobyEducation$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	coord_flip() + ggtitle('The Number of Teachers and Head Teachers across education levels\nare almost identical across the 2 year longitudinal sample') +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 

TEducationPlot

```

<br/>

```{r build teacher and head teacher education level across 2 years new figure percent, include=FALSE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherEducation <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherEducation <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducation)
colnames(TeacherEducation) <- sub("TeacherEducation_f", "Education Level", colnames(TeacherEducation)) 
TeacherEducation <- TeacherEducation %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherEducation <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## conver to dataframe
HTeacherEducation <- as.data.frame(HTeacherEducation)
colnames(HTeacherEducation) <- sub("HTeacherEducation_f", "Education Level", colnames(HTeacherEducation))
HTeacherEducation <- HTeacherEducation %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyEducation <- rbind(TeacherEducation, HTeacherEducation)

TCombobyEducation$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")
TCombobyEducation$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TCombobyEducation$n <- sapply(TCombobyEducation$n, as.numeric)


TCombobyEducation <- TCombobyEducation %>% mutate(label_color = if_else(Group=='Head Teachers' | per < 5, true = "black", false = "white"))

TCombobyEducation <- TCombobyEducation %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	per < 5 ~ per,
	per < 9 ~ per-4.5,
	TRUE ~ per-5))

TCombobyEducation$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyEducation$Group, "Teachers", "Head Teachers")
 
teacher_barcol <- "#1C9099"
hteacher_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

TEducationPercentPlot <- ggplot(data = TCombobyEducation) +
	geom_bar(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = per, fill = Group), 
	stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
	scale_fill_manual(values = c("Teachers" = teacher_barcol, 
	                             "Head Teachers" = hteacher_barcol)) +
	facet_wrap(~Group) + 
	geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = Group, label = label), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=2), hjust=0, color = TCombobyEducation$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') + ggtitle('The Percent of Teachers and Head Teachers across education levels\nare almost identical across the 2 year longitudinal sample') +
	coord_flip() +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 

TEducationPercentPlot

```

```{r build teacher education level by site type across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

TeacherEducationbySite <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TColocation_f, TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeacherEducationbySite <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbySite)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('TColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- merge(TeacherEducationbySite, TeachersbySiteCnt, by.x="TColocation_f", by.y="TColocation_f")

## add percent
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin)
colnames(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin) <-  c('Site Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type`, "Colocated Site", "BAB Center")

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label_color = if_else(`Site Type`=='BAB Center' | n < 5, true = "black", false = "white"))

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$n <- sapply(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$n, as.numeric)

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	n == 1 ~ n,
	n  < 5 ~ n,
	TRUE ~ n-4))
	
colocated_barcol <- "#1C9099"
standalone_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

TEducationbySitePlot2Yr <- ggplot(data = TeacherEducationbySiteJoin) + geom_bar(aes(x=`Education Level`, y=n, fill=`Site Type`), 
	stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Colocated Site" = colocated_barcol, "BAB Center" = standalone_barcol)) +
	facet_wrap(~`Site Type`) + 
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Site Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=2), hjust=0, color = TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	  coord_flip() + ggtitle('Teacher Education Level disaggregated by Site Type\nmeasured across the 2 year longitudinal sample') +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 


TEducationbySitePlot2Yr

```

```{r build head teacher education level by site type across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Site Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=0), hjust=0, color = HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +

    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 

HTEducationbySitePlot2Yr

```

<br/>

```{r build teacher education level by site type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

TeacherEducationbySite <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f, EL2TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeacherEducationbySite <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbySite)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('EL2TColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- merge(TeacherEducationbySite, TeachersbySiteCnt, by.x="EL2TColocation_f", by.y="EL2TColocation_f")

## add percent
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin)
colnames(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin) <-  c('Site Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type`,  "Colocated Site", "BAB Center")

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label_color = if_else(`Site Type`=='BAB Center', true = "black", false = "white"))

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$n <- sapply(TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$n, as.numeric)

TeacherEducationbySiteJoin <- TeacherEducationbySiteJoin %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	n == 1 ~ 0.5,
	n == 2 ~ 1.5,
	n == 3 ~ 2.5,
  n < 10 ~ n-0.5,
	TRUE ~ n-1.5))
	
colocated_barcol <- "#1C9099"
standalone_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

TEducationbySitePlot <- ggplot(data = TeacherEducationbySiteJoin) + geom_bar(aes(x=`Education Level`, y=n, fill=`Site Type`), 
	stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Colocated Site" = colocated_barcol, "BAB Center" = standalone_barcol)) + facet_wrap(~`Site Type`) + 
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Site Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=0), hjust=0, color = TeacherEducationbySiteJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	  coord_flip() + ggtitle('Teacher Education Level at the end of Year 2 disaggregated by Site Type')  +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 


TEducationbySitePlot

```

<br/>

```{r build head teacher education level by site type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
colnames(HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin) <-  c('Site Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$`Site Type`, "Colocated Site", "BAB Center")

  n < 10 ~ n-0.5,

standalone_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

	stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Colocated Site" = colocated_barcol, "BAB Center" = standalone_barcol)) + facet_wrap(~`Site Type`) + 
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Site Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=0), hjust=0, color = HeadTeacherEducationbySiteJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	  coord_flip() + ggtitle('Head Teacher Education Level at the end of Year 2\n disaggregated by Site Type')  +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
```

```{r build teacher education level across 2 years by gender, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherEducationbyGender <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TGenderDesc, TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeacherEducationbyGender <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbyGender)

## get teacher counts by gender
TeachersbyGenderCnt <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TGenderDesc) %>% count()
TeachersbyGenderCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyGenderCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyGenderCnt) <- c('TGenderDesc', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin <- merge(TeacherEducationbyGender, TeachersbyGenderCnt, by.x="TGenderDesc", by.y="TGenderDesc")

## add percent
TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin <- TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin <- TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin <- as.data.frame(TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin)
colnames(TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin) <-  c('Gender', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin$Gender <- fct_relevel(TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin$Gender, "male", "female")

TEducationbyGenderPlot <- ggplot(data = TeacherEducationbyGenderJoin, aes(x=Gender, y=n, fill=`Education Level`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Education Level\nSurveyed Across 2 Year Longitudinal Sample\nDisaggregated by Gender') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TEducationbyGenderPlot

```

```{r build teacher education level by state type, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.5}
TeachersbyState <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState_f, EL2TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyState <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyState)

## get teacher counts by site location

TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('EL2TState_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeachersbyStateJoin <- merge(TeachersbyState, TeachersbyStateCnt, by.x="EL2TState_f", by.y="EL2TState_f")

## add percent

    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
```
