```{r build teacher education level by location type across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.5}

TeachersEducationbyLocation <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TLocationTypeDesc, TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeachersEducationbyLocation <- as.data.frame(TeachersEducationbyLocation)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersEducationbyLocationCnt <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TLocationTypeDesc) %>% count()
TeachersEducationbyLocationCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersEducationbyLocationCnt)
colnames(TeachersEducationbyLocationCnt) <- c('TLocationTypeDesc', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- merge(TeachersEducationbyLocation, TeachersEducationbyLocationCnt, by.x="TLocationTypeDesc", by.y="TLocationTypeDesc")

## add percent
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- as.data.frame(TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin)
colnames(TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin) <-  c('Location Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Location Type` <- fct_relevel(TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Location Type`, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label_color = case_when(
  `Location Type`== 'IDP' ~ "white",
  `Location Type` == 'Rural' ~ "white",
  `Location Type` == 'Urban' ~ "black")
  )
  
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$n <- sapply(TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$n, as.numeric)
  
TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	n == 1 ~ 0.25,
	n == 2 ~ 1,
	n == 3 ~ 2,
  n < 10 ~ n-0.85,
	TRUE ~ n-2))
	
idp_barcol <- "#1C9099"
rural_barcol <-"#67A9CF"
urban_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"


TEducationbyLocation2YrPlot <- ggplot(data = TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin) + geom_bar(aes(x=`Education Level`, y=n, fill=`Location Type`), stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("IDP" = idp_barcol, "Rural" = rural_barcol, "Urban" = urban_barcol)) + facet_wrap(~`Location Type`) + 
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Location Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=0), hjust=0, color = TeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	  coord_flip() + ggtitle('Teacher Education Level disaggregated by Location Type\nmeasured across 2 year longitudinal sample')  +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 

TEducationbyLocation2YrPlot

```


```{r build head teacher education level by location type across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocation <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTLocationTypeDesc, HTeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocation <- as.data.frame(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocation)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyLocationCnt <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTLocationTypeDesc) %>% count()
TeachersbyLocationCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyLocationCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyLocationCnt) <- c('HTLocationTypeDesc', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- merge(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocation, TeachersbyLocationCnt, by.x="HTLocationTypeDesc", by.y="HTLocationTypeDesc")

## add percent
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- as.data.frame(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin)
colnames(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin) <-  c('Location Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Location Type` <- fct_relevel(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$`Location Type`, "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label_color = case_when(
  `Location Type`== 'IDP' ~ "white",
  `Location Type` == 'Rural' ~ "white",
  `Location Type` == 'Urban' ~ "black")
  )

HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$n <- sapply(HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$n, as.numeric)

HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin <- HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label_position = case_when(
	n == 1 ~ 0.25,
	n == 2 ~ 1.25,
	n == 3 ~ 2.25,
  n < 10 ~ n-0.75,
	TRUE ~ n-1.25))
	
idp_barcol <- "#1C9099"
rural_barcol <-"#67A9CF"
urban_barcol <- "#D0D1E6"

HTEducationbyLocation2YrPlot <- ggplot(data = HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin) + geom_bar(aes(x=`Education Level`, y=n, fill=`Location Type`), stat = "identity", position = "identity", width = 0.5) + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("IDP" = idp_barcol, "Rural" = rural_barcol, "Urban" = urban_barcol)) + facet_wrap(~`Location Type`) + 
	  geom_text(aes(x = `Education Level`, y = label_position, group = `Location Type`, label = n), position = position_nudge(x=0, y=0), hjust=0, color = HeadTeachersEducationbyLocationJoin$label_color, size=3.5, fontface='bold') +
	  coord_flip() + ggtitle('Head Teacher Education Level disaggregated by Location Type\nmeasured across 2 year longitudinal sample')  +
	scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) + ## removes padding at both ends of the y axis
	theme_minimal() +
	theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(), ## gets rid of background box behind teachers and head teachers (panel titles)
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0, size = 12), ## controls font and size of panel titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the grid behind each column of bars
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"), ## controls the space between panels
    legend.position = "none", ## gets rid of the legend
    axis.title = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the axes titles
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "black"), ## controls the item text labels on the y axis
    axis.text.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the labels on the x axis
    axis.line.x = element_blank(), ## gets rid of the line on the x-axis
    axis.line.y = element_blank() 
  ) 
    

HTEducationbyLocation2YrPlot
```

```{r build teacher education level by location type at endline A, include=FALSE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.5}
TeachersbyLocation <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f, EL2TeacherEducation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyLocation <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyLocation)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyLocationCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyLocationCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyLocationCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyLocationCnt) <- c('EL2TLocationType_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeachersbyLocationJoin <- merge(TeachersbyLocation, TeachersbyLocationCnt, by.x="EL2TLocationType_f", by.y="EL2TLocationType_f")

## add percent
TeachersbyLocationJoin <- TeachersbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeachersbyLocationJoin <- TeachersbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeachersbyLocationJoin <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyLocationJoin)
colnames(TeachersbyLocationJoin) <-  c('Location Type', 'Education Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeachersbyLocationJoin$`Education Level` <- fct_relevel(TeachersbyLocationJoin$`Education Level`, "Other please specify", "Doctorate Degree", "Master's Degree", "Bachelor's Degree", "Grade 14 graduate", "Grade 12 graduate", "Less than Grade 12", "I have not finished Grade 12")

TeachersbyLocationJoin$`Location Type` <- fct_relevel(TeachersbyLocationJoin$`Location Type`, "Urban", "Rural", "IDP")

TEducationbyLocationPlot <- ggplot(data = TeachersbyLocationJoin, aes(x=`Location Type`, y=n, fill=`Education Level`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Education Level at the End of Year 2 Disaggregated by Location Type') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TEducationbyLocationPlot
```

```{r build teacher education level by location type at endline B, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=4}
  )
```

#### Teacher Experience Levels

Teachers and Head Teachers were asked about their level of experience on the baseline survey only, so the following figures display teacher level of experience at baseline only. The possible choices for level of experience were: "More than 5 years", "5 years", "4 years", "3 years", "2 years", "1 year", "Less than 1 year".

```{r build teacher and head teacher experience level at baseline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherExperience <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
## add percent
TeacherExperience <- TeacherExperience %>% mutate(per = round((n/BTotTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
TeacherExperience <- TeacherExperience %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeacherExperience <- as.data.frame(TeacherExperience)
colnames(TeacherExperience) <- sub("BTeacherExpLength_f", "Experience Level", colnames(TeacherExperience)) 
TeacherExperience <- TeacherExperience %>% mutate(Group = 'Teachers')

HTeacherExperience <- Bheadteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BHTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
## add percent
HTeacherExperience <- HTeacherExperience %>% mutate(per = round((n/BTotHTeachers)*100, sigdig2))
## add label
HTeacherExperience <- HTeacherExperience %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## conver to dataframe
HTeacherExperience <- as.data.frame(HTeacherExperience)
colnames(HTeacherExperience) <- sub("BHTeacherExpLength_f", "Experience Level", colnames(HTeacherExperience))
HTeacherExperience <- HTeacherExperience %>% mutate(Group = 'Head Teachers')

TCombobyExp <- rbind(TeacherExperience, HTeacherExperience)

TCombobyExp$Group <- fct_relevel(TCombobyExp$Group, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")
TCombobyExp$`Experience Level` <- fct_relevel(TCombobyExp$`Experience Level`, "More than 5 years", "5 years", "4 years", "3 years", "2 years", "1 year", "Less than 1 year")

TExpPlot <- ggplot(data = TCombobyExp, aes(x=Group, y=n, fill=`Experience Level`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="Experience Level", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher and Head Teacher Experience Level\nat Baseline') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TExpPlot
```

```{r build teacher experience length by site type at baseline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
TeacherExperiencebySite <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTColocation_f, BTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
TeacherExperiencebySite <- as.data.frame(TeacherExperiencebySite)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('BTColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## convert to dataframe

colnames(TeacherExperiencebySiteJoin) <-  c('Site Type', 'Experience Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeacherExperiencebySiteJoin$`Experience Level` <- fct_relevel(TeacherExperiencebySiteJoin$`Experience Level`, "More than 5 years", "5 years", "4 years", "3 years", "2 years", "1 year", "Less than 1 year")

TExperiencebySitePlot <- ggplot(data = TeacherExperiencebySiteJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=`Experience Level`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20), limits=c(0, 20)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="Experience Level", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Experience Level at Baseline Disaggregated by Site Type') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
```

```{r build teacher experience length by state type, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.5}
TeachersbyState <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTState_f, BTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
```

```{r build head teacher experience length by state type, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
HeadTeachersbyState <- Bheadteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BHTState_f, BHTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
HeadTeachersbyState <- as.data.frame(HeadTeachersbyState)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyStateCnt <- Bheadteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BHTState_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('BHTState_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
HeadTeachersbyStateJoin <- merge(HeadTeachersbyState, TeachersbyStateCnt, by.x="BHTState_f", by.y="BHTState_f")

## add percent
HeadTeachersbyStateJoin <- HeadTeachersbyStateJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
HeadTeachersbyStateJoin <- HeadTeachersbyStateJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
HeadTeachersbyStateJoin <- as.data.frame(HeadTeachersbyStateJoin)
colnames(HeadTeachersbyStateJoin) <-  c('State', 'Experience Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

HeadTeachersbyStateJoin$`Experience Level` <- fct_relevel(HeadTeachersbyStateJoin$`Experience Level`, "More than 5 years", "5 years", "4 years", "3 years", "2 years", "1 year", "Less than 1 year")

HeadTeachersbyStateJoin$State <- fct_relevel(HeadTeachersbyStateJoin$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

HTExperiencebyStatePlot <- ggplot(data = HeadTeachersbyStateJoin, aes(x=State, y=n, fill=`Experience Level`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15), limits=c(0, 15)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="Experience Level", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Head Teacher Experience Level at Baseline Disaggregated by State') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

HTExperiencebyStatePlot

```

Because teacher level of experience was not asked at endline, the following figures pair teacher experience by age group and education level to see if either could be used as a proxy for level of experience at endline.

```{r build teacher experience length by age group, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3.5}
TeachersbyAgeGroup <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTeacherAgeGroup1_f, BTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyAgeGroup <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyAgeGroup)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyAgeGroupCnt <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTeacherAgeGroup1_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyAgeGroupCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyAgeGroupCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyAgeGroupCnt) <- c('BTeacherAgeGroup1_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin <- merge(TeachersbyAgeGroup, TeachersbyAgeGroupCnt, by.x="BTeacherAgeGroup1_f", by.y="BTeacherAgeGroup1_f")

## add percent
TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin <- TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin <- TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin)
colnames(TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin) <-  c('Age Group', 'Experience Level', 'n', 'Group Total', 'per', 'label')

TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin$`Experience Level` <- fct_relevel(TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin$`Experience Level`, "More than 5 years", "5 years", "4 years", "3 years", "2 years", "1 year", "Less than 1 year")

TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin$`Age Group` <- fct_relevel(TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin$`Age Group`, "40 - 65 Year Olds", "30 - 40 Year Olds", "Under 30 Year Olds")

TExperiencebyAgeGroupPlot <- ggplot(data = TeachersbyAgeGroupJoin, aes(x=`Age Group`, y=n, fill=`Experience Level`)) + 
    xlab("Age Group") + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20), limits=c(0, 20)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="Experience Level", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Experience Level at Baseline Disaggregated by Age Group') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TExperiencebyAgeGroupPlot
```

```{r build teacher experience length by education level, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8,      fig.height=4.0}
TeachersbyEducation <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTeacherEducation_f, BTeacherExpLength_f) %>% count()

    xlab("Experience") + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
```

#### Teacher Reason for Teaching

```{r Teacher Reason for teaching at baseline, include = TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=3}
TReasontable <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select("Base"=BTTimePeriod, "Nothing\nElse\nAvailable" = BTeachReason_01, "Like\nTeaching" = BTeachReason_02, "Serve the\nPeople"=BTeachReason_03, "Other" = BTeachReason_04)

TReasontable <- aggregate(.~Base,data=TReasontable,FUN=sum)
TReasontablepivot1 <- TReasontable %>% pivot_longer(!Base, names_to = 'Reason', values_to = 'Response')
TReasontablepivot1 <- as.data.frame(TReasontablepivot1)
TReasontablepivot1$Reason <- sapply(TReasontablepivot1$Reason, as.factor)
TReasontablepivot1$Reason <- fct_relevel(TReasontablepivot1$Reason, "Other", "Serve the\nPeople", "Like\nTeaching", "Nothing\nElse\nAvailable")

TReasontablepivot1$Reason <- fct_rev(TReasontablepivot1$Reason)

ggplot(data = TReasontablepivot1, aes(x=Reason, y=Response, fill=Base)) + xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Teachers') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) + 
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge(), color="grey", fill="#31A354") + ggtitle('Teacher Reason for Teaching') + guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE)) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
```

<br/>

```{r Teacher Reason for teaching at baseline by site type, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=2.5}

TReasontableSite <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select("Site Type" = BTColocation_f, "Nothing Else Available" = BTeachReason_01, "Like Teaching" = BTeachReason_02, "Serve the People"=BTeachReason_03, "Other" = BTeachReason_04)

## sum data by site type
TReasontableSite2 <- aggregate(.~`Site Type`,data=TReasontableSite,FUN=sum)

## pivot reasons from columns to rows
TReasonstableSitepivot1 <- TReasontableSite2 %>% pivot_longer(!`Site Type`, names_to = 'Reason', values_to = 'n')
TReasonstableSitepivot1 <- as.data.frame(TReasonstableSitepivot1)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('Site Type', 'Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TReasonstableSitepivot2 <- merge(TReasonstableSitepivot1, TeachersbySiteCnt)

## add percent
TReasonstableSitepivot2 <- TReasonstableSitepivot2 %>% mutate(per = round((n/Total)*100, 0))

## add label
TReasonstableSitepivot2 <- TReasonstableSitepivot2 %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))

## convert to dataframe
TReasonstableSitepivot2 <- as.data.frame(TReasonstableSitepivot2)


TReasonstableSitepivot2$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TReasonstableSitepivot2$`Site Type`, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")
TReasonstableSitepivot2$Reason <- sapply(TReasonstableSitepivot2$Reason, as.factor)
TReasonstableSitepivot2$Reason <- fct_relevel(TReasonstableSitepivot2$Reason, "Other", "Nothing Else Available", "Serve the People", "Like Teaching")

ggplot(data = TReasonstableSitepivot2, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=Reason)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Teachers') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,10,20,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Reason", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teaching Reasons at Baseline Disaggregated by Site Type') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
```

<br/>

```{r Teacher Reason for teaching by state at baseline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3}

TReasontableState <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select("State" = BTState_f, "Nothing Else Available" = BTeachReason_01, "Like Teaching" = BTeachReason_02, "Serve the People"=BTeachReason_03, "Other" = BTeachReason_04)

## sum data by location type
TReasontableState2 <- aggregate(.~State,data=TReasontableState,FUN=sum)

## pivot reasons from columns to rows
TReasonstableStatepivot1 <- TReasontableState2 %>% pivot_longer(!State, names_to = 'Reason', values_to = 'n')
TReasonstableStatepivot1 <- as.data.frame(TReasonstableStatepivot1)

## get teacher counts by location type
TeachersbyStateCnt <- Bteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(BTState_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('State', 'Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TReasonstableStatepivot2 <- merge(TReasonstableStatepivot1, TeachersbyStateCnt)

## add percent
TReasonstableStatepivot2 <- TReasonstableStatepivot2 %>% mutate(per = round((n/Total)*100, 0))

## add label
TReasonstableStatepivot2 <- TReasonstableStatepivot2 %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0),'%'))

## convert to dataframe
TReasonstableStatepivot2 <- as.data.frame(TReasonstableStatepivot2)

TReasonstableStatepivot2$State <- fct_relevel(TReasonstableStatepivot2$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")
TReasonstableStatepivot2$Reason <- sapply(TReasonstableStatepivot2$Reason, as.factor)
TReasonstableStatepivot2$Reason <- fct_relevel(TReasonstableStatepivot2$Reason, "Other", "Nothing Else Available", "Serve the People", "Like Teaching")

TReasonbyStatePlot <- ggplot(data = TReasonstableStatepivot2, aes(x=State, y=n, fill=Reason)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Teachers') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,10,20,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Reason", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teaching Reasons at Baseline Disaggregated by State') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
 
TReasonbyStatePlot
```

```{r Teacher Reason for teaching by location at baseline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8, fig.height=3}
	  geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Reason", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teaching Reasons at Baseline Disaggregated by Location') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
 
## ggarrange(TReasonsplot1, TReasonsplot2, labels = c("", ""), ncol = 2, nrow = 1, align="hv", legend="right", common.legend = TRUE)

TReasonbyLocationPlot
```


#### Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching

```{r Teacher Additional job, include=TRUE, fig.width=6, fig.height=3}

TOtherJob <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TOtherOccupation_f) %>% count()
## add percent
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TOtherJob <- as.data.frame(TOtherJob)

colnames(TOtherJob) <- c("Other Job", "n", "per", "label")

TOtherJob$`Other Job` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJob$`Other Job`, "Any other job", "Farming", "Raising animals", "Being an Imam", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Driving", "Running a store")

TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% filter(!is.na(`Other Job`))
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% filter(`Other Job`!= 'Did not Answer')

TOtherJob2YearsPlot <- ggplot(data = TOtherJob, aes(x=`Other Job`, y=n)) + xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Teachers') + 
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching from 2 Year Longitudinal Sample') + 
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()

TOtherJob2YearsPlot
```

```{r build teacher additional job at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TOtherJob <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TOtherOccupation_f) %>% count()
TOtherJob <- as.data.frame(TOtherJob)

## add percent
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TOtherJob <- as.data.frame(TOtherJob)
colnames(TOtherJob) <- c("Other Job", "n", "per", "label")  

TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% filter(!is.na(`Other Job`))
TOtherJob <- TOtherJob %>% filter(`Other Job`!= 'Did not Answer')

TOtherJob$`Other Job` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJob$`Other Job`, "Any other job", "Farming", "Raising animals", "Being an Imam", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Driving", "Running a store")

TOtherJobEndlinePlot1 <- ggplot(TOtherJob, aes(x=`Other Job`, y=n)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab("") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching\nat the End of Year 2") + theme_classic()
  
TOtherJobEndlinePlot1  
```

```{r build teacher additional job by site type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}

TOtherJobbySiteType <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f, EL2TOtherOccupation_f) %>% count()
TOtherJobbySiteType <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbySiteType)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('EL2TColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- merge(TOtherJobbySiteType, TeachersbySiteCnt, by.x="EL2TColocation_f", by.y="EL2TColocation_f")

## add percent
TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin)
colnames(TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin) <- c("Site Type", "Other Job", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label")  

TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin %>% filter(!is.na(`Other Job`))
TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin <- TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin %>% filter(`Other Job`!= 'Did not Answer')

TOtherJob$`Other Job` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJob$`Other Job`, "Any other job", "Farming", "Raising animals", "Being an Imam", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Driving", "Running a store")

TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin$`Site Type`, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")

TOtherJobbySiteplot1 <- ggplot(data = TOtherJobbySiteTypeJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=`Other Job`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15), limits=c(0, 15)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching\nat the End of Year 2 by Site Type') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
	
TOtherJobbySiteplot1
```

```{r build teacher additional job by state at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TOtherJobbyState <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState_f, EL2TOtherOccupation_f) %>% count()
TOtherJobbyState <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbyState)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyStateCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('EL2TState_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- merge(TOtherJobbyState, TeachersbyStateCnt, by.x="EL2TState_f", by.y="EL2TState_f")

## add percent
TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- TOtherJobbyStateJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- TOtherJobbyStateJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbyStateJoin)
colnames(TOtherJobbyStateJoin) <- c("State", "Other Job", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label")  

TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- TOtherJobbyStateJoin %>% filter(!is.na(`Other Job`))
TOtherJobbyStateJoin <- TOtherJobbyStateJoin %>% filter(`Other Job`!= 'Did not Answer')

TOtherJob$`Other Job` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJob$`Other Job`, "Any other job", "Raising animals", "Being an Imam", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Driving", "Running a store", "Farming")

TOtherJobbyStateJoin$State <- fct_relevel(TOtherJobbyStateJoin$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

TOtherJobbyStateplot1 <- ggplot(data = TOtherJobbyStateJoin, aes(x=State, y=n, fill=`Other Job`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15), limits=c(0, 15)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching\nat the End of Year 2 by State') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
	
TOtherJobbyStateplot1
```

```{r build teacher additional job by location type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TOtherJobbyLocation <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TLocationType_f, EL2TOtherOccupation_f) %>% count()
TOtherJobbyLocation <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbyLocation)

## get teacher counts by site location

TeachersbyLocationCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyLocationCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyLocationCnt) <- c('EL2TLocationType_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts

## add percent
TOtherJobbyLocationJoin <- TOtherJobbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TOtherJobbyLocationJoin <- TOtherJobbyLocationJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TOtherJobbyLocationJoin <- as.data.frame(TOtherJobbyLocationJoin)
colnames(TOtherJobbyLocationJoin) <- c("Location Type", "Other Job", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label")  

TOtherJobbyLocationJoin <- TOtherJobbyLocationJoin %>% filter(!is.na(`Other Job`))
TOtherJobbyLocationJoin <- TOtherJobbyLocationJoin %>% filter(`Other Job`!= 'Did not Answer')

TOtherJobbyLocationJoin$`Other Job` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJobbyLocationJoin$`Other Job`, "Any other job", "Raising animals", "Being an Imam", "Teaching at private schools and courses", "Driving", "Running a store", "Farming")

TOtherJobbyLocationJoin$`Location Type` <- fct_relevel(TOtherJobbyLocationJoin$`Location Type`, "Urban", "Rural", "IDP")

TOtherJobLocationplot1 <- ggplot(data = TOtherJobbyLocationJoin, aes(x=`Location Type`, y=n, fill=`Other Job`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15), limits=c(0, 15)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Jobs in Addition to Teaching\nat the End of Year 2 by Location Type') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +

	  labs(colour = NULL) +
```

#### Teacher Class Size

```{r build teacher class size demographics, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}

ggplot(Bteachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=BTBABClassTeachSize)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Class Size in Students") + xlim(0, 250) + ylim(0,15) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("BAB Teacher Class Size at Baseline") + theme_classic()

ggplot(Bteachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=BTFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Class Size in Students") + xlim(0, 250) + ylim(0,15) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("Formal Primary Teacher Class Size at Baseline") + theme_classic()

ggplot(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=EL2TBABClassTeachSize)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Class Size in Students") + xlim(0, 250) + ylim(0,15) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("BAB Teacher Class Size at Endline") + theme_classic()

ggplot(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=EL2TFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize)) + geom_histogram(color="black", fill="darkgreen", binwidth = 1) + xlab("Class Size in Students") + xlim(0, 250) + ylim(0,15) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + ggtitle("Formal Primary Teacher Class Size at Endline") + theme_classic()
```

```{r build teacher class size medians at endline by site type, fig.width=7, fig.height=2}
## get median BAB Class sizes by site type
TClassSizebySiteBAB <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2TBABClassTeachSize, na.rm = TRUE))
TClassSizebySiteBAB <- as.data.frame(TClassSizebySiteBAB)
colnames(TClassSizebySiteBAB) <- c("Site Type", "median")
TClassSizebySiteBAB <- TClassSizebySiteBAB %>% mutate(Class = "BAB")

TClassSizebySiteFP <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2TFormalPrimaryClassTeachSize, na.rm=TRUE))
TClassSizebySiteFP <- as.data.frame(TClassSizebySiteFP)
colnames(TClassSizebySiteFP) <- c("Site Type", "median")
TClassSizebySiteFP <- TClassSizebySiteFP %>% mutate(Class = "Formal Primary")

TClassSizebySiteJoin <- rbind(TClassSizebySiteBAB, TClassSizebySiteFP)

TClassSizebySiteJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TClassSizebySiteJoin$`Site Type`, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")

TClassSizebySiteplot1 <- ggplot(data = TClassSizebySiteJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=median, fill=`Class`)) + xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40,45,50), limits=c(0, 50)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Median Class Size at the End of Year 2 by Site Type') + geom_text(aes(label = median), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) + coord_flip() + labs(colour = NULL) + theme_classic()
	
TClassSizebySiteplot1
```

#### Teacher Working Shifts

```{r build teacher working shift BAB, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2.8}

EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABSchoolShift_f <- fct_relevel(EL2teachersurveylonglocate$EL2TBABSchoolShift_f, "NA", "Other", "Noon", "Afternoon", "Morning")

TWorkShiftBABplot1 <- ggplot(EL2teachersurveylonglocate, aes(x=EL2TBABSchoolShift_f, fill=EL2TBABSchoolShift_f)) + geom_bar(fill="#31A354") + xlab("Work Shift") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + coord_flip() + ggtitle("BAB Teacher Work Shift at Endline") + theme_classic()

TWorkShiftBABplot1
```

```{r build teacher working shift BAB by Site, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=2.8}

TWorkShift <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% dplyr::select( EL2TColocation_f, EL2TBABSchoolShift_f) %>% count(EL2TColocation_f, EL2TBABSchoolShift_f)
TWorkShift <- as.data.frame(TWorkShift)
TWorkShift <- drop_na(TWorkShift)

TWorkShift$EL2TColocation_f <- fct_relevel(TWorkShift$EL2TColocation_f, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")
TWorkShift$EL2TBABSchoolShift_f <- fct_relevel(TWorkShift$EL2TBABSchoolShift_f, "NA", "Other", "Noon", "Afternoon", "Morning")

TWorkShiftBABSitePlot1 <- ggplot(data = TWorkShift, aes(x=EL2TColocation_f, y=n, fill=EL2TBABSchoolShift_f)) + 
    xlab("") + ylab('Number of Teachers') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40), limits=c(0, 40)) + geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="Shift", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('BAB Teacher Work Shift Disaggregated by Site Type at Endline') + coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) + theme_classic()

TWorkShiftBABSitePlot1
```


#### Teacher Dialect

```{r build teacher language across 2 years, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TLanguage <- BMEL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(TeacherLanguage_f) %>% count()
TLanguage <- as.data.frame(TLanguage)

## add percent
TLanguage <- TLanguage %>% mutate(per = round((n/BMEL2NumTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TLanguage <- TLanguage %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TLanguage <- as.data.frame(TLanguage)
colnames(TLanguage) <- c("Teacher Dialect", "n", "per", "label")  

TLanguage$`Teacher Dialect` <- fct_relevel(TLanguage$`Teacher Dialect`, "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Maxaa tiri")

Tdialectplot1 <- ggplot(TLanguage, aes(x=`Teacher Dialect`, y=n)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab("Dialect") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Teacher Dialect Mother Tongue from 2 Year Longitudinal Sample") + theme_classic()

Tdialectplot1
```

```{r build teacher language at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TLanguage <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TeacherLanguage_f) %>% count()
TLanguage <- as.data.frame(TLanguage)

## add percent
TLanguage <- TLanguage %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label

## convert to dataframe
TLanguage <- as.data.frame(TLanguage)
colnames(TLanguage) <- c("Teacher Dialect", "n", "per", "label")  

TLanguage$`Teacher Dialect` <- fct_relevel(TLanguage$`Teacher Dialect`, "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Maxaa tiri")

  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab("Dialect") + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Teacher Dialect Mother Tongue at the End of Year 2") + theme_classic()
```

```{r build teacher language by site type at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TLanguagebySiteType <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f, EL2TeacherLanguage_f) %>% count()
TLanguagebySiteType <- as.data.frame(TLanguagebySiteType)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbySiteCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TColocation_f) %>% count()
TeachersbySiteCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbySiteCnt)
colnames(TeachersbySiteCnt) <- c('EL2TColocation_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin <- merge(TLanguagebySiteType, TeachersbySiteCnt, by.x="EL2TColocation_f", by.y="EL2TColocation_f")

## add percent
TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin <- TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin <- TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin <- as.data.frame(TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin)
colnames(TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin) <- c("Site Type", "Teacher Dialect", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label")  

TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin$`Teacher Dialect` <- fct_relevel(TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin$`Teacher Dialect`, "Barwaani", "Dabarre", "Maay", "Maxaa tiri")

TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin$`Site Type` <- fct_relevel(TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin$`Site Type`, "BAB Center", "Colocated Site")

TDialectSiteplot1 <- ggplot(data = TLanguagebySiteTypeJoin, aes(x=`Site Type`, y=n, fill=`Teacher Dialect`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmpalette2, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher Dialect/Mother Tongue at the End of Year 2\nDisaggregated by Site Type') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
	
TDialectSiteplot1
```

#### Dialect Same for Teachers and Students

Teachers were asked at endline if they speak the same dialect as their students and they responded with yes or no.

```{r build teachers and students dialect same at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2}
TDialectSameEndline <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TDialectSame_f) %>% count()
TDialectSameEndline <- as.data.frame(TDialectSameEndline)

## add percent
TDialectSameEndline <- TDialectSameEndline %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TDialectSameEndline <- TDialectSameEndline %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TDialectSameEndline <- as.data.frame(TDialectSameEndline)
colnames(TDialectSameEndline) <- c("Dialect Same", "n", "per", "label")  

TDialectSameEndline$`Dialect Same` <- fct_relevel(TDialectSameEndline$`Dialect Same`, "No", "Yes")

TDialectSameEndlineplot1 <- ggplot(TDialectSameEndline, aes(x=`Dialect Same`, y=n)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab(NULL) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Teacher and Student Dialect the Same at the End of Year 2") + theme_classic()

TDialectSameEndlineplot1
```

```{r build teachers and students dialect same by state at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TDialectSameEndlinebyState <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState_f, EL2TDialectSame_f) %>% count()
TDialectSameEndlinebyState <- as.data.frame(TDialectSameEndlinebyState)

## get teacher counts by site location
TeachersbyStateCnt <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TState_f) %>% count()
TeachersbyStateCnt <- as.data.frame(TeachersbyStateCnt)
colnames(TeachersbyStateCnt) <- c('EL2TState_f', 'Group Total')

## join overall counts by individual counts
TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin <- merge(TDialectSameEndlinebyState, TeachersbyStateCnt, by.x="EL2TState_f", by.y="EL2TState_f")

## add percent
TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin <- TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin %>% mutate(per = round((n/`Group Total`)*100, 0))
## add label
TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin <- TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin <- as.data.frame(TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin)
colnames(TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin) <- c("State", "Dialect Same", "n", "Group Total", "per", "label")  

TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin$State <- fct_relevel(TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin$State, "South-West", "Jubbaland", "Hirshabeelle", "Benaadir")

TDialectStateplot1 <- ggplot(data = TDialectSameEndlinebyStateJoin, aes(x=State, y=n, fill=`Dialect Same`)) + 
    xlab(NULL) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30), limits=c(0, 30)) +
	  geom_bar(stat="identity", position=position_dodge2(preserve="single"), color="grey") + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + ggtitle('Teacher and Student Dialect the Same\nat the End of Year 2 by State') + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge2(0.9, preserve="single"), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE ) +
	  coord_flip() +
	  labs(colour = NULL) +
    theme_classic()
	
TDialectStateplot1
```


<br/>

Head Teachers were asked a slightly different question than teachers to at endline.  They were asked if they have students that speak different dialects in their BAB school.  

```{r build head teachers and students dialect same at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2}
HTDialectSameEndline <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2HTBABDialectDffrnt_f) %>% count()

## add label

## convert to dataframe

colnames(HTDialectSameEndline) <- c("Different Dialects", "n", "per", "label")  

HTDialectSameEndline$`Different Dialects` <- fct_relevel(HTDialectSameEndline$`Different Dialects`, "No", "Yes")

HTDialectSameEndlineplot1 <- ggplot(HTDialectSameEndline, aes(x=`Different Dialects`, y=n)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab(NULL) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Head Teacher Reported that BAB Students in their School\nhave Different Primary Dialects at the End of Year 2\n") + theme_classic()

HTDialectSameEndlineplot1
```

#### Common Background for Teachers and Students

Teachers were also asked if they share a common background with the students they teach.

```{r build teachers and students common background at endline, include=TRUE, fig.width=7, fig.height=2.8}
TCmmnBckgrndEndline <- EL2teachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2TCmmnBckgrnd_f) %>% count()
TCmmnBckgrndEndline <- as.data.frame(TCmmnBckgrndEndline)

## add percent
TCmmnBckgrndEndline <- TCmmnBckgrndEndline %>% mutate(per = round((n/EL2TotTeachers)*100, 0))
## add label
TCmmnBckgrndEndline <- TCmmnBckgrndEndline %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, 0), '%'))
## convert to dataframe
TCmmnBckgrndEndline <- as.data.frame(TCmmnBckgrndEndline)
colnames(TCmmnBckgrndEndline) <- c("Common Background", "n", "per", "label")  

TCmmnBckgrndEndline$`Common Background` <- fct_relevel(TCmmnBckgrndEndline$`Common Background`, "I don't know", "No", "Yes")

TCmmnBckgrndEndlineplot1 <- ggplot(TCmmnBckgrndEndline, aes(x=`Common Background`, y=n)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", show.legend=FALSE, fill ="#31A354") + xlab(NULL) + ylab("Number of Teachers") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 60), limits=c(0, 60)) + geom_text(aes(label = label), position = position_dodge(0.9), hjust = -0.5, size = 3, inherit.aes = TRUE) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette, guide=guide_legend(title="", reverse=T)) + coord_flip() + ggtitle("Teachers and Students have a Common Background at the End of Year 2") + theme_classic()

TCmmnBckgrndEndlineplot1
```

#### Accomadations for Students with Different Dialects

The 5 teachers who replied that they do not speak the same dialect as their students and the 20 Head teachers who replied they have students with different primary dialects in their BAB school where asked how students with different dialects are accommodated in the classroom.

<br/>

```{r teacher and head teacher dialect accommodations, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5,  fig.height=4.0}

EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd <- EL2teachersurveylonglocateSansOutliers %>% dplyr::select("Teacher translates for students"=EL2TDialectHowAccmdt_01, "school has materials in multiple dialects"=EL2TDialectHowAccmdt_02, "students support each other"=EL2TDialectHowAccmdt_03, "no accommodations"=EL2TDialectHowAccmdt_04, "other accommodations"=EL2TDialectHowAccmdt_05)

EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd <- as.data.frame(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd)
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd <- EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd %>% mutate(Base='Teachers')
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd <- drop_na(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd)

EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdAggregate <- aggregate(.~Base, data=EndlineTchrDialectAccmmd, FUN=sum)
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdAggregate %>% pivot_longer(!Base, names_to = 'Accommodation', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1)
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation <- sapply(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation, as.factor)
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation <- fct_reorder(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation, EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response)
EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1[!(is.na(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response) | EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocateSansOutliers %>% dplyr::select("Teacher translates for students"=EL2HTBABDialectHowAccmdt_01, "school has materials in multiple dialects"=EL2HTBABDialectHowAccmdt_02, "students support each other"=EL2HTBABDialectHowAccmdt_03, "no accommodations"=EL2HTBABDialectHowAccmdt_04, "other accommodations"=EL2HTBABDialectHowAccmdt_05)

EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd <- as.data.frame(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd)
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd <- EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd %>% mutate(Base='Head Teachers')
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd <- drop_na(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd)

EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdAggregate <- aggregate(.~Base, data=EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmd, FUN=sum)
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdAggregate %>% pivot_longer(!Base, names_to = 'Accommodation', values_to = 'Response')
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- as.data.frame(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1)
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation <- sapply(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation, as.factor)
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation <- fct_reorder(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Accommodation, EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response)
EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1 <- EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1[!(is.na(EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response) | EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1$Response=="0"),]

EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined <- rbind(EndlineTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1, EndlineHeadTchrDialectAccmmdpivot1)

EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Accommodation <- fct_relevel(EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Accommodation, "no accommodations", "other accommodations", "students support each other", "school has materials in multiple dialects", "Teacher translates for students")

EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined <- as.data.frame(EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined)
EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Base <- sapply(EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Base, as.factor)
EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Base <- fct_relevel(EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined$Base, "Head Teachers", "Teachers")

ggplot(data = EndlineDialectAccmmdCombined, aes(x=Base,  y=Response, fill=Accommodation)) + ylab('Number of Individuals') + xlab('') + geom_bar(stat="identity", position = position_dodge2(preserve = "single", width=0.9)) + ggtitle('Teacher Accommodations for Students \nwith Different Dialects at the End of Year 2') + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 5, 10, 15,20)) + scale_fill_brewer(palette = pvmboxplotpalette) + guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) + coord_flip() + labs(colour=NULL) + theme_classic() + theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray", size = 0.25, linetype = 1), plot.title = element_text(color="black"), axis.title.x = element_text(color="#777B7E"), axis.text.x=element_text(color="#777B7E"))
```

<br/>


#### Accomadations for Students with Disabilities

```{r BAB head teacher classes with disabled students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4.0}

HeadTchrBABDisabled <- BMEL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(HTBABSchoolDisabledStudents) %>% count()

HeadTchrBABDisabled <- as.data.frame(HeadTchrBABDisabled)

## replace na's with 0
##HeadTchrBABDisabled <- drop_na(HeadTchrBABDisabled)
HeadTchrBABDisabled[is.na(HeadTchrBABDisabled)] = 0

HeadTchrBABDisabledNum <- HeadTchrBABDisabled[2,2] 

HeadTchrBABDisabled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled %>% arrange(desc(n))

## #1C9099 - Teal, #D0D1E6 - lilac

## set square color for waffle chart
HeadTchrBABDisabled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled %>% mutate(squareColor = ifelse(HTBABSchoolDisabledStudents==0, "#D0D1E6", "#1C9099"))

## create new labels for whether or not head teacher teaches
HeadTchrBABDisabled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled %>% mutate(Teaches = ifelse(HTBABSchoolDisabledStudents==0, "No", "Yes"))

## create percent column
HeadTchrBABDisabled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled %>% mutate(percent = round((n/BMEL2NumHeadTeachers)*100, 0))

## create percentType square color
HeadTchrBABDisabled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled %>% mutate(percentType = ifelse(HTBABSchoolDisabledStudents==0, "background", "fillColor"))
                                        
hdt_percent_filled <- HeadTchrBABDisabled[HeadTchrBABDisabled$percentType == "fillColor",]$percent
hdt_percent_filled <- paste0(hdt_percent_filled, "%")

## create object placeholder for waffle name
hdt_name <- "of BAB Head Teachers have"
hdt_name2 <- " disabled students in the classroom"

## add chart title
# first layer: identify the data source and set aesthetics
ggplot(data = HeadTchrBABDisabled, aes(fill = squareColor, values = percent)) +
  # second layer: define waffle chart dimensions, color, and border thickness
  geom_waffle(n_cols = 10, size = 0.5, colour = "#FFFFFF", 
              flip = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
  # third layer: specify square colors
    scale_fill_manual(values = HeadTchrBABDisabled$squareColor) +
  # add a title using HTML
  labs(title = paste0("<span style='color:#1C9099;'>", hdt_percent_filled ," </span>",
    "<span style='color:#262626'>", hdt_name ,"</span>", " <BR/>", "<span style='color:#262626'>", hdt_name2 ,"</span>")) +
  theme_void() +
  # update theme: add element_markdown to apply custom HTML formatting
  theme(plot.title = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold",
                                      hjust = 0.15, vjust = 0.5, size = 20),
        # add margins to plot
        plot.margin = margin(t = 0.5, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, "cm"))
```

<br/>

```{r BAB head teacher disabled accommodations, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5,  fig.height=4.0}

HeadTchrBABAccmds <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocateSansOutliers %>% dplyr::select("physical adaptations"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_01, "educational materials"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_02, "students support each other"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_03, "extra classroom helpers"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_04, "different instruction"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_05, "no accommodations"=EL2HTBABDisabledHowAccmmdt_06)

HeadTchrBABAccmds <- as.data.frame(HeadTchrBABAccmds)
HeadTchrBABAccmds <- HeadTchrBABAccmds %>% mutate(Base='Head Teachers')
HeadTchrBABAccmds <- drop_na(HeadTchrBABAccmds)

## get number of head teachers who said they had disabled students at endline
EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled <- EL2headteachersurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2HTBABSchoolDisabledStudents) %>% count()

EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled <- as.data.frame(EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled)

## replace na's with 0
##HeadTchrBABDisabled <- drop_na(HeadTchrBABDisabled)
EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled[is.na(EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled)] = 0

EL2HeadTchrBABDisabledNum <- EL2HeadTchrBABDisabled[2,2] 


HeadTchrBABAccmdsAggregate <- aggregate(.~Base, data=HeadTchrBABAccmds, FUN=sum)
HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1 <- HeadTchrBABAccmdsAggregate %>% pivot_longer(!Base, names_to = 'Level', values_to = 'Response')
HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1 <- as.data.frame(HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1)
HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Level <- sapply(HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Level, as.factor)
HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Level <- fct_reorder(HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Level, HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Response)
HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall <- HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1[!(is.na(HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Response) | HeadTchrBABAccmdspivot1$Response=="0"),]

HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Level <- fct_relevel(HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Level, "no accommodations", "different instruction", "extra classroom helpers", "students support each other", "educational materials", "physical adaptations")

HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall <- as.data.frame(HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall)
HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Base <- sapply(HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Base, as.factor)
HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Base <- fct_relevel(HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Base, "Head Teachers")

HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall <- HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall %>% mutate(impact = round( Response/EL2HeadTchrBABDisabledNum, 2))

HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall <- HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall %>% mutate(percentage = paste0(impact*100, "%"))

## create impact color for category with highest percentage
HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall <- HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall %>% mutate(barcolor = ifelse(Level == "no accommodations", "#1C9099", "grey"))

noAccmd <- HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall %>% filter(Level=="no accommodations")

hdt_BABAccmds_titlepre = noAccmd$percentage
hdt_BABAccmds_title1 = "of BAB Head Teachers who have students"
hdt_BABAccmds_title2 = "with disabilities, have"

hdt_BABAccmds_titleMax = "no accommodations"
hdt_BABAccmds_titlefinal = " for them"

g.plot <- ggplot(data = HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall) + geom_bar(stat = "identity",
	position = "identity",
	fill = HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$barcolor,
	width = 0.75,
	aes(x = reorder(Level, impact), y = impact), ) + scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0)) + coord_flip() +
	theme_minimal() + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "gray40"),
        axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid = element_blank(), 
        plot.margin = unit(c(1.3, 1, 0, 1), "lines")) +
		annotate(geom = "text",
    label = HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$percentage, 
    x = HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$Level, 
    y = HeadTchrBABAccmdsOverall$impact - 0.005,
    color = "white",
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4,
    hjust = 1
    ) + # add a title using HTML
  labs(title = paste0("<span style='color:#1C9099;'>", hdt_BABAccmds_titlepre, " <span>", "<span style='color:#262626'>", hdt_BABAccmds_title1, " </span>", " <BR/>", "<span style='color:#262626;'>", hdt_BABAccmds_title2," </span>",  
    "<span style='color:#1C9099'>", hdt_BABAccmds_titleMax, "</span>",  "<span style='color:#262626;'>", hdt_BABAccmds_titlefinal," </span>")) +
  # update theme: add element_markdown to apply custom HTML formatting
  theme(plot.title = element_markdown(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold",
                                      hjust = 0.15, vjust = 0.5, size = 16))
        
print(g.plot)
	
```

```{r fp head teacher disabled accommodations, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5,  fig.height=4.0}
hdt_FPAccmds_titlefinal = " for them"

g.plot <- ggplot(data = HeadTchrFPAccmdsOverall) + geom_bar(stat = "identity",
	position = "identity",
	fill = HeadTchrFPAccmdsOverall$barcolor,
	width = 0.75,
	aes(x = reorder(Level, impact), y = impact), ) + scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0)) + coord_flip() +
	theme_minimal() + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "gray40"),

		annotate(geom = "text",
    label = HeadTchrFPAccmdsOverall$percentage,

    y = HeadTchrFPAccmdsOverall$impact - 0.005,
    color = "white",
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 4,
    hjust = 1

    "<span style='color:#1C9099'>", hdt_BABAccmds_titleMax, "</span>",  "<span style='color:#262626;'>", hdt_BABAccmds_titlefinal," </span>")) +
  # update theme: add element_markdown to apply custom HTML formatting

                                      hjust = 0.15, vjust = 0.5, size = 16))
        
print(g.plot)
```
