#### SEL Outcomes by Dialect

<br/>

```{r SEL outcomes by dialect, include=TRUE}
HopebyDialectYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
HopebyDialectYr1 <- as.data.frame(HopebyDialectYr1)
HopebyDialectPivotYr1 <- HopebyDialectYr1 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
HopebyDialectPivotYr1 <- HopebyDialectPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Hope Yr1")

HopebyDialectYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
HopebyDialectYr2 <- as.data.frame(HopebyDialectYr2)
HopebyDialectPivotYr2 <- HopebyDialectYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
HopebyDialectPivotYr2 <- HopebyDialectPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Hope Yr2")

EmpathybyDialectYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MEmpathy_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EmpathybyDialectYr1 <- as.data.frame(EmpathybyDialectYr1)
EmpathybyDialectPivotYr1 <- EmpathybyDialectYr1 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
EmpathybyDialectPivotYr1 <- EmpathybyDialectPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Empathy Yr1")

EmpathybyDialectYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Empathy_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EmpathybyDialectYr2 <- as.data.frame(EmpathybyDialectYr2)
EmpathybyDialectPivotYr2 <- EmpathybyDialectYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
EmpathybyDialectPivotYr2 <- EmpathybyDialectPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Empathy Yr2")

SelfEsteembyDialectYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MSelfEsteem_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SelfEsteembyDialectYr1 <- as.data.frame(SelfEsteembyDialectYr1)
SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr1 <- SelfEsteembyDialectYr1 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr1 <- SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Self-Esteem Yr1")

SelfEsteembyDialectYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SelfEsteembyDialectYr2 <- as.data.frame(SelfEsteembyDialectYr2)
SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr2 <- SelfEsteembyDialectYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr2 <- SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Self-Esteem Yr2")

CivicEngbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CivicEngage_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CivicEngbyDialect <- as.data.frame(CivicEngbyDialect)
CivicEngbyDialectPivot <- CivicEngbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
CivicEngbyDialectPivot <- CivicEngbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Civic Engagement")

CmmntyBlngngbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CmmntyBlngngbyDialect <- as.data.frame(CmmntyBlngngbyDialect)
CmmntyBlngngbyDialectPivot <- CmmntyBlngngbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
CmmntyBlngngbyDialectPivot <- CmmntyBlngngbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Community Belonging")

StdntSatisbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
StdntSatisbyDialect <- as.data.frame(StdntSatisbyDialect)
StdntSatisbyDialectPivot <- StdntSatisbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
StdntSatisbyDialectPivot <- StdntSatisbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="School Benefit")

SPTEbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Equity_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SPTEbyDialect <- as.data.frame(SPTEbyDialect)
SPTEbyDialectPivot <- SPTEbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
SPTEbyDialectPivot <- SPTEbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Student Perception of Teacher Equity")

CHRINFLNCbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CHRINFLNCbyDialect <- as.data.frame(CHRINFLNCbyDialect)
CHRINFLNCbyDialectPivot <- CHRINFLNCbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
CHRINFLNCbyDialectPivot <- CHRINFLNCbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Responsibility Influence on Schoolwork")

SafetybyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Safety_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SafetybyDialect <- as.data.frame(SafetybyDialect)
SafetybyDialectPivot <- SafetybyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = mean)
SafetybyDialectPivot <- SafetybyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Overall Safety")

SELbyDialectTable <- rbind(HopebyDialectPivotYr1, HopebyDialectPivotYr2, EmpathybyDialectPivotYr1, EmpathybyDialectPivotYr2, SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr1, SelfEsteembyDialectPivotYr2, CivicEngbyDialectPivot, CmmntyBlngngbyDialectPivot, StdntSatisbyDialectPivot, SPTEbyDialectPivot, CHRINFLNCbyDialectPivot, SafetybyDialectPivot)

SELbyDialectTable2 <- SELbyDialectTable[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]

SELbyDialectTable2$Maay <- specify_decimal(SELbyDialectTable2$Maay, 2)
SELbyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri` <- specify_decimal(SELbyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri`, 2)
SELbyDialectTable2$Other <- specify_decimal(SELbyDialectTable2$Other, 2)


SELbyDialectTable2 <- flextable(SELbyDialectTable2)
SELbyDialectTable2 <- autofit(SELbyDialectTable2)
SELbyDialectTable2 <- add_header_row(SELbyDialectTable2, values = c("  ", "Dialect"), colwidths = c(1,3))
SELbyDialectTable2 <- bold(SELbyDialectTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
SELbyDialectTable2 <- hline_top(SELbyDialectTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
SELbyDialectTable2 <- vline(SELbyDialectTable2, j=1, part="all")
SELbyDialectTable2 <- align(SELbyDialectTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:4, align = "right", part = "all")
SELbyDialectTable2 <- border_inner_h(SELbyDialectTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

`r SELbyDialectTable2`

```{r SEL by Dialect stats table build, include=TRUE}
dfkruskalSELbyDialect <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=22, ncol = 5))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfkruskalSELbyDialect) <- c("SEL", "Dunn Statistic", "Maay - Maxaa tiri", "Maay - Other", "Maxaa tiri - Other")

dfkruskalSELbyDialect[1,1] <- "Hope"
dfkruskalSELbyDialect[1:4,2] <- c("Yr 1 Z-statistic", "Yr 1 P.adjusted", "Yr 2 Z-statistic", "Yr 2 P.adjusted")

hopebydialectdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(MHope_Avg ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")

hopebydialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(EL2Hope_Avg ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")

## add hope by dialect to dunnTest Result Yr1 to Master Table

dfkruskalSELbyDialect[1,4] <- hopebydialectdunnYr1[[2]][2,2]

dfkruskalSELbyDialect[2,5] <- hopebydialectdunnYr1[[2]][3,4]

## set format of flextable
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- autofit(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- height(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, height=0.08)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- width(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, j=1, 1.7)

flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- width(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, j=5, 1)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- fontsize(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=4)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=8)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=12)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=14)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=16)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=18)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=20)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=22)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=24)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=2, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=4, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=6, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=8, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=10, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=12, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=14, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=16, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=18, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=20, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=22, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=24, j=3:5, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=19:20, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=21:22, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i=23:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- padding(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i = NULL, padding.top = .5, padding.bottom = .5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bold(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, i = 1, j = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, ~ `Maay - Maxaa tiri`<0.05 & `Maay - Maxaa tiri` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=3)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, ~ `Maay - Other`<0.05 & `Maay - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=4)
flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect, ~ `Maxaa tiri - Other`<0.05 & `Maxaa tiri - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=5)

flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect <- fix_border_issues(flexdfkruskalSELbyDialect)

```

#### EGRA Outcomes by Dialect

```{r EGRA outcomes by dialect, include=TRUE}
BEGRAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BEGRAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(BEGRAbyDialect)
BEGRAbyDialectPivot <- BEGRAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
BEGRAbyDialectPivot <- BEGRAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA Begin")

MEGRAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
MEGRAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(MEGRAbyDialect)
MEGRAbyDialectPivot <- MEGRAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
MEGRAbyDialectPivot <- MEGRAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA End")

Yr1EGRAGainbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr1EGRAGainbyDialect <- as.data.frame(Yr1EGRAGainbyDialect)
Yr1EGRAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr1EGRAGainbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
Yr1EGRAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr1EGRAGainbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA Gain")

BL2EGRAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BL2EGRAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(BL2EGRAbyDialect)
BL2EGRAbyDialectPivot <- BL2EGRAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
BL2EGRAbyDialectPivot <- BL2EGRAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA Begin")

EL2EGRAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EL2EGRAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(EL2EGRAbyDialect)
EL2EGRAbyDialectPivot <- EL2EGRAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
EL2EGRAbyDialectPivot <- EL2EGRAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA End")

Yr2EGRAGainbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr2EGRAGainbyDialect <- as.data.frame(Yr2EGRAGainbyDialect)
Yr2EGRAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr2EGRAGainbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
Yr2EGRAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr2EGRAGainbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA Gain")

EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable <- rbind(BEGRAbyDialectPivot, MEGRAbyDialectPivot, Yr1EGRAGainbyDialectPivot, BL2EGRAbyDialectPivot, EL2EGRAbyDialectPivot, Yr2EGRAGainbyDialectPivot)

EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]

EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Maay <- specify_decimal(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Maay, 2)
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri` <- specify_decimal(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri`, 2)
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Other <- specify_decimal(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Other, 2)

EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- flextable(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2)
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- autofit(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2)
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- add_header_row(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, values = c("  ", "Dialect"), colwidths = c(1,3))
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- bold(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- hline_top(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- vline(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- align(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:4, align = "right", part = "all")
EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

<br/>

`r EGRAOutcomebyDialectTable2`

<br/>

```{r EGRA dunn outcomes by dialect, include=TRUE}

EGRAdunnDialectTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=4, ncol = 4))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(EGRAdunnDialectTable) <- c("Dunn Statistic", "Maay - Maxaa tiri", "Maay - Other", "Maxaa tiri - Other")

EGRAdunnDialectTable[,1] <- c("Year 1 Gain Z-stat", "Year 1 P.adjusted", "Year 2 Gain Z-stat", "Year 2 P.adjusted")

dialectdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(MEGRAPCTGain ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(EL2EGRAPCTGain ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")


## add dialect to dunnTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
EGRAdunnDialectTable[1,2] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[1,3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][2,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[1,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][3,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[2,2] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1,4]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[2,3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][2,4]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[2,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][3,4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
EGRAdunnDialectTable[3,2] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][1,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[3,3] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[3,4] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][3,2]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[4,2] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][1,4]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[4,3] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2,4]
EGRAdunnDialectTable[4,4] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][3,4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
EGRAdunnDialectTable <- EGRAdunnDialectTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- flextable(EGRAdunnDialectTable)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- autofit(EGRAdunnDialectTable2)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- bold(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- align(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:4, align = "right", part = "all")
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- hline_top(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- vline(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maay - Maxaa tiri`<0.05 & `Maay - Maxaa tiri` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=2)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maay - Other`<0.05 & `Maay - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=3)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGRAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maxaa tiri - Other`<0.05 & `Maxaa tiri - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=4)
EGRAdunnDialectTable2 <- fix_border_issues(EGRAdunnDialectTable2)
```

`r EGRAdunnDialectTable2`

<br/>

#### EGMA Outcomes by Dialect

```{r EGMA outcomes by dialect, include=TRUE}
BEGMAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BEGMAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(BEGMAbyDialect)
BEGMAbyDialectPivot <- BEGMAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
BEGMAbyDialectPivot <- BEGMAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGMA Begin")

MEGMAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
MEGMAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(MEGMAbyDialect)
MEGMAbyDialectPivot <- MEGMAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
MEGMAbyDialectPivot <- MEGMAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGMA End")

Yr1EGMAGainbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr1EGMAGainbyDialect <- as.data.frame(Yr1EGMAGainbyDialect)
Yr1EGMAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr1EGMAGainbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
Yr1EGMAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr1EGMAGainbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGMA Gain")

BL2EGMAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BL2EGMAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(BL2EGMAbyDialect)
BL2EGMAbyDialectPivot <- BL2EGMAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
BL2EGMAbyDialectPivot <- BL2EGMAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGMA Begin")

EL2EGMAbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EL2EGMAbyDialect <- as.data.frame(EL2EGMAbyDialect)
EL2EGMAbyDialectPivot <- EL2EGMAbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
EL2EGMAbyDialectPivot <- EL2EGMAbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGMA End")

Yr2EGMAGainbyDialect <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr2EGMAGainbyDialect <- as.data.frame(Yr2EGMAGainbyDialect)
Yr2EGMAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr2EGMAGainbyDialect %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Languages2_f, values_from = median)
Yr2EGMAGainbyDialectPivot <- Yr2EGMAGainbyDialectPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGMA Gain")

EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable <- rbind(BEGMAbyDialectPivot, MEGMAbyDialectPivot, Yr1EGMAGainbyDialectPivot, BL2EGMAbyDialectPivot, EL2EGMAbyDialectPivot, Yr2EGMAGainbyDialectPivot)

EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]

EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Maay <- specify_decimal(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Maay, 2)
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri` <- specify_decimal(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$`Maxaa tiri`, 2)
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Other <- specify_decimal(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2$Other, 2)

EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- flextable(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2)
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- autofit(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2)
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- add_header_row(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, values = c("  ", "Dialect"), colwidths = c(1,3))
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- bold(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- align(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:4, align = "right", part = "all")
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- hline_top(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- vline(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

<br/>

`r EGMAOutcomebyDialectTable2`

<br/>

```{r EGMA dunn outcomes by dialect, include=TRUE}

EGMAdunnDialectTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=4, ncol = 4))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(EGMAdunnDialectTable) <- c("Dunn Statistic", "Maay - Maxaa tiri", "Maay - Other", "Maxaa tiri - Other")

EGMAdunnDialectTable[,1] <- c("Year 1 Gain Z-stat", "Year 1 P.adjusted", "Year 2 Gain Z-stat", "Year 2 P.adjusted")

dialectdunnYr1 <- dunnTest(MEGMAPCTGain ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")

dialectdunnYr2 <- dunnTest(EL2EGMAPCTGain ~ Languages2_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, method="bonferroni")


## add dialect to dunnTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
EGMAdunnDialectTable[1,2] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[1,3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][2,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[1,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][3,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[2,2] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][1,4]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[2,3] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][2,4]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[2,4] <- dialectdunnYr1[[2]][3,4]

## add dialect to dunnTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
EGMAdunnDialectTable[3,2] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][1,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[3,3] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[3,4] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][3,2]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[4,2] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][1,4]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[4,3] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][2,4]
EGMAdunnDialectTable[4,4] <- dialectdunnYr2[[2]][3,4]

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
EGMAdunnDialectTable <- EGMAdunnDialectTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- flextable(EGMAdunnDialectTable)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- autofit(EGMAdunnDialectTable2)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- bold(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- align(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:4, align = "right", part = "all")
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- hline_top(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- vline(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maay - Maxaa tiri`<0.05 & `Maay - Maxaa tiri` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=2)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maay - Other`<0.05 & `Maay - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=3)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- bg(EGMAdunnDialectTable2, ~ `Maxaa tiri - Other`<0.05 & `Maxaa tiri - Other` >=0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=4)
EGMAdunnDialectTable2 <- fix_border_issues(EGMAdunnDialectTable2)

```
<br/>

`r EGMAdunnDialectTable2`

\newpage

## Appendix A.2 Data by Colocation

A colocated school has both formal primary classes and BAB classes in the same building.  A BAB Center has only BAB classes in the building.  In some cases only Formal Primary data was collected at a school, in some only BAB data was collected, and in other both Formal Primary and BAB data was collected in a school.

```{r SEL outcomes by colocation, include=TRUE}
HopebyColocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
HopebyColocationYr1 <- as.data.frame(HopebyColocationYr1)
HopebyColocationPivotYr1 <- HopebyColocationYr1 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
HopebyColocationPivotYr1 <- HopebyColocationPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Hope Yr1")

HopebyColocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
HopebyColocationYr2 <- as.data.frame(HopebyColocationYr2)
HopebyColocationPivotYr2 <- HopebyColocationYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
HopebyColocationPivotYr2 <- HopebyColocationPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Hope Yr2")

EmpathybyColocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MEmpathy_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EmpathybyColocationYr1 <- as.data.frame(EmpathybyColocationYr1)
EmpathybyColocationPivotYr1 <- EmpathybyColocationYr1 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
EmpathybyColocationPivotYr1 <- EmpathybyColocationPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Empathy Yr1")

EmpathybyColocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Empathy_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EmpathybyColocationYr2 <- as.data.frame(EmpathybyColocationYr2)
EmpathybyColocationPivotYr2 <- EmpathybyColocationYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
EmpathybyColocationPivotYr2 <- EmpathybyColocationPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Empathy Yr2")

SelfEsteembyColocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(MSelfEsteem_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SelfEsteembyColocationYr1 <- as.data.frame(SelfEsteembyColocationYr1)

SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr1 <- SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr1 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Self-Esteem Yr1")

SelfEsteembyColocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2SelfEsteem_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SelfEsteembyColocationYr2 <- as.data.frame(SelfEsteembyColocationYr2)
SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr2 <- SelfEsteembyColocationYr2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr2 <- SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr2 %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Self-Esteem Yr2")

CivicEngbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CivicEngage_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CivicEngbyColocation <- as.data.frame(CivicEngbyColocation)
CivicEngbyColocationPivot <- CivicEngbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
CivicEngbyColocationPivot <- CivicEngbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Civic Engagement")

CmmntyBlngngbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CmmntyBlngngbyColocation <- as.data.frame(CmmntyBlngngbyColocation)
CmmntyBlngngbyColocationPivot <- CmmntyBlngngbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
CmmntyBlngngbyColocationPivot <- CmmntyBlngngbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Community Belonging")

StdntSatisbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
StdntSatisbyColocation <- as.data.frame(StdntSatisbyColocation)
StdntSatisbyColocationPivot <- StdntSatisbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
StdntSatisbyColocationPivot <- StdntSatisbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="School Benefit")

SPTEbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Equity_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SPTEbyColocation <- as.data.frame(SPTEbyColocation)
SPTEbyColocationPivot <- SPTEbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
SPTEbyColocationPivot <- SPTEbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Student Perception of Teacher Equity")

CHRINFLNCbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
CHRINFLNCbyColocation <- as.data.frame(CHRINFLNCbyColocation)
CHRINFLNCbyColocationPivot <- CHRINFLNCbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
CHRINFLNCbyColocationPivot <- CHRINFLNCbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Responsibility Influence on Schoolwork")

SafetybyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(mean = mean(EL2Safety_Avg, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
SafetybyColocation <- as.data.frame(SafetybyColocation)
SafetybyColocationPivot <- SafetybyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = mean)
SafetybyColocationPivot <- SafetybyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`SEL Measure`="Overall Safety")

SELbyColocationTable <- rbind(HopebyColocationPivotYr1, HopebyColocationPivotYr2, EmpathybyColocationPivotYr1, EmpathybyColocationPivotYr2, SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr1, SelfEsteembyColocationPivotYr2, CivicEngbyColocationPivot, CmmntyBlngngbyColocationPivot, StdntSatisbyColocationPivot, SPTEbyColocationPivot, CHRINFLNCbyColocationPivot, SafetybyColocationPivot)

SELbyColocationTable2 <- SELbyColocationTable[, c(3, 1, 2)]

SELbyColocationTable2 <- SELbyColocationTable2 %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))


SELbyColocationTable2 <- flextable(SELbyColocationTable2)
SELbyColocationTable2 <- autofit(SELbyColocationTable2)
SELbyColocationTable2 <- add_header_row(SELbyColocationTable2, values = c("  ", "Colocated"), colwidths = c(1,2))
SELbyColocationTable2 <- bold(SELbyColocationTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
SELbyColocationTable2 <- hline_top(SELbyColocationTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
SELbyColocationTable2 <- vline(SELbyColocationTable2, j=1, part="all")
SELbyColocationTable2 <- align(SELbyColocationTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:3, align = "right", part = "all")
SELbyColocationTable2 <- border_inner_h(SELbyColocationTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

`r SELbyColocationTable2`

```{r SEL by Colocation stats table build, include=TRUE}
dfkruskalSELbyColocation <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=22, ncol = 3))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfkruskalSELbyColocation) <- c("SEL", "Kruskal Test", "Yes - No")

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[1,1] <- "Hope"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[1:4,2] <- c("Yr 1 H-stat", "Yr 1 P-Value", "Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

hopebycolocationkruskalYr1 <- kruskal.test(MHope_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

hopebycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2Hope_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

## add hope by dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[1,3] <- hopebycolocationkruskalYr1$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[2,3] <- hopebycolocationkruskalYr1$p.value

## add hope by dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[3,3] <- hopebycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[4,3] <- hopebycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[5,1] <- "Empathy"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[5:8,2] <- c("Yr 1 H-stat", "Yr 1 P-Value", "Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

empathybycolocationkruskalYr1 <- kruskal.test(MEmpathy_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

empathybycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2Empathy_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

## add empathy by dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[5,3] <- empathybycolocationkruskalYr1$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[6,3] <- empathybycolocationkruskalYr1$p.value

## add empathy by dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[7,3] <- empathybycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[8,3] <- empathybycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr1 <- kruskal.test(MSelfEsteem_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2SelfEsteem_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[9,1] <- "Self-Esteem"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[9:12,2] <- c("Yr 1 H-stat", "Yr 1 P-Value", "Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add self-esteem dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[9,3] <- selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr1$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[10,3] <- selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr1$p.value

## add self-esteem dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[11,3] <- selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[12,3] <- selfesteembycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

civicengagebycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2CivicEngage_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[13,1] <- "Civic Engage"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[13:14,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[13,3] <- civicengagebycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[14,3] <- civicengagebycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

cmmntyblngngbycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2CmmntyBlngngCNV_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[15,1] <- "Community Belonging"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[15:16,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[15,3] <- cmmntyblngngbycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[16,3] <- cmmntyblngngbycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

stdntsatisbycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2StdntSatisCNV_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[17,1] <- "School Benefit"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[17:18,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[17,3] <- stdntsatisbycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[18,3] <- stdntsatisbycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

SPTEbycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2Equity_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[19,1] <- "Student Perception of Teacher Equity"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[19:20,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[19,3] <- SPTEbycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[20,3] <- SPTEbycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

CHRINFLNCbycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2CHR_INFLNC_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[21,1] <- "Responsibility Influence on Schoolwork"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[21:22,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[21,3] <- CHRINFLNCbycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[22,3] <- CHRINFLNCbycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value

SafetybycolocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2Safety_Avg ~ Colocated_f, data =  EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

dfkruskalSELbyColocation[23,1] <- "Overall Safety"
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[23:24,2] <- c("Yr 2 H-stat", "Yr 2 P-Value")

## add civic engage dialect to kruskalTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[23,3] <- SafetybycolocationkruskalYr2$statistic
dfkruskalSELbyColocation[24,3] <- SafetybycolocationkruskalYr2$p.value


#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
dfkruskalSELbyColocation <- dfkruskalSELbyColocation %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- flextable(dfkruskalSELbyColocation)

## set format of flextable
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- autofit(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- height(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, height=0.08)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- width(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, j=1, 1.7)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- width(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, j=2, 1)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- width(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, j=3, 1)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- fontsize(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=4)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=8)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=12)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=14)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=16)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=18)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=20)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=22)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- hline(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=24)
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=2, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=4, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=6, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=8, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=10, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=12, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=14, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=16, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=18, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=20, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=22, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=24, j=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=19:20, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=21:22, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- merge_at(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i=23:24, j=1, part="body")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- padding(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, i = NULL, padding.top = .5, padding.bottom = .5, padding.left=.5, padding.right=.5, part="all")
flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- bg(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation, ~ `Yes - No`<0.05 & `Yes - No` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=3)

flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation <- fix_border_issues(flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation)

```

<br/>

`r flexdfkruskalSELbyColocation`

<br/>

#### EGRA Outcomes by Colocation

```{r EGRA outcomes by Colocation, include=TRUE}
BEGRAbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BEGRAbyColocation <- as.data.frame(BEGRAbyColocation)
BEGRAbyColocationPivot <- BEGRAbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
BEGRAbyColocationPivot <- BEGRAbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA Begin")

MEGRAbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
MEGRAbyColocation <- as.data.frame(MEGRAbyColocation)
MEGRAbyColocationPivot <- MEGRAbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
MEGRAbyColocationPivot <- MEGRAbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA End")

Yr1EGRAGainbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr1EGRAGainbyColocation <- as.data.frame(Yr1EGRAGainbyColocation)
Yr1EGRAGainbyColocationPivot <- Yr1EGRAGainbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
Yr1EGRAGainbyColocationPivot <- Yr1EGRAGainbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 1 EGRA Gain")

BL2EGRAbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
BL2EGRAbyColocation <- as.data.frame(BL2EGRAbyColocation)
BL2EGRAbyColocationPivot <- BL2EGRAbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
BL2EGRAbyColocationPivot <- BL2EGRAbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA Begin")

EL2EGRAbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
EL2EGRAbyColocation <- as.data.frame(EL2EGRAbyColocation)
EL2EGRAbyColocationPivot <- EL2EGRAbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
EL2EGRAbyColocationPivot <- EL2EGRAbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA End")

Yr2EGRAGainbyColocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Colocated_f) %>% summarise(median = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm=TRUE))
## convert to dataframe
Yr2EGRAGainbyColocation <- as.data.frame(Yr2EGRAGainbyColocation)
Yr2EGRAGainbyColocationPivot <- Yr2EGRAGainbyColocation %>% pivot_wider(names_from = Colocated_f, values_from = median)
Yr2EGRAGainbyColocationPivot <- Yr2EGRAGainbyColocationPivot %>% mutate(`Outcome Measure`="Year 2 EGRA Gain")

EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable <- rbind(BEGRAbyColocationPivot, MEGRAbyColocationPivot, Yr1EGRAGainbyColocationPivot, BL2EGRAbyColocationPivot, EL2EGRAbyColocationPivot, Yr2EGRAGainbyColocationPivot)

EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable[, c(3, 1, 2)]

EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- flextable(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2)
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- autofit(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2)
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- add_header_row(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, values = c("  ", "Colocated"), colwidths = c(1,2))
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- bold(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE) 
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- hline_top(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- vline(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- align(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, i = NULL, j = 2:3, align = "right", part = "all")
EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
```

<br/>

`r EGRAOutcomebyColocationTable2`

<br/>

```{r EGRA kruskal outcomes by Colocation, include=TRUE}

EGRAkruskalColocationTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=4, ncol = 2))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(EGRAkruskalColocationTable) <- c("Kruskal Test", "Yes - No")

EGRAkruskalColocationTable[,1] <- c("Year 1 Gain H-stat", "Year 1 P-Value", "Year 2 Gain H-stat", "Year 2 P-Value")

ColocationkruskalYr1 <- kruskal.test(MEGRAPCTGain ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

ColocationkruskalYr2 <- kruskal.test(EL2EGRAPCTGain ~ Colocated_f, data = EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)

## add Colocation to dunnTest Result Yr1 to Master Table
EGRAkruskalColocationTable[1,2] <- ColocationkruskalYr1$statistic
EGRAkruskalColocationTable[2,2] <- ColocationkruskalYr1$p.value

## add Colocation to dunnTest Result Yr2 to Master Table
EGRAkruskalColocationTable[3,2] <- ColocationkruskalYr2$statistic
EGRAkruskalColocationTable[4,2] <- ColocationkruskalYr2$p.value

#round values in all numeric columns to 2 decimal places
EGRAkruskalColocationTable <- EGRAkruskalColocationTable %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 3))

EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- flextable(EGRAkruskalColocationTable)
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- autofit(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2)
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- bold(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- align(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, i = NULL, j = 2, align = "right", part = "all")
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- hline_top(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- vline(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, j=1, part="all")
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- bg(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2, ~ `Yes - No`<0.05 & `Yes - No` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=2)
EGRAkruskalColocationTable2 <- fix_border_issues(EGRAkruskalColocationTable2)
```

`r EGRAkruskalColocationTable2`

<br/>

EGMAkruskalColocationTable <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow=4, ncol = 2))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(EGMAkruskalColocationTable) <- c("Kruskal Test", "Yes - No")

EGMAkruskalColocationTable[,1] <- c("Year 1 Gain H-stat", "Year 1 P-Value", "Year 2 Gain H-stat", "Year 2 P-Value")

EGMAkruskalColocationTable[4,2] <- ColocationkruskalYr2$p.value

EGMAkruskalColocationTable2 <- align(EGMAkruskalColocationTable2, i = NULL, j = 2, align = "right", part = "all")

EGMAkruskalColocationTable2 <- border_inner_h(EGMAkruskalColocationTable2, border = NULL, part = "body")
EGMAkruskalColocationTable2 <- bg(EGMAkruskalColocationTable2, ~ `Yes - No`<0.05 & `Yes - No` >= 0, bg=upperselectorcolor, j=2)
EGMAkruskalColocationTable2 <- fix_border_issues(EGMAkruskalColocationTable2)

## Appendix B EGRA and EGMA Instrument Analysis

### Level 1 EGRA and EGMA Item Analysis (Discrimination and Difficulty)

#### EGRA Item Analysis Results Level 1 Baseline

The Level 1 Baseline EGRA contains a total of 294 items in 9 subsections as follows: Listening Comprehension (5 items), Phonemic Awareness (10 items), Letter Sound Identification (100 items), Invented Words (50 items), Familiar/Real Words (50 items), Oral Reading Fluency (66 items), Reading Comprehension (5 items), Dictation 01 (5 items), Dictation 02 (3 items). 

<br/>

```{r Baseline Level 1 EGRA Item Analysis}

BListeningCompList <- c('BListeningComp_01_n', 'BListeningComp_02_n', 'BListeningComp_03_n', 'BListeningComp_04_n', 'BListeningComp_05_n')
BPhonAwareList <- c('BPhonAware_01_n', 'BPhonAware_02_n', 'BPhonAware_03_n', 'BPhonAware_04_n', 'BPhonAware_05_n', 'BPhonAware_06_n', 'BPhonAware_07_n', 'BPhonAware_08_n', 'BPhonAware_09_n', 'BPhonAware_10_n')
BLetSoundList <- c('BLetSound_01_n', 'BLetSound_02_n', 'BLetSound_03_n', 'BLetSound_04_n', 'BLetSound_05_n', 'BLetSound_06_n', 'BLetSound_07_n', 'BLetSound_08_n', 'BLetSound_09_n', 'BLetSound_10_n', 'BLetSound_11_n', 'BLetSound_12_n', 'BLetSound_13_n', 'BLetSound_14_n', 'BLetSound_15_n', 'BLetSound_16_n', 'BLetSound_17_n', 'BLetSound_18_n', 'BLetSound_19_n', 'BLetSound_20_n', 'BLetSound_21_n', 'BLetSound_22_n', 'BLetSound_23_n', 'BLetSound_24_n', 'BLetSound_25_n', 'BLetSound_26_n', 'BLetSound_27_n', 'BLetSound_28_n', 'BLetSound_29_n', 'BLetSound_30_n', 'BLetSound_31_n', 'BLetSound_32_n', 'BLetSound_33_n', 'BLetSound_34_n', 'BLetSound_35_n', 'BLetSound_36_n', 'BLetSound_37_n', 'BLetSound_38_n', 'BLetSound_39_n', 'BLetSound_40_n', 'BLetSound_41_n', 'BLetSound_42_n', 'BLetSound_43_n', 'BLetSound_44_n', 'BLetSound_45_n', 'BLetSound_46_n', 'BLetSound_47_n', 'BLetSound_48_n', 'BLetSound_49_n', 'BLetSound_50_n', 'BLetSound_51_n', 'BLetSound_52_n', 'BLetSound_53_n', 'BLetSound_54_n', 'BLetSound_55_n', 'BLetSound_56_n', 'BLetSound_57_n', 'BLetSound_58_n', 'BLetSound_59_n', 'BLetSound_60_n', 'BLetSound_61_n', 'BLetSound_62_n', 'BLetSound_63_n', 'BLetSound_64_n', 'BLetSound_65_n', 'BLetSound_66_n', 'BLetSound_67_n', 'BLetSound_68_n', 'BLetSound_69_n', 'BLetSound_70_n', 'BLetSound_71_n', 'BLetSound_72_n', 'BLetSound_73_n', 'BLetSound_74_n', 'BLetSound_75_n', 'BLetSound_76_n', 'BLetSound_77_n', 'BLetSound_78_n', 'BLetSound_79_n', 'BLetSound_80_n', 'BLetSound_81_n', 'BLetSound_82_n', 'BLetSound_83_n', 'BLetSound_84_n', 'BLetSound_85_n', 'BLetSound_86_n', 'BLetSound_87_n', 'BLetSound_88_n', 'BLetSound_89_n', 'BLetSound_90_n', 'BLetSound_91_n', 'BLetSound_92_n', 'BLetSound_93_n', 'BLetSound_94_n', 'BLetSound_95_n', 'BLetSound_96_n', 'BLetSound_97_n', 'BLetSound_98_n', 'BLetSound_99_n', 'BLetSound_100_n')
BInventWordList <- c('BInventWord_01_n', 'BInventWord_02_n', 'BInventWord_03_n', 'BInventWord_04_n', 'BInventWord_05_n', 'BInventWord_06_n', 'BInventWord_07_n', 'BInventWord_08_n', 'BInventWord_09_n', 'BInventWord_10_n', 'BInventWord_11_n', 'BInventWord_12_n', 'BInventWord_13_n', 'BInventWord_14_n', 'BInventWord_15_n', 'BInventWord_16_n', 'BInventWord_17_n', 'BInventWord_18_n', 'BInventWord_19_n', 'BInventWord_20_n', 'BInventWord_21_n', 'BInventWord_22_n', 'BInventWord_23_n', 'BInventWord_24_n', 'BInventWord_25_n', 'BInventWord_26_n', 'BInventWord_27_n', 'BInventWord_28_n', 'BInventWord_29_n', 'BInventWord_30_n', 'BInventWord_31_n', 'BInventWord_32_n', 'BInventWord_33_n', 'BInventWord_34_n', 'BInventWord_35_n', 'BInventWord_36_n', 'BInventWord_37_n', 'BInventWord_38_n', 'BInventWord_39_n', 'BInventWord_40_n', 'BInventWord_41_n', 'BInventWord_42_n', 'BInventWord_43_n', 'BInventWord_44_n', 'BInventWord_45_n', 'BInventWord_46_n', 'BInventWord_47_n', 'BInventWord_48_n', 'BInventWord_49_n', 'BInventWord_50_n')

BRealWordsList <- c('BRealWords_01_n', 'BRealWords_02_n', 'BRealWords_03_n', 'BRealWords_04_n', 'BRealWords_05_n', 'BRealWords_06_n', 'BRealWords_07_n', 'BRealWords_08_n', 'BRealWords_09_n', 'BRealWords_10_n', 'BRealWords_11_n', 'BRealWords_12_n', 'BRealWords_13_n', 'BRealWords_14_n', 'BRealWords_15_n', 'BRealWords_16_n', 'BRealWords_17_n', 'BRealWords_18_n', 'BRealWords_19_n', 'BRealWords_20_n', 'BRealWords_21_n', 'BRealWords_22_n', 'BRealWords_23_n', 'BRealWords_24_n', 'BRealWords_25_n', 'BRealWords_26_n', 'BRealWords_27_n', 'BRealWords_28_n', 'BRealWords_29_n', 'BRealWords_30_n', 'BRealWords_31_n', 'BRealWords_32_n', 'BRealWords_33_n', 'BRealWords_34_n', 'BRealWords_35_n', 'BRealWords_36_n', 'BRealWords_37_n', 'BRealWords_38_n', 'BRealWords_39_n', 'BRealWords_40_n', 'BRealWords_41_n', 'BRealWords_42_n', 'BRealWords_43_n', 'BRealWords_44_n', 'BRealWords_45_n', 'BRealWords_46_n', 'BRealWords_47_n', 'BRealWords_48_n', 'BRealWords_49_n', 'BRealWords_50_n')

BOralRdFlncyList <- c('BOralRdFlncy_01_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_02_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_03_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_04_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_05_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_06_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_07_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_08_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_09_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_10_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_11_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_12_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_13_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_14_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_15_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_16_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_17_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_18_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_19_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_20_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_21_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_22_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_23_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_24_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_25_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_26_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_27_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_28_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_29_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_30_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_31_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_32_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_33_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_34_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_35_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_36_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_37_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_38_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_39_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_40_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_41_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_42_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_43_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_44_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_45_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_46_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_47_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_48_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_49_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_50_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_51_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_52_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_53_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_54_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_55_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_56_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_57_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_58_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_59_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_60_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_61_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_62_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_63_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_64_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_65_n', 'BOralRdFlncy_66_n')

BReadCompList <- c('BReadComp_01_n', 'BReadComp_02_n', 'BReadComp_03_n', 'BReadComp_04_n', 'BReadComp_05_n')

BDictation_01List <- c('BDictation_01_01_n', 'BDictation_01_02_n', 'BDictation_01_03_n', 'BDictation_01_04_n', 'BDictation_01_05_n')

BDictation_02List <- c('BDictation_02_01_n', 'BDictation_02_02_n', 'BDictation_02_03_n')

OutlierParticipantIdList <- OutlierParticipantIdList %>% mutate(OutlierTest=1)

BstudentOutliers <- merge(Bstudentsurveylong, OutlierParticipantIdList, by.x='BStudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE) 

BEGRASansOutlier <- BstudentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGRA subsection
BListeningCompItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BListeningCompList]
BPhonAwareItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BPhonAwareList]
BLetSoundItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BLetSoundList]
BInventWordItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BInventWordList]
BRealWordsItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BRealWordsList]
BOralRdFlncyItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BOralRdFlncyList]
BReadCompItems <- BEGRASansOutlier[BReadCompList]
BDictation_01Items <- BEGRASansOutlier[BDictation_01List]
BDictation_02Items <- BEGRASansOutlier[BDictation_02List]

## put all of the EGRA subsections together with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGRA items
BEGRAItems <- cbind(BListeningCompItems, BPhonAwareItems, BLetSoundItems, BInventWordItems, BRealWordsItems, BOralRdFlncyItems, BReadCompItems, BDictation_01Items, BDictation_02Items)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGRA items dataframe
BEGRAItems[is.na(BEGRAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers of each item by first calculating the colMeans for each item
item.diffBEGRA <- colMeans(BEGRAItems)
item.diffBEGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffBEGRA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsBEGRA <- ncol(BEGRAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsBEGRA <- nrow(BEGRAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreBEGRA <- rowSums(BEGRAItems) ## total score

item.discBEGRA <- numeric(n.itemsBEGRA)    ## output vector
for(i in 1:n.itemsBEGRA){                 ## sequence
  item.discBEGRA[i] <- cor(total.scoreBEGRA, BEGRAItems[,i], "pairwise.complete.obs","spearman")  # body
}
item.discBEGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.discBEGRA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xBEGRA <- var(total.scoreBEGRA)*(n.studentsBEGRA-1)/n.studentsBEGRA

## calculate observed score of variance of each item
var.yBEGRA <- numeric(n.itemsBEGRA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsBEGRA){
	var.yBEGRA[i] <- var(BEGRAItems[,i])*(n.studentsBEGRA-1)/n.studentsBEGRA
	}

var.yBEGRADF <- as.data.frame(var.yBEGRA)

## calculate alpha for BEGRA test
alphaBEGRA <- (n.itemsBEGRA/(n.itemsBEGRA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yBEGRA)/var.xBEGRA)
alphaBEGRADisplay <- round(alphaBEGRA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdBEGRA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreBEGRA)*(n.studentsBEGRA-1)/n.studentsBEGRA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seBEGRA <- sdBEGRA*sqrt(1-alphaBEGRA)
seBEGRADisplay <- round(seBEGRA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
BEGRADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffBEGRADF, var.yBEGRADF, item.discBEGRADF)

BEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(BEGRADiffDiscDF)

BEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('B*', '', BEGRADiffDiscDF$Item) 
BEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', BEGRADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .5 & item.discBEGRA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .85 & item.diffBEGRA > .5 & item.discBEGRA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA > .85 & item.discBEGRA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGRA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .5 & item.discBEGRA <= .3 & item.discBEGRA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .85 & item.diffBEGRA > .5 & item.discBEGRA <= .3 & item.discBEGRA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA > .85 & item.discBEGRA <= .3 & item.discBEGRA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairBEGRA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .5 & item.discBEGRA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA <= .85 & item.diffBEGRA > .5 & item.discBEGRA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodBEGRA, Item)

## filter the BEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGRA <- BEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGRA > .85 & item.discBEGRA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGRA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGRAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantBEGRAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=2, 2.7)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 7, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsBEGRA` students completed the Baseline level 1 EGRA exam.

<br/>

`r alphaBEGRADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seBEGRADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGRA`

#### EGRA Item Analysis Results Level 1 Endline
