```{r Endline Level 1 EGRA Item Analysis}
MLetSoundList <- c('MLetSound_01_n', 'MLetSound_02_n', 'MLetSound_03_n', 'MLetSound_04_n', 'MLetSound_05_n', 'MLetSound_06_n', 'MLetSound_07_n', 'MLetSound_08_n', 'MLetSound_09_n', 'MLetSound_10_n', 'MLetSound_11_n', 'MLetSound_12_n', 'MLetSound_13_n', 'MLetSound_14_n', 'MLetSound_15_n', 'MLetSound_16_n', 'MLetSound_17_n', 'MLetSound_18_n', 'MLetSound_19_n', 'MLetSound_20_n', 'MLetSound_21_n', 'MLetSound_22_n', 'MLetSound_23_n', 'MLetSound_24_n', 'MLetSound_25_n', 'MLetSound_26_n', 'MLetSound_27_n', 'MLetSound_28_n', 'MLetSound_29_n', 'MLetSound_30_n', 'MLetSound_31_n', 'MLetSound_32_n', 'MLetSound_33_n', 'MLetSound_34_n', 'MLetSound_35_n', 'MLetSound_36_n', 'MLetSound_37_n', 'MLetSound_38_n', 'MLetSound_39_n', 'MLetSound_40_n', 'MLetSound_41_n', 'MLetSound_42_n', 'MLetSound_43_n', 'MLetSound_44_n', 'MLetSound_45_n', 'MLetSound_46_n', 'MLetSound_47_n', 'MLetSound_48_n', 'MLetSound_49_n', 'MLetSound_50_n', 'MLetSound_51_n', 'MLetSound_52_n', 'MLetSound_53_n', 'MLetSound_54_n', 'MLetSound_55_n', 'MLetSound_56_n', 'MLetSound_57_n', 'MLetSound_58_n', 'MLetSound_59_n', 'MLetSound_60_n', 'MLetSound_61_n', 'MLetSound_62_n', 'MLetSound_63_n', 'MLetSound_64_n', 'MLetSound_65_n', 'MLetSound_66_n', 'MLetSound_67_n', 'MLetSound_68_n', 'MLetSound_69_n', 'MLetSound_70_n', 'MLetSound_71_n', 'MLetSound_72_n', 'MLetSound_73_n', 'MLetSound_74_n', 'MLetSound_75_n', 'MLetSound_76_n', 'MLetSound_77_n', 'MLetSound_78_n', 'MLetSound_79_n', 'MLetSound_80_n', 'MLetSound_81_n', 'MLetSound_82_n', 'MLetSound_83_n', 'MLetSound_84_n', 'MLetSound_85_n', 'MLetSound_86_n', 'MLetSound_87_n', 'MLetSound_88_n', 'MLetSound_89_n', 'MLetSound_90_n', 'MLetSound_91_n', 'MLetSound_92_n', 'MLetSound_93_n', 'MLetSound_94_n', 'MLetSound_95_n', 'MLetSound_96_n', 'MLetSound_97_n', 'MLetSound_98_n', 'MLetSound_99_n', 'MLetSound_100_n')

MInventWordList <- c('MInventWord_01_n', 'MInventWord_02_n', 'MInventWord_03_n', 'MInventWord_04_n', 'MInventWord_05_n', 'MInventWord_06_n', 'MInventWord_07_n', 'MInventWord_08_n', 'MInventWord_09_n', 'MInventWord_10_n', 'MInventWord_11_n', 'MInventWord_12_n', 'MInventWord_13_n', 'MInventWord_14_n', 'MInventWord_15_n', 'MInventWord_16_n', 'MInventWord_17_n', 'MInventWord_18_n', 'MInventWord_19_n', 'MInventWord_20_n', 'MInventWord_21_n', 'MInventWord_22_n', 'MInventWord_23_n', 'MInventWord_24_n', 'MInventWord_25_n', 'MInventWord_26_n', 'MInventWord_27_n', 'MInventWord_28_n', 'MInventWord_29_n', 'MInventWord_30_n', 'MInventWord_31_n', 'MInventWord_32_n', 'MInventWord_33_n', 'MInventWord_34_n', 'MInventWord_35_n', 'MInventWord_36_n', 'MInventWord_37_n', 'MInventWord_38_n', 'MInventWord_39_n', 'MInventWord_40_n', 'MInventWord_41_n', 'MInventWord_42_n', 'MInventWord_43_n', 'MInventWord_44_n', 'MInventWord_45_n', 'MInventWord_46_n', 'MInventWord_47_n', 'MInventWord_48_n', 'MInventWord_49_n', 'MInventWord_50_n')

MRealWordsList <- c('MRealWords_01_n', 'MRealWords_02_n', 'MRealWords_03_n', 'MRealWords_04_n', 'MRealWords_05_n', 'MRealWords_06_n', 'MRealWords_07_n', 'MRealWords_08_n', 'MRealWords_09_n', 'MRealWords_10_n', 'MRealWords_11_n', 'MRealWords_12_n', 'MRealWords_13_n', 'MRealWords_14_n', 'MRealWords_15_n', 'MRealWords_16_n', 'MRealWords_17_n', 'MRealWords_18_n', 'MRealWords_19_n', 'MRealWords_20_n', 'MRealWords_21_n', 'MRealWords_22_n', 'MRealWords_23_n', 'MRealWords_24_n', 'MRealWords_25_n', 'MRealWords_26_n', 'MRealWords_27_n', 'MRealWords_28_n', 'MRealWords_29_n', 'MRealWords_30_n', 'MRealWords_31_n', 'MRealWords_32_n', 'MRealWords_33_n', 'MRealWords_34_n', 'MRealWords_35_n', 'MRealWords_36_n', 'MRealWords_37_n', 'MRealWords_38_n', 'MRealWords_39_n', 'MRealWords_40_n', 'MRealWords_41_n', 'MRealWords_42_n', 'MRealWords_43_n', 'MRealWords_44_n', 'MRealWords_45_n', 'MRealWords_46_n', 'MRealWords_47_n', 'MRealWords_48_n', 'MRealWords_49_n', 'MRealWords_50_n')

MOralRdFlncyList <- c('MOralRdFlncy_01_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_02_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_03_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_04_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_05_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_06_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_07_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_08_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_09_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_10_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_11_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_12_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_13_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_14_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_15_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_16_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_17_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_18_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_19_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_20_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_21_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_22_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_23_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_24_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_25_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_26_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_27_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_28_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_29_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_30_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_31_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_32_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_33_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_34_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_35_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_36_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_37_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_38_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_39_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_40_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_41_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_42_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_43_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_44_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_45_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_46_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_47_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_48_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_49_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_50_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_51_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_52_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_53_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_54_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_55_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_56_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_57_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_58_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_59_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_60_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_61_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_62_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_63_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_64_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_65_n', 'MOralRdFlncy_66_n')

MReadCompList <- c('MReadComp_01_n', 'MReadComp_02_n', 'MReadComp_03_n', 'MReadComp_04_n', 'MReadComp_05_n')

MDictation_01List <- c('MDictation_01_01_n', 'MDictation_01_02_n', 'MDictation_01_03_n', 'MDictation_01_04_n', 'MDictation_01_05_n')

MDictation_02List <- c('MDictation_02_01_n', 'MDictation_02_02_n', 'MDictation_02_03_n')

MstudentOutliers <- merge(Mstudentsurveylong, OutlierParticipantIdList, by.x='MStudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE) 

MEGRASansOutlier <- MstudentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGRA subsection
MListeningCompItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MListeningCompList]
MPhonAwareItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MPhonAwareList]
MLetSoundItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MLetSoundList]
MInventWordItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MInventWordList]
MRealWordsItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MRealWordsList]
MOralRdFlncyItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MOralRdFlncyList]
MReadCompItems <- MEGRASansOutlier[MReadCompList]
MDictation_01Items <- MEGRASansOutlier[MDictation_01List]
MDictation_02Items <- MEGRASansOutlier[MDictation_02List]

## put all of the EGRA subsections together with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGRA items
MEGRAItems <- cbind(MListeningCompItems, MPhonAwareItems, MLetSoundItems, MInventWordItems, MRealWordsItems, MOralRdFlncyItems, MReadCompItems, MDictation_01Items, MDictation_02Items)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGRA items dataframe
MEGRAItems[is.na(MEGRAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers of each item by first calculating the colMeans for each item
item.diffMEGRA <- colMeans(MEGRAItems)
item.diffMEGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffMEGRA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsMEGRA <- ncol(MEGRAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsMEGRA <- nrow(MEGRAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreMEGRA <- rowSums(MEGRAItems) ## total score

item.discMEGRA <- numeric(n.itemsMEGRA)    ## output vector
for(i in 1:n.itemsMEGRA){                 ## sequence
  item.discMEGRA[i] <- cor(total.scoreMEGRA, MEGRAItems[,i], "pairwise.complete.obs","spearman")  # body
}
item.discMEGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.discMEGRA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xMEGRA <- var(total.scoreMEGRA)*(n.studentsMEGRA-1)/n.studentsMEGRA

## calculate observed score of variance of each item
var.yMEGRA <- numeric(n.itemsMEGRA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsMEGRA){
	var.yMEGRA[i] <- var(MEGRAItems[,i])*(n.studentsMEGRA-1)/n.studentsMEGRA
	}

var.yMEGRADF <- as.data.frame(var.yMEGRA)

## calculate alpha for MEGRA test
alphaMEGRA <- (n.itemsMEGRA/(n.itemsMEGRA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yMEGRA)/var.xMEGRA)
alphaMEGRADisplay <- round(alphaMEGRA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdMEGRA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreMEGRA)*(n.studentsMEGRA-1)/n.studentsMEGRA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seMEGRA <- sdMEGRA*sqrt(1-alphaMEGRA)
seMEGRADisplay <- round(seMEGRA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
MEGRADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffMEGRADF, var.yMEGRADF, item.discMEGRADF)

MEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(MEGRADiffDiscDF)

MEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('B*', '', MEGRADiffDiscDF$Item) 
MEGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', MEGRADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .5 & item.discMEGRA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .85 & item.diffMEGRA > .5 & item.discMEGRA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA > .85 & item.discMEGRA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGRA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .5 & item.discMEGRA <= .3 & item.discMEGRA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .85 & item.diffMEGRA > .5 & item.discMEGRA <= .3 & item.discMEGRA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA > .85 & item.discMEGRA <= .3 & item.discMEGRA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairMEGRA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .5 & item.discMEGRA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA <= .85 & item.diffMEGRA > .5 & item.discMEGRA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodMEGRA, Item)

## filter the MEGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGRA <- MEGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGRA > .85 & item.discMEGRA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGRA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGRAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantMEGRAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=2, 2.7)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 7, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsMEGRA` students completed the Midline level 1 EGRA exam.

<br/>

`r alphaMEGRADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seMEGRADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGRA`

#### EGMA Item Analysis Results Level 1 Baseline

The Level 1 Baseline EGMA contains a total of 96 items in 8 subsections as follows: Number Identification (20 items), Number Discrimination (10 items), Missing Number (10 items), Addition Level 1 (20 items), Addition Level 2 (5 items), Subtraction Level 1 (20 items), Subtraction Level 2 (5 items), Word Problem (8 items).

<br/>

```{r Baseline Level 1 EGMA Item Analysis, include=TRUE}
BNumIdentifyList <- c('BNumIdentify_01_n', 'BNumIdentify_02_n', 'BNumIdentify_03_n', 'BNumIdentify_04_n', 'BNumIdentify_05_n', 'BNumIdentify_06_n', 'BNumIdentify_07_n', 'BNumIdentify_08_n', 'BNumIdentify_09_n', 'BNumIdentify_10_n', 'BNumIdentify_11_n', 'BNumIdentify_12_n', 'BNumIdentify_13_n', 'BNumIdentify_14_n', 'BNumIdentify_15_n', 'BNumIdentify_16_n', 'BNumIdentify_17_n', 'BNumIdentify_18_n', 'BNumIdentify_19_n', 'BNumIdentify_20_n')

BNumDiscList <- c('BNumDisc_01_n', 'BNumDisc_02_n', 'BNumDisc_03_n', 'BNumDisc_04_n', 'BNumDisc_05_n', 'BNumDisc_06_n', 'BNumDisc_07_n', 'BNumDisc_08_n', 'BNumDisc_09_n', 'BNumDisc_10_n')

BMissNumList <- c('BMissNum_01_n', 'BMissNum_02_n', 'BMissNum_03_n', 'BMissNum_04_n', 'BMissNum_05_n', 'BMissNum_06_n', 'BMissNum_07_n', 'BMissNum_08_n', 'BMissNum_09_n', 'BMissNum_10_n')

BAddLvl1List <- c('BAddLvl1_01_n', 'BAddLvl1_02_n', 'BAddLvl1_03_n', 'BAddLvl1_04_n', 'BAddLvl1_05_n', 'BAddLvl1_06_n', 'BAddLvl1_07_n', 'BAddLvl1_08_n', 'BAddLvl1_09_n', 'BAddLvl1_10_n', 'BAddLvl1_11_n', 'BAddLvl1_12_n', 'BAddLvl1_13_n', 'BAddLvl1_14_n', 'BAddLvl1_15_n', 'BAddLvl1_16_n', 'BAddLvl1_17_n', 'BAddLvl1_18_n', 'BAddLvl1_19_n', 'BAddLvl1_20_n')

BAddLvl2List <- c('BAddLvl2_01_n', 'BAddLvl2_02_n', 'BAddLvl2_03_n', 'BAddLvl2_04_n', 'BAddLvl2_05_n')

BSubLvl1List <- c('BSubLvl1_01_n', 'BSubLvl1_02_n', 'BSubLvl1_03_n', 'BSubLvl1_04_n', 'BSubLvl1_05_n', 'BSubLvl1_06_n', 'BSubLvl1_07_n', 'BSubLvl1_08_n', 'BSubLvl1_09_n', 'BSubLvl1_10_n', 'BSubLvl1_11_n', 'BSubLvl1_12_n', 'BSubLvl1_13_n', 'BSubLvl1_14_n', 'BSubLvl1_15_n', 'BSubLvl1_16_n', 'BSubLvl1_17_n', 'BSubLvl1_18_n', 'BSubLvl1_19_n', 'BSubLvl1_20_n')

BSubLvl2List <- c('BSubLvl2_01_n', 'BSubLvl2_02_n', 'BSubLvl2_03_n', 'BSubLvl2_04_n', 'BSubLvl2_05_n')

BWordProbList <- c('BWordProb_01_n', 'BWordProb_02_n', 'BWordProb_03_n', 'BWordProb_04_n', 'BWordProb_05_n', 'BWordProb_06_n')

BEGMASansOutlier <- BstudentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGMA subsection
BNumIdentifyItems <- BEGMASansOutlier[BNumIdentifyList]
BNumDiscItems <- BEGMASansOutlier[BNumDiscList]
BMissNumItems <- BEGMASansOutlier[BMissNumList]
BAddLvl1Items <- BEGMASansOutlier[BAddLvl1List]
BAddLvl2Items <- BEGMASansOutlier[BAddLvl2List]
BSubLvl1Items <- BEGMASansOutlier[BSubLvl1List]
BSubLvl2Items <- BEGMASansOutlier[BSubLvl2List]
BWordProbItems <- BEGMASansOutlier[BWordProbList]

## put all of the EGMA subsections togethre with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGMA items
BEGMAItems <- cbind(BNumIdentifyItems, BNumDiscItems, BMissNumItems, BAddLvl1Items, BAddLvl2Items, BSubLvl1Items, BSubLvl2Items, BWordProbItems)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGMA items dataframe
BEGMAItems[is.na(BEGMAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers for each item by first calculating the colMeans of each item
item.diffBEGMA <- colMeans(BEGMAItems)
item.diffBEGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffBEGMA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsBEGMA <- ncol(BEGMAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsBEGMA <- nrow(BEGMAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreBEGMA <- rowSums(BEGMAItems) ## total score

item.discBEGMA <- numeric(n.itemsBEGMA)    ## output vector
for (i in 1:n.itemsBEGMA) {               ## sequence
     item.discBEGMA[i] <- cor(total.scoreBEGMA, BEGMAItems[,i],
	 "pairwise.complete.obs", "spearman")   ## body
}
item.discBEGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.discBEGMA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xBEGMA <- var(total.scoreBEGMA)*(n.studentsBEGMA-1)/n.studentsBEGMA

## calculate observed score variance of each item
var.yBEGMA <- numeric(n.itemsBEGMA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsBEGMA){
	var.yBEGMA[i] <- var(BEGMAItems[,i])*(n.studentsBEGMA-1)/n.studentsBEGMA
	}
var.yBEGMADF <- as.data.frame(var.yBEGMA)	
	
## calculate alpha for EGMA test
alphaBEGMA <- (n.itemsBEGMA/(n.itemsBEGMA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yBEGMA)/var.xBEGMA)
alphaBEGMADisplay <- round(alphaBEGMA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdBEGMA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreBEGMA)*(n.studentsBEGMA-1)/n.studentsBEGMA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seBEGMA <- sdBEGMA*sqrt(1-alphaBEGMA)
seBEGMADisplay <- round(seBEGMA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
BEGMADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffBEGMADF, var.yBEGMADF, item.discBEGMADF)

BEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(BEGMADiffDiscDF)

BEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('B*', '', BEGMADiffDiscDF$Item)
BEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', BEGMADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .5 & item.discBEGMA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .85 & item.diffBEGMA > .5 & item.discBEGMA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA > .85 & item.discBEGMA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGMA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .5 & item.discBEGMA <= .3 & item.discBEGMA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .85 & item.diffBEGMA > .5 & item.discBEGMA <= .3 & item.discBEGMA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA > .85 & item.discBEGMA <= .3 & item.discBEGMA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairBEGMA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .5 & item.discBEGMA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA <= .85 & item.diffBEGMA > .5 & item.discBEGMA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodBEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGMA <- BEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBEGMA > .85 & item.discBEGMA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGMA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodBEGMAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantBEGMAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=2, 2.5)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsBEGMA` students completed the Baseline level 1 EGMA exam.

<br/>

`r alphaBEGMADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seBEGMADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantBEGMA`

#### EGMA Item Analysis Results Level 1 Endline

```{r Endline Level 1 EGMA Item Analysis, include=TRUE}
MNumIdentifyList <- c('MNumIdentify_01_n', 'MNumIdentify_02_n', 'MNumIdentify_03_n', 'MNumIdentify_04_n', 'MNumIdentify_05_n', 'MNumIdentify_06_n', 'MNumIdentify_07_n', 'MNumIdentify_08_n', 'MNumIdentify_09_n', 'MNumIdentify_10_n', 'MNumIdentify_11_n', 'MNumIdentify_12_n', 'MNumIdentify_13_n', 'MNumIdentify_14_n', 'MNumIdentify_15_n', 'MNumIdentify_16_n', 'MNumIdentify_17_n', 'MNumIdentify_18_n', 'MNumIdentify_19_n', 'MNumIdentify_20_n')

MNumDiscList <- c('MNumDisc_01_n', 'MNumDisc_02_n', 'MNumDisc_03_n', 'MNumDisc_04_n', 'MNumDisc_05_n', 'MNumDisc_06_n', 'MNumDisc_07_n', 'MNumDisc_08_n', 'MNumDisc_09_n', 'MNumDisc_10_n')

MMissNumList <- c('MMissNum_01_n', 'MMissNum_02_n', 'MMissNum_03_n', 'MMissNum_04_n', 'MMissNum_05_n', 'MMissNum_06_n', 'MMissNum_07_n', 'MMissNum_08_n', 'MMissNum_09_n', 'MMissNum_10_n')

MAddLvl1List <- c('MAddLvl1_01_n', 'MAddLvl1_02_n', 'MAddLvl1_03_n', 'MAddLvl1_04_n', 'MAddLvl1_05_n', 'MAddLvl1_06_n', 'MAddLvl1_07_n', 'MAddLvl1_08_n', 'MAddLvl1_09_n', 'MAddLvl1_10_n', 'MAddLvl1_11_n', 'MAddLvl1_12_n', 'MAddLvl1_13_n', 'MAddLvl1_14_n', 'MAddLvl1_15_n', 'MAddLvl1_16_n', 'MAddLvl1_17_n', 'MAddLvl1_18_n', 'MAddLvl1_19_n', 'MAddLvl1_20_n')

MAddLvl2List <- c('MAddLvl2_01_n', 'MAddLvl2_02_n', 'MAddLvl2_03_n', 'MAddLvl2_04_n', 'MAddLvl2_05_n')

MSubLvl1List <- c('MSubLvl1_01_n', 'MSubLvl1_02_n', 'MSubLvl1_03_n', 'MSubLvl1_04_n', 'MSubLvl1_05_n', 'MSubLvl1_06_n', 'MSubLvl1_07_n', 'MSubLvl1_08_n', 'MSubLvl1_09_n', 'MSubLvl1_10_n', 'MSubLvl1_11_n', 'MSubLvl1_12_n', 'MSubLvl1_13_n', 'MSubLvl1_14_n', 'MSubLvl1_15_n', 'MSubLvl1_16_n', 'MSubLvl1_17_n', 'MSubLvl1_18_n', 'MSubLvl1_19_n', 'MSubLvl1_20_n')

MSubLvl2List <- c('MSubLvl2_01_n', 'MSubLvl2_02_n', 'MSubLvl2_03_n', 'MSubLvl2_04_n', 'MSubLvl2_05_n')

MWordProbList <- c('MWordProb_01_n', 'MWordProb_02_n', 'MWordProb_03_n', 'MWordProb_04_n', 'MWordProb_05_n', 'MWordProb_06_n')

MEGMASansOutlier <- MstudentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGMA subsection
MNumIdentifyItems <- MEGMASansOutlier[MNumIdentifyList]
MNumDiscItems <- MEGMASansOutlier[MNumDiscList]
MMissNumItems <- MEGMASansOutlier[MMissNumList]
MAddLvl1Items <- MEGMASansOutlier[MAddLvl1List]
MAddLvl2Items <- MEGMASansOutlier[MAddLvl2List]
MSubLvl1Items <- MEGMASansOutlier[MSubLvl1List]
MSubLvl2Items <- MEGMASansOutlier[MSubLvl2List]
MWordProbItems <- MEGMASansOutlier[MWordProbList]

## put all of the EGMA subsections togethre with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGMA items
MEGMAItems <- cbind(MNumIdentifyItems, MNumDiscItems, MMissNumItems, MAddLvl1Items, MAddLvl2Items, MSubLvl1Items, MSubLvl2Items, MWordProbItems)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGMA items dataframe
MEGMAItems[is.na(MEGMAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers for each item by first calculating the colMeans of each item
item.diffMEGMA <- colMeans(MEGMAItems)
item.diffMEGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffMEGMA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsMEGMA <- ncol(MEGMAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsMEGMA <- nrow(MEGMAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreMEGMA <- rowSums(MEGMAItems) ## total score

item.discMEGMA <- numeric(n.itemsMEGMA)    ## output vector
for (i in 1:n.itemsMEGMA) {               ## sequence
     item.discMEGMA[i] <- cor(total.scoreMEGMA, MEGMAItems[,i],
	 "pairwise.complete.obs", "spearman")   ## body
}
item.discMEGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.discMEGMA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xMEGMA <- var(total.scoreMEGMA)*(n.studentsMEGMA-1)/n.studentsMEGMA

## calculate observed score variance of each item
var.yMEGMA <- numeric(n.itemsMEGMA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsMEGMA){
	var.yMEGMA[i] <- var(MEGMAItems[,i])*(n.studentsMEGMA-1)/n.studentsMEGMA
	}
var.yMEGMADF <- as.data.frame(var.yMEGMA)	
	
## calculate alpha for EGMA test
alphaMEGMA <- (n.itemsMEGMA/(n.itemsMEGMA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yMEGMA)/var.xMEGMA)
alphaMEGMADisplay <- round(alphaMEGMA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdMEGMA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreMEGMA)*(n.studentsMEGMA-1)/n.studentsMEGMA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seMEGMA <- sdMEGMA*sqrt(1-alphaMEGMA)
seMEGMADisplay <- round(seMEGMA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
MEGMADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffMEGMADF, var.yMEGMADF, item.discMEGMADF)

MEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(MEGMADiffDiscDF)

MEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('B*', '', MEGMADiffDiscDF$Item)
MEGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', MEGMADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .5 & item.discMEGMA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .85 & item.diffMEGMA > .5 & item.discMEGMA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA > .85 & item.discMEGMA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGMA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .5 & item.discMEGMA <= .3 & item.discMEGMA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .85 & item.diffMEGMA > .5 & item.discMEGMA <= .3 & item.discMEGMA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA > .85 & item.discMEGMA <= .3 & item.discMEGMA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairMEGMA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .5 & item.discMEGMA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA <= .85 & item.diffMEGMA > .5 & item.discMEGMA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodMEGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGMA <- MEGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffMEGMA > .85 & item.discMEGMA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGMA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodMEGMAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantMEGMAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=2, 2.5)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsMEGMA` students completed the Midline level 1 EGMA exam.

<br/>

`r alphaMEGMADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seMEGMADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantMEGMA`

### Level 2 EGRA and EGMA Item Analysis (Discrimination and Difficulty)

#### EGRA Item Aanlysis Results Level 2 Baseline

The Level 2 Baseline EGRA contains a total of 324 items in 9 subsections as follows: Listening Comprehension (7 items), Phonemic Awareness (10 items), Letter Sound Identification (100 items), Invented Words (50 items), Familiar/Real Words (49 items), Oral Reading Fluency (91 items), Reading Comprehension (8 items), Dictation 01 (5 items), Dictation 02 (4 items).  

<br/>

```{r Baseline Level 2 EGRA Item Analysis}
BL2ListeningCompList <- c('BL2ListeningComp_01_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_02_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_03_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_04_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_05_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_06_n', 'BL2ListeningComp_07_n')

BL2PhonAwareList <- c('BL2PhonAware_01_n', 'BL2PhonAware_02_n', 'BL2PhonAware_03_n', 'BL2PhonAware_04_n', 'BL2PhonAware_05_n', 'BL2PhonAware_06_n', 'BL2PhonAware_07_n', 'BL2PhonAware_08_n', 'BL2PhonAware_09_n', 'BL2PhonAware_10_n')

BL2LetSoundList <- c('BL2LetSound_01_n', 'BL2LetSound_02_n', 'BL2LetSound_03_n', 'BL2LetSound_04_n', 'BL2LetSound_05_n', 'BL2LetSound_06_n', 'BL2LetSound_07_n', 'BL2LetSound_08_n', 'BL2LetSound_09_n', 'BL2LetSound_10_n', 'BL2LetSound_11_n', 'BL2LetSound_12_n', 'BL2LetSound_13_n', 'BL2LetSound_14_n', 'BL2LetSound_15_n', 'BL2LetSound_16_n', 'BL2LetSound_17_n', 'BL2LetSound_18_n', 'BL2LetSound_19_n', 'BL2LetSound_30_n', 'BL2LetSound_31_n', 'BL2LetSound_32_n', 'BL2LetSound_33_n', 'BL2LetSound_34_n', 'BL2LetSound_35_n', 'BL2LetSound_36_n', 'BL2LetSound_37_n', 'BL2LetSound_38_n', 'BL2LetSound_39_n', 'BL2LetSound_40_n', 'BL2LetSound_41_n', 'BL2LetSound_42_n', 'BL2LetSound_43_n', 'BL2LetSound_44_n', 'BL2LetSound_45_n', 'BL2LetSound_46_n', 'BL2LetSound_47_n', 'BL2LetSound_48_n', 'BL2LetSound_49_n', 'BL2LetSound_50_n', 'BL2LetSound_51_n', 'BL2LetSound_52_n', 'BL2LetSound_53_n', 'BL2LetSound_54_n', 'BL2LetSound_55_n', 'BL2LetSound_56_n', 'BL2LetSound_57_n', 'BL2LetSound_58_n', 'BL2LetSound_59_n', 'BL2LetSound_60_n', 'BL2LetSound_61_n', 'BL2LetSound_62_n', 'BL2LetSound_63_n', 'BL2LetSound_64_n', 'BL2LetSound_65_n', 'BL2LetSound_66_n', 'BL2LetSound_67_n', 'BL2LetSound_68_n', 'BL2LetSound_69_n', 'BL2LetSound_70_n', 'BL2LetSound_71_n', 'BL2LetSound_72_n', 'BL2LetSound_73_n', 'BL2LetSound_74_n', 'BL2LetSound_75_n', 'BL2LetSound_76_n', 'BL2LetSound_77_n', 'BL2LetSound_78_n', 'BL2LetSound_79_n', 'BL2LetSound_80_n', 'BL2LetSound_81_n', 'BL2LetSound_82_n', 'BL2LetSound_83_n', 'BL2LetSound_84_n', 'BL2LetSound_85_n', 'BL2LetSound_86_n', 'BL2LetSound_87_n', 'BL2LetSound_88_n', 'BL2LetSound_89_n', 'BL2LetSound_90_n', 'BL2LetSound_91_n', 'BL2LetSound_92_n', 'BL2LetSound_93_n', 'BL2LetSound_94_n', 'BL2LetSound_95_n', 'BL2LetSound_96_n', 'BL2LetSound_97_n', 'BL2LetSound_98_n', 'BL2LetSound_99_n', 'BL2LetSound_100_n')

BL2InventWordList <- c('BL2InventWord_01_n', 'BL2InventWord_02_n', 'BL2InventWord_03_n', 'BL2InventWord_04_n', 'BL2InventWord_05_n', 'BL2InventWord_06_n', 'BL2InventWord_07_n', 'BL2InventWord_08_n', 'BL2InventWord_09_n', 'BL2InventWord_10_n', 'BL2InventWord_11_n', 'BL2InventWord_12_n', 'BL2InventWord_13_n', 'BL2InventWord_14_n', 'BL2InventWord_15_n', 'BL2InventWord_16_n', 'BL2InventWord_17_n', 'BL2InventWord_18_n', 'BL2InventWord_19_n', 'BL2InventWord_20_n', 'BL2InventWord_21_n', 'BL2InventWord_22_n', 'BL2InventWord_23_n', 'BL2InventWord_24_n', 'BL2InventWord_25_n', 'BL2InventWord_26_n', 'BL2InventWord_27_n', 'BL2InventWord_28_n', 'BL2InventWord_29_n', 'BL2InventWord_30_n', 'BL2InventWord_31_n', 'BL2InventWord_32_n', 'BL2InventWord_33_n', 'BL2InventWord_34_n', 'BL2InventWord_35_n', 'BL2InventWord_36_n', 'BL2InventWord_37_n', 'BL2InventWord_38_n', 'BL2InventWord_39_n', 'BL2InventWord_40_n', 'BL2InventWord_41_n', 'BL2InventWord_42_n', 'BL2InventWord_43_n', 'BL2InventWord_44_n', 'BL2InventWord_45_n', 'BL2InventWord_46_n', 'BL2InventWord_47_n', 'BL2InventWord_48_n', 'BL2InventWord_49_n', 'BL2InventWord_50_n')

BL2RealWordsList <- c('BL2RealWords_01_n', 'BL2RealWords_02_n', 'BL2RealWords_03_n', 'BL2RealWords_04_n', 'BL2RealWords_05_n', 'BL2RealWords_06_n', 'BL2RealWords_07_n', 'BL2RealWords_08_n', 'BL2RealWords_09_n', 'BL2RealWords_10_n', 'BL2RealWords_11_n', 'BL2RealWords_12_n', 'BL2RealWords_13_n', 'BL2RealWords_14_n', 'BL2RealWords_15_n', 'BL2RealWords_16_n', 'BL2RealWords_17_n', 'BL2RealWords_18_n', 'BL2RealWords_19_n', 'BL2RealWords_20_n', 'BL2RealWords_21_n', 'BL2RealWords_22_n', 'BL2RealWords_23_n', 'BL2RealWords_24_n', 'BL2RealWords_25_n', 'BL2RealWords_26_n', 'BL2RealWords_27_n', 'BL2RealWords_28_n', 'BL2RealWords_29_n', 'BL2RealWords_30_n', 'BL2RealWords_31_n', 'BL2RealWords_32_n', 'BL2RealWords_33_n', 'BL2RealWords_34_n', 'BL2RealWords_35_n', 'BL2RealWords_36_n', 'BL2RealWords_37_n', 'BL2RealWords_38_n', 'BL2RealWords_39_n', 'BL2RealWords_40_n', 'BL2RealWords_41_n', 'BL2RealWords_42_n', 'BL2RealWords_43_n', 'BL2RealWords_44_n', 'BL2RealWords_45_n', 'BL2RealWords_46_n', 'BL2RealWords_47_n', 'BL2RealWords_48_n', 'BL2RealWords_49_n')

BL2OralRdFlncyList <- c('BL2OralRdFlncy_01_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_02_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_03_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_04_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_05_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_06_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_07_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_08_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_09_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_10_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_11_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_12_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_13_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_14_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_15_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_16_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_17_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_18_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_19_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_20_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_21_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_22_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_23_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_24_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_25_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_26_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_27_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_28_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_29_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_30_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_31_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_32_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_33_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_34_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_35_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_36_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_37_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_38_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_39_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_40_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_41_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_42_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_43_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_44_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_45_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_46_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_47_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_48_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_49_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_50_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_51_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_52_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_53_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_54_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_55_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_56_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_57_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_58_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_59_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_60_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_61_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_62_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_63_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_64_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_65_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_66_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_67_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_68_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_69_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_70_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_71_n',
'BL2OralRdFlncy_72_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_73_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_74_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_75_n',
'BL2OralRdFlncy_76_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_77_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_78_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_79_n',
'BL2OralRdFlncy_80_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_81_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_82_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_83_n',
'BL2OralRdFlncy_84_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_85_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_86_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_87_n',
'BL2OralRdFlncy_88_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_89_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_90_n', 'BL2OralRdFlncy_91_n')

BL2ReadCompList <- c('BL2ReadComp_01_n', 'BL2ReadComp_02_n', 'BL2ReadComp_03_n', 'BL2ReadComp_04_n', 'BL2ReadComp_05_n', 'BL2ReadComp_06_n', 'BL2ReadComp_07_n', 'BL2ReadComp_08_n')

BL2Dictation_01List <- c('BL2Dictation_01_01_n', 'BL2Dictation_01_02_n', 'BL2Dictation_01_03_n', 'BL2Dictation_01_04_n', 'BL2Dictation_01_05_n')

BL2Dictation_02List <- c('BL2Dictation_02_01_n', 'BL2Dictation_02_02_n', 'BL2Dictation_02_03_n', 'BL2Dictation_02_04_n')

BL2studentOutliers <- merge(BL2studentsurveylonglocate, OutlierParticipantIdList, by.x='BL2StudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

BL2EGRASansOutlier <- BL2studentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGRA subsection
BL2ListeningCompItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2ListeningCompList]
BL2PhonAwareItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2PhonAwareList]
BL2LetSoundItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2LetSoundList]
BL2InventWordItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2InventWordList]
BL2RealWordsItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2RealWordsList]
BL2OralRdFlncyItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2OralRdFlncyList]
BL2ReadCompItems <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2ReadCompList]
BL2Dictation_01Items <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2Dictation_01List]
BL2Dictation_02Items <- BL2EGRASansOutlier[BL2Dictation_02List]

## put all of the EGRA subsections together with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGRA items
BL2EGRAItems <- cbind(BL2ListeningCompItems, BL2PhonAwareItems, BL2LetSoundItems, BL2InventWordItems, BL2RealWordsItems, BL2OralRdFlncyItems, BL2ReadCompItems, BL2Dictation_01Items, BL2Dictation_02Items)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGRA items dataframe
BL2EGRAItems[is.na(BL2EGRAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers of each item by first calculating the colMeans for each item
item.diffBL2EGRA <- colMeans(BL2EGRAItems)
item.diffBL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffBL2EGRA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsBL2EGRA <- ncol(BL2EGRAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsBL2EGRA <- nrow(BL2EGRAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreBL2EGRA <- rowSums(BL2EGRAItems) ## total score

item.discBL2EGRA <- numeric(n.itemsBL2EGRA)    ## output vector
for(i in 1:n.itemsBL2EGRA){                 ## sequence
  item.discBL2EGRA[i] <- cor(total.scoreBL2EGRA, BL2EGRAItems[,i], "pairwise.complete.obs","spearman")  # body
}
item.discBL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.discBL2EGRA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xBL2EGRA <- var(total.scoreBL2EGRA)*(n.studentsBL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGRA

## calculate observed score of variance of each item
var.yBL2EGRA <- numeric(n.itemsBL2EGRA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsBL2EGRA){
	var.yBL2EGRA[i] <- var(BL2EGRAItems[,i])*(n.studentsBL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGRA
	}

var.yBL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(var.yBL2EGRA)

## calculate alpha for EGRA test
alphaBL2EGRA <- (n.itemsBL2EGRA/(n.itemsBL2EGRA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yBL2EGRA)/var.xBL2EGRA)
alphaBL2EGRADisplay <- round(alphaBL2EGRA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdBL2EGRA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreBL2EGRA)*(n.studentsBL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGRA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seBL2EGRA <- sdBL2EGRA*sqrt(1-alphaBL2EGRA)
seBL2EGRADisplay <- round(seBL2EGRA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
BL2EGRADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffBL2EGRADF, var.yBL2EGRADF, item.discBL2EGRADF)

BL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(BL2EGRADiffDiscDF)

BL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('BL2*', '', BL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item) 
BL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', BL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGRA > .5 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA > .85 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGRA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGRA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGRA > .5 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGRA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA > .85 & item.discBL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGRA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGRA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGRA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGRA > .5 & item.discBL2EGRA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGRA <- BL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGRA > .85 & item.discBL2EGRA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGRA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=2, 2.7)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 7, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsBL2EGRA` students completed the Baseline level 2 EGRA exam.  The following matrix shows the baseline level 2 results from the item analysis in a matrix format.  The three columns indicate the difficulty level results from hard with a difficulty ranging from 0 to .5, then medium with a difficulty ranging from .51 to .85, and finally easy with a difficulty from .86 to 1.  While the rows down the left side indicate the discrimination analysis results from poor with a discrimination index less than or equal to .1, then fair with a discrimination index less than .3 but greater than .1, and finally good with a discrimination index greater than .3.  As you can see none of the EGRA items fall in the poor discrimination category and only two items are in the fair discrimination category, with a majority of the items falling into the good discrimination category.  A majority of the items are also in the hard level of difficulty, but this is expected due to this being a baseline exam.  

<br/>

`r alphaBL2EGRADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seBL2EGRADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

*Difficulty* - the percentage of students answering the question correctly. 

<br/>

*Discrimination* - the correlation of responses to individual items with overall test score. The higher the correlation, the more the item results are consistent with the test as a whole.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGRA`

<br/>

#### EGRA Item Aanlysis Results Level 2 Endline

The Level 2 Endline EGRA contains a total of 324 items in 9 subsections as follows: Listening Comprehension (7 items), Phonemic Awareness (10 items), Letter Sound Identification (100 items), Invented Words (50 items), Familiar/Real Words (49 items), Oral Reading Fluency (91 items), Reading Comprehension (8 items), Dictation 01 (5 items), Dictation 02 (4 items).  

<br/>

```{r Endline Level 2 EGRA Item Analysis}
EL2ListeningCompList <- c('EL2ListeningComp_01_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_02_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_03_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_04_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_05_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_06_n', 'EL2ListeningComp_07_n')

EL2PhonAwareList <- c('EL2PhonAware_01_n', 'EL2PhonAware_02_n', 'EL2PhonAware_03_n', 'EL2PhonAware_04_n', 'EL2PhonAware_05_n', 'EL2PhonAware_06_n', 'EL2PhonAware_07_n', 'EL2PhonAware_08_n', 'EL2PhonAware_09_n', 'EL2PhonAware_10_n')

EL2LetSoundList <- c('EL2LetSound_01_n', 'EL2LetSound_02_n', 'EL2LetSound_03_n', 'EL2LetSound_04_n', 'EL2LetSound_05_n', 'EL2LetSound_06_n', 'EL2LetSound_07_n', 'EL2LetSound_08_n', 'EL2LetSound_09_n',
```
