'EL2LetSound_20_n', 'EL2LetSound_21_n', 'EL2LetSound_22_n', 'EL2LetSound_23_n', 'EL2LetSound_24_n', 'EL2LetSound_25_n', 'EL2LetSound_26_n', 'EL2LetSound_27_n', 'EL2LetSound_28_n', 'EL2LetSound_29_n', 'EL2LetSound_30_n', 'EL2LetSound_31_n', 'EL2LetSound_32_n', 'EL2LetSound_33_n', 'EL2LetSound_34_n', 'EL2LetSound_35_n', 'EL2LetSound_36_n', 'EL2LetSound_37_n', 'EL2LetSound_38_n', 'EL2LetSound_39_n', 'EL2LetSound_40_n', 'EL2LetSound_41_n', 'EL2LetSound_42_n', 'EL2LetSound_43_n', 'EL2LetSound_44_n', 'EL2LetSound_45_n', 'EL2LetSound_46_n', 'EL2LetSound_47_n', 'EL2LetSound_48_n', 'EL2LetSound_49_n', 'EL2LetSound_50_n', 'EL2LetSound_51_n', 'EL2LetSound_52_n', 'EL2LetSound_53_n', 'EL2LetSound_54_n', 'EL2LetSound_55_n', 'EL2LetSound_56_n', 'EL2LetSound_57_n', 'EL2LetSound_58_n', 'EL2LetSound_59_n', 'EL2LetSound_60_n', 'EL2LetSound_61_n', 'EL2LetSound_62_n', 'EL2LetSound_63_n', 'EL2LetSound_64_n', 'EL2LetSound_65_n', 'EL2LetSound_66_n', 'EL2LetSound_67_n', 'EL2LetSound_68_n', 'EL2LetSound_69_n', 'EL2LetSound_70_n', 'EL2LetSound_71_n', 'EL2LetSound_72_n', 'EL2LetSound_73_n', 'EL2LetSound_74_n', 'EL2LetSound_75_n', 'EL2LetSound_76_n', 'EL2LetSound_77_n', 'EL2LetSound_78_n', 'EL2LetSound_79_n', 'EL2LetSound_80_n', 'EL2LetSound_81_n', 'EL2LetSound_82_n', 'EL2LetSound_83_n', 'EL2LetSound_84_n', 'EL2LetSound_85_n', 'EL2LetSound_86_n', 'EL2LetSound_87_n', 'EL2LetSound_88_n', 'EL2LetSound_89_n', 'EL2LetSound_90_n', 'EL2LetSound_91_n', 'EL2LetSound_92_n', 'EL2LetSound_93_n', 'EL2LetSound_94_n', 'EL2LetSound_95_n', 'EL2LetSound_96_n', 'EL2LetSound_97_n', 'EL2LetSound_98_n', 'EL2LetSound_99_n', 'EL2LetSound_100_n')

```{r Endline Level 2 EGRA Item Analysis}
EL2InventWordList <- c('EL2InventWord_01_n', 'EL2InventWord_02_n', 'EL2InventWord_03_n', 'EL2InventWord_04_n', 'EL2InventWord_05_n', 'EL2InventWord_06_n', 'EL2InventWord_07_n', 'EL2InventWord_08_n', 'EL2InventWord_09_n', 'EL2InventWord_10_n', 'EL2InventWord_11_n', 'EL2InventWord_12_n', 'EL2InventWord_13_n', 'EL2InventWord_14_n', 'EL2InventWord_15_n', 'EL2InventWord_16_n', 'EL2InventWord_17_n', 'EL2InventWord_18_n', 'EL2InventWord_19_n', 'EL2InventWord_20_n', 'EL2InventWord_21_n', 'EL2InventWord_22_n', 'EL2InventWord_23_n', 'EL2InventWord_24_n', 'EL2InventWord_25_n', 'EL2InventWord_26_n', 'EL2InventWord_27_n', 'EL2InventWord_28_n', 'EL2InventWord_29_n', 'EL2InventWord_30_n', 'EL2InventWord_31_n', 'EL2InventWord_32_n', 'EL2InventWord_33_n', 'EL2InventWord_34_n', 'EL2InventWord_35_n', 'EL2InventWord_36_n', 'EL2InventWord_37_n', 'EL2InventWord_38_n', 'EL2InventWord_39_n', 'EL2InventWord_40_n', 'EL2InventWord_41_n', 'EL2InventWord_42_n', 'EL2InventWord_43_n', 'EL2InventWord_44_n', 'EL2InventWord_45_n', 'EL2InventWord_46_n', 'EL2InventWord_47_n', 'EL2InventWord_48_n', 'EL2InventWord_49_n', 'EL2InventWord_50_n')

EL2RealWordsList <- c('EL2RealWords_01_n', 'EL2RealWords_02_n', 'EL2RealWords_03_n', 'EL2RealWords_04_n', 'EL2RealWords_05_n', 'EL2RealWords_06_n', 'EL2RealWords_07_n', 'EL2RealWords_08_n', 'EL2RealWords_09_n', 'EL2RealWords_10_n', 'EL2RealWords_11_n', 'EL2RealWords_12_n', 'EL2RealWords_13_n', 'EL2RealWords_14_n', 'EL2RealWords_15_n', 'EL2RealWords_16_n', 'EL2RealWords_17_n', 'EL2RealWords_18_n', 'EL2RealWords_19_n', 'EL2RealWords_20_n', 'EL2RealWords_21_n', 'EL2RealWords_22_n', 'EL2RealWords_23_n', 'EL2RealWords_24_n', 'EL2RealWords_25_n', 'EL2RealWords_26_n', 'EL2RealWords_27_n', 'EL2RealWords_28_n', 'EL2RealWords_29_n', 'EL2RealWords_30_n', 'EL2RealWords_31_n', 'EL2RealWords_32_n', 'EL2RealWords_33_n', 'EL2RealWords_34_n', 'EL2RealWords_35_n', 'EL2RealWords_36_n', 'EL2RealWords_37_n', 'EL2RealWords_38_n', 'EL2RealWords_39_n', 'EL2RealWords_40_n', 'EL2RealWords_41_n', 'EL2RealWords_42_n', 'EL2RealWords_43_n', 'EL2RealWords_44_n', 'EL2RealWords_45_n', 'EL2RealWords_46_n', 'EL2RealWords_47_n', 'EL2RealWords_48_n', 'EL2RealWords_49_n')

EL2OralRdFlncyList <- c('EL2OralRdFlncy_01_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_02_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_03_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_04_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_05_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_06_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_07_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_08_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_09_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_10_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_11_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_12_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_13_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_14_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_15_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_16_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_17_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_18_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_19_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_20_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_21_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_22_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_23_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_24_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_25_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_26_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_27_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_28_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_29_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_30_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_31_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_32_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_33_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_34_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_35_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_36_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_37_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_38_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_39_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_40_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_41_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_42_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_43_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_44_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_45_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_46_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_47_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_48_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_49_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_50_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_51_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_52_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_53_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_54_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_55_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_56_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_57_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_58_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_59_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_60_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_61_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_62_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_63_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_64_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_65_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_66_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_67_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_68_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_69_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_70_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_71_n',
'EL2OralRdFlncy_72_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_73_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_74_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_75_n',
'EL2OralRdFlncy_76_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_77_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_78_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_79_n',
'EL2OralRdFlncy_80_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_81_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_82_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_83_n',
'EL2OralRdFlncy_84_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_85_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_86_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_87_n',
'EL2OralRdFlncy_88_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_89_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_90_n', 'EL2OralRdFlncy_91_n')

EL2ReadCompList <- c('EL2ReadComp_01_n', 'EL2ReadComp_02_n', 'EL2ReadComp_03_n', 'EL2ReadComp_04_n', 'EL2ReadComp_05_n', 'EL2ReadComp_06_n', 'EL2ReadComp_07_n', 'EL2ReadComp_08_n')

EL2Dictation_01List <- c('EL2Dictation_01_01_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_02_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_03_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_04_n', 'EL2Dictation_01_05_n')

EL2Dictation_02List <- c('EL2Dictation_02_01_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_02_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_03_n', 'EL2Dictation_02_04_n')

EL2studentOutliers <- merge(EL2studentsurveylonglocate, OutlierParticipantIdList, by.x='EL2StudentId', by.y='BStudentId', all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

EL2EGRASansOutlier <- EL2studentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGRA subsection
EL2ListeningCompItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2ListeningCompList]
EL2PhonAwareItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2PhonAwareList]
EL2LetSoundItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2LetSoundList]
EL2InventWordItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2InventWordList]
EL2RealWordsItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2RealWordsList]
EL2OralRdFlncyItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2OralRdFlncyList]
EL2ReadCompItems <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2ReadCompList]
EL2Dictation_01Items <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2Dictation_01List]
EL2Dictation_02Items <- EL2EGRASansOutlier[EL2Dictation_02List]

## put all of the EGRA subsections together with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGRA items
EL2EGRAItems <- cbind(EL2ListeningCompItems, EL2PhonAwareItems, EL2LetSoundItems, EL2InventWordItems, EL2RealWordsItems, EL2OralRdFlncyItems, EL2ReadCompItems, EL2Dictation_01Items, EL2Dictation_02Items)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGRA items dataframe
EL2EGRAItems[is.na(EL2EGRAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers of each item by first calculating the colMeans for each item
item.diffEL2EGRA <- colMeans(EL2EGRAItems)
item.diffEL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffEL2EGRA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsEL2EGRA <- ncol(EL2EGRAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsEL2EGRA <- nrow(EL2EGRAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreEL2EGRA <- rowSums(EL2EGRAItems) ## total score

item.discEL2EGRA <- numeric(n.itemsEL2EGRA)    ## output vector
for(i in 1:n.itemsEL2EGRA){                 ## sequence
  item.discEL2EGRA[i] <- cor(total.scoreEL2EGRA, EL2EGRAItems[,i], "pairwise.complete.obs","spearman")  # body
}
item.discEL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(item.discEL2EGRA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xEL2EGRA <- var(total.scoreEL2EGRA)*(n.studentsEL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGRA

## calculate observed score of variance of each item
var.yEL2EGRA <- numeric(n.itemsEL2EGRA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsEL2EGRA){
	var.yEL2EGRA[i] <- var(EL2EGRAItems[,i])*(n.studentsEL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGRA
	}

var.yEL2EGRADF <- as.data.frame(var.yEL2EGRA)

## calculate alpha for EGRA test
alphaEL2EGRA <- (n.itemsEL2EGRA/(n.itemsEL2EGRA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yEL2EGRA)/var.xEL2EGRA)
alphaEL2EGRADisplay <- round(alphaEL2EGRA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdEL2EGRA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreEL2EGRA)*(n.studentsEL2EGRA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGRA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seEL2EGRA <- sdEL2EGRA*sqrt(1-alphaEL2EGRA)
seEL2EGRADisplay <- round(seEL2EGRA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
EL2EGRADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffEL2EGRADF, var.yEL2EGRADF, item.discEL2EGRADF)

EL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(EL2EGRADiffDiscDF)

EL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('EL2*', '', EL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item) 
EL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', EL2EGRADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGRA > .5 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA > .85 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGRA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGRA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGRA > .5 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGRA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA > .85 & item.discEL2EGRA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGRA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGRA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGRA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGRA > .5 & item.discEL2EGRA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGRA, Item)

## filter the EGRADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGRA <- EL2EGRADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGRA > .85 & item.discEL2EGRA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGRA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGRAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=2, 2.7)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 7, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsEL2EGRA` students completed the Endline level 2 EGRA exam.  The following matrix shows the baseline level 2 results from the item analysis in a matrix format.  The three columns indicate the difficulty level results from hard with a difficulty ranging from 0 to .5, then medium with a difficulty ranging from .51 to .85, and finally easy with a difficulty from .86 to 1.  While the rows down the left side indicate the discrimination analysis results from poor with a discrimination index less than or equal to .1, then fair with a discrimination index less than .3 but greater than .1, and finally good with a discrimination index greater than .3.  As you can see none of the EGRA items fall in the poor discrimination category and only two items are in the fair discrimination category, with a majority of the items falling into the good discrimination category.  A majority of the items are also in the hard level of difficulty, but this is expected due to this being a baseline exam.  

<br/>

`r alphaEL2EGRADisplay` *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better.

<br/>

`r seEL2EGRADisplay` *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

*Difficulty* - the percentage of students answering the question correctly. 

<br/>

*Discrimination* - the correlation of responses to individual items with overall test score. The higher the correlation, the more the item results are consistent with the test as a whole.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGRA`

<br/>

#### EGMA Item Analysis Results Level 2 Baseline

The Level 2 Baseline EGMA contains a total of 110 items in 10 subsections as follows: Number Identification (20 items), Number Discrimination (10 items), Missing Number (10 items), Addition Level 1 (20 items), Addition Level 2 (5 items), Subtraction Level 1 (20 items), Subtraction Level 2 (5 items), Multiplication Level 1 (6 items), Division Level 1 (6 items), Word Problem (8 items).

<br/>

```{r Baseline Level 2 EGMA Item Analysis, include=TRUE}
BL2NumIdentifyList <- c('BL2NumIdentify_01_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_02_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_03_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_04_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_05_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_06_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_07_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_08_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_09_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_10_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_11_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_12_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_13_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_14_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_15_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_16_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_17_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_18_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_19_n', 'BL2NumIdentify_20_n')

BL2NumDiscList <- c('BL2NumDisc_01_n', 'BL2NumDisc_02_n', 'BL2NumDisc_03_n', 'BL2NumDisc_04_n', 'BL2NumDisc_05_n', 'BL2NumDisc_06_n', 'BL2NumDisc_07_n', 'BL2NumDisc_08_n', 'BL2NumDisc_09_n', 'BL2NumDisc_10_n')

BL2MissNumList <- c('BL2MissNum_01_n', 'BL2MissNum_02_n', 'BL2MissNum_03_n', 'BL2MissNum_04_n', 'BL2MissNum_05_n', 'BL2MissNum_06_n', 'BL2MissNum_07_n', 'BL2MissNum_08_n', 'BL2MissNum_09_n', 'BL2MissNum_10_n')

BL2AddLvl1List <- c('BL2AddLvl1_01_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_02_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_03_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_04_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_05_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_06_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_07_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_08_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_09_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_10_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_11_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_12_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_13_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_14_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_15_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_16_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_17_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_18_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_19_n', 'BL2AddLvl1_20_n')

BL2AddLvl2List <- c('BL2AddLvl2_01_n', 'BL2AddLvl2_02_n', 'BL2AddLvl2_03_n', 'BL2AddLvl2_04_n', 'BL2AddLvl2_05_n')

BL2SubLvl1List <- c('BL2SubLvl1_01_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_02_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_03_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_04_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_05_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_06_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_07_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_08_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_09_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_10_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_11_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_12_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_13_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_14_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_15_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_16_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_17_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_18_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_19_n', 'BL2SubLvl1_20_n')

BL2SubLvl2List <- c('BL2SubLvl2_01_n', 'BL2SubLvl2_02_n', 'BL2SubLvl2_03_n', 'BL2SubLvl2_04_n', 'BL2SubLvl2_05_n')

BL2MultLvl1List <- c('BL2MultLvl1_01_n', 'BL2MultLvl1_02_n', 'BL2MultLvl1_03_n', 'BL2MultLvl1_04_n', 'BL2MultLvl1_05_n', 'BL2MultLvl1_06_n')

BL2DivLvl1List <- c('BL2DivLvl1_01_n', 'BL2DivLvl1_02_n', 'BL2DivLvl1_03_n', 'BL2DivLvl1_04_n', 'BL2DivLvl1_05_n', 'BL2DivLvl1_06_n')

BL2WordProbList <- c('BL2WordProb_01_n', 'BL2WordProb_02_n', 'BL2WordProb_03_n', 'BL2WordProb_04_n', 'BL2WordProb_05_n', 'BL2WordProb_06_n', 'BL2WordProb_07_n', 'BL2WordProb_08_n')

BL2EGMASansOutlier <- BL2studentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use previously defined lists to create dataframes for each EGMA subsection
BL2NumIdentifyItems <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2NumIdentifyList]
BL2NumDiscItems <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2NumDiscList]
BL2MissNumItems <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2MissNumList]
BL2AddLvl1Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2AddLvl1List]
BL2AddLvl2Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2AddLvl2List]
BL2SubLvl1Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2SubLvl1List]
BL2SubLvl2Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2SubLvl2List]
BL2MultLvl1Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2MultLvl1List]
BL2DivLvl1Items <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2DivLvl1List]
BL2WordProbItems <- BL2EGMASansOutlier[BL2WordProbList]

## put all of the EGMA subsections togethre with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGMA items
BL2EGMAItems <- cbind(BL2NumIdentifyItems, BL2NumDiscItems, BL2MissNumItems, BL2AddLvl1Items, BL2AddLvl2Items, BL2SubLvl1Items, BL2SubLvl2Items, BL2MultLvl1Items, BL2DivLvl1Items, BL2WordProbItems)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGMA items dataframe
BL2EGMAItems[is.na(BL2EGMAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty using the CTT library can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers for each item by first calculating the colMeans of each item
item.diffBL2EGMA <- colMeans(BL2EGMAItems)
item.diffBL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffBL2EGMA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsBL2EGMA <- ncol(BL2EGMAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsBL2EGMA <- nrow(BL2EGMAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreBL2EGMA <- rowSums(BL2EGMAItems) ## total score

item.discBL2EGMA <- numeric(n.itemsBL2EGMA)    ## output vector
for (i in 1:n.itemsBL2EGMA) {               ## sequence
     item.discBL2EGMA[i] <- cor(total.scoreBL2EGMA, BL2EGMAItems[,i],
	 "pairwise.complete.obs", "spearman")   ## body
}
item.discBL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.discBL2EGMA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xBL2EGMA <- var(total.scoreBL2EGMA)*(n.studentsBL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGMA

## calculate observed score variance of each item
var.yBL2EGMA <- numeric(n.itemsBL2EGMA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsBL2EGMA){
	var.yBL2EGMA[i] <- var(BL2EGMAItems[,i])*(n.studentsBL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGMA
	}
var.yBL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(var.yBL2EGMA)	
	
## calculate alpha for EGMA test
alphaBL2EGMA <- (n.itemsBL2EGMA/(n.itemsBL2EGMA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yBL2EGMA)/var.xBL2EGMA)
alphaBL2EGMADisplay <- round(alphaBL2EGMA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdBL2EGMA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreBL2EGMA)*(n.studentsBL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsBL2EGMA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seBL2EGMA <- sdBL2EGMA*sqrt(1-alphaBL2EGMA)
seBL2EGMADisplay <- round(seBL2EGMA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
BL2EGMADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffBL2EGMADF, var.yBL2EGMADF, item.discBL2EGMADF)

BL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(BL2EGMADiffDiscDF)

BL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('BL2*', '', BL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item)
BL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', BL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGMA > .5 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA > .85 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGMA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGMA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGMA > .5 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGMA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA > .85 & item.discBL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discBL2EGMA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGMA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discBL2EGMA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffBL2EGMA > .5 & item.discBL2EGMA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGMA <- BL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffBL2EGMA > .85 & item.discBL2EGMA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGMA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodBL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=2, 2.5)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsBL2EGMA` students completed the Baseline level 2 EGMA exam.  The following matrix shows the baseline level 2 results from the item analysis in a matrix format.  The three columns indicate the difficulty level results from hard with a difficulty ranging from 0 to .5, then medium with a difficulty ranging from .51 to .85, and finally easy with a difficulty from .86 to 1.  While the rows down the left side indicate the discrimination analysis results from poor with a discrimination index less than or equal to .1, then fair with a discrimination index less than .3 but greater than .1, and finally good with a discrimination index greater than .3.  As you can see none of the EGMA items fall in the poor discrimination category nor the fair discrimination category, with all of the items falling into the good discrimination category.  A majority of the items are also in the hard level of difficulty, but this is expected due to this being a baseline exam.

<br/>

`r alphaBL2EGMADisplay`  EGMA *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better the internal consistency of the test.

<br/>

`r seBL2EGMADisplay` EGMA *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantBL2EGMA`

<br/>


#### EGMA Item Analysis Results Level 2 Endline

```{r Endline Level 2 EGMA Item Analysis, include=TRUE}
EL2NumIdentifyList <- c('EL2NumIdentify_01_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_02_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_03_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_04_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_05_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_06_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_07_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_08_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_09_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_10_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_11_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_12_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_13_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_14_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_15_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_16_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_17_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_18_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_19_n', 'EL2NumIdentify_20_n')

EL2NumDiscList <- c('EL2NumDisc_01_n', 'EL2NumDisc_02_n', 'EL2NumDisc_03_n', 'EL2NumDisc_04_n', 'EL2NumDisc_05_n', 'EL2NumDisc_06_n', 'EL2NumDisc_07_n', 'EL2NumDisc_08_n', 'EL2NumDisc_09_n', 'EL2NumDisc_10_n')

EL2MissNumList <- c('EL2MissNum_01_n', 'EL2MissNum_02_n', 'EL2MissNum_03_n', 'EL2MissNum_04_n', 'EL2MissNum_05_n', 'EL2MissNum_06_n', 'EL2MissNum_07_n', 'EL2MissNum_08_n', 'EL2MissNum_09_n', 'EL2MissNum_10_n')

EL2AddLvl1List <- c('EL2AddLvl1_01_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_02_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_03_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_04_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_05_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_06_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_07_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_08_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_09_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_10_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_11_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_12_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_13_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_14_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_15_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_16_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_17_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_18_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_19_n', 'EL2AddLvl1_20_n')

EL2AddLvl2List <- c('EL2AddLvl2_01_n', 'EL2AddLvl2_02_n', 'EL2AddLvl2_03_n', 'EL2AddLvl2_04_n', 'EL2AddLvl2_05_n')

EL2SubLvl1List <- c('EL2SubLvl1_01_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_02_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_03_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_04_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_05_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_06_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_07_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_08_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_09_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_10_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_11_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_12_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_13_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_14_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_15_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_16_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_17_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_18_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_19_n', 'EL2SubLvl1_20_n')

EL2SubLvl2List <- c('EL2SubLvl2_01_n', 'EL2SubLvl2_02_n', 'EL2SubLvl2_03_n', 'EL2SubLvl2_04_n', 'EL2SubLvl2_05_n')

EL2MultLvl1List <- c('EL2MultLvl1_01_n', 'EL2MultLvl1_02_n', 'EL2MultLvl1_03_n', 'EL2MultLvl1_04_n', 'EL2MultLvl1_05_n', 'EL2MultLvl1_06_n')

EL2DivLvl1List <- c('EL2DivLvl1_01_n', 'EL2DivLvl1_02_n', 'EL2DivLvl1_03_n', 'EL2DivLvl1_04_n', 'EL2DivLvl1_05_n', 'EL2DivLvl1_06_n')

EL2WordProbList <- c('EL2WordProb_01_n', 'EL2WordProb_02_n', 'EL2WordProb_03_n', 'EL2WordProb_04_n', 'EL2WordProb_05_n', 'EL2WordProb_06_n', 'EL2WordProb_07_n', 'EL2WordProb_08_n')

EL2EGMASansOutlier <- EL2studentOutliers %>% filter(!is.na(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n) & is.na(OutlierTest))

## use defined lists to create dataframes for each EGMA subsection
EL2NumIdentifyItems <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2NumIdentifyList]
EL2NumDiscItems <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2NumDiscList]
EL2MissNumItems <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2MissNumList]
EL2AddLvl1Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2AddLvl1List]
EL2AddLvl2Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2AddLvl2List]
EL2SubLvl1Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2SubLvl1List]
EL2SubLvl2Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2SubLvl2List]
EL2MultLvl1Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2MultLvl1List]
EL2DivLvl1Items <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2DivLvl1List]
EL2WordProbItems <- EL2EGMASansOutlier[EL2WordProbList]

## put all of the EGMA subsections togethre with cbind to create a dataframe with each of the EGMA items
EL2EGMAItems <- cbind(EL2NumIdentifyItems, EL2NumDiscItems, EL2MissNumItems, EL2AddLvl1Items, EL2AddLvl2Items, EL2SubLvl1Items, EL2SubLvl2Items, EL2MultLvl1Items, EL2DivLvl1Items, EL2WordProbItems)

## convert all NA's to 0 in EGMA items dataframe
EL2EGMAItems[is.na(EL2EGMAItems)] <- 0

## The item difficulty can be obtained by calculating the proportion of correct answers for each item by first calculating the colMeans of each item
item.diffEL2EGMA <- colMeans(EL2EGMAItems)
item.diffEL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.diffEL2EGMA)

## calculate the item discrimination
n.itemsEL2EGMA <- ncol(EL2EGMAItems)        ## number of items
n.studentsEL2EGMA <- nrow(EL2EGMAItems)     ## number of students
total.scoreEL2EGMA <- rowSums(EL2EGMAItems) ## total score

item.discEL2EGMA <- numeric(n.itemsEL2EGMA)    ## output vector
for (i in 1:n.itemsEL2EGMA) {               ## sequence
     item.discEL2EGMA[i] <- cor(total.scoreEL2EGMA, EL2EGMAItems[,i],
	 "pairwise.complete.obs", "spearman")   ## body
}
item.discEL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(item.discEL2EGMA)

## calculate observed-score variance of whole test
var.xEL2EGMA <- var(total.scoreEL2EGMA)*(n.studentsEL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGMA

## calculate observed score variance of each item
var.yEL2EGMA <- numeric(n.itemsEL2EGMA)

for(i in 1:n.itemsEL2EGMA){
	var.yEL2EGMA[i] <- var(EL2EGMAItems[,i])*(n.studentsEL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGMA
	}
var.yEL2EGMADF <- as.data.frame(var.yEL2EGMA)	
	
## calculate alpha for EGMA test
alphaEL2EGMA <- (n.itemsEL2EGMA/(n.itemsEL2EGMA-1))*(1 - sum(var.yEL2EGMA)/var.xEL2EGMA)
alphaEL2EGMADisplay <- round(alphaEL2EGMA, 3)

## calculate the standard deviation of the total score
sdEL2EGMA <- sqrt(var(total.scoreEL2EGMA)*(n.studentsEL2EGMA-1)/n.studentsEL2EGMA)

## calculate the standard error of measurement estimate
seEL2EGMA <- sdEL2EGMA*sqrt(1-alphaEL2EGMA)
seEL2EGMADisplay <- round(seEL2EGMA, 3)

## combine the difficulty and discrimination values into one dataframe to build list of difficulty and discrimination by item
EL2EGMADiffDiscDF <- cbind(item.diffEL2EGMADF, var.yEL2EGMADF, item.discEL2EGMADF)

EL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- row.names(EL2EGMADiffDiscDF)

EL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('EL2*', '', EL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item)
EL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item <- gsub('*_n', '', EL2EGMADiffDiscDF$Item)

## build a matrix of difficulty and discimination
## Poor Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and poor discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGMA > .5 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the upper right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and poor discrimination
DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA > .85 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .1)
DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGMA, Item)

## Fair Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGMA > .1)
DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and fair discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGMA > .5 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGMA > .1)
DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the middle right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and fair discimination test items
DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA > .85 & item.discEL2EGMA <= .3 & item.discEL2EGMA > .1)
DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGMA, Item)

##Good Discrimination
## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower left quadrant with description of hard difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .5 & item.discEL2EGMA > .3)
DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obain the lower middle quadrant with description of medium difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA <= .85 & item.diffEL2EGMA > .5 & item.discEL2EGMA > .3)
DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGMA, Item)

## filter the EGMADiffDiscDF dataframe to obtain the lower right quadrant with description of easy difficulty and good discrimination test items
DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGMA <- EL2EGMADiffDiscDF %>% filter(item.diffEL2EGMA > .85 & item.discEL2EGMA > .3)
DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS <- pull(DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGMA, Item)

## create quadrant dataframe
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 3, ncol = 4))
 
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf) <- c("Discrimination", "Hard (0 - 50)", "Medium (51 - 85)", "Easy (86 - 100)")

## set row labels
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[1] <- "Poor\n ( < 0.1)"
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[2] <- "Fair\n (0.1 - 0.3)"
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$Discrimination[3] <- "Good\n ( > 0.3)"

## collapse the vector of strings into one string with items separated by , for each quadrant
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[1] <- paste(DiffHardDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[2] <- paste(DiffHardDiscFairEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Hard (0 - 50)`[3] <- paste(DiffHardDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[1] <- paste(DiffMedDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[2] <- paste(DiffMedDiscFairEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Medium (51 - 85)`[3] <- paste(DiffMedDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[1] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscPoorEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[2] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscFairEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')
diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf$`Easy (86 - 100)`[3] <- paste(DiffEasyDiscGoodEL2EGMAVS, collapse=', ')

set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- flextable(diffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMAdf)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, i=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- hline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, i=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=3)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- vline(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=4)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- add_header_row(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, values = c("", "Difficulty",  "Items"), colwidths = c(1, 1, 2), top=TRUE)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=1, 1.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=2, 2.5)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=3, 2.2)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- width(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, j=4, 1)
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8, part = "body")
flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA <- fontsize(flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "header")
```

`r n.studentsEL2EGMA` students completed the Endline level 2 EGMA exam.  The following matrix shows the endline level 2 results from the item analysis in a matrix format.  The three columns indicate the difficulty level results from hard with a difficulty ranging from 0 to .5, then medium with a difficulty ranging from .51 to .85, and finally easy with a difficulty from .86 to 1.  While the rows down the left side indicate the discrimination analysis results from poor with a discrimination index less than or equal to .1, then fair with a discrimination index less than .3 but greater than .1, and finally good with a discrimination index greater than .3.  As you can see none of the EGMA items fall in the poor discrimination category nor the fair discrimination category, with all of the items falling into the good discrimination category.  A majority of the items are also in the hard level of difficulty, but this is expected due to this being a baseline exam.

<br/>

`r alphaEL2EGMADisplay`  EGMA *Reliability*  coefficient alpha - a measure of the internal consistency of the exam. This statistic ranges from 0 to 1.00, and the higher the value the better the internal consistency of the test.

<br/>

`r seEL2EGMADisplay` EGMA *Standard error of measurement* - a measure of accuracy of individual student scores. The smaller the number, the more accurate the measurement.

<br/>

`r flexdiffdiscQuadrantEL2EGMA`

<br/>

### Floor Ceiling Effects for Level 1 and 2

```{r EGRA and EGMA floor and ceiling Analysis}

## Calculate EGRA Level 1 Baseline Floor and Ceiling
n.studentsBEGRA <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin)
BEGRAFloor0df <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% filter(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n == 0)
BEGRAFloor0Count <- nrow(BEGRAFloor0df)
rm(BEGRAFloor0df)
BEGRAFloor0Percent <- round((BEGRAFloor0Count/n.studentsBEGRA)*100, sigdig2)
BEGRAFloor0Print <- paste0(BEGRAFloor0Count, " (",BEGRAFloor0Percent, "%)") 

BEGRAFloor0To10df <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1Begin %>% filter(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n <= 10)
BEGRAFloor0To10Count <- nrow(BEGRAFloor0To10df)
rm(BEGRAFloor0To10df)

## create floor and ceiling dataframe
floorToCelingdf <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = 8, ncol = 6))

## set column names
colnames(floorToCelingdf) <- c("Assessment", "Learner Scores (%)", "Level 1 Baseline", "Level 1 Endline", "Level 2 Baseline", "Level 2 Endline")

## Set rest of values
floorToCelingdf$Assessment[1] <- "EGRA"
floorToCelingdf$Assessment[5] <- "EGMA"

## add learner score levels
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[1] <- "0"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[2] <- "0-10"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[3] <- "90-100"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[4] <- "100"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[5] <- "0"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[6] <- "0-10"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[7] <- "90-100"
floorToCelingdf$`Learner Scores (%)`[8] <- "100"

## add level 1 baseline data
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[1] <- BEGRAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[2] <- BEGRAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[3] <- BEGRACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[4] <- BEGRACeiling100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[5] <- BEGMAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[6] <- BEGMAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[7] <- BEGMACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Baseline`[8] <- BEGMACeiling100Print

## add level 1 endline data
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[1] <- MEGRAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[2] <- MEGRAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[3] <- MEGRACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[4] <- MEGRACeiling100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[5] <- MEGMAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[6] <- MEGMAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[7] <- MEGMACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 1 Endline`[8] <- MEGMACeiling100Print

## add level 2 baseline data
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[1] <- BL2EGRAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[2] <- BL2EGRAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[3] <- BL2EGRACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[4] <- BL2EGRACeiling100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[5] <- BL2EGMAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[6] <- BL2EGMAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[7] <- BL2EGMACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Baseline`[8] <- BL2EGMACeiling100Print

## add level 2 endline data
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[1] <- EL2EGRAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[2] <- EL2EGRAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[3] <- EL2EGRACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[4] <- EL2EGRACeiling100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[5] <- EL2EGMAFloor0Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[6] <- EL2EGMAFloor0To10Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[7] <- EL2EGMACeiling90To100Print
floorToCelingdf$`Level 2 Endline`[8] <- EL2EGMACeiling100Print


## create flextablefrom dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexFloorToCeiling <- flextable(floorToCelingdf)

## set format of flextable
flexFloorToCeiling <- autofit(flexFloorToCeiling)
flexFloorToCeiling <- height(flexFloorToCeiling, height = .08)
flexFloorToCeiling <- fontsize(flexFloorToCeiling, i=NULL, j=NULL, size=9, part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- hline(flexFloorToCeiling, i=4)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=1, 1.2)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=2, 1.0)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=3, 1.0)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=4, 1.0)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=5, 1.0)
flexFloorToCeiling <- width(flexFloorToCeiling, j=6, 1.0)
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=1, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=2, j=1, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=3, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=4, j=1, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=5, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=6, j=1, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=7, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- bg(flexFloorToCeiling, i=8, j=1, bg="#EFEFEF", part="body")
flexFloorToCeiling <- fix_border_issues(flexFloorToCeiling)
```

`r flexFloorToCeiling`




### Enumerator Bias

```{r endline level 2 egra and egma enumerator bias base numbers}
EL2Enumerator <- EL2studentsurveylonglocate %>% group_by(EL2EnumeratorId) %>% count()
EL2NumEnumerators <- nrow(EL2Enumerator)

## EGRA mean and sd
EL2EGRATotal_nMean <- round(mean(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGRATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE), sigdig2)
EL2EGRATotal_nsd <- sd(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGRATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE)

## Calculate EGRA Mean by Enumerator
EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% group_by(EL2EnumeratorIdNorm) %>% summarise(mean=round(mean(EL2EGRATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE), sigdig2))
EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator <- as.data.frame(EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator)

## Calculate EGRA Mean by Enumerator Range
EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanMin <- min(EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator$mean, na.rm=TRUE)
EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanMax <- max(EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator$mean, na.rm=TRUE)
EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanRange <- paste0(EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanMin, " to ", EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanMax)

## EGMA mean and sd
EL2EGMATotal_nMean <- round(mean(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGMATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE), sigdig2)
EL2EGMATotal_nsd <- sd(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGMATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE)

## Calculate EGMA mean of Enumerator
EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator <- EL2studentsurveylong %>% group_by(EL2EnumeratorIdNorm) %>% summarise(mean= round(mean(EL2EGMATotal_n, na.rm=TRUE), sigdig2))
EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator <- as.data.frame(EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator)

## Calculate EGRA Mean by Enumerator Range
EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanMin <- min(EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator$mean, na.rm=TRUE)
EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanMax <- max(EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator$mean, na.rm=TRUE)
EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanRange <- paste0(EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanMin, " to ", EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanMax)

```

The evaluation team examined all data for quality and integrity post collection. As a part of the data quality assurance, the research team completed an analysis to check for bias between enumerators. There were a total of `r EL2NumEnumerators` enumerators at the endline data collection. The overall EGRA Total mean was `r EL2EGRATotal_nMean`, while the mean of data collected by enumerators ranged from `r EL2EGRAEnumeratorMeanRange` Figure(); the overall EGMA Total mean was `r EL2EGMATotal_nMean`, while the mean of data collected by enumerators ranged from `r EL2EGMAEnumeratorMeanRange` (Figure ). These results raised questions about the potential for data bias resulting from errors or inconsistencies in the way enumerators were using the data collection tools. To test for possible enumerator bias, we used box plots to identify outliers and replaced learner IDs with the corresponding enumerator IDs. Analysis revealed no outliers for EGRA (figure  XXX) and no outliers for EGMA (Figure XXX). Thus, we concluded that variation is within acceptable levels and evidence of enumerator bias is insignificant. 

```{r endline level 2 egra enumerator bias plots, include=TRUE, width=7.5}
## subset mean of EGRATotal_n by EL2EnumeratorId
plot(EL2EGRAMeanbyEnumerator, type="o", xlab="Enumerator", ylab="Endline Level 2 Mean", main="Endline Level 2 EGRA Mean\nVariation by Enumerator")

boxplot(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGRATotal_n, col=c("steelblue"), xlab = "Mean EGRA Total", ylab="EGRA Total", main="Box Plot Analysis of EGRA \nEndline Level 2 Enumerator Scores")
```

```{r endline level 2 egma enumerator bias plots, include=TRUE, width=7.5}
plot(EL2EGMAMeanbyEnumerator, type="o", xlab="Enumerator", ylab="Endline Level 2 Mean", main="Endline Level 2 EGMA Mean\nVariation by Enumerator")

boxplot(EL2studentsurveylong$EL2EGMATotal_n, col=c("steelblue"), xlab = "Mean EGMA Total", ylab="EGMA Total", main = "Box Plot Analysis of EGMA \nEndline Level 2 Enumerator Scores")
```

## Appendix C State Level Reports

Appendix C contains figures for the longitudinal data disaggregated by State and District.

### State of Benaadir Data

```{r baseline-endline retained students Benaadir build leaflet map, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}

SchoolIdMediansBenaadir <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGRAMedian = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMediansBenaadir <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMediansBenaadir)

SchoolIdMedians2Benaadir <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGMAMedian = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians2Benaadir <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians2Benaadir)

SchoolIdMedianCombineBenaadir <- merge(SchoolIdMediansBenaadir, SchoolIdMedians2Benaadir, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateBenaadir <- merge(SchoolIdMedianCombineBenaadir, location, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateBenaadir <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateBenaadir %>% rename("long" = GPSLongitude, "lat"=GPSLatitude)

schoolsBenaadir <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateBenaadir %>% dplyr::select(lat, long, egra = EGRAMedian, egma = EGMAMedian, Location = District_f)

schoolsBenaadir$Location <- sapply(schoolsBenaadir$Location, as.factor)

getColor <- function(population) { 
		sapply(schoolsBenaadir$Location, function(Location) {  
		if(Location == "Dayniile") {
		"green"
		} else if(Location == "Kaxda") {
		"orange"
		} else if(Location == "Shabis") {
		"red"
		} else {"blue"} })}

icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'ios-close',
  iconColor = 'black',
  library = 'ion',
  markerColor = getColor()
)

leaflet(schoolsBenaadir) %>% addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(~long, ~lat, icon=icons, label=~as.character(Location))

```

* Green = Dayniille District, Orange = Kaxda Disctrict, Red =  Shibis, Blue = Xamarwayne District

```{r Benaadir demographics table by location type, include=TRUE}
## Overall Study Students
OverallN <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier)
BenaadirN <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir)

## Overall Study Gender
GenderOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderOverallStudy <- GenderOverallStudy %>% mutate(per = round((n/OverallN)*100, sigdig3))
## add percent
GenderOverallStudy <- GenderOverallStudy %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderOverallStudy <- as.data.frame(GenderOverallStudy)
GenderOverallStudy <- GenderOverallStudy %>% arrange(n)
GenderOverallStudy <- GenderOverallStudy[-c(1),]

## retrieve gender by location type
GenderbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
## add percent
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocationType)
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyLocationType <- GenderbyLocationType[-c(1,3,5,7),]
GenderbyLocationType2 <- GenderbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivot <- GenderbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivot <- GenderbyLocationTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")


## Overall Study median age and range
MedianAgeOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
## Age Range
MinAgeOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgeOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## create range
AgeRangeOverallStudy <- paste0("(", MinAgeOverallStudy, "-", MaxAgeOverallStudy, ")")
AgeOverallStudy <- paste0(MedianAgeOverallStudy, " ", AgeRangeOverallStudy)

## retrieve age by location type
MedianAgebyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot <- MedianAgebyLocationType %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot <- MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot <- as.data.frame(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot)
## Age range by location type
MinAgebyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgebyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## create range
AgeRangebyLocation <- merge(MinAgebyLocationType, MaxAgebyLocationType, by.x='LocationTypeDesc_f', by.y='LocationTypeDesc_f')
AgeRangebyLocation <- AgeRangebyLocation %>% mutate(Range = paste0("(", min, "-", max, ")"))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$IDP[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$IDP[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocation[1,4], " ")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$Rural[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$Rural[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocation[2,4])
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$Urban[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivot$Urban[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocation[3,4], " ")



## overall attend other prior
AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
## calculate percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy %>% mutate(per = round((n/OverallN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy)
AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')

## attend other prior by location type

AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2 <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")


## overall maternal education
MaternalEdOverallStudy <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
## calculate percent
MaternalEdOverallStudy <- MaternalEdOverallStudy %>% mutate(per = round((n/OverallN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent

MaternalEdOverallStudy <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdOverallStudy)
MaternalEdOverallStudy <- MaternalEdOverallStudy %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')

## Maternal Ed
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyLocationType)
MaternalEdbyLocationType <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyLocationType2 <- MaternalEdbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")

## Overall Study Languages

LanguagesOverallStudy <- LanguagesOverallStudy %>% mutate(per = round((n/OverallN)*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesOverallStudy <- LanguagesOverallStudy %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))

LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))

LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType[-c(1,2,4,5,7,8),]
LanguagesbyLocationType <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2 <- LanguagesbyLocationType %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyLocationType2 %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot <- LanguagesbyLocationType2Pivot %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

LocationTypeTable2AllStudy <- LocationTypeTableAllStudy[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
LocationTypeTable2Benaadir <- LocationTypeTableBenaadir[,c(3,1,2)]

LocationTypeTable2AllStudy <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeTable2AllStudy)
LocationTypeTable2Benaadir <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeTable2Benaadir)

LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =10, ncol = 6))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo) <- c("Student Characteristic", "Population", "All", "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

## set studentcharacteristic and population columns
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[1,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[1,1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[1,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[2,2] <- "Benaadir"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[3,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[2,1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[3,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[4,2] <- "Benaadir"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[5,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[3,1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[5,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[6,2] <- "Benaadir"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[7,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[4,1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[7,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[8,2] <- "Benaadir"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[9,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[5,1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[9,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo[10,2] <- "Benaadir"

## set all column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[1] <- GenderOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[2] <- GenderOverallBenaadir$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[3] <- AgeOverallStudy
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[4] <- AgeOverallBenaadir
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[5] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[6] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallBenaadir$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[7] <- MaternalEdOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[8] <- MaternalEdOverallBenaadir$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[9] <- LanguagesOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$All[10] <- LanguagesOverallBenaadir$label

## set idp column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[5]

## set idp column for Benaadir students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$IDP[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$IDP[5]

## set rural column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Rural[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Rural[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Rural[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Rural[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Rural[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[5]

## set urban column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[5]

## set urban column for Benaadir students
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo$Urban[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Benaadir$Urban[5]

gray_border <- fp_border(color = "gray")

flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- flextable(LocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo)

flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- footnote(
  flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i = 1, j = 5,
  ref_symbols = "*",
  value = as_paragraph("No data was collected from Rural Location Type sites in Benaadir"), part="header")
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- autofit(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- add_header_row(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, values = c("   ", "School Location Type"), colwidths = c(3,3))
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- bold(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=1, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=2, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=3, 1.3)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=4, 1.3)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=5, 1.3)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- merge_at(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- valign(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=1, j = 1, part="all", valign = "top")
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline_top(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- vline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, j=3, part="all")
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=2, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=4, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=6, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=8, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=10, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=1, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=3, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=5, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=7, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i=9, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- height(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, height= .06)
flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo <- fontsize(flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
```

`r flexLocationTypeTable2BenaadirCombo`

#### State of Benaadir Retention and Attrition

```{r baseline-endline student retention table for Benaadir, include=TRUE}
 dfDemoTableBenaadir <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =27, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfDemoTableBenaadir) <- c("\nGroup", "\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABBenaadirdf <- EndlinestudentsurveyBenaadir %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BeginCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginBenaadir)
Yr1EndCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndBenaadir)
Yr1RetentionCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionBenaadir)
Yr1AttritionCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionBenaadir)
Yr2BeginCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2BeginBenaadir)
Yr2EndCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndBenaadir)
Yr2RetentionCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionBenaadir)
Yr2AttritionCountBenaadir <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionBenaadir)
TwoYrRetentionCountBenaadir <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionBenaadir)
TwoYrAttritionCountBenaadir <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionBenaadir)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Begin Benaadir
yr1beginprogrampivotBenaadir <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginBenaadir %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1beginprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr1beginprogrampivotBenaadir)

## get program data for Yr 1 end Benaadir
yr1endprogrampivotBenaadir <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndBenaadir %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1endprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr1endprogrampivotBenaadir)

## get program data for Yr 1 students lost Benaadir

yr1attritionprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionprogrampivotBenaadir)

yr2endprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr2endprogrampivotBenaadir)

yr2retentionprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionprogrampivotBenaadir)

## get program data for Yr 2 end students lost Benaadir

yr2attritionprogrampivotBenaadir <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionprogrampivotBenaadir)

Yr1BeginCountBenaadir,
```
