```{r baseline-endline student retention table for Benaadir, include=TRUE}
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableBenaadir[25,] <- buildlanguageRow1Benaadir

## build and set language row 2 Benaadir overall row 26
buildlanguageRow2Benaadir <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[2,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableBenaadir[26,] <- buildlanguageRow2Benaadir

## build and set language row 3 Benaadir overall row 27
buildlanguageRow3Benaadir <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotBenaadir[3,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableBenaadir[27,] <- buildlanguageRow3Benaadir

dfDemoTableBenaadir <- drop_na(dfDemoTableBenaadir)

dfDemoTableBenaadir[,8] <- NULL
dfDemoTableBenaadir[,4] <- NULL

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- flextable(dfDemoTableBenaadir)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- autofit(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- add_header_row(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir,  values = c('Benaadir Retention and Attrition'), colwidths=c(10), top=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bold(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- height(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bold(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 1:2, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bold(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=2, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=3:5, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=6:7, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=8:9, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=10:11, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=14:17, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=22:23, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=24:26, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=4, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=5, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=6, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=7, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=8, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=9, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- width(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=10, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=1)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=2)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=5)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=7)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=9)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=11)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=13)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=17)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=19)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=21)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- hline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i=23)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- vline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=2)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- vline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=5)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- vline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=8)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- vline(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, j=10)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- vline_left(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- border_outer(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, part = "all", border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8.5, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- align(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- align(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- valign(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 2, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 4, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 6, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 8, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 10, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 12, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 14, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 16, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 18, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 20, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 22, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 24, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- bg(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = 26, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- padding(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemoBenaadir <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemoBenaadir)
```

`r flexSurveyDemoBenaadir`

* Please note there are some missing values for the SES Composite items and therefore the counts do not always equal the overall student totals for this category. Numbers in Paranthesis indicate the retention or missing rate based on the baseline values.

<br/>

#### State of Benaadir Student Perception of Hope

```{r hope gains for Benaadir by District, include=TRUE, fig.height=3, fig.width=7.0}
## build District level hope gain data for Benaadir State
hopegainbaseBenaadirDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
hopegainendBenaadirDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))

hopegainBenaadirDistrict <- merge(hopegainbaseBenaadirDistrict, hopegainendBenaadirDistrict, by='District_f')
colnames(hopegainBenaadirDistrict) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')

## build Benaadir State Overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseBenaadirOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseBenaadirOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendBenaadirOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendBenaadirOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainBenaadirOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseBenaadirOverall, hopegainendBenaadirOverall)
hopegainBenaadirOverall <- hopegainBenaadirOverall %>% mutate(District = 'Benaadir Overall')
hopegainBenaadirOverall <- hopegainBenaadirOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]


## build study overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseStudyOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendStudyOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainStudyOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseStudyOverall, hopegainendStudyOverall)
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]


## Combine data from 3 levels
hopegainBenaadir <- rbind(hopegainStudyOverall, hopegainBenaadirOverall, hopegainBenaadirDistrict)

hopegainBenaadir <- hopegainBenaadir %>% mutate(Gain = round((Endline - Baseline), 2))
hopegainBenaadir <- hopegainBenaadir %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
hopegainBenaadir <- hopegainBenaadir %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse(Endline > Baseline, Endline + .7, Baseline + .7))

hopegainBenaadir$District <- sapply(hopegainBenaadir$District, as.factor)
hopegainBenaadir$District <- fct_relevel(hopegainBenaadir$District, "Xamarwayne", "Shabis", "Kaxda", "Dayniile", "Benaadir Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")


ggplot(hopegainBenaadir) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color="black") + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=4.5) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,1,2,3,4,5), limits=c(0, 5)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=4.5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y="Hope Gain", title="Benaadir Student Hope Gains Over One Academic Year") + coord_flip() 
```



#### State of Benaadir Student EGRA Gains

<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains for Benaadir by District Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retreive Benaadir District level 1 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianstart = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- merge(egragainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr1, egragainendBenaadirDistrictYr1, by='District_f')
egragainBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- merge(egragainBenaadirDistrictYr1, egragainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainBenaadirDistrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Benaadir State overall level 1 EGRA gains
egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline') 

egragainendBenaadirOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1, egragainendBenaadirOverallYr1)
egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Benaadir Overall')
egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
BenaadiroverallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = BenaadiroverallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build Study overall level 1 EGRA gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egragainendStudyOverallYr1)
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)

## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainBenaadirYr1 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr1, egragainBenaadirOverallYr1, egragainBenaadirDistrictYr1)

egragainBenaadirYr1 <- egragainBenaadirYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainBenaadirYr1 <- egragainBenaadirYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainBenaadirYr1$District <- sapply(egragainBenaadirYr1$District, as.factor)
egragainBenaadirYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egragainBenaadirYr1$District, "Xamarwayne", "Shabis", "Kaxda", "Dayniile", "Benaadir Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainBenaadir2Yr1 <- egragainBenaadirYr1
egragainBenaadir2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egragainBenaadir2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegragainBenaadirYr1 <- ggplot(egragainBenaadirYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") +  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank(), axis.title.y=element_blank())
```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains for Benaadir by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retreive Benaadir District level 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- merge(egragainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr2, egragainendBenaadirDistrictYr2, by='District_f')
egragainBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- merge(egragainBenaadirDistrictYr2, egragainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainBenaadirDistrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Benaadir State overall level 2 EGRA gains
egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline') 

egragainendBenaadirOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2, egragainendBenaadirOverallYr2)
egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 %>% mutate(School = 'Benaadir Overall')
egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egragainBenaadirOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)

## build Study overall level 2 EGRA gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline') 

egragainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egragainendStudyOverallYr2)
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainBenaadirYr2 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr2, egragainBenaadirOverallYr2, egragainBenaadirDistrictYr2)

egragainBenaadirYr2 <- egragainBenaadirYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainBenaadirYr2 <- egragainBenaadirYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainBenaadirYr2$District <- sapply(egragainBenaadirYr2$District, as.factor)
egragainBenaadirYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egragainBenaadirYr2$District, "Xamarwayne", "Shabis", "Kaxda", "Dayniile", "Benaadir Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainBenaadir2Yr2 <- egragainBenaadirYr2
egragainBenaadir2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egragainBenaadir2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egragainBenaadir2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egragainBenaadir2Yr2)

ggplotegragainBenaadirYr2 <- ggplot(egragainBenaadirYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegragainBenaadirYr1, ggplotegragainBenaadirYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("Benaadir EGRA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains table for Benaadir by District Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Benaadir
egragainBenaadirCombined <- merge(egragainBenaadir2Yr1, egragainBenaadir2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egragainBenaadirCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egragainBenaadirCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,2], 0)
egragainBenaadirCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,3], 0)
egragainBenaadirCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,4], 0)
egragainBenaadirCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,5], 0)
egragainBenaadirCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,6], 0)
egragainBenaadirCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egragainBenaadirCombined[,7], 0)

egragainBenaadirCombined <- egragainBenaadirCombined[c(5,1:4,6),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- flextable(egragainBenaadirCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- add_header_row(flexegragainBenaadirCombined,  values = c('Benaadir EGRA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- bold(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- autofit(flexegragainBenaadirCombined)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- height(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- align(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, i = 6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=4)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=7)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, j=1)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- vline_left(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, border = std_border)
flexegragainBenaadirCombined <- border_outer(flexegragainBenaadirCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```


`r flexegragainBenaadirCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Benaadir EGRA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA subsection median gains from level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline. 

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 1 by All Study for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE}
egraBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainL1 <- merge(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2, egraEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainL1 $Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")


lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsAllStudyplot <- ggplot(egragainL1 ) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='Time', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	labs(x="EGRA Subsection", y="EGRA Median Score", title="All Study Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none", axis.title.x=element_blank(), axis.title.y=element_blank())
```


```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 1 by Benaadir State for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}

names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsBenaadirplot <- ggplot(egragainL1 ) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	labs(x=NULL, y="EGRA Median Score", title="Benaadir Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egrasubsectionsBenaadirplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.05,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```

<br/>

#### State of Benaadir Student EGMA Gains

<br/>

```{r EGMA Gains for Benaadir by district Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve Benaadir District level 1 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr1, egmagainendBenaadirDistrictYr1, by='District_f')
egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr1, egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Benaadir State overall level 1 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline') 

egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr1, egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr1)
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Benaadir Overall')
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
BenaadiroverallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = BenaadiroverallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build Study overall level 1 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egmagainendStudyOverallYr1)
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)

## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainBenaadirYr1 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr1, egmagainBenaadirOverallYr1, egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr1)

egmagainBenaadirYr1 <- egmagainBenaadirYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainBenaadirYr1 <- egmagainBenaadirYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainBenaadirYr1$District <- sapply(egmagainBenaadirYr1$District, as.factor)
egmagainBenaadirYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainBenaadirYr1$District, "Xamarwayne", "Shabis", "Kaxda", "Dayniile", "Benaadir Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainBenaadir2Yr1 <- egmagainBenaadirYr1
egmagainBenaadir2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egmagainBenaadir2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegmagainBenaadirYr1 <- ggplot(egmagainBenaadirYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") +  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```

```{r EGMA Gains for Benaadir by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retreive Benaadir District level 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrictYr2, egmagainendBenaadirDistrictYr2, by='District_f')
egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr2, egmagainbaseBenaadirDistrict2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Benaadir State overall level 2 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline') 

egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseBenaadirOverallYr2, egmagainendBenaadirOverallYr2)
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 %>% mutate(School = 'Benaadir Overall')
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 <- egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)

## build Study overall level 2 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline') 

egmagainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egmagainendStudyOverallYr2)
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainBenaadirYr2 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr2, egmagainBenaadirOverallYr2, egmagainBenaadirDistrictYr2)

egmagainBenaadirYr2 <- egmagainBenaadirYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainBenaadirYr2 <- egmagainBenaadirYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainBenaadirYr2$District <- sapply(egmagainBenaadirYr2$District, as.factor)
egmagainBenaadirYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainBenaadirYr2$District, "Xamarwayne", "Shabis", "Kaxda", "Dayniile", "Benaadir Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainBenaadir2Yr2 <- egmagainBenaadirYr2
egmagainBenaadir2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egmagainBenaadir2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egmagainBenaadir2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egmagainBenaadir2Yr2)

ggplotegmagainBenaadirYr2 <- ggplot(egmagainBenaadirYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegmagainBenaadirYr1, ggplotegmagainBenaadirYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("Benaadir EGMA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Gains table for Benaadir by District Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Benaadir
egmagainBenaadirCombined <- merge(egmagainBenaadir2Yr1, egmagainBenaadir2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egmagainBenaadirCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egmagainBenaadirCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,2], 0)
egmagainBenaadirCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,3], 0)
egmagainBenaadirCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,4], 0)
egmagainBenaadirCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,5], 0)
egmagainBenaadirCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,6], 0)
egmagainBenaadirCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egmagainBenaadirCombined[,7], 0)

egmagainBenaadirCombined <- egmagainBenaadirCombined[c(5,1:4,6),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- flextable(egmagainBenaadirCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- add_header_row(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined,  values = c('Benaadir EGMA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- bold(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- autofit(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- height(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- width(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- align(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- bg(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, i = 6, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=4)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=7)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- vline(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, j=1)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- vline_left(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, border = std_border)
flexegmagainBenaadirCombined <- border_outer(flexegmagainBenaadirCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```


<br/>

`r flexegmagainBenaadirCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Benaadir EGMA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGMA subsection median gains from Level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points. Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 1 All Study for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL1 <- merge(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL1$Subsection, 
"Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsAllStudyplot <- ggplot(egmagainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="All Study Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(legend.position="none", axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 1 by Benaadir State for all students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQBenaadirSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQBenaadirSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL1 <- merge(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL1$Subsection, "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsBenaadirplot <- ggplot(egmagainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
  labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Benaadir Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egmasubsectionsBenaadirplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.05,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```
