```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 2 by All Study for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL2Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL2Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL2Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL2Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL2Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL2Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL2Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL2Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL2 <- merge(egmaBL2Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL2Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL2$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL2$Subsection, "Division", "Multiplication", "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2 <- ggplot(egmagainL2) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
    labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="All Study Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(legend.position="none", axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 2 by Benaadir state for all students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadir <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQBenaadirSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot1 <- egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadir %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2 <- egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2)
egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadir <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQBenaadirSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot1 <- egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadir %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2 <- egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2)
egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL2Benaadir <- merge(egmaBL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2, egmaEL2SubsectionBenaadirpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL2Benaadir$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL2Benaadir$Subsection, "Division", "Multiplication", "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsBenaadirplotL2 <- ggplot(egmagainL2Benaadir) + geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Benaadir Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egmasubsectionsBenaadirplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.05,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))			
		
```



\newpage

### State of Hirshabeelle Data

```{r baseline-endline retained students Hirshabeelle build leaflet map, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}

SchoolIdMediansHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGRAMedian = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMediansHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMediansHirshabeelle)

SchoolIdMedians2Hirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGMAMedian = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians2Hirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians2Hirshabeelle)

SchoolIdMedianCombineHirshabeelle <- merge(SchoolIdMediansHirshabeelle, SchoolIdMedians2Hirshabeelle, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateHirshabeelle <- merge(SchoolIdMedianCombineHirshabeelle, location, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateHirshabeelle <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateHirshabeelle %>% rename("long" = GPSLongitude, "lat"=GPSLatitude)

schoolsHirshabeelle <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(lat, long, egra = EGRAMedian, egma = EGMAMedian, Location = District_f)

schoolsHirshabeelle$Location <- sapply(schoolsHirshabeelle$Location, as.factor)

getColor <- function(population) { 
		sapply(schoolsHirshabeelle$Location, function(Location) {  
		if(Location == "Balcad") {
		"green"
		} else {"blue"} })}

icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'ios-close',
  iconColor = 'black',
  library = 'ion',
  markerColor = getColor()
)

leaflet(schoolsHirshabeelle) %>% addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(~long, ~lat, icon=icons, label=~as.character(Location))

```
* Green = Balcad District, Blue = Jowhar District


```{r Hirshabeelle demographics table by location type, include=TRUE}

## Retrieve Hirshabeelle State Data
HirshabeelleN <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle)

## Overall Hirshabeelle Gender
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## calculate percent
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- GenderOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(per = round((n/HirshabeelleN)*100, sigdig3))
## add percent label
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- GenderOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(GenderOverallHirshabeelle)
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- GenderOverallHirshabeelle %>% arrange(n)
GenderOverallHirshabeelle <- GenderOverallHirshabeelle[-c(1),]

## Hirshabeelle Gender by Location
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle)
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle[-c(1,3),]
GenderbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle <- GenderbyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")


## Overall Hirshabeelle median age and range
MedianAgeOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
## Age Range
MinAgeOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgeOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## create range
AgeRangeOverallHirshabeelle <- paste0("(", MinAgeOverallHirshabeelle, "-", MaxAgeOverallHirshabeelle, ")")
AgeOverallHirshabeelle <- paste0(MedianAgeOverallHirshabeelle, " ", AgeRangeOverallHirshabeelle)

## Hirshabeelle Median Age by Location
MedianAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle <- MedianAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle <- MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")

## Hirshabeelle Age Range by location
MinAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## Hirshabeelle create Age range
AgeRangebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- merge(MinAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle, MaxAgebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle, by.x='LocationTypeDesc_f', by.y='LocationTypeDesc_f')
AgeRangebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- AgeRangebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% mutate(Range = paste0("(", min, "-", max, ")"))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle$Rural[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle$Rural[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle[1,4], " ")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle$Urban[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle$Urban[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeHirshabeelle[2,4], " ")


## Overall Hirshabeelle Attend Other Prior
AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
## calculate percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(per = round((n/HirshabeelleN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle)
AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')

## Hirshabeelle Attend Other Prior by Location
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")


## Overall Hirshabeelle Maternal Ed
MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
## calculate percent
MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(per = round((n/HirshabeelleN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle)
MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')

## Hirshabeelle MaternalEd by Location
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")


## Overall Hirshabeelle Study Languages
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(per = round((n/HirshabeelleN)*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), "%)"))
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle)
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle %>% arrange(n)
LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle <- LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle[-c(1),]

## Hirshabeelle study languages by location type
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle[-c(1,3),]
LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeHirshabeelle %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationType2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle <- LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

LocationTypeTableHirshabeelle <- rbind(GenderbyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle, MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotHirshabeelle, AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle, MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle, LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotHirshabeelle)

LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle <- LocationTypeTableHirshabeelle[,c(3,1,2)]

LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle)

LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =10, ncol = 6))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo) <- c("Student Characteristic", "Population", "All", "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

## set student characteristic and population columns
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[1,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[1,1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[1,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[2,2] <- "Hirshabeelle"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[3,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[2,1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[3,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[4,2] <- "Hirshabeelle"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[5,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[3,1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[5,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[6,2] <- "Hirshabeelle"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[7,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[4,1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[7,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[8,2] <- "Hirshabeelle"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[9,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[5,1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[9,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo[10,2] <- "Hirshabeelle"

## set all column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[1] <- GenderOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[2] <- GenderOverallHirshabeelle$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[3] <- AgeOverallStudy
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[4] <- AgeOverallHirshabeelle
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[5] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[6] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallHirshabeelle$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[7] <- MaternalEdOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[8] <- MaternalEdOverallHirshabeelle$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[9] <- LanguagesOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$All[10] <- LanguagesOverallHirshabeelle$label

## set idp column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$IDP[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$IDP[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$IDP[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$IDP[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$IDP[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[5]

## set rural column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[5]

## set rural column for Hirshabeelle students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Rural[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Rural[5]

## set urban column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[5]

## set urban column for Hirshabeelle students
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo$Urban[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Hirshabeelle$Urban[5]

gray_border <- fp_border(color = "gray")

flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- flextable(LocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo)

flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- footnote(
  flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i = 1, j = 4,
  ref_symbols = "*",
  value = as_paragraph("No data was collected from IDP Location Type sites in Hirshabeelle"), part="header")
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- autofit(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- add_header_row(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, values = c("  ", "School Location Type"), colwidths = c(3,3))
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- bold(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=1, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=2, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=3, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=4, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=5, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=6, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- merge_at(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- valign(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=1, j = 1, part="all", valign = "top")
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline_top(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- vline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, j=3, part="all")
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=2, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=4, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=6, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=8, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=10, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=1, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=3, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=5, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=7, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i=9, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- height(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, height= .06)
flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo <- fontsize(flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
```
    
`r flexLocationTypeTable2HirshabeelleCombo`

<br/>

#### State of Hirshabeelle Retention and Attrition


```{r baseline-endline student retention table for Hirshabeelle, include=TRUE}
 dfDemoTableHirshabeelle <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =26, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfDemoTableHirshabeelle) <- c("\nGroup", 
"\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABHirshabeelledf <- EndlinestudentsurveyHirshabeelle %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BeginCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginHirshabeelle)
Yr1EndCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndHirshabeelle)
Yr1RetentionCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionHirshabeelle)
Yr1AttritionCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionHirshabeelle)

Yr2EndCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndHirshabeelle)

Yr2AttritionCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionHirshabeelle)

TwoYrAttritionCountHirshabeelle <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionHirshabeelle)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Begin Hirshabeelle
yr1beginprogrampivotHirshabeelle <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginHirshabeelle %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()

paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableHirshabeelle[25,] <- buildlanguageRow1Hirshabeelle

## build and set language row 2 Hirshabeelle overall row 26
buildlanguageRow2Hirshabeelle <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotHirshabeelle[2,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableHirshabeelle[26,] <- buildlanguageRow2Hirshabeelle


dfDemoTableHirshabeelle <- drop_na(dfDemoTableHirshabeelle)

dfDemoTableHirshabeelle[,8] <- NULL
dfDemoTableHirshabeelle[,4] <- NULL

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- flextable(dfDemoTableHirshabeelle)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- autofit(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- add_header_row(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle,  values = c('Hirshabeelle Retention and Attrition'), colwidths=c(10), top=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bold(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- height(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bold(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 1:2, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bold(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=2, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=3:5, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=6:7, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=8:9, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=10:11, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=14:17, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=22:23, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=24:25, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=4, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=5, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=6, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=7, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=8, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=9, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- width(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=10, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=1)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=2)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=5)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=7)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=9)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=11)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=13)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=17)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=19)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=21)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=23)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- hline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i=25)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- vline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=2)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- vline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=5)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- vline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=8)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- vline(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, j=10)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- vline_left(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- border_outer(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, part = "all", border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8.5, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- align(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- align(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- valign(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 2, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 4, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 6, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 8, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 10, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 12, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 14, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 16, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 18, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 20, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 22, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- bg(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = 24, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- padding(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle)
```

`r flexSurveyDemoHirshabeelle`

#### State of Hirshabeelle Student Perception of Hope

```{r hope gains for Hirshabeelle by District, include=TRUE, fig.height=2.5, fig.width=7.0}
## build District level hope gain data for Hirshabeelle State
hopegainbaseHirshabeelleDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
hopegainendHirshabeelleDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))

hopegainHirshabeelleDistrict <- merge(hopegainbaseHirshabeelleDistrict, hopegainendHirshabeelleDistrict, by='District_f')
colnames(hopegainHirshabeelleDistrict) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')

## build Hirshabeelle State Overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseHirshabeelleOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseHirshabeelleOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendHirshabeelleOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendHirshabeelleOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainHirshabeelleOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseHirshabeelleOverall, hopegainendHirshabeelleOverall)
hopegainHirshabeelleOverall <- hopegainHirshabeelleOverall %>% mutate(District = 'Hirshabeelle Overall')
hopegainHirshabeelleOverall <- hopegainHirshabeelleOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]


## build study overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseStudyOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendStudyOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainStudyOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseStudyOverall, hopegainendStudyOverall)
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]


## Combine data from 3 levels
hopegainHirshabeelle <- rbind(hopegainStudyOverall, hopegainHirshabeelleOverall, hopegainHirshabeelleDistrict)

hopegainHirshabeelle <- hopegainHirshabeelle %>% mutate(Gain = round((Endline - Baseline), 2))
hopegainHirshabeelle <- hopegainHirshabeelle %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
hopegainHirshabeelle <- hopegainHirshabeelle %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse(Endline > Baseline, Endline + .4, Baseline + .7))

hopegainHirshabeelle$District <- sapply(hopegainHirshabeelle$District, as.factor)
hopegainHirshabeelle$District <- fct_relevel(hopegainHirshabeelle$District, "Jowhar", "Balcad", "Hirshabeelle Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")


ggplot(hopegainHirshabeelle) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color="black") + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=4.5) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,1,2,3,4,5), limits=c(0, 5)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=4.5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y="Hope Gain", title="Hirshabeelle Student Hope Gains Over One Academic Year") + coord_flip()
```

#### State of Hirshabeelle Student EGRA Gains

<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains for Hirshabeelle by District Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve Hirshabeelle District Year 1 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- merge(egragainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, egragainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, by='District_f')
egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- merge(egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, egragainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Hirshabeelle State Overall year 1 EGRA gains
egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')

egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1, egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1)
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Hirshabeelle Overall')
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build study overall year 1 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')

egragainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egragainendStudyOverallYr1)
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)

## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainHirshabeelleYr1 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr1, egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr1, egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1)

egragainHirshabeelleYr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainHirshabeelleYr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainHirshabeelleYr1$District <- sapply(egragainHirshabeelleYr1$District, as.factor)
egragainHirshabeelleYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egragainHirshabeelleYr1$District, "Jowhar", "Balcad", "Hirshabeelle Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainHirshabeelle2Yr1 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr1
egragainHirshabeelle2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egragainHirshabeelle2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegragainHirshabeelleYr1 <- ggplot(egragainHirshabeelleYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGRA Gains for Hirshabeelle by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retrieve Hirshabeelle District year 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- merge(egragainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, egragainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, by='District_f')
egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- merge(egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, egragainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Hirshabeelle State Overall year 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2, egragainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2)
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Hirshabeelle Overall')
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)


## build Study Overall year 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egragainendStudyOverallYr2)
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)



## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainHirshabeelleYr2 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr2, egragainHirshabeelleOverallYr2, egragainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2)

egragainHirshabeelleYr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainHirshabeelleYr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainHirshabeelleYr2$District <- sapply(egragainHirshabeelleYr2$District, as.factor)
egragainHirshabeelleYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egragainHirshabeelleYr2$District, "Jowhar", "Balcad", "Hirshabeelle Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainHirshabeelle2Yr2 <- egragainHirshabeelleYr2
egragainHirshabeelle2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egragainHirshabeelle2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egragainHirshabeelle2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egragainHirshabeelle2Yr2)

ggplotegragainHirshabeelleYr2 <- ggplot(egragainHirshabeelleYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegragainHirshabeelleYr1, ggplotegragainHirshabeelleYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1.15,1),				top=textGrob("Hirshabeelle EGRA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
				
```


<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains table for Hirshabeelle by District Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Hirshabeelle
egragainHirshabeelleCombined <- merge(egragainHirshabeelle2Yr1, egragainHirshabeelle2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egragainHirshabeelleCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,2], 0)
egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,3], 0)
egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,4], 0)
egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,5], 0)
egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,6], 0)
egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egragainHirshabeelleCombined[,7], 0)

egragainHirshabeelleCombined <- egragainHirshabeelleCombined[c(4,2,1,3),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- flextable(egragainHirshabeelleCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- add_header_row(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined,  values = c('Hirshabeelle EGRA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- bold(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- autofit(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- height(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=1, 1.6)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- align(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- bg(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- bg(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=4)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=7)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, j=1)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline_left(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, border = std_border)
flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined <- border_outer(flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```

<br/>

`r flexegragainHirshabeelleCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Hirshabeelle EGRA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA subsection median gains from level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 1 by Hirshabeelle schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainL1 <- merge(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2, egraEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainL1 $Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL1 <- ggplot(egragainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Hirshabeelle Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
	
grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egrasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL1,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.15,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 2 by Hirshabeelle schools for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeelle <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot1 <- egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2 <- egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2)
egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeelle <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot1 <- egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeelle %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2 <- egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2)
egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainbyL2Hirshabeelle <- merge(egraBSubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2, egraESubsectionL2Hirshabeellepivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainbyL2Hirshabeelle$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainbyL2Hirshabeelle$Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL2 <- ggplot(egragainbyL2Hirshabeelle) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Hirshabeelle Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
	
grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egrasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.15,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))	
```


<br/>

#### State of Hirshabeelle Student EGMA Gains

```{r EGMA Gains for Hirshabeelle by District Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve Hirshabeelle District year 1 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, egmagainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, by='District_f')
egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1, egmagainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Hirshabeelle State Overall year 1 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')

egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr1, egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr1)
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Hirshabeelle Overall')
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build study overall year 1 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')

egmagainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egmagainendStudyOverallYr1)
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)

## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainHirshabeelleYr1 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr1, egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr1, egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr1)

egmagainHirshabeelleYr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainHirshabeelleYr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainHirshabeelleYr1$District <- sapply(egmagainHirshabeelleYr1$District, as.factor)
egmagainHirshabeelleYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainHirshabeelleYr1$District, "Jowhar", "Balcad", "Hirshabeelle Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr1 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr1
egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegmagainHirshabeelleYr1 <- ggplot(egmagainHirshabeelleYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGMA Gains for Hirshabeelle by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retrieve Hirshabeelle District Year 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, egmagainendHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, by='District_f')
egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2, egmagainbaseHirshabeelleSchool2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build Hirshabeelle State Overall Year 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseHirshabeelleOverallYr2, egmagainendHirshabeelleOverallYr2)
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Hirshabeelle Overall')
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierHirshabeelle %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)


## build Study Overall Year 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egmagainendStudyOverallYr2)
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)



## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainHirshabeelleYr2 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr2, egmagainHirshabeelleOverallYr2, egmagainHirshabeelleDisctrictYr2)

egmagainHirshabeelleYr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainHirshabeelleYr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainHirshabeelleYr2$District <- sapply(egmagainHirshabeelleYr2$District, as.factor)
egmagainHirshabeelleYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainHirshabeelleYr2$District, "Jowhar", "Balcad", "Hirshabeelle Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr2 <- egmagainHirshabeelleYr2
egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egmagainHirshabeelle2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr2)

ggplotegmagainHirshabeelleYr2 <- ggplot(egmagainHirshabeelleYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegmagainHirshabeelleYr1, ggplotegmagainHirshabeelleYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1.15,1),top=textGrob("Hirshabeelle EGMA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```

<br/>

```{r EGMA Gains table for Hirshabeelle by District Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Hirshabeelle
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- merge(egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr1, egmagainHirshabeelle2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,2], 0)
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,3], 0)
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,4], 0)
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,5], 0)
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,6], 0)
egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[,7], 0)

egmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- egmagainHirshabeelleCombined[c(4,2,1,3),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- flextable(egmagainHirshabeelleCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- add_header_row(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined,  values = c('Hirshabeelle EGMA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- bold(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- autofit(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- height(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=1, 1.6)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- width(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- align(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- bg(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- bg(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=4)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=7)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, j=1)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- vline_left(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, border = std_border)
flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined <- border_outer(flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```
