`r flexegmagainHirshabeelleCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Hirshabeelle EGMA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGMA subsection median gains from Level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains year 1 by Hirshabeelle schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL1 <- merge(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL1$Subsection, "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsHirshabeelleplot <- ggplot(egmagainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Hirshabeelle Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egmasubsectionsHirshabeelleplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))	
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains year 2 by Hirshabeelle schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeelle <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot1 <- egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeelle %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2 <- egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2)
egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeelle <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQHirshabeelleSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot1 <- egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeelle %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2 <- egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2)
egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainbyL2Hirshabeelle <- merge(egmaBL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2, egmaEL2SubsectionHirshabeellepivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainbyL2Hirshabeelle$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainbyL2Hirshabeelle$Subsection, "Division", "Multiplication", "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL2 <- ggplot(egmagainbyL2Hirshabeelle) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Hirshabeelle Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
	
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egmasubsectionsHirshabeelleplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))	

```

\newpage

### State of Jubbaland Data


```{r baseline-endline retained students Jubbaland build leaflet map, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}

SchoolIdMediansJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGRAMedian = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMediansJubbaland <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMediansJubbaland)

SchoolIdMedians2Jubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGMAMedian = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians2Jubbaland <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians2Jubbaland)

SchoolIdMedianCombineJubbaland <- merge(SchoolIdMediansJubbaland, SchoolIdMedians2Jubbaland, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateJubbaland <- merge(SchoolIdMedianCombineJubbaland, location, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateJubbaland <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateJubbaland %>% rename("long" = GPSLongitude, "lat"=GPSLatitude)

schoolsJubbaland <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(lat, long, egra = EGRAMedian, egma = EGMAMedian, Location = LocationTypeDesc)

schoolsJubbaland$Location <- sapply(schoolsJubbaland$Location, as.factor)

getColor <- function(population) { 
		sapply(schoolsJubbaland$Location, function(Location) {  
		if(Location == "Rural") {
		"green"
		} else {"blue"} })}

icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'ios-close',
  iconColor = 'black',
  library = 'ion',
  markerColor = getColor()
)

leaflet(schoolsJubbaland) %>% addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(~long, ~lat, icon=icons, label=~as.character(Location))

```

* Green = Northern Jubbaland, Blue = Southern Jubbaland

```{r Jubbaland demographics table by location type, include=TRUE}

## Retrieve Jubbaland State Data
JubbalandN <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland)

## Overall Jubbaland Gender
GenderOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## calculate percent
GenderOverallJubbaland <- GenderOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(per = round((n/JubbalandN)*100, sigdig3))
## add percent label
GenderOverallJubbaland <- GenderOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderOverallJubbaland <- as.data.frame(GenderOverallJubbaland)
GenderOverallJubbaland <- GenderOverallJubbaland %>% arrange(n)
GenderOverallJubbaland <- GenderOverallJubbaland[-c(1),]


## Jubbaland Gender by Location
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland)
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland[-c(1,3),]
GenderbyLocationType2Jubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationType2Jubbaland %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotJubbaland <- GenderbyLocationTypePivotJubbaland %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")


## Overall Jubbaland median age and range
MedianAgeOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
## Age Range
MinAgeOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgeOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## create range
AgeRangeOverallJubbaland <- paste0("(", MinAgeOverallJubbaland, "-", MaxAgeOverallJubbaland, ")")
AgeOverallJubbaland <- paste0(MedianAgeOverallJubbaland, " ", AgeRangeOverallJubbaland)

## Jubbaland Median age by location
MedianAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland <- MedianAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland <- MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")

## Jubbaland Age Range by location
MinAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## Jubbaland create Age range
AgeRangebyLocationTypeJubbaland <- merge(MinAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland, MaxAgebyLocationTypeJubbaland, by.x='LocationTypeDesc_f', by.y='LocationTypeDesc_f')
AgeRangebyLocationTypeJubbaland <- AgeRangebyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% mutate(Range = paste0("(", min, "-", max, ")"))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland$Rural[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland$Rural[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeJubbaland[1,4], " ")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland$Urban[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland$Urban[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeJubbaland[2,4], " ")


## Overall Jubbaland Attend Other Prior
AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
## calculate percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(per = round((n/JubbalandN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland)
AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')

## Jubbaland Attend Other Prior by Location
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Jubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2Jubbaland %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")


## Overall Jubbaland Maternal Ed
MaternalEdOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
## calculate percent
MaternalEdOverallJubbaland <- MaternalEdOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(per = round((n/JubbalandN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
MaternalEdOverallJubbaland <- MaternalEdOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdOverallJubbaland <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdOverallJubbaland)
MaternalEdOverallJubbaland <- MaternalEdOverallJubbaland %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')

## Jubbaland Maternal Ed by Location
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyLocationType2Jubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2Jubbaland %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")


## Overall Jubbaland Study Language
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- LanguagesOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(per = round((n/JubbalandN)*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- LanguagesOverallJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), "%)"))
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- as.data.frame(LanguagesOverallJubbaland)
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- LanguagesOverallJubbaland %>% arrange(n)
LanguagesOverallJubbaland <- LanguagesOverallJubbaland[-c(1,2),]

## Jubbaland Study Language by location
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland[-c(1,3,4),]
LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2Jubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeJubbaland %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationType2Jubbaland %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland <- LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

LocationTypeTableJubbaland <- rbind(GenderbyLocationTypePivotJubbaland, MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotJubbaland, AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland, MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland, LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotJubbaland)

LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland <- LocationTypeTableJubbaland[,c(3,1,2)]

LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland)

LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =10, ncol = 6))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo) <- c("Student Characteristic", "Population", "All", "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

## set student characteristic and population columns
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[1,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[1,1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[1,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[2,2] <- "Jubbaland"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[3,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[2,1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[3,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[4,2] <- "Jubbaland"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[5,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[3,1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[5,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[6,2] <- "Jubbaland"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[7,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[4,1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[7,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[8,2] <- "Jubbaland"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[9,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[5,1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[9,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo[10,2] <- "Jubbaland"

## set all column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[1] <- GenderOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[2] <- GenderOverallJubbaland$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[3] <- AgeOverallStudy
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[4] <- AgeOverallJubbaland
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[5] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[6] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallJubbaland$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[7] <- MaternalEdOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[8] <- MaternalEdOverallJubbaland$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[9] <- LanguagesOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$All[10] <- LanguagesOverallJubbaland$label

## set idp column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$IDP[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$IDP[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$IDP[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$IDP[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$IDP[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[5]

## set rural column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[5]

## set rural column for Jubbaland students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Rural[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Rural[5]

## set urban column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[5]

## set urban column for Jubbaland students
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[2] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[4] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[6] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[8] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo$Urban[10] <- LocationTypeTable2Jubbaland$Urban[5]

gray_border <- fp_border(color = "gray")

flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- flextable(LocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo)

flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- footnote(
  flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i = 1, j = 4,
  ref_symbols = "*",
  value = as_paragraph("No data was collected from IDP Location Type sites in Jubbaland"), part="header")
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- autofit(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- add_header_row(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, values = c("  ", "School Location Type"), colwidths = c(3,3))
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- bold(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=1, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=2, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=3, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=4, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=5, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=6, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- merge_at(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- valign(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=1, j = 1, part="all", valign = "top")
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline_top(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- vline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, j=3, part="all")
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=2, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=4, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=6, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=8, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=10, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=1, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=3, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=5, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=7, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i=9, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- height(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, height= .06)
flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo <- fontsize(flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")

```

`r flexLocationTypeTable2JubbalandCombo`

#### State of Jubbaland Retention and Attrition

```{r baseline-endline student retention table for Jubbaland, include=TRUE}
 dfDemoTableJubbaland <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =27, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfDemoTableJubbaland) <- c("\nGroup", "\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABJubbalanddf <- EndlinestudentsurveyJubbaland %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BeginCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginJubbaland)
Yr1EndCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndJubbaland)
Yr1RetentionCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionJubbaland)
Yr1AttritionCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionJubbaland)
Yr2BeginCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2BeginJubbaland)
Yr2EndCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndJubbaland)
Yr2RetentionCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionJubbaland)
Yr2AttritionCountJubbaland <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionJubbaland)
TwoYrRetentionCountJubbaland <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionJubbaland)
TwoYrAttritionCountJubbaland <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionJubbaland)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Begin Jubbaland
yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 1 end Jubbaland
yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 1 Retained students Jubbaland
yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 1 students lost Jubbaland
yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## Get program data for Yr 2 Begin Jubbaland
yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2BeginJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 2 end Jubbaland
yr2endprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2endprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2endprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 2 Retained Students Jubbaland
yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for Yr 2 end students lost Jubbaland
yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for 2 Year Retained Students Jubbaland
twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## get program data for 2 Year Students lost Jubbaland
twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionJubbaland %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland)

## set program row 1 for all students
dfDemoTableJubbaland[1,] <- buildProgramRow1
dfDemoTableJubbaland[1,1] <- 'Study Totals'

## build and set program row 2 Jubbaland Totals
buildProgramRow2Jubbaland <- c('Jubbaland Totals', '', 
Yr1BeginCountJubbaland, 
Yr1EndCountJubbaland, 
paste0(Yr1RetentionCountJubbaland, ' (', percent(Yr1RetentionCountJubbaland/Yr1BeginCountJubbaland), ')'), paste0(Yr1AttritionCountJubbaland, ' (',  percent(Yr1AttritionCountJubbaland/Yr1BeginCountJubbaland), ')'), 
Yr2BeginCountJubbaland,
Yr2EndCountJubbaland, 
paste0(Yr2RetentionCountJubbaland, ' (', percent(Yr2RetentionCountJubbaland/Yr2BeginCountJubbaland), ')'),
paste0(Yr2AttritionCountJubbaland, ' (', percent(Yr2AttritionCountJubbaland/Yr2BeginCountJubbaland), ')'),
paste0(TwoYrRetentionCountJubbaland, ' (',  percent(TwoYrRetentionCountJubbaland/Yr1BeginCountJubbaland), ')'), paste0(TwoYrAttritionCountJubbaland, ' (',  percent(TwoYrAttritionCountJubbaland/Yr1BeginCountJubbaland), ')'))
dfDemoTableJubbaland[2,] <- buildProgramRow2Jubbaland

## build and set program row 3
buildProgramRow3Jubbaland <- c('Program', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,1]), yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], 
yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2],
yr2endprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2],
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableJubbaland[3,] <- buildProgramRow3Jubbaland

## build and set program row 4
buildProgramRow4Jubbaland <- c('', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,1]), yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], 
yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2],

paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'))

yr1endprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'),
```
