```{r baseline-endline student retention table for Jubbaland, include=TRUE}
yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## Get language data for yr 2 end Jubbaland
yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndJubbaland %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## Get language data for yr 2 Retained students Jubbaland
yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionJubbaland %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## Get language data for yr 2 Students lost Jubbaland
yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionJubbaland %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## Get language data for 2 yr Retained Students Jubbaland
twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionJubbaland %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## Get language data for 2 yr students lost Jubbaland
twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionJubbaland %>% group_by(Languages2_f) %>% count()
twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland <- as.data.frame(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland)

## build and set language row 1 Jubbaland overall row 24
buildlanguageRow1Jubbaland <- c('Student Dialects', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,1]), 
yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableJubbaland[24,] <- buildlanguageRow1Jubbaland

## build and set language row 2 Jubbaland overall row 25
buildlanguageRow2Jubbaland <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[2,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableJubbaland[25,] <- buildlanguageRow2Jubbaland

## build and set language row 3 Jubbaland overall row 26
buildlanguageRow3Jubbaland <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0('0', ' (', '0%', ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotJubbaland[3,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableJubbaland[26,] <- buildlanguageRow3Jubbaland

dfDemoTableJubbaland <- drop_na(dfDemoTableJubbaland)

dfDemoTableJubbaland[,8] <- NULL
dfDemoTableJubbaland[,4] <- NULL

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- flextable(dfDemoTableJubbaland)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- autofit(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- height(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bold(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 1:2, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bold(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=2, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=3:5, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=6:7, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=8:9, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=10:11, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=12:13, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=14:17, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=18:19, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=20:21, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=22:23, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=24:26, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=4, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=5, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=6, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=7, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=8, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=9, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- width(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=10, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=1)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=2)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=5)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=7)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=9)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=11)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=13)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=17)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=19)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=21)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- hline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i=23)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- vline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=2)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- vline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=5)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- vline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=8)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- vline(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, j=10)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- vline_left(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- border_outer(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, part = "all", border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8.5, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- align(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- align(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- valign(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 2, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 4, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 6, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 8, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 10, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 12, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 14, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 16, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 18, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 20, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 22, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 24, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- bg(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = 26, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- padding(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemoJubbaland <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemoJubbaland)
```

`r flexSurveyDemoJubbaland`

#### State of Jubbaland Student Perception of Hope

```{r hope gains for Jubbaland by School, include=TRUE, fig.height=3.2, fig.width=7.0}
## build school level hope gain data for Jubbaland
hopebaseJubbalandLocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
hopebaseJubbalandLocation <- as.data.frame(hopebaseJubbalandLocation)
hopeendJubbalandLocation <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
hopeendJubbalandLocation <- as.data.frame(hopeendJubbalandLocation)

hopeJubbalandLocation <- merge(hopebaseJubbalandLocation, hopeendJubbalandLocation, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
colnames(hopeJubbalandLocation) <- c('Location', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
hopeJubbalandLocation <- hopeJubbalandLocation %>% mutate(Population = ifelse(Location=='Rural', 'Northern Kismaayo', 'Southern Kismaayo'))
hopeJubbalandLocation$Location <- NULL
hopeJubbalandLocation <- hopeJubbalandLocation[, c(3, 1, 2)]

## build Jubbaland State Overall hope gain data
hopebaseJubbalandOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopebaseJubbalandOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopeendJubbalandOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopeendJubbalandOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopeJubbalandOverall <- cbind(hopebaseJubbalandOverall, hopeendJubbalandOverall)
hopeJubbalandOverall <- hopeJubbalandOverall %>% mutate(Population = 'Jubbaland Overall')
hopeJubbalandOverall <- hopeJubbalandOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]

## build study overall hope gain data
hopebaseStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopebaseStudyOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopeendStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopeendStudyOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopeStudyOverall <- cbind(hopebaseStudyOverall, hopeendStudyOverall)
hopeStudyOverall <- hopeStudyOverall %>% mutate(Population = 'Study Overall')
hopeStudyOverall <- hopeStudyOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]

## Combine data from 3 levels
hopeJubbaland <- rbind(hopeStudyOverall, hopeJubbalandOverall, hopeJubbalandLocation)

hopeJubbaland <- hopeJubbaland %>% mutate(Gain = round((Endline - Baseline), 2))
hopeJubbaland <- hopeJubbaland %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
hopeJubbaland <- hopeJubbaland %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse(Endline > Baseline, Endline + .7, Baseline + .7))

hopeJubbaland$Population <- sapply(hopeJubbaland$Population, as.factor)
hopeJubbaland$Population <- fct_relevel(hopeJubbaland$Population, "Southern Kismaayo", "Northern Kismaayo", "Jubbaland Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")


ggplot(hopeJubbaland) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=Population, xend=Population, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color="black") + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=4.5) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,1,2,3,4,5), limits=c(0, 5)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=4.5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y="Hope Gain", title="Jubbaland Student Hope Gains Over One Academic Year") + coord_flip()
```


#### State of Jubbaland Student EGRA Gains

<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains for Jubbaland by location type Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGRA baseline year 1
egrabaseJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGRA Gain year 1
egragainJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGRA endline year 1
egraendJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Location Type year 1
egraJubbalandLocationYr1 <- merge(egrabaseJubbalandLocationYr1, egraendJubbalandLocationYr1, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- merge(egraJubbalandLocationYr1, egragainJubbalandLocationYr1, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
colnames(egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo) <- c('Location', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## reset Rural to North Kismaayo and Urban to South Kismaayo
egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo %>% mutate(Population = ifelse(Location=='Rural', 'Northern Kismaayo', 'Southern Kismaayo'))
egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo$Location <- NULL
egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]



## build Jubbaland State Overall year 1 EGRA gains
## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA baseline year 1
egrabaseJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA Gain year 1
egragainJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA endline year 1
egraendJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Overall year 1
egraJubbalandOverallYr1 <- cbind(egrabaseJubbalandOverallYr1, egraendJubbalandOverallYr1, egragainJubbalandOverallYr1)
egraJubbalandOverallYr1 <- egraJubbalandOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Population = 'Jubbaland Overall')
egraJubbalandOverallYr1 <- egraJubbalandOverallYr1[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egraJubbalandOverallYr1) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')




## build Study Overall EGRA gains year 1
## retrieve Study Overall EGRA baseline year 1
egrabaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGRA Gain year 1
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGRA endline year 1
egraendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Study Overall year 1
egraStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egrabaseStudyOverallYr1, egraendStudyOverallYr1, egragainStudyOverallYr1)
egraStudyOverallYr1 <- egraStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Population = 'Study Overall')
egraStudyOverallYr1 <- egraStudyOverallYr1[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egraStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')


## Combine data from 3 levels
egraJubbalandYr1 <- rbind(egraStudyOverallYr1, egraJubbalandOverallYr1, egraJubbalandLocationYr1Combo)

egraJubbalandYr1 <- egraJubbalandYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 0))
egraJubbalandYr1 <- egraJubbalandYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egraJubbalandYr1$Population <- sapply(egraJubbalandYr1$Population, as.factor)
egraJubbalandYr1$Population <- fct_relevel(egraJubbalandYr1$Population, "Southern Kismaayo", "Northern Kismaayo", "Jubbaland Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egraJubbaland2Yr1 <- egraJubbalandYr1
egraJubbaland2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egraJubbaland2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegraJubbalandYr1 <- ggplot(egraJubbalandYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=Population, xend=Population, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGRA Gains for Jubbaland by location type Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retrieve Jubbaland location EGRA baseline year 2
egrabaseJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGRA Gain year 2
egragainJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGRA endline year 2
egraendJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Location Type year 2
egraJubbalandLocationYr2 <- merge(egrabaseJubbalandLocationYr2, egraendJubbalandLocationYr2, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- merge(egraJubbalandLocationYr2, egragainJubbalandLocationYr2, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
colnames(egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo) <- c('Location', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## reset Rural to North Jubbaland and Urban to South Jubbaland
egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo %>% mutate(Population = ifelse(Location=='Rural', 'Northern Kismaayo', 'Southern Kismaayo'))
egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo$Location <- NULL
egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]



## build Jubbaland State Overall year 2 EGRA gains
## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA baseline year 2
egrabaseJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA Gain year 2
egragainJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGRA endline year 2
egraendJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Overall year 2
egraJubbalandOverallYr2 <- cbind(egrabaseJubbalandOverallYr2, egraendJubbalandOverallYr2, egragainJubbalandOverallYr2)
egraJubbalandOverallYr2 <- egraJubbalandOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Population = 'Jubbaland Overall')
egraJubbalandOverallYr2 <- egraJubbalandOverallYr2[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egraJubbalandOverallYr2) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')



## build Study Overall EGRA gains year 2
## retrieve Study Overall EGRA baseline year 2
egrabaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGRA Gain year 2
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGRA endline year 2
egraendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Study Overall year 2
egraStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egrabaseStudyOverallYr2, egraendStudyOverallYr2, egragainStudyOverallYr2)
egraStudyOverallYr2 <- egraStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Population = 'Study Overall')
egraStudyOverallYr2 <- egraStudyOverallYr2[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egraStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')


## Combine data from 3 levels
egraJubbalandYr2 <- rbind(egraStudyOverallYr2, egraJubbalandOverallYr2, egraJubbalandLocationYr2Combo)
egraJubbaland2Yr2 <- egraJubbalandYr2

egraJubbalandYr2 <- egraJubbalandYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 0))
egraJubbalandYr2 <- egraJubbalandYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egraJubbalandYr2$Population <- sapply(egraJubbalandYr2$Population, as.factor)
egraJubbalandYr2$Population <- fct_relevel(egraJubbalandYr2$Population, "Southern Kismaayo", "Northern Kismaayo", "Jubbaland Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egraJubbaland2Yr2 <- egraJubbalandYr2
egraJubbaland2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egraJubbaland2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egraJubbaland2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egraJubbaland2Yr2)

ggplotegraJubbalandYr2 <- ggplot(egraJubbalandYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=Population, xend=Population, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegraJubbalandYr1, ggplotegraJubbalandYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1.2,1), 				top=textGrob("Jubbaland EGRA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains table for Jubbaland by school Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Jubbaland
egraJubbalandCombined <- merge(egraJubbaland2Yr1, egraJubbaland2Yr2, by.x="Population", by.y="Population", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egraJubbalandCombined) <- c('Population', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egraJubbalandCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,2], 0)
egraJubbalandCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,3], 0)
egraJubbalandCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,4], 0)
egraJubbalandCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,5], 0)
egraJubbalandCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,6], 0)
egraJubbalandCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egraJubbalandCombined[,7], 0)

egraJubbalandCombined <- egraJubbalandCombined[c(4,1,2,3),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- flextable(egraJubbalandCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- add_header_row(flexegraJubbalandCombined,  values = c('Jubbaland EGRA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- bold(flexegraJubbalandCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- autofit(flexegraJubbalandCombined)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- height(flexegraJubbalandCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- fontsize(flexegraJubbalandCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- fontsize(flexegraJubbalandCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- align(flexegraJubbalandCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- bg(flexegraJubbalandCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- bg(flexegraJubbalandCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=4)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=7)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegraJubbalandCombined, j=1)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- vline_left(flexegraJubbalandCombined, border = std_border)
flexegraJubbalandCombined <- border_outer(flexegraJubbalandCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```

<br/>

`r flexegraJubbalandCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Jubbaland EGRA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA subsection median gains from level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 1 by Jubbaland for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainL1 <- merge(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2, egraEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainL1 $Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsJubbalandplot <- ggplot(egragainL1 ) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Jubbaland Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egrasubsectionsJubbalandplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.15,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain year 2 by Jubbaland for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8} 
egraBSubsectionL2Jubbaland <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot1 <- egraBSubsectionL2Jubbaland %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2 <- egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2)
egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraESubsectionL2Jubbaland <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot1 <- egraESubsectionL2Jubbaland %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2 <- egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2)
egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainbyL2Jubbaland <- merge(egraBSubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2, egraESubsectionL2Jubbalandpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainbyL2Jubbaland$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainbyL2Jubbaland$Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsJubbalandplotL2 <- ggplot(egragainbyL2Jubbaland) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Jubbaland Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egrasubsectionsJubbalandplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.15,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```



<br/>

#### State of Jubbaland Student EGMA Gains

```{r EGMA Gains for Jubbaland by location type Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGMA baseline year 1
egmabaseJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGMA Gain year 1
egmagainJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGMA endline year 1
egmaendJubbalandLocationYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Location Type year 1
egmaJubbalandLocationYr1 <- merge(egmabaseJubbalandLocationYr1, egmaendJubbalandLocationYr1, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- merge(egmaJubbalandLocationYr1, egmagainJubbalandLocationYr1, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
colnames(egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo) <- c('Location', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## reset Rural to North Jubbaland and Urban to South Jubbaland
egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo %>% mutate(Population = ifelse(Location=='Rural', 'Northern Kismaayo', 'Southern Kismaayo'))
egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo$Location <- NULL
egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo <- egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]



## build Jubbaland State Overall year 1 EGMA gains
## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA baseline year 1
egmabaseJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA Gain year 1
egmagainJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA endline year 1
egmaendJubbalandOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Overall year 1
egmaJubbalandOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmabaseJubbalandOverallYr1, egmaendJubbalandOverallYr1, egmagainJubbalandOverallYr1)
egmaJubbalandOverallYr1 <- egmaJubbalandOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Population = 'Jubbaland Overall')
egmaJubbalandOverallYr1 <- egmaJubbalandOverallYr1[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egmaJubbalandOverallYr1) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')




## build Study Overall EGMA gains year 1
## retrieve Study Overall EGMA baseline year 1
egmabaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGMA Gain year 1
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGMA endline year 1
egmaendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Study Overall year 1
egmaStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmabaseStudyOverallYr1, egmaendStudyOverallYr1, egmagainStudyOverallYr1)
egmaStudyOverallYr1 <- egmaStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Population = 'Study Overall')
egmaStudyOverallYr1 <- egmaStudyOverallYr1[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egmaStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')


## Combine data from 3 levels
egmaJubbalandYr1 <- rbind(egmaStudyOverallYr1, egmaJubbalandOverallYr1, egmaJubbalandLocationYr1Combo)

egmaJubbalandYr1 <- egmaJubbalandYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 0))
egmaJubbalandYr1 <- egmaJubbalandYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmaJubbalandYr1$Population <- sapply(egmaJubbalandYr1$Population, as.factor)
egmaJubbalandYr1$Population <- fct_relevel(egmaJubbalandYr1$Population, "Southern Kismaayo", "Northern Kismaayo", "Jubbaland Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmaJubbaland2Yr1 <- egmaJubbalandYr1
egmaJubbaland2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egmaJubbaland2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegmaJubbalandYr1 <- ggplot(egmaJubbalandYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=Population, xend=Population, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGMA Gains for Jubbaland by location type Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2}
## retrieve Jubbaland location EGMA baseline year 2
egmabaseJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGMA Gain year 2
egmagainJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Location Type EGMA endline year 2
egmaendJubbalandLocationYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Location Type year 2
egmaJubbalandLocationYr2 <- merge(egmabaseJubbalandLocationYr2, egmaendJubbalandLocationYr2, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- merge(egmaJubbalandLocationYr2, egmagainJubbalandLocationYr2, by='LocationTypeDesc_f')
colnames(egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo) <- c('Location', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## reset Rural to North Kismaayo and Urban to South Kismaayo
egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo %>% mutate(Population = ifelse(Location=='Rural', 'Northern Kismaayo', 'Southern Kismaayo'))
egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo$Location <- NULL
egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo <- egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]



## build Jubbaland State Overall year 2 EGMA gains
## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA baseline year 2
egmabaseJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA Gain year 2
egmagainJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Jubbaland Overall EGMA endline year 2
egmaendJubbalandOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierJubbaland %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Jubbaland Overall year 2
egmaJubbalandOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmabaseJubbalandOverallYr2, egmaendJubbalandOverallYr2, egmagainJubbalandOverallYr2)
egmaJubbalandOverallYr2 <- egmaJubbalandOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Population = 'Jubbaland Overall')
egmaJubbalandOverallYr2 <- egmaJubbalandOverallYr2[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egmaJubbalandOverallYr2) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')



## build Study Overall EGMA gains year 2
## retrieve Study Overall EGMA baseline year 2
egmabaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGMA Gain year 2
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))

## retrieve Study Overall EGMA endline year 2
egmaendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

## Combine Study Overall year 2
egmaStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmabaseStudyOverallYr2, egmaendStudyOverallYr2, egmagainStudyOverallYr2)
egmaStudyOverallYr2 <- egmaStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Population = 'Study Overall')
egmaStudyOverallYr2 <- egmaStudyOverallYr2[, c(4, 1, 2, 3)]
colnames(egmaStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Population', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')


## Combine data from 3 levels
egmaJubbalandYr2 <- rbind(egmaStudyOverallYr2, egmaJubbalandOverallYr2, egmaJubbalandLocationYr2Combo)
egmaJubbaland2Yr2 <- egmaJubbalandYr2

egmaJubbalandYr2 <- egmaJubbalandYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 0))
egmaJubbalandYr2 <- egmaJubbalandYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmaJubbalandYr2$Population <- sapply(egmaJubbalandYr2$Population, as.factor)
egmaJubbalandYr2$Population <- fct_relevel(egmaJubbalandYr2$Population, "Southern Kismaayo", "Northern Kismaayo", "Jubbaland Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmaJubbaland2Yr2 <- egmaJubbalandYr2
egmaJubbaland2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egmaJubbaland2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egmaJubbaland2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egmaJubbaland2Yr2)

ggplotegmaJubbalandYr2 <- ggplot(egmaJubbalandYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=Population, xend=Population, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Population, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegmaJubbalandYr1, ggplotegmaJubbalandYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1.2,1), 				top=textGrob("Jubbaland EGMA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```

<br/>

```{r EGMA Gains table for Jubbaland by school Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for Jubbaland
egmaJubbalandCombined <- merge(egmaJubbaland2Yr1, egmaJubbaland2Yr2, by.x="Population", by.y="Population", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egmaJubbalandCombined) <- c('Population', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egmaJubbalandCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,2], 0)
egmaJubbalandCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,3], 0)
egmaJubbalandCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,4], 0)
egmaJubbalandCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,5], 0)
egmaJubbalandCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,6], 0)
egmaJubbalandCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egmaJubbalandCombined[,7], 0)

egmaJubbalandCombined <- egmaJubbalandCombined[c(4,1,2,3),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- flextable(egmaJubbalandCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- add_header_row(flexegmaJubbalandCombined,  values = c('Jubbaland EGMA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- bold(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- autofit(flexegmaJubbalandCombined)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- height(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- width(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- fontsize(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- fontsize(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- align(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- bg(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- bg(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=4)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=7)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- vline(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, j=1)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- vline_left(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, border = std_border)
flexegmaJubbalandCombined <- border_outer(flexegmaJubbalandCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```

`r flexegmaJubbalandCombined`

<br/>

#### State of Jubbaland EGMA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGMA subsection median gains from Level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 1 by Jubbaland schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL1 <- merge(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL1$Subsection, "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsJubbalandplot <- ggplot(egmagainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Jubbaland Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egmasubsectionsJubbalandplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))	
```

<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 2 by Jubbaland schools for all students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL2SubsectionJubbaland <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot1 <- egmaBL2SubsectionJubbaland %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2 <- egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))

egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL2SubsectionJubbaland <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQJubbalandSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot1 <- egmaEL2SubsectionJubbaland %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2 <- egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2)
egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainbyL2Jubbaland <- merge(egmaBL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2, egmaEL2SubsectionJubbalandpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainbyL2Jubbaland$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainbyL2Jubbaland$Subsection, "Division", "Multiplication", "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsJubbalandplotL2 <- ggplot(egmagainbyL2Jubbaland) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Jubbaland Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egmasubsectionsJubbalandplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```

\newpage

### State of South-West Data

```{r baseline-endline retained students SouthWest build leaflet map, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}

SchoolIdMediansSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGRAMedian = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMediansSouthWest <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMediansSouthWest)

SchoolIdMedians2SouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(SchoolId) %>% summarise(EGMAMedian = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
SchoolIdMedians2SouthWest <- as.data.frame(SchoolIdMedians2SouthWest)

SchoolIdMedianCombineSouthWest <- merge(SchoolIdMediansSouthWest, SchoolIdMedians2SouthWest, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateSouthWest <- merge(SchoolIdMedianCombineSouthWest, location, by.x="SchoolId", by.y="SchoolId", all.x=TRUE, all.y=FALSE)

SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateSouthWest <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateSouthWest %>% rename("long" = GPSLongitude, "lat"=GPSLatitude)

schoolsSouthWest <- SchoolIdEGRAEGMALocateSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(lat, long, egra = EGRAMedian, egma = EGMAMedian, Location = District_f)

schoolsSouthWest$Location <- sapply(schoolsSouthWest$Location, as.factor)

getColor <- function(population) { 
		sapply(schoolsSouthWest$Location, function(Location) {  
		if(Location == "Baraawe") {
		"green"
		} else if(Location == "Baydhabo") {
		"orange"
		} else {"blue"} })}

icons <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'ios-close',
  iconColor = 'black',
  library = 'ion',
  markerColor = getColor()
)

leaflet(schoolsSouthWest) %>% addTiles() %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(~long, ~lat, icon=icons, label=~as.character(Location))

```

* Green = Baraawe District, Orange = Baydhabo District, Blue = Wanlawayn District

```{r SouthWest demographics table by location type, include=TRUE}

## Retrieve SouthWest State Data
SouthWestN <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest)

## Overall SouthWest Gender
GenderOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(Gender_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## calculate percent
GenderOverallSouthWest <- GenderOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(per = round((n/SouthWestN)*100, sigdig3))
## add percent label
GenderOverallSouthWest <- GenderOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderOverallSouthWest <- as.data.frame(GenderOverallSouthWest)
GenderOverallSouthWest <- GenderOverallSouthWest %>% arrange(n)
GenderOverallSouthWest <- GenderOverallSouthWest[-c(1),]

## South-West Gender by Location
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Gender_f)
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
## add percent
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(Gender_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3),  '%)'))
## convert to dataframe
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- as.data.frame(GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest)
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest[-c(1,3,5),]
GenderbyLocationType2SouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationType2SouthWest %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
GenderbyLocationTypePivotSouthWest <- GenderbyLocationTypePivotSouthWest %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Predominant Gender")


## Overall SouthWest median age and range
MedianAgeOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
## Age Range
MinAgeOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgeOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## create range
AgeRangeOverallSouthWest <- paste0("(", MinAgeOverallSouthWest, "-", MaxAgeOverallSouthWest, ")")
AgeOverallSouthWest <- paste0(MedianAgeOverallSouthWest, " ", AgeRangeOverallSouthWest)

## SouthWest median age by location
MedianAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(median=median(StudentAge))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest <- MedianAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = median)
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest <- MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Median Age")

## SouthWest age range by location
MinAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(min=min(StudentAge))
MaxAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% summarise(max=max(StudentAge))
## SouthWest create Age range
AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest <- merge(MinAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest, MaxAgebyLocationTypeSouthWest, by.x='LocationTypeDesc_f', by.y='LocationTypeDesc_f')
AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest <- AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% mutate(Range = paste0("(", min, "-", max, ")"))
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$IDP[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$IDP[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest[1,4], " ")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$Rural[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$Rural[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest[2,4], " ")
MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$Urban[1] <- paste0(MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest$Urban[1], " ", AgeRangebyLocationTypeSouthWest[3,4], " ")


## Overall SouthWest Attend Other Prior
AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
## calculate percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(per = round((n/SouthWestN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest)
AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')

## SouthWest Attend other prior by location
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(AttendOtherPrior_f)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- as.data.frame(AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% filter(AttendOtherPrior_f=='Yes')
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2SouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2SouthWest %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Prior Ed")


## Overall SouthWest MaternalEd
MaternalEdOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
## calculate percent
MaternalEdOverallSouthWest <- MaternalEdOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(per = round((n/SouthWestN)*100, sigdig3))
## combine n and percent
MaternalEdOverallSouthWest <- MaternalEdOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdOverallSouthWest <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdOverallSouthWest)
MaternalEdOverallSouthWest <- MaternalEdOverallSouthWest %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')

## SouthWest MaternalEd by location
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(MotherLiteracy_f)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%'))
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- as.data.frame(MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest)
MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% filter(MotherLiteracy_f=='Yes')
MaternalEdbyLocationType2SouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2SouthWest %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Maternal Ed")


## Overall SouthWest study languages
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- LanguagesOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(per = round((n/SouthWestN)*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- LanguagesOverallSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), "%)"))
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- as.data.frame(LanguagesOverallSouthWest)
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- LanguagesOverallSouthWest %>% arrange(n)
LanguagesOverallSouthWest <- LanguagesOverallSouthWest[-c(1,2),]

## SouthWest study languages by location type
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count(Languages2_f)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% mutate(per = round((n/sum(n))*100, sigdig3))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% mutate(label = paste0(Languages2_f, " (", specify_decimal(per, sigdig3), '%)'))
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- as.data.frame(LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% arrange(LocationTypeDesc_f, n)
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest[-c(1,3,4,6,7),]
LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2SouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationTypeSouthWest %>% dplyr::select(LocationTypeDesc_f, label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationType2SouthWest %>% pivot_wider(names_from = LocationTypeDesc_f, values_from = label)
LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest <- LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest %>% mutate(`Student Characteristic`="Primary Dialect")

LocationTypeTableSouthWest <- rbind(GenderbyLocationTypePivotSouthWest, MedianAgebyLocationTypePivotSouthWest, AttendOtherPriorbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest, MaternalEdbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest, LanguagesbyLocationType2PivotSouthWest)

LocationTypeTable2SouthWest <- LocationTypeTableSouthWest[,c(3,1,2)]

LocationTypeTable2SouthWest <- as.data.frame(LocationTypeTable2SouthWest)

LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =10, ncol = 6))

## set dataframe column headers
colnames(LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo) <- c("Student Characteristic", "Population", "All", "IDP", "Rural", "Urban")

## set studentcharacteristic and population columns
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[1,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[1,1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[1,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[2,2] <- "South-West"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[3,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[2,1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[3,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[4,2] <- "South-West"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[5,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[3,1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[5,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[6,2] <- "South-West"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[7,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[4,1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[7,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[8,2] <- "South-West"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[9,1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy[5,1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[9,2] <- "All Study"
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo[10,2] <- "South-West"

## set all column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[1] <- GenderOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[2] <- GenderOverallSouthWest$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[3] <- AgeOverallStudy
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[4] <- AgeOverallSouthWest
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[5] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[6] <- AttendOtherPriorOverallSouthWest$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[7] <- MaternalEdOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[8] <- MaternalEdOverallSouthWest$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[9] <- LanguagesOverallStudy$label
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$All[10] <- LanguagesOverallSouthWest$label

## set idp column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$IDP[5]

## set idp column for SouthWest students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[2] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$IDP[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[4] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$IDP[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[6] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$IDP[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[8] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$IDP[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$IDP[10] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$IDP[5]

## set rural column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Rural[5]

## set rural column for SouthWest students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[2] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Rural[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[4] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Rural[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[6] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Rural[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[8] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Rural[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Rural[10] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Rural[5]

## set urban column for all study students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[1] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[3] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[5] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[7] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[9] <- LocationTypeTable2AllStudy$Urban[5]

## set urban column for SouthWest students
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[2] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Urban[1]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[4] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Urban[2]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[6] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Urban[3]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[8] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Urban[4]
LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo$Urban[10] <- LocationTypeTable2SouthWest$Urban[5]

gray_border <- fp_border(color = "gray")

flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- flextable(LocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo)

flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- autofit(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- add_header_row(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, values = c("  ", "School Location Type"), colwidths = c(3,3))
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- bold(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, part = "header", bold = TRUE)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=1, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=2, 1.0)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=3, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=4, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=5, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- width(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=6, 1.2)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- merge_at(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=1:2, j=1, part="body")
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- valign(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=1, j = 1, part="all", valign = "top")
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline_top(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j = NULL, border = NULL, part = "header")
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- vline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, j=3, part="all")
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=2, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=4, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=6, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=8, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=10, j=1:6)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=1, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=3, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=5, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=7, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- hline(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i=9, j=2:6, border=gray_border)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- height(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, height= .06)
flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo <- fontsize(flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 9, part = "all")
```

`r flexLocationTypeTable2SouthWestCombo`
