```{r baseline-endline student retention table for SouthWest, include=TRUE}
 dfDemoTableSouthWest <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow =27, ncol = 12))
## set dataframe column headers
colnames(dfDemoTableSouthWest) <- c("\nGroup", "\nSubgroup", "Year 1 Begin", "Year 1 End", "Year 1 Retention", "Year 1 Attrition", "Year 2 Begin", "Year 2 End", "Year 2 Retention", "Year 2 Attrition", "2-Year Retention", "2-Year Attrition")

endlineBABSouthWestdf <- EndlinestudentsurveySouthWest %>% filter(MatchPoint!="B")

## Set Basic Counts
Yr1BeginCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginSouthWest)
Yr1EndCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndSouthWest)
Yr1RetentionCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionSouthWest)
Yr1AttritionCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionSouthWest)
Yr2BeginCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2BeginSouthWest)
Yr2EndCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndSouthWest)
Yr2RetentionCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionSouthWest)
Yr2AttritionCountSouthWest <- nrow(EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionSouthWest)
TwoYrRetentionCountSouthWest <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionSouthWest)
TwoYrAttritionCountSouthWest <- nrow(Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionSouthWest)

## Get program data for Yr 1 Begin SouthWest
yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 1 end SouthWest
yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1EndSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 1 Retained students SouthWest
yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1RetentionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 1 students lost SouthWest
yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1AttritionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## Get program data for Yr 2 Begin SouthWest
yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2BeginSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 2 end SouthWest
yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2EndSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 2 Retained Students SouthWest
yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2RetentionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for Yr 2 end students lost SouthWest
yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr2AttritionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for 2 Year Retained Students SouthWest
twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## get program data for 2 Year Students lost SouthWest
twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionSouthWest %>% group_by(BABProgramGrade_f) %>% count()
twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest <- as.data.frame(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest)

## set program row 1 for all students
dfDemoTableSouthWest[1,] <- buildProgramRow1
dfDemoTableSouthWest[1,1] <- 'Study Totals'

## build and set program row 2
buildProgramRow2SouthWest <- c('South-West Totals', '', 
Yr1BeginCountSouthWest, 
Yr1EndCountSouthWest, 
paste0(Yr1RetentionCountSouthWest, ' (', percent(Yr1RetentionCountSouthWest/Yr1BeginCountSouthWest), ')'), paste0(Yr1AttritionCountSouthWest, ' (',  percent(Yr1AttritionCountSouthWest/Yr1BeginCountSouthWest), ')'), 
Yr2BeginCountSouthWest,
Yr2EndCountSouthWest, 
paste0(Yr2RetentionCountSouthWest, ' (', percent(Yr2RetentionCountSouthWest/Yr2BeginCountSouthWest), ')'),
paste0(Yr2AttritionCountSouthWest, ' (', percent(Yr2AttritionCountSouthWest/Yr2BeginCountSouthWest), ')'),
paste0(TwoYrRetentionCountSouthWest, ' (',  percent(TwoYrRetentionCountSouthWest/Yr1BeginCountSouthWest), ')'), paste0(TwoYrAttritionCountSouthWest, ' (',  percent(TwoYrAttritionCountSouthWest/Yr1BeginCountSouthWest), ')'))
dfDemoTableSouthWest[2,] <- buildProgramRow2SouthWest

## build and set program row 3
buildProgramRow3SouthWest <- c('Program', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,1]), yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], 
yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2],
yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2],
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[1,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableSouthWest[3,] <- buildProgramRow3SouthWest

## build and set program row 4
buildProgramRow4SouthWest <- c('', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,1]), yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], 
yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2],
yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], 
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[2,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableSouthWest[4,] <- buildProgramRow4SouthWest

## build and set program row 5
buildProgramRow5SouthWest <- c('', as.character(yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,1]), yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], 
yr1endprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2],
yr2endprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), paste0(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr2beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), paste0(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginprogrampivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'))

yr1beginlocationpivotSouthWest <- EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginSouthWest %>% group_by(LocationTypeDesc_f) %>% count()

## get location data for year 1 end SouthWest

buildlanguageRow3SouthWest <- c('', as.character(yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,1]), yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], 
yr1endlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], 
paste0(yr1retentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr1retentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr1attritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(yr1attritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
yr2beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2],
yr2endlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2],  
paste0(yr2retentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (',  percent(yr2retentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(yr2attritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(yr2attritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr2beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'),
paste0(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrretentionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'), 
paste0(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2], ' (', percent(twoyrattritionlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]/yr1beginlanguagepivotSouthWest[3,2]), ')'))
dfDemoTableSouthWest[27,] <- buildlanguageRow3SouthWest

dfDemoTableSouthWest <- drop_na(dfDemoTableSouthWest)

dfDemoTableSouthWest[,8] <- NULL
dfDemoTableSouthWest[,4] <- NULL

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")


## create flextables from dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- flextable(dfDemoTableSouthWest)

## set format of flextables
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- autofit(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- add_header_row(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest,  values = c('South-West Retention and Attrition'), colwidths=c(10), top=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bold(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- height(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, height= .06)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bold(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 1:2, bold = TRUE, part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bold(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 1, bold = TRUE, part = "header")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=1, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=2, j=1:2, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=3:5, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=6:8, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=9:10, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=11:12, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=13:14, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=15:18, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=19:20, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=21:22, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=23:24, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- merge_at(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=25:27, j=1, part="body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=1, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=2, 0.8)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=3, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=4, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=5, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=6, 0.5)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=7, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=8, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=9, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- width(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=10, 0.7)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=1)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=2)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=5)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=8)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=10)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=12)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=14)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=18)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=20)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=22)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- hline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i=24)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- vline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=2)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- vline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=5)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- vline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=8)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- vline(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, j=10)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- vline_left(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- border_outer(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, part = "all", border = std_border)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- fontsize(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = NULL, j = NULL, size = 8.5, part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- align(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = NULL, j = 3:10, align = "right", part = "all")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- align(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = NULL, j = 1:2, align = "left", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- valign(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = NULL, j = NULL, part="all", valign = "top")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 2, j = 3:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 4, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 6, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 8, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 10, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 12, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 14, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 16, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 18, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 20, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 22, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 24, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- bg(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = 26, j = 2:10, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- padding(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest, i = NULL, padding.top = 1, padding.bottom = 1)
flexSurveyDemoSouthWest <- fix_border_issues(flexSurveyDemoSouthWest)
```

`r flexSurveyDemoSouthWest`

#### State of South-West Student Perception of Hope

```{r hope gains for SouthWest by District, include=TRUE, fig.height=3, fig.width=7.0}
## build District level hope gain data for SouthWest State
hopegainbaseSouthWestDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
hopegainendSouthWestDistrict <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))

hopegainSouthWestDistrict <- merge(hopegainbaseSouthWestDistrict, hopegainendSouthWestDistrict, by='District_f')
colnames(hopegainSouthWestDistrict) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')


## build SouthWest State Overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseSouthWestOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseSouthWestOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendSouthWestOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendSouthWestOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainSouthWestOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseSouthWestOverall, hopegainendSouthWestOverall)
hopegainSouthWestOverall <- hopegainSouthWestOverall %>% mutate(District = 'South-West Overall')
hopegainSouthWestOverall <- hopegainSouthWestOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]


## build study overall hope gain data
hopegainbaseStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(MHope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainbaseStudyOverall) <- c('Baseline') 
hopegainendStudyOverall <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier %>% summarise(grp.mean = mean(EL2Hope_Avg, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(hopegainendStudyOverall) <- c('Endline')

hopegainStudyOverall <- cbind(hopegainbaseStudyOverall, hopegainendStudyOverall)
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
hopegainStudyOverall <- hopegainStudyOverall[, c(3, 1, 2)]

hopegainSouthWest <- rbind(hopegainStudyOverall, hopegainSouthWestOverall, hopegainSouthWestDistrict)

hopegainSouthWest <- hopegainSouthWest %>% mutate(Gain = round((Endline - Baseline), 2))
hopegainSouthWest <- hopegainSouthWest %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
hopegainSouthWest <- hopegainSouthWest %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse(Endline > Baseline, Endline + .7, Baseline + .7))

hopegainSouthWest$District <- sapply(hopegainSouthWest$District, as.factor)
hopegainSouthWest$District <- fct_relevel(hopegainSouthWest$District, "Wanlawayn", "Baydhabo", "Baraawe", "South-West Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

ggplot(hopegainSouthWest) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color="black") + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=4.5) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,1,2,3,4,5), limits=c(0, 5)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=4.5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y="Hope Gain", title="South-West Student Hope Gains Over One Academic Year") + coord_flip()
```

#### State of South-West Student EGRA Gains

```{r EGRA Gains for SouthWest by district Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve South-West District Year 1 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- merge(egragainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr1, egragainendSouthWestDistrictYr1, by='District_f')
egragainSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- merge(egragainSouthWestDistrictYr1, egragainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainSouthWestDistrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build South-West State Overall Year 1 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendSouthWestOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1, egragainendSouthWestOverallYr1)
egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'South-West Overall')
egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
SouthWestoverallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = SouthWestoverallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build Study Overall Year 1 EGRA gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egragainendStudyOverallYr1)
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
StudyoverallegrapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr1 <- egragainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = StudyoverallegrapctgainYr1$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainSouthWestYr1 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr1, egragainSouthWestOverallYr1, egragainSouthWestDistrictYr1)

egragainSouthWestYr1 <- egragainSouthWestYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainSouthWestYr1 <- egragainSouthWestYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainSouthWestYr1$District <- sapply(egragainSouthWestYr1$District, as.factor)
egragainSouthWestYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egragainSouthWestYr1$District, "Wanlawayn", "Baydhabo", "Baraawe", "South-West Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainSouthWest2Yr1 <- egragainSouthWestYr1
egragainSouthWest2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egragainSouthWest2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegragainSouthWestYr1 <- ggplot(egragainSouthWestYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank())
```


```{r EGRA Gains for SouthWest by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2, fig.height=4}
## retrieve SouthWest District Year 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainendSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egragainSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- merge(egragainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr2, egragainendSouthWestDistrictYr2, by='District_f')
egragainSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- merge(egragainSouthWestDistrictYr2, egragainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egragainSouthWestDistrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build SouthWest State Overall Year 2 EGRA Gains
egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendSouthWestOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2, egragainendSouthWestOverallYr2)
egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'South-West Overall')
egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egragainSouthWestOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)

## build Study overall Year 2 EGRA gains
egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egragainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGRATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egragainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egragainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egragainendStudyOverallYr2)
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egragainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegrapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGRAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egragainStudyOverallYr2 <- egragainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegrapctgainYr2$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egragainSouthWestYr2 <- rbind(egragainStudyOverallYr2, egragainSouthWestOverallYr2, egragainSouthWestDistrictYr2)

egragainSouthWestYr2 <- egragainSouthWestYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egragainSouthWestYr2 <- egragainSouthWestYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egragainSouthWestYr2$District <- sapply(egragainSouthWestYr2$District, as.factor)
egragainSouthWestYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egragainSouthWestYr2$District, "Wanlawayn", "Baydhabo", "Baraawe", "South-West Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egragainSouthWest2Yr2 <- egragainSouthWestYr2
egragainSouthWest2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egragainSouthWest2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egragainSouthWest2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egragainSouthWest2Yr2)

ggplotegragainSouthWestYr2 <- ggplot(egragainSouthWestYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegragainSouthWestYr1, ggplotegragainSouthWestYr2,
                 ncol = 2, widths=c(1,1), 				top=textGrob("South-West EGRA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGRA Gains table for SouthWest by school Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for SouthWest
egragainSouthWestCombined <- merge(egragainSouthWest2Yr1, egragainSouthWest2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egragainSouthWestCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egragainSouthWestCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,2], 0)
egragainSouthWestCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,3], 0)
egragainSouthWestCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,4], 0)
egragainSouthWestCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,5], 0)
egragainSouthWestCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,6], 0)
egragainSouthWestCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egragainSouthWestCombined[,7], 0)

egragainSouthWestCombined <- egragainSouthWestCombined[c(4,3,1,2,5),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- flextable(egragainSouthWestCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- add_header_row(flexegragainSouthWestCombined,  values = c('South-West EGRA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- bold(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- autofit(flexegragainSouthWestCombined)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- height(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- fontsize(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- align(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- bg(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- bg(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=4)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=7)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, j=1)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- vline_left(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, border = std_border)
flexegragainSouthWestCombined <- border_outer(flexegragainSouthWestCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```

<br/>

`r flexegragainSouthWestCombined`

<br/>

#### State of South-West EGRA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA subsection median gains from level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain Year 1 by South-West Schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = MListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = MPhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = MLetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = MInventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = MRealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = MOralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = MReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = MDictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = MDictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egraEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egraEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainL1 <- merge(egraBL1Subsectionpivot2, egraEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainL1 $Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsSouthWestplot <- ggplot(egragainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) + 
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="South-West Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egrasubsectionsSouthWestplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.06,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))

```

<br/>

```{r EGRA Subsection gain Year 2 for South-West schools for all Longitudinal students, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egraBSubsectionL2SouthWest <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = BL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = BL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = BL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = BL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = BL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = BL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = BL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = BL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = BL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraBSubsectionL2SouthWestpivot1 <- egraBSubsectionL2SouthWest %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egraBSubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraBSubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egraESubsectionL2SouthWest <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Listening Comprehension' = EL2ListeningCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Phonemic Awareness' = EL2PhonAwareItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Letter Sounds Identification' = EL2LetSoundItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Invented Words' = EL2InventWordItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Real Words' = EL2RealWordsItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Oral Reading Fluency' = EL2OralRdFlncyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Reading Comprehension' = EL2ReadCompItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 1' = EL2Dictation_01_ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Dictation 2' = EL2Dictation_02_ItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot1 <- egraESubsectionL2SouthWest %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Dictation 2`, `Dictation 1`, `Reading Comprehension`, `Oral Reading Fluency`, `Real Words`, `Invented Words`, `Letter Sounds Identification`, `Phonemic Awareness`, `Listening Comprehension`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2 <- egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2)
egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egragainbyL2SouthWest <- merge(egraBSubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2, egraESubsectionL2SouthWestpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egragainbyL2SouthWest$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egragainbyL2SouthWest$Subsection, "Reading Comprehension", "Oral Reading Fluency", "Real Words", "Invented Words", "Letter Sounds Identification", "Phonemic Awareness", "Listening Comprehension", "Dictation 2", "Dictation 1")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egrasubsectionsSouthWestplotL2 <- ggplot(egragainbyL2SouthWest) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="South-West Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light()+ theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egrasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egrasubsectionsSouthWestplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.06,1), top=textGrob("EGRA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGRA Median Score"))	
```


<br/>

#### State of South-West Student EGMA Gains

```{r EGMA Gains for SouthWest by district Year 1, include=TRUE}
## retrieve South-West District Year 1 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr1, egmagainendSouthWestDistrictYr1, by='District_f')
egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr1 <- merge(egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr1, egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr1, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build South-West State Overall Year 1 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr1, egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr1)
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'South-West Overall')
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
SouthWestoverallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = SouthWestoverallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)

## build Study Overall Year 1 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendStudyOverallYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(MEGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr1) <- c('Endline')

egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr1, egmagainendStudyOverallYr1)
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr1) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
StudyoverallegmapctgainYr1 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(MEGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr1 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr1 %>% mutate(Gain = StudyoverallegmapctgainYr1$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainSouthWestYr1 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr1, egmagainSouthWestOverallYr1, egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr1)

egmagainSouthWestYr1 <- egmagainSouthWestYr1 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainSouthWestYr1 <- egmagainSouthWestYr1 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainSouthWestYr1$District <- sapply(egmagainSouthWestYr1$District, as.factor)
egmagainSouthWestYr1$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainSouthWestYr1$District, "Wanlawayn", "Baydhabo", "Baraawe", "South-West Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainSouthWest2Yr1 <- egmagainSouthWestYr1
egmagainSouthWest2Yr1$Label <- NULL
egmagainSouthWest2Yr1$x_pos <- NULL


ggplotegmagainSouthWestYr1 <- ggplot(egmagainSouthWestYr1) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 1") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(legend.position="none",  axis.title.x=element_blank(), axis.title.y=element_blank())
```


```{r EGMA Gains for SouthWest by District Year 2, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.2, fig.height=4}
## retrieve SouthWest District Year 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainendSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% group_by(District_f) %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))

egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrictYr2, egmagainendSouthWestDistrictYr2, by='District_f')
egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr2 <- merge(egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr2, egmagainbaseSouthWestDistrict2Yr2, by='District_f')
colnames(egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline', 'Gain')

## build SouthWest State Overall Year 2 EGMA Gains
egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')

egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseSouthWestOverallYr2, egmagainendSouthWestOverallYr2)
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'South-West Overall')
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
overallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierSouthWest %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 <- egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = overallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)

## build Study overall Year 2 EGMA gains
egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianBaseline = median(BL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Baseline')
 
egmagainendStudyOverallYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(medianend = median(EL2EGMATotalAdjusted_n, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(egmagainendStudyOverallYr2) <- c('Endline')
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- cbind(egmagainbaseStudyOverallYr2, egmagainendStudyOverallYr2)
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(District = 'Study Overall')
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2[, c(3, 1, 2)]
colnames(egmagainStudyOverallYr2) <- c('District', 'Baseline', 'Endline')
studyoverallegmapctgainYr2 <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier %>% summarise(Gain = median(EL2EGMAPCTGain, na.rm = TRUE))
egmagainStudyOverallYr2 <- egmagainStudyOverallYr2 %>% mutate(Gain = studyoverallegmapctgainYr2$Gain)


## Combine data from 3 levels
egmagainSouthWestYr2 <- rbind(egmagainStudyOverallYr2, egmagainSouthWestOverallYr2, egmagainSouthWestDistrictYr2)

egmagainSouthWestYr2 <- egmagainSouthWestYr2 %>% mutate(Label = specify_decimal(Gain, 2))
egmagainSouthWestYr2 <- egmagainSouthWestYr2 %>% mutate(x_pos = ifelse((Baseline<Endline), ((Endline-Baseline)/2)+Baseline, ((Baseline-Endline)/2)+Endline))

egmagainSouthWestYr2$District <- sapply(egmagainSouthWestYr2$District, as.factor)
egmagainSouthWestYr2$District <- fct_relevel(egmagainSouthWestYr2$District, "Wanlawayn", "Baydhabo", "Baraawe", "South-West Overall", "Study Overall")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmagainSouthWest2Yr2 <- egmagainSouthWestYr2
egmagainSouthWest2Yr2$Label <- NULL
egmagainSouthWest2Yr2$x_pos <- NULL
egmagainSouthWest2FlexYr2 <- flextable(egmagainSouthWest2Yr2)

ggplotegmagainSouthWestYr2 <- ggplot(egmagainSouthWestYr2) + 
    geom_segment( aes(x=District, xend=District, y=`Baseline`, yend=`Endline`), color = "black") + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Baseline`, color="Baseline"), size=5) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=District, y=`Endline`, color="Endline"), size=5) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	theme_light() + labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="Year 2") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())

## arrange ggplots
grid.arrange(ggplotegmagainSouthWestYr1, ggplotegmagainSouthWestYr2,
                ncol = 2, widths=c(1,1), 				top=textGrob("South-West EGMA Score Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Gains table for SouthWest by school Year 2}

## merge year 1 and year 2 for SouthWest
egmagainSouthWestCombined <- merge(egmagainSouthWest2Yr1, egmagainSouthWest2Yr2, by.x="District", by.y="District", all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

colnames(egmagainSouthWestCombined) <- c('District', 'Year 1\nBaseline Score', 'Year 1\nEndline Score', 'Year 1\n% Score Gain', 'Year 2\nBaseline Score', 'Year 2\nEndline Score', 'Year 2\n% Score Gain')

egmagainSouthWestCombined[,2] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,2], 0)
egmagainSouthWestCombined[,3] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,3], 0)
egmagainSouthWestCombined[,4] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,4], 0)
egmagainSouthWestCombined[,5] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,5], 0)
egmagainSouthWestCombined[,6] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,6], 0)
egmagainSouthWestCombined[,7] <- specify_decimal(egmagainSouthWestCombined[,7], 0)

egmagainSouthWestCombined <- egmagainSouthWestCombined[c(4,3,1,2,5),]

## create flextables from combined dataframe
set_flextable_defaults(theme_fun = theme_booktabs)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- flextable(egmagainSouthWestCombined)

std_border <- fp_border(color = "black")

## set format of flextables
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- add_header_row(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined,  values = c('South-West EGMA Median Scores'), colwidths=c(7), top=TRUE)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- bold(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, part="header", bold=TRUE)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- autofit(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- height(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, height = 0.08)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=1, 1.2)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=2, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=3, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=4, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=5, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=6, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- width(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=7, 0.9)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9, part = "body")
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- fontsize(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, i=NULL, j=NULL, size = 9.5, part = "header")
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- align(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, align="right", i=NULL, j=2:7, part="all")
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- bg(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, i = 2, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- bg(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, i = 4, bg="#EFEFEF", part = "body")

flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=4)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=7)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- vline(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, j=1)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- vline_left(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, border = std_border)
flexegmagainSouthWestCombined <- border_outer(flexegmagainSouthWestCombined, part = "all", border = std_border)
```

<br/>

`r flexegmagainSouthWestCombined`

<br/>

#### State of South-West EGMA Subsection Results

The dumbbell figures below show the EGMA subsection median gains from Level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 1 by South-West Schools for all Longitudinal students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = BWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaBL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaBL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL1Subsection <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =MNumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = MNumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = MMissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = MAddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = MAddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = MSubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = MSubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Word Problems' = MWordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 <- egmaEL1Subsection %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- egmaEL1Subsectionpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2)
egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainL1 <- merge(egmaBL1Subsectionpivot2, egmaEL1Subsectionpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainL1$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainL1$Subsection, "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionSouthWestplot <- ggplot(egmagainL1) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) + ylim(0,100) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="South-West Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplot, egmasubsectionSouthWestplot,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.06,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 1 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))
```


<br/>

```{r EGMA Subsection Gains Year 2 by South-West schools for all students dumbbell plot, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.8}
egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWest <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' = BL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = BL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = BL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = BL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = BL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = BL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = BL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = BL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = BL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = BL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot1 <- egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWest %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Baseline')

egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2 <- egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Baseline = round(median(Baseline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2)
egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWest <- BMBL2EL2studentsurveylonglocateMQSouthWestSansOutlier %>% dplyr::select('Number Identification' =EL2NumIdentifyItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Number Discrimination' = EL2NumDiscItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Missing Numbers' = EL2MissNumItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 1' = EL2AddLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Addition Level 2' = EL2AddLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 1' = EL2SubLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Subtraction Level 2' = EL2SubLvl2ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Multiplication' = EL2MultLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n, 'Division' = EL2DivLvl1ItemsCorrectPercent_n,'Word Problems' = EL2WordProbItemsCorrectPercent_n)

egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot1 <- egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWest %>% pivot_longer( cols=c(`Number Identification`, `Number Discrimination`, `Missing Numbers`, `Addition Level 1`, `Addition Level 2`, `Subtraction Level 1`, `Subtraction Level 2`, `Multiplication`, `Division`, `Word Problems`), names_to = 'Subsection', values_to = 'Endline')

egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2 <- egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot1 %>% group_by(Subsection) %>% summarise(Endline = round(median(Endline, na.rm = TRUE), 1))
egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2 <- as.data.frame(egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2)
egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2$Subsection <- sapply(egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2$Subsection, as.factor)

egmagainbyL2SouthWest <- merge(egmaBL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2, egmaEL2SubsectionSouthWestpivot2, by.x=c("Subsection"), by.y=c("Subsection"), all.x=TRUE, all.y=TRUE)

egmagainbyL2SouthWest$Subsection <- fct_relevel(egmagainbyL2SouthWest$Subsection, "Division", "Multiplication", "Subtraction Level 2", "Subtraction Level 1", "Addition Level 2", "Addition Level 1", "Missing Numbers", "Number Discrimination", "Number Identification", "Word Problems")

lollipopColor <- c("#AF8DC3", "#7FBF7B")
names(lollipopColor) <- c("Baseline", "Endline")

egmasubsectionsSouthWestplotL2 <- ggplot(egmagainbyL2SouthWest) + 
	geom_segment( aes(x=Subsection, xend=Subsection, y=Baseline, yend=Endline)) +
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Baseline, color='Baseline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100), limits = c(0,100)) + 
	geom_point( aes(x=Subsection, y=Endline, color='Endline'), position = position_dodge(.5), size=4) + scale_color_manual(name='', values=lollipopColor, guide = guide_legend()) +
	labs(x=NULL, y=NULL, title="South-West Students") + coord_flip() + theme_light() + theme(axis.title.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(), axis.title.x=element_blank())
		
grid.arrange(egmasubsectionsAllStudyplotL2, egmasubsectionsSouthWestplotL2,
                ncol=2, widths=c(1.06,1), top=textGrob("EGMA Year 2 Subsection Gains", gp=gpar(fontsize=16,font=1)), bottom=textGrob("EGMA Median Score"))	
```

## Appendix D Score cards by School



### Somalia BAB External Evaluation ---- Almawahib School Endline Score Card 

<br/>

```{r Almawahib School demo table, include=TRUE}
AlmawahibSchooltable <- build_table_schoollevel_combo_demo_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginBenaadir, Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionBenaadir,  Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionBenaadir, 'Almawahib', 'Benaadir')

AlmawahibSchooldf <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% filter(SchoolName=='Almawahib')
AlmawahibSchoolLocation <- as.character(AlmawahibSchooldf$LocationTypeDesc_f[[1]])
AlmawahibSchoolProgramTypedf <- AlmawahibSchooldf %>% count(BABProgram_f)
AlmawahibSchoolProgramType <- as.character(AlmawahibSchoolProgramTypedf[,1])
AlmawahibSchoolFundingTypedf <- AlmawahibSchooldf %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
AlmawahibSchoolFundingType <- as.character(AlmawahibSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

* Program Type: `r AlmawahibSchoolProgramType`
* Location Type: `r AlmawahibSchoolLocation`
* Funding Type: `r AlmawahibSchoolFundingType`

<br/>

`r AlmawahibSchooltable`

<br/>

\newpage

#### EGRA and EGMA Total Gains by Level

The dumbbell figures below show the EGRA and EGMA Gains for level 1 on the left and level 2 on the right.  Each figure has the gains in the following order from top to bottom: school level, state level, and totals for all students.  

```{r Almawahib School EGRA Gains by Groups, include=TRUE, fig.width=5.5,  fig.height=3}
AlmawahibSchoolegragainL1plot <- build_dumbbell_EGRAGain_L1_by_school_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, 'Almawahib', 'Benaadir', 'Almawahib School Literacy\n(EGRA) Gains Level 1')

AlmawahibSchoolegragainL2plot <- build_dumbbell_EGRAGain_L2_by_school_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, 'Almawahib', 'Benaadir', 'Almawahib School Literacy\n(EGRA) Gains Level 2')

ggarrange(AlmawahibSchoolegragainL1plot, AlmawahibSchoolegragainL2plot, ncol=2, nrow=1, common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

<br/>

```{r Almawahib School EGMA Gains by Groups, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.5,  fig.height=3}

AlmawahibSchoolegmagainL1plot <- build_dumbbell_EGMAGain_L1_by_school_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, 'Almawahib', 'Benaadir', 'Almawahib School Numeracy\n(EGMA) Gains Level 1')

AlmawahibSchoolegmagainL2plot <- build_dumbbell_EGMAGain_L2_by_school_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedQuadsSansOutlier, 'Almawahib', 'Benaadir', 'Almawahib School Numeracy\n(EGMA) Gains Level 2')

ggarrange(AlmawahibSchoolegmagainL1plot, AlmawahibSchoolegmagainL2plot, ncol=2, nrow=1, common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

\newpage


#### EGRA and EGMA Subsection Gains by Level

The dumbbell figures below show the subsection median gains from level 1 in the first figure and level 2 in the second figure.  Each subsection total has been normalized to have a total of 100 points.  Please note that in the case where only one color dot is visible that is because there was no change in the median score between the baseline and endline.

<br/>

```{r Almawahib School EGRA Level 1 and 2 Subsections by Groups, include=TRUE, fig.width=7.9, fig.height=7}
ggarrange(AlmawahibSchoolegrasubsectionL1plot, AlmawahibSchoolegrasubsectionL2plot, ncol=1, nrow=2, common.legend=TRUE, legend="right")
```

### Somalia BAB External Evaluation ---- Moalim Jama School Endline Score Card 

<br/>

```{r Moalim Jama School demo table, include=TRUE}
MoalimJamaSchooltable <- build_table_schoollevel_combo_demo_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginBenaadir, Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionBenaadir,  Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionBenaadir, 'Moalim Jama', 'Benaadir')

MoalimJamaSchooldf <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierBenaadir %>% filter(SchoolName=='Moalim Jama')
MoalimJamaSchoolLocation <- as.character(MoalimJamaSchooldf$LocationTypeDesc_f[[1]])
MoalimJamaSchoolProgramTypedf <- MoalimJamaSchooldf %>% count(BABProgram_f)
MoalimJamaSchoolProgramType <- as.character(MoalimJamaSchoolProgramTypedf[,1])
MoalimJamaSchoolFundingTypedf <- MoalimJamaSchooldf %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
MoalimJamaSchoolFundingType <- as.character(MoalimJamaSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

* Program Type: `r MoalimJamaSchoolProgramType`
* Location Type: `r MoalimJamaSchoolLocation`
* Funding Type: `r MoalimJamaSchoolFundingType`

<br/>

`r MoalimJamaSchooltable`

<br/>

```{r Kismayo Pri and Sec School demo table, include=TRUE}
KismayoPriandSecSchoolFundingType <- as.character(KismayoPriandSecSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

* Program Type: `r KismayoPriandSecSchoolProgramType`

### Somalia BAB External Evaluation ---- Yontoy Pri School  Endline Score Card 

<br/>

```{r Yontoy Pri School demo table, include=TRUE}
YontoyPriSchooltable <- build_table_schoollevel_combo_demo_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginJubbaland, Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionJubbaland,  Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionJubbaland, 'Yontoy Pri School', 'Jubbaland')

YontoyPriSchooldf <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierJubbaland %>% filter(SchoolName=='Yontoy Pri School')
YontoyPriSchoolLocation <- as.character(YontoyPriSchooldf$LocationTypeDesc_f[[1]])
YontoyPriSchoolProgramTypedf <- YontoyPriSchooldf %>% count(BABProgram_f)
YontoyPriSchoolProgramType <- as.character(YontoyPriSchoolProgramTypedf[,1])
YontoyPriSchoolFundingTypedf <- YontoyPriSchooldf %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
YontoyPriSchoolFundingType <- as.character(YontoyPriSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

* Program Type: `r YontoyPriSchoolProgramType`
* Location Type: `r YontoyPriSchoolLocation`
* Funding Type: `r YontoyPriSchoolFundingType`

<br/>

`r YontoyPriSchooltable`

<br/>

```{r Mustaqbal School demo table, include=TRUE}
MustaqbalSchoolLocation <- as.character(MustaqbalSchooldf$LocationTypeDesc_f[[1]])

MustaqbalSchoolProgramType <- as.character(MustaqbalSchoolProgramTypedf[,1])
MustaqbalSchoolFundingTypedf <- MustaqbalSchooldf %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
MustaqbalSchoolFundingType <- as.character(MustaqbalSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

### Somalia BAB External Evaluation ---- Xudurweyne School Endline Score Card 

<br/>

```{r Xudurweyne School demo table, include=TRUE}
XudurweyneSchooltable <- build_table_schoollevel_combo_demo_function(EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest, EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlier, EndlinestudentsurveyYr1BeginSouthWest, Endlinestudentsurvey2YrRetentionSouthWest,  Endlinestudentsurvey2YrAttritionSouthWest, 'Xudurweyne', 'South-West')

XudurweyneSchooldf <- EndlinestudentsurveyMatchedSansOutlierSouthWest %>% filter(SchoolName=='Xudurweyne')
XudurweyneSchoolLocation <- as.character(XudurweyneSchooldf$LocationTypeDesc_f[[1]])
XudurweyneSchoolProgramTypedf <- XudurweyneSchooldf %>% count(BABProgram_f)
XudurweyneSchoolProgramType <- as.character(XudurweyneSchoolProgramTypedf[,1])
XudurweyneSchoolFundingTypedf <- XudurweyneSchooldf %>% count(FundingTypeDesc_f)
XudurweyneSchoolFundingType <- as.character(XudurweyneSchoolFundingTypedf[,1])
```

* Program Type: `r XudurweyneSchoolProgramType`
* Location Type: `r XudurweyneSchoolLocation`
* Funding Type: `r XudurweyneSchoolFundingType`

<br/>

`r XudurweyneSchooltable`

<br/>


\newpage
